title: Enterprise Architect (TOGAF 9.x)
label: HOT
reasons:
- Competitive salary package
- Comprehensive health and accident insurance
- Full salary during probation
jobDescription:
Định hình và quản trị kiến trúc công nghệ tổng thể cho hệ sinh thái Galaxy Holdings và các công ty thành viên (Galaxy Pay, Galaxy One, Galaxy Technology, Galaxy Joy, FinOS...).

Đảm bảo sự nhất quán, khả năng mở rộng và tích hợp liền mạch giữa các nền tảng số phục vụ chiến lược chuyển đổi số của Tập đoàn SOVICO.

TRÁCH NHIỆM CHÍNH

- Xây dựng và duy trì Enterprise Architecture Blueprint (Business, Application, Data, Technology layers) theo chuẩn TOGAF/Zachman cho toàn bộ hệ sinh thái Galaxy Holdings
- Thiết kế kiến trúc tham chiếu (Reference Architecture) cho các domain: Fintech, Aviation, Logistics, Hospitality, Banking phù hợp với hệ sinh thái SOVICO
- Đánh giá và quyết định công nghệ nền tảng (Technology Stack), đảm bảo tính nhất quán và tái sử dụng across các công ty thành viên
- Xây dựng chiến lược tích hợp hệ thống (Integration Strategy) giữa các đơn vị: Galaxy Pay, Galaxy Joy, Galaxy One, FinOS, Galaxy Connect
- Thiết lập Architecture Governance Framework, review và phê duyệt kiến trúc cho các dự án lớn
- Tư vấn chiến lược chuyển đổi số, đánh giá Application Portfolio và xây dựng lộ trình hiện đại hóa (Legacy Modernization)
- Xây dựng tiêu chuẩn API, Event-Driven Architecture và Microservices cho toàn hệ sinh thái
- Làm việc chặt chẽ với C-level, Business Leaders và Product Teams để align công nghệ với mục tiêu kinh doanh
requirements:
- Tối thiểu 12 năm kinh nghiệm trong lĩnh vực CNTT, trong đó ít nhất 5 năm ở vai trò Enterprise/Solution Architect
- Chứng chỉ TOGAF 9.x (bắt buộc); các chứng chỉ AWS/Azure/GCP Solutions Architect Professional là lợi thế lớn
- Kinh nghiệm thực tế thiết kế kiến trúc cho hệ thống quy mô lớn (multi-BU, multi-domain) với hàng triệu người dùng
- Am hiểu sâu về Microservices, Event-Driven Architecture, API Gateway, Service Mesh, Domain-Driven Design (DDD)
- Kinh nghiệm với Cloud-native Architecture (AWS/Azure/GCP), Hybrid Cloud và Multi-cloud Strategy
- Hiểu biết về các ngành: Fintech, Banking, Aviation, Digital Commerce là lợi thế đặc biệt
- Kỹ năng communication xuất sắc, có khả năng trình bày kiến trúc phức tạp cho cả đối tượng kỹ thuật và phi kỹ thuật
- Tiếng Anh thành thạo (đọc, viết, giao tiếp kỹ thuật)

ƯU TIÊN / LỢI THẾ

- Kinh nghiệm làm việc tại các tập đoàn đa ngành (conglomerate) hoặc công ty công nghệ quy mô lớn
- Hiểu biết về ArchiMate, Business Capability Modeling, Value Stream Mapping
- Kinh nghiệm với Digital Twin, IoT Architecture cho ngành logistics/aviation
benefits:
- Mức lương cạnh tranh top thị trường, thưởng hiệu suất hấp dẫn
- Bảo hiểm sức khỏe cao cấp cho bản thân và gia đình; khám sức khỏe định kỳ hàng năm
- Cơ hội phát triển trong hệ sinh thái đa ngành SOVICO: Hàng không (Vietjet), Tài chính (HDBank), Công nghệ, Bất động sản, Nghỉ dưỡng
- Đào tạo chuyên sâu, hỗ trợ chứng chỉ quốc tế và tham gia hội nghị công nghệ trong và ngoài nước
- Môi trường làm việc hiện đại, linh hoạt (hybrid work), văn hóa đổi mới sáng tạo

title: AI Solutions Architect (Transformation Lead)
label: HOT
reasons:
- Inspired Leadership Team and Talented Colleagues
- Attractive Salary and Benefits
- Hybrid mode available and flexible working time
jobDescription:
AI-Native Engineering Practice - Technical Ownership:

- Own and continuously evolve KMS's AI-native SDLC operating model at KMS: agent workflow designs, verification gates, context management standards, and eval frameworks
- Build and lead multi-agent systems using orchestration layers such as Claude Code, GitHub Copilot Workspace, Cursor, LangGraph, CrewAI, or equivalent — from prototype to production
- In collaboration with the Director of Engineering, contribute to and help maintain KMS's AI toolchain selection criteria — evaluating tools with engineering rigor, not hype — and publishing internal guidance on when AI helps and when it hurts
- Establish prompt engineering standards, agent evaluation (evals) loops, and AI output quality gates across the delivery organization

Capability & Standards Leadership

- Prior experience in a lead, principal, or staff engineer role with demonstrated cross-team influence
- Experience in outsourcing, consulting, or multi-client delivery environments
- Track record of building or leading an internal community of practice, guild, or AI adoption program
- Develop and continuously evolve KMS's AI-native SDLC playbook — standards, workflow templates, case studies, and guardrails that delivery teams can adopt immediately
- Design and lead internal upskilling programs (workshops, pairing) that move engineers from AI-assisted to AI-native working patterns
- Track the AI capability frontier — model improvements, new agent frameworks, emerging risks — and translate signals into timely updates to KMS's practices

Client Delivery

- Work closely alongside KMS Delivery Teams — as an AI transformation advisor and execution partner — identifying the highest-value automation opportunities across the SDLC and coordinating with the team to bring them to life
- Design and deploy agent-orchestrated workflows tailored to each client's stack, team maturity, and delivery context — with measurable ROI
- Build business cases for AI-native adoption with clients and account managers, framing the value in terms of velocity, quality, and cost
- Represent KMS's AI-native engineering capabilities in client conversations, QBRs, and RFP responses — acting as a credible technical authority
requirements:
Core Engineering Foundation

- 8+ years of professional software engineering, with a proven track record of leading technical initiatives that span multiple teams or systems
- Deep hands-on experience across the full SDLC: from requirements and architecture through testing, deployment, and production operations
- Demonstrated ability to lead technical direction — setting standards, reviewing architecture decisions, and influencing without direct authority
- Strong command of software architecture principles: system decomposition, API design, scalability, observability, and failure mode reasoning
- Proficiency in at least one primary language: Python, TypeScript/JavaScript, Java, .Net or Go — with experience across multiple layers of the stack

AI & Agentic Systems Fluency

- Proven, production-grade experience with AI coding agents as a core part of your daily workflow
- Strong understanding of LLM API integration in production: context window management, latency and cost tradeoffs, model selection criteria, fallback strategies, and output reliability patterns
- Experience or strong interest in multi-agent orchestration patterns: task decomposition, agent communication, tool use, memory, and eval loops
- Working knowledge of RAG architectures, embedding strategies, and how to ground AI agents in domain-specific, proprietary knowledge bases
- Ability to design and run AI evals: you can define quality metrics, build evaluation datasets, detect regressions, and use quantitative signals to improve agent behaviour over time

Nice to have

- Experience with agentic frameworks: LangGraph, CrewAI, AutoGen, or similar orchestration patterns
- MLOps knowledge: model deployment, monitoring, drift detection, A/B testing in production
- Proficient daily use of AI coding tools (Copilot, Cursor, Claude Code) across the full SDLC
- Able to decompose complex tasks, provide effective context, and apply chain-of-thought and multi-step prompting workflows
- Experience with agentic workflows and AI-driven development frameworks
- Hands-on experience integrating AI tools with other systems via MCP (Model Context Protocol) or equivalent
- Awareness of emerging AI tools and willingness to evaluate and adopt new capabilities
benefits:
Perks You'll Enjoy

- Working in one of the Best Places to Work in Vietnam
- Building large-scale & global software products
- Working & growing with Passionate & Talented Team
- Diverse career opportunities with Software Services, Software Product Development, IT Solutions & Consulting
- Flexible working time
- Various training on hot-trend technologies, best practices and soft skills
- Company trip, big year-end party, team building, etc.
- Fitness & sport activities: football, tennis, table tennis, badminton, yoga, swimming…
- Joining community development activities: 1% Pledge, charity every quarter, blood donation, public seminars, career orientation talks,…
- Free in-house entertainment facilities (foosball, ping pong, gym…), coffee, and snacks (instant noodles, cookies, candies…)

And much more, join us and let yourself explore other fantastic things!

jobDescription:
OVERVIEW OF GPBANK

GPBank is a member of the VPBank Group ecosystem, transferred under a mandatory restructuring from a “zero-dong” bank model. It is also the first bank in Vietnam to achieve profitability within only five months after the transfer under VPBank’s management — a remarkable milestone demonstrating outstanding restructuring and governance capabilities.

JOB RESPONSIBILITIES

- Define and manage the product backlog for digital platforms (e.g., Internet Banking, Mobile Banking, eKYC, RM tools) and internal operational systems (e.g., BPM, ECM, DMS)
- Prioritize backlog items based on business value, user experience, and urgency aligned with the bank’s digital transformation strategy.
- Collaborate closely with Business Unit, BAs, Developers, QA, and DevOps to ensure timely and high-quality delivery of digital solutions.
- Actively participate in Agile ceremonies such as Sprint Planning, Daily Stand-ups, Grooming, and Retrospectives to maintain alignment and agility.
- Act as the central contact point for clarifying business requirements and coordinating issue resolution during development, testing, and deployment phases.
- Communicate effectively with business units, operations, testing teams, partners, and other stakeholders to ensure aligned expectations and execution.
- Gather and manage feedback from end users and business units, updating the backlog accordingly.
- Monitor post-release performance of digital platforms, including usage metrics, error rates, and actual user experience.
requirements:
JOB REQUIREMENTS

- Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Mathematics, or related field of study: or equivalent education, training & experience
- Candidates with relevant international certifications are preferred, such as:+ PSPO I/CSPO (Professional Scrum Product Owner)+ PMI-ACP (Agile Certified Practitioner)+ CBAP (Certified Business Analysis Professional)+ PMP (Project Management Professional)
- Minimum of 8-10 years of experience in a BA/IT PO role, including at least 5 years as a Product Owner for IT products in the banking or financial sector.
- Solid understanding of digital banking platforms such as Internet Banking, Mobile Banking, eKYC, Digital Onboarding, RM/Branch tools, Self-Service Banking, BPM/Workflow systems, and ECM/DMS...
- Good knowledge of banking operations, business process flows, and approval procedures—especially in digital channels and back-office domains.
- Ability to define product goals, identify MVP, manage backlog, and track delivery with ownership.
- Preferred: knowledge or hands-on experience with enabling technologies such as RPA, OCR, Chatbot, e-Signature, or third-party digital service integration (Open API).
benefits:
BENEFITS

- Competitive salary package 16 months/year. (~58-62M Gross/months)
- Opportunity to participate in billion-dollar transformation projects, building and developing end-to-end FULL CLOUD SERVICES, supporting the implementation of New Core, New Card, Payment systems, and fully digital SME banking.
- Full benefits including Social Insurance, Health Insurance, Accident Insurance, and Personal Healthcare Insurance (Bao Viet Gold healthcare package covering both inpatient and outpatient services).
- Provided with full working equipment: laptop, PC, and uniform.
- Entitled to standard benefits such as annual company trips, lunch allowance, birthday benefits, wedding/funeral support, and training/certification sponsorship.
- Holiday bonuses on National Day (Sep 2), Reunification Day (Apr 30), Hung Kings’ Festival, International Women’s Day (Mar 8), Vietnamese Women’s Day (Oct 20), and New Year.
- Access to various sports clubs and wellness activities (running, badminton, pickleball, football, yoga, etc.).
- Preferential interest rates for housing loans, car loans, personal loans, overdraft facilities, and employee loan programs.

WORKING HOURS/LOCTIONS

- Flexible working schedule with no time tracking; employees can choose from 3 shifts: 8:00 – 17:30, 8:30 – 18:00, or 9:00 – 18:30. Lunch break from 12:00 – 13:30 (1.5 hours).
- Working days: Monday to Friday, plus 2 Saturday mornings per month (remote work allowed).
- Location: 18 Pham Hung, Tu Liem, Hanoi

CONTACT/APPLY: Ms Phuong Anh HR (Phone/Zalo Email: )

jobDescription:
Giới thiệu công ty:

Công ty Cổ Phần Công Nghệ Bách Việt (Bavitech Corporation) hoạt động trong lĩnh vực kỹ thuật điện, đo lường và tự động hóa, cung cấp các giải pháp công nghệ phục vụ sản xuất và vận hành.

Chúng tôi là đối tác đáng tin cậy trong tích hợp hệ thống, đồng hành cùng nhiều khách hàng trong và ngoài nước. Tại Bavitech, chúng tôi không chỉ cung cấp thiết bị mà còn tập trung xây dựng giải pháp phần mềm & hệ thống thông minh, kết hợp với hỗ trợ kỹ thuật nhanh chóng, nhằm tạo ra giá trị bền vững cho khách hàng.

Vị trí công việc:

Bạn sẽ tham gia trực tiếp vào việc xây dựng các ứng dụng web phục vụ hệ thống công nghiệp và vận hành thực tế – nơi code không chỉ chạy, mà còn tạo ra tác động rõ ràng đến doanh nghiệp.

- Phát triển và maintain các ứng dụng web trong hệ thống dự án
- Tham gia xây dựng, cải tiến các sản phẩm phần mềm nội bộ
- Phối hợp cùng team kỹ thuật để triển khai giải pháp cho khách hàng
- Nghiên cứu công nghệ mới và đề xuất cải tiến hệ thống
- Hỗ trợ xử lý các vấn đề kỹ thuật trong quá trình vận hành
requirements:
Yêu cầu:

1. Học vấn & Chứng chỉ:

- Tốt nghiệp Cao đẳng/Đại học chuyên ngành CNTT, Phần mềm hoặc có các chứng chỉ lập trình IT uy tín.

2. Kỹ năng chuyên môn (Có kiến thức, kinh nghiệm trong các mảng sau):

- Có kiến thức hoặc kinh nghiệm với các nhóm công nghệ:Web Backend: .NET / ASP.NET MVC / Web Services / NodeJSWeb Frontend: JavaScript, HTML5, CSSDatabase: Có kiến thức hoặc kinh nghiệm làm việc với SQL Server, MySQL, Oracle...
- Web Backend: .NET / ASP.NET MVC / Web Services / NodeJS
- Web Frontend: JavaScript, HTML5, CSS
- Database: Có kiến thức hoặc kinh nghiệm làm việc với SQL Server, MySQL, Oracle...
- Tư duy logic tốt, chủ động học hỏi và có trách nhiệm trong công việc

Ưu Tiên (Lợi thế):

- Kinh nghiệm làm việc với các Framework hiện đại: ReactJS, Angular, Bootstrap, Kendo UI.
- Am hiểu về lập trình Mobile: ReactNative hoặc Flutter.
- Có kinh nghiệm với NoSQL (MongoDB).
- Hiểu biết về hệ thống thông tin địa lý (GIS) là một lợi thế lớn.

3. Chào đón ứng viên ở mọi cấp độ (Fresher - Junior - Senior)

- Fresher: Có nền tảng cơ bản, sẽ được training và mentor
- Junior: Có thể làm việc độc lập với các task cơ bản
- Senior: Có kinh nghiệm dự án, khả năng thiết kế & dẫn dắt kỹ thuật
benefits:
- Mức lương: Cạnh tranh, thỏa thuận trực tiếp dựa trên năng lực
- Đào tạo: Fresher: Được dẫn dắt bởi các Senior dày dặn kinh nghiệm, lộ trình đào tạo bài bản về Tech stack và quy trình dự án thực tế.Senior: Cơ hội làm chủ công nghệ, dẫn dắt đội ngũ và tham gia vào các quyết định kiến trúc hệ thống.
- Fresher: Được dẫn dắt bởi các Senior dày dặn kinh nghiệm, lộ trình đào tạo bài bản về Tech stack và quy trình dự án thực tế.
- Senior: Cơ hội làm chủ công nghệ, dẫn dắt đội ngũ và tham gia vào các quyết định kiến trúc hệ thống.
- Chế độ phúc lợi: Đảm bảo đầy đủ quyền lợi theo Luật lao động (BHXH, BHYT, BHTN).
- Môi trường: Làm việc trong lĩnh vực Tự động hóa công nghệ cao, trẻ trung, năng động và giàu tính sáng tạo.

title: Senior Fullstack Developer (.NET/ Blazor/C#) - Up $3000
label: HOT
reasons:
- Flexible Work from Home.
- Opportunity to improve English skills.
- Attractive Salary and Benefits.
jobDescription:
This position is for a Senior Fullstack Developer (.NET, Blazor or HTMX) to join our CodeHQ Vietnam team in HCMC (Quan 12).

We have two upcoming projects you may find interesting: a Medical Management platform and a Transport & Logistics system. You will be working on web applications that require strong .NET skills along with modern frontend experience in either Blazor or HTMX. Experience with cloud technologies will also be advantageous.

Our team practices agentic AI-assisted development using tools like GitHub Copilot Enterprise and Claude Code, combined with Domain-Driven Design (DDD), Behaviour-Driven Development (BDD), Test-Driven Development (TDD), and end-to-end testing with Playwright.
requirements:
Essential dev skills:

- Strong .NET Core, C# and Web API
- Strong experience with Blazor (Server and/or WebAssembly) or HTMX
- Database design and optimization (SQL Server, PostgreSQL, or MySQL)
- Microservices architecture and cloud platforms (Azure, AWS, or Google Cloud)
- Unit and integration testing
- APIs
- Experience working with AI-related technologies or integrations
- Familiarity with agentic AI development workflows (e.g., using agents in GitHub Copilot Enterprise, Claude Code)
- It would be helpful to have hands-on experience with DDD, BDD, TDD, and/or Playwright for end-to-end testing
- Good understanding of the Agile/Scrum development methodology

Preferred dev skills:

- Experience with Docker, Kubernetes, or CI/CD pipelines
- Knowledge of authentication and security best practices (OAuth, JWT, Identity Server)
- Prior work in healthcare, logistics, or other regulated/operationally complex domains

Essential soft skills:

- Good English communication skills, both verbal and written. IELTS certification preferred.
- Strong team player, positive attitude, and professionalism.
- 5+ years’ practical experience in designing, developing and delivering commercial software applications
- Experience with working with overseas customers.

Interviews are online or optionally at our CodeHQ office in QTSC, District 12.
benefits:
At CodeHQ, building great software is all about people who understand and care about the problem, who love collaborating and take pride in getting it done. We all know how important it is to be a part of our clients’ cultures and how we can add to it.

We have some amazing customers you’ll get to work with, and no two days are ever the same. We enjoy the cultural diversity of our Vietnam and New Zealand offices, always celebrating success and recognising those that go above and beyond the norm.

Apply today to join our winning team for:

- 14-day annual leave and 4-day sick leave
- 13th-month bonus
- Lunch allowance
- Attractive Salary, reviewed twice a year
- Hybrid work model – work from home or office
- Bao Viet accident & healthcare insurance
- English training programme and practical use with NZ colleagues and customers.
- Access to premium learning and development resources
- Modern office space, well equipped including fully-stocked pantry
- Cash gifts for special occasions including Tet holiday, Vietnam National Day and Liberation Day.
- Team vacation trip, team building activities, and monthly happy hour.
- Plus much more.

title: Chuyên gia an ninh mạng (Cybersecurity, Networking)
company: Trung tâm công nghệ thông tin MobiFone
label: SUPER HOT
reasons:
- Môi trường làm việc năng động, chuyên nghiệp
- Cơ hội thăng tiến cao trong công việc
- Chế độ đãi ngộ và phúc lợi tốt
jobDescription:
1. Nghiên cứu, đề xuất xây dựng kiến trúc an ninh mạng: Nghiên cứu, đề xuấtthiết kế và triển khai các kiến trúc bảo mật cho hệ thống CNTT và các hệ thống tuân thủ các chuẩn bảo mật của Việt Nam.

2. Giám sát và phát hiện tấn công: Triển khai và vận hành các hệ thống giám sát an ninh mạng (Security Monitoring) để phát hiện sớm các dấu hiệu tấn công hoặc hành vi bất thường trong hệ thống.

3. Triển khai và vận hành các giải pháp an toàn thông tin: Triển khai và vận hành các giải pháp hệ thống an toàn thông tin đảm bảo hệ thống CNTT, dữ liệu và hạ tầng mạng.

4. Phân tích và xử lý sự cố an ninh: Thực hiện điều tra và xử lý các sự cố an ninh mạng (Incident Response), bao gồm: phân tích log hệ thống, phân tích malware, điều tra tấn công APT, khôi phục hệ thống sau sự cố.

5. Đánh giá lỗ hổng và kiểm thử bảo mật:

- Thực hiện đánh giá an ninh hệ thống và Phối hợp với đội phát triển phần mềm để khắc phục lỗ hổng bảo mật trong hệ thống và ứng dụng.

6. Hợp tác giữa các phòng ban

- Phối hợp với các đội ngũ CNTT, DevOps, Phát triển phần mềm, Vận hành hệ thống để đảm bảo các giải pháp CNTT được triển khai theo tiêu chuẩn bảo mật.
- Tham gia tư vấn cho ban lãnh đạo về chiến lược an toàn thông tin và quản trị rủi ro CNTT.

7. Nghiên cứu và cải tiến: Theo dõi các xu hướng tấn công mạng mới và nghiên cứu và áp dụng các công nghệ mới nhằm nâng cao năng lực phòng thủ an ninh mạng cho doanh nghiệp.
requirements:
1. Kinh nghiệm chuyên môn:

- Có tối thiểu 5 năm kinh nghiệm trong lĩnh vực an ninh mạng hoặc an toàn thông tin tại các tập đoàn, doanh nghiệp CNTT tại Việt Nam. Ưu tiên ứng viên đã tham gia thiết kế hoặc triển khai các hệ thống bảo mật cho các hạ tầng CNTT lớn, hệ thống ngân hàng, hệ thống chính phủ hoặc doanh nghiệp công nghệ.
- Có kinh nghiệm triển khai hoặc vận hành các hệ thống bảo mật như: Firewall, SIEM/SOAR, IDS/IPS, SOC, Endpoint Security, WAF, DLP, PAM/VPN, DBFW…

2. Kỹ năng kỹ thuật:

- Ứng viên có hiểu biết về bảo mật mạng (Network Security), bảo mật hệ thống (System Security), bảo mật ứng dụng (Application Security), bảo mật đám mây (Cloud Security) và thành thạo các công cụ bảo mật phổ biến như: SIEM/SOAR, vulnerability scanner, network monitoring tools, malware analysis tools….
- Có kinh nghiệm làm việc với các hệ thống: Linux, Windows Server, Network infrastructure, Cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP) là lợi thế.

3. Kỹ năng hạ tầng

- Ứng viên có hiểu biết về các công nghệ hạ tầng CNTT như: container và Kubernetes, hệ thống mạng doanh nghiệp, hệ thống lưu trữ dữ liệu, kiến trúc microservices và cloud-native.
- Có kinh nghiệm xây dựng các mô hình bảo mật như: Zero Trust Architecture, Secure DevOps (DevSecOps) là lợi thế.

4. Kỹ năng phân tích

- Có tư duy phân tích, khả năng phát hiện và đánh giá rủi ro bảo mật.
- Có khả năng điều tra và phân tích các sự cố an ninh mạng phức tạp.

5. Yêu cầu khác:

- Kỹ năng giao tiếp và trình bày tốt, có khả năng giải thích các vấn đề kỹ thuật cho lãnh đạo và đối tác không chuyên về CNTT.
- Có khả năng làm việc độc lập, đồng thời phối hợp tốt với các nhóm kỹ thuật khác.
- Tiếng Anh tốt để đọc tài liệu kỹ thuật và trao đổi chuyên môn quốc tế.

6. Trình độ chuyên môn

- Tốt nghiệp Đại học trở lên chuyên ngành: An toàn thông tin/Công nghệ thông tin/Khoa học máy tính/Hệ thống thông tin hoặc các ngành liên quan.
- Ưu tiên ứng viên có: Thạc sĩ/Tiến sĩ về an ninh mạng và các chứng chỉ quốc tế như: CISSP, CISM, CEH, OSCP, Security+, AWS Security Specialty,…
benefits:
Thu nhập cạnh tranh: Mức lương và thưởng hấp dẫn, thỏa thuận dựa trên năng lực và kết quả.

Chế độ phúc lợi: Đầy đủ BHXH, BHYT, BHTN theo Luật Lao động, kèm bảo hiểm sức khỏe nâng cao. Chế độ nghỉ phép, nghỉ lễ theo quy định, cộng thêm các phúc lợi nội bộ (du lịch, teambuilding, hội thao, v.v.).

Môi trường làm việc:

- Được trang bị công cụ, phần mềm, nền tảng công nghệ hiện đại để phát triển sản phẩm.
- Được tham gia vào các chương trình đào tạo và phát triển chuyên môn (workshop, đào tạo nội bộ, học tập công nghệ mới), có chính sách khen thưởng, hỗ trợ chi phí học tập các chứng chỉ quốc tế tế cao cấp/chứng chỉ chuyên môn cao cấp.
- Cơ hội làm việc với các dự án B2G quy mô lớn, cung cấp sản phẩm, dịch vụ hoặc giải pháp cho các cơ quan, tổ chức chính phủ, tiếp cận những xu hướng công nghệ/nền tảng mới nhất.
- Môi trường trẻ trung, năng động, minh bạch, văn hóa làm việc chuyên nghiệp, nhiều cơ hội hợp tác với đối tác chiến lược, tập đoàn công nghệ trong và ngoài nước.

reasons:

jobDescription:
Tổng quan: Xây dựng hệ thống backend nhằm cung cấp các năng lực phần mềm triển khai kết nối qua kênh web và mobile cho Công ty cũng như phục vụ đối tác kết nối.

1. Thiết kế & phát triển hệ thống phần mềm

- Dựa trên bài toán nghiệp vụ, tiến hành thiết kế và phân rã các module, chức năng của ứng dụng và phân việc cho các thành viên trong team hoàn thành công việc của mình.

- Phối hợp xây dựng ứng dụng front-end trên nền tảng web.
- Xây dựng tích hơp với các API của hệ thống middleware để đảm bảo luồng tương tác end-2-end.

2. Hỗ trợ việc chuyển giao ứng dụng

- Đào tạo/chuyển giao cho khách hàng/đối tác và các đơn vị liên quan về hệ thống phần mềm được xây dựng/triển khai.

3. Xử lý các lỗi, sự cố phát sinh của hệ thống:

requirements:
1. Trình độ Học vấn

- Tốt nghiệp đại học các trường chuyên ngành công nghệ thông tin (CNTT)

jobDescription:
Mục tiêu vị trí: Phát triển và triển khai các hệ thống AI/LLM vào sản phẩm thực tế của công ty như AI CRM, chatbot, hệ thống hỏi đáp tài liệu và AI tự động hóa quy trình; đảm bảo hệ thống hoạt động ổn định, dễ mở rộng, kiểm soát tốt chất lượng đầu ra, tốc độ phản hồi và chi phí vận hành.

Mô tả công việc:

- Trực tiếp phát triển backend và các thành phần AI cho sản phẩm như chatbot, RAG, AI xử lý tài liệu, AI workflow và automation.
- Xây dựng các service/API phục vụ tích hợp AI vào website, CRM, hệ thống nội bộ và các nền tảng liên quan.
- Phát triển các pipeline xử lý dữ liệu, retrieval, orchestration, evaluation và monitoring cho hệ thống AI.
- Tham gia thiết kế giải pháp kỹ thuật phù hợp với yêu cầu sản phẩm, bảo đảm hiệu năng, độ ổn định, bảo mật và khả năng mở rộng.
- Đề xuất hướng triển khai phù hợp giữa prompting, RAG, workflow AI, model routing hoặc các giải pháp liên quan tùy bài toán thực tế.
- Tích hợp các mô hình AI/LLM, công cụ xử lý dữ liệu và các hệ thống backend vào sản phẩm đang vận hành.
- Theo dõi và cải thiện chất lượng hệ thống AI dựa trên các chỉ số như độ chính xác, độ trễ phản hồi, tỷ lệ lỗi, chi phí sử dụng và trải nghiệm người dùng.
- Chủ động phân tích nguyên nhân khi hệ thống AI hoạt động chưa đạt kỳ vọng; đề xuất và triển khai hướng khắc phục.
- Phối hợp với các bộ phận Business, Product, Backend, Frontend, Data và DevOps để triển khai giải pháp AI vào môi trường thực tế.
- Viết tài liệu kỹ thuật, mô tả luồng xử lý, đầu vào – đầu ra, giới hạn hệ thống và các lưu ý vận hành.
requirements:
Yêu cầu bắt buộc

- Có từ 4 năm kinh nghiệm phát triển phần mềm, trong đó có kinh nghiệm làm việc thực tế với AI/ML/LLM/NLP.
- Thành thạo Python.
- Có nền tảng tốt về backend, API, xử lý dữ liệu và tư duy thiết kế hệ thống.
- Đã từng tham gia triển khai ít nhất 1 hệ thống AI/LLM vào môi trường vận hành thực tế.
- Có kinh nghiệm thực tế với ít nhất 2 trong các nhóm sau: LLM / chatbot / RAG AI workflow / automation pipeline dữ liệu / retrieval / vector database evaluation / monitoring / observability cloud deployment
- LLM / chatbot / RAG
- AI workflow / automation
- pipeline dữ liệu / retrieval / vector database
- evaluation / monitoring / observability
- cloud deployment
- Có khả năng làm việc độc lập, chủ động bám việc đến cùng.
- Có tư duy cân đối giữa chất lượng – tốc độ – chi phí – rủi ro – khả năng mở rộng trong quá trình triển khai.
- Có khả năng đọc hiểu bài toán nghiệp vụ và chuyển hóa thành giải pháp kỹ thuật khả thi.

Ưu tiên

- Từng triển khai AI cho CRM, chatbot CSKH, kho tri thức nội bộ, xử lý tài liệu hoặc tự động hóa quy trình.
- Có kinh nghiệm với FastAPI, Django, Flask hoặc các framework backend tương đương.
- Có kinh nghiệm với vector database, Redis, queue, logging, monitoring.
- Có kinh nghiệm với AWS / GCP / Azure.
- Từng làm việc trong môi trường phối hợp giữa Business – Product – Tech.
- Có tư duy tối ưu latency, token cost, quality và reliability trong môi trường vận hành thực tế.
- Có khả năng viết tài liệu kỹ thuật rõ ràng, mạch lạc.
benefits:

- Tham gia xây dựng AI CRM lõi và các sản phẩm AI ứng dụng trực tiếp cho khách hàng/doanh nghiệp.
- Được tham gia vào các bài toán thực tế về chatbot, knowledge base, document AI và workflow automation.
- Có cơ hội làm việc trực tiếp với đội ngũ xây sản phẩm, được trao quyền chủ động trong phạm vi chuyên môn.
- Được trang bị công cụ phục vụ công việc như GPT Pro và các tài khoản cần thiết cho quá trình nghiên cứu, phát triển.
- Tham gia đầy đủ các chế độ BHXH, BHYT, BHTN theo quy định.
- Thưởng Lễ, Tết, lương tháng 13 và các chế độ phúc lợi nội bộ khác.
- Môi trường làm việc thân thiện, chuyên nghiệp, đề cao năng lực, hiệu suất và tinh thần chủ động.

title: Principal Architect (AI)
label: HOT
jobDescription:
We are seeking a Principal Architect to define and own the architecture of our Unified Edge AI Engine. In this role, you will design the software backbone that orchestrates the entire lifecycle of video analytics on embedded hardware.

You will act as the bridge between Systems Engineering and AI Research. Your mission is to build a modular, graph-based execution engine that balances massive data throughput with limited compute resources, enabling advanced AI models (optimized via quantization/pruning) to run in real-time across diverse hardware platforms.

Scope of Responsibilities/Expectations:

- Pipeline Engine Architecture: Architect a modular, high-throughput Video & AI Pipeline Engine. Design the framework for dynamic graph construction (DAG) where AI models, logic nodes, and image processing blocks can be assembled and executed efficiently.
- Heterogeneous Resource Orchestration: Design the scheduling logic to balance workloads across CPU, GPU, DSP, and NPU. manage critical system bottlenecks such as PCIe Bandwidth, Memory Bandwidth, and Thermal constraints to prevent system stalls.
- AI Optimization Strategy: Define the architectural support for Model Quantization (INT8/FP16) and Network Pruning. Ensure the engine can natively handle optimized model formats, managing the trade-off between inference speed, memory footprint, and accuracy.
- Memory & Data Flow Design: Architect zero-copy data transport mechanisms (DMA, Shared Memory, Ring Buffers) to pass high-resolution video frames and tensor data between pipeline stages without CPU intervention.
- Scalability & Abstraction: Create a hardware-agnostic Abstraction Layer (HAL) that allows the engine to scale from low-power cameras to high-performance AI processors with minimal code changes.
requirements:
- System Architecture: Mastery of Modern C++ (14/17/20) and architectural patterns for high-concurrency, real-time systems. Deep understanding of Producer-Consumer models, Lock-free queues, and multi-threaded synchronization.
- AI Model Optimization: Strong knowledge of techniques to reduce model complexity: Quantization (PTQ/QAT), Weight Pruning, and Knowledge Distillation. Experience integrating these optimized models into C++ runtimes (e.g., TensorRT, SNPE/QNN, OpenVINO).
- Hardware Intimacy: Deep understanding of SoC architectures (Qualcomm, Ambarella, NVIDIA). Ability to analyze how Cache Coherency, Bus Arbitration, and Memory Controllers impact AI performance.
- Profiling & Analysis: Expert ability to use system profilers (e.g., Perf, eBPF, Nsight Systems) to visualize the "Critical Path" of the pipeline and optimize instruction-level performance.
- Pipeline Frameworks: Experience designing or heavily customizing media pipelines (similar to GStreamer, MediaPipe, or DeepStream).

Basic Qualifications

- Bachelor’s Degree or higher in Embedded AI, Computer Science, Computer Engineering, or related technical fields.
- 10+ years of industry experience in Embedded Software Architecture or High-Performance Computing.
- Proven track record of designing complex software engines for Video Processing, Computer Vision, or Autonomous Systems.
- Experience acting as a System Architect, making critical decisions on resource allocation, memory management, and hardware selection.
benefits:
- Compensation & bonus: 13th & 14th salary, AIP bonus, Holidays, Tet, and Long year service …
- Social insurance, Health insurance, Unemployment insurance: by Social Insurance and Labor Law

- We have AON insurance package for employee, spouse, and children every year

- You’ll love working in our dynamic environment employees, young & active
- We love sport activities, as marathon, football, swimming,...
- Working time: From Monday to Friday | 08:30-12:00 & 13:00-17.30

title: Senior Machine Learning Engineer (AI)
label: HOT
jobDescription:
- Advanced Model Research: Lead the R&D of high-performance models for Fine-Grained Visual Categorization (FGVC) and Hierarchical Classification, focusing on detecting complex object attributes and nuances in unconstrained environments using both Supervised and Self-Supervised Learning (SSL).
- Generative AI & VLM: Spearhead the exploration of Vision Language Models (VLM) and CLIP-based architectures to enable Text-to-Image / Image-to-Image retrieval and Open-Set Recognition, moving beyond fixed-class taxonomy.
- Agentic Data Workflows: Architect and implement AI Agentic Workflows to automate the data lifecycle. Design intelligent agents for autonomous data mining, auto-captioning, and Synthetic Data Generation to overcome long-tail edge cases and reduce reliance on manual annotation.
- Production-Grade AI: Drive the transition of models from research prototypes to production. Collaborate with Embedded AI Engineers to guide the distillation and quantization of heavy Foundation Models for deployment on edge devices.
requirements:
- Deep Learning Mastery: Expert-level understanding of Deep Learning architectures, specifically Transformers (ViT, Swin), CNNs (EfficientNet, ResNet), and Object Detection/Segmentation frameworks.
- Generative AI & Multi-modal: Hands-on experience with Multimodal Foundation Models (CLIP, LLaVA, etc.) and Generative approaches (Diffusion Models, GANs) for data synthesis.
- Data-Centric AI: Proven track record in building automated data pipelines. Experience with Active Learning, Auto-labeling, or building "Agentic" systems for data curation is a critical differentiator.
- Frameworks: Proficiency in PyTorch (preferred) or TensorFlow, and strong programming skills in Python and C++.
- Practical Implementation: Strong ability to write clean, maintainable code and experience with MLOps practices (CI/CD for ML, Experiment Tracking).
- Education: Bachelor’s Degree or higher in Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Computer Vision, Mathematics, or a related technical field.
- 7+ years of relevant industry experience in Computer Vision and Machine Learning.
- Proven track record of leading technical initiatives and successfully deploying AI models into commercial products (0-to-1 product lifecycle experience is highly preferred).
- Demonstrated ability to lead and mentor technical teams in a fast-paced R&D environment.

jobDescription:
HO26.85 - Head of Computer Vision Technology Department

Chịu trách nhiệm định hướng, giám sát, điều phối và phát triển các dự án, sản phẩm hoặc dịch vụ AI trong ngân hàng, tập trung vào lĩnh vực Công nghệ Xử lý Ảnh - Computer Vision.Nhiệm vụ chính:1. Trực tiếp tham gia phát triển các sản phẩm, dịch vụ ứng dụng AI.2. Tham gia xây dựng và triển khai định hướng cho các dự án AI - Computer Vision3. Lập kế hoạch chi tiết và quản lý các dự án phát triển và ứng dụng AI.4. Giám sát và hỗ trợ đội ngũ phát triển trong việc phát triển và triển khai các giải pháp AI, đảm bảo chất lượng và hiệu suất cao nhất.5. Làm việc chặt chẽ với các phòng ban liên quan (thuộc Trung tâm AI (NLP, Chatbot, R&D.v.v. và các đơn vị khác) để đảm bảo sự phối hợp nhịp nhàng và tối ưu hóa nguồn lực.6. Cập nhật và nghiên cứu các công nghệ AI mới nhất, áp dụng vào các dự án thực tế.7. Đảm bảo chất lượng và hiệu suất cho các dự án AI, thực hiện kiểm tra và đánh giá định kỳ.8. Xác định và đánh giá các rủi ro trong quá trình triển khai dự án.
requirements:

Đặc biệt trong lĩnh vực Computer Vision- Có kinh nghiệm quản lý nhóm hoặc quản lý các dự án phức tạp liên quan đến AI là lợi thế- Chuyên môn:+ Hiểu biết sâu về các công nghệ AI/ML, Computer Vision+ Quen thuộc với các công cụ và framework như Tensor Flow, Pytorch, Scikit-learn …+ Có chuyên môn về quản trị dữ liệu- Kỹ năng quản lý+ Kỹ năng lập kế hoạch, tổ chức và quản lý công việc+ Kỹ năng ra quyết định, giải quyết vấn đề và quản lý xung đột+ Khả năng truyền cảm hứng cho đội ngũ- Yêu cầu khác:+ Hiểu biết về các quy định pháp lý, đạo đức liên quan đến AI+ Kiến thức về quản trị rủi ro và các tiêu chuẩn ngành

title: Android Engineer (Kotlin)
label: HOT
reasons:
- Excellent environment and team to help you grow.
- Competitive salary and learning culture.
- Premium health care for you and your family.
jobDescription:
Are you an experienced (Senior) Android Engineer looking for your next career move? Do you have a background in design & architecture and development of digital products? If so read on.

The team:

You will be part of our Digital Delivery Hub who are responsible for designing, developing and maintaining some of the most interesting and innovative digital apps within the financial services space that are at the forefront of the market. Our Hub is focused on building a world class User Experience, Design and Web / Mobile Development team that can work with the business to realise an exciting digital strategy.

The role:

We are looking for a talented (Senior) Android Developer who still does hands-on development to contribute in the development and execution of an innovative mobile banking solution in Asia. This will include the development of in-country and cross-border solutions across all facets of a mobile banking operation including customer experience and design, developing and implementing new products and services, process engineering and other functional deliverable. Risk management and technology innovation will be essential for your success.

You will be responsible for technically leading and coaching our engineers who work in cross-functional delivery teams to design and build best-of-breed mobile solutions whilst maintaining necessary support for ongoing products.

Your duties will be to:

- Provide hands-on technical leadership and development in mobile solution development – you will get your hands dirty.
- Provide a leading voice in the evolving mobile architecture framework and road-map covering languages, tooling, patterns and delivery processes.
- Enhance our talent pool ensuring that our team’s skills and practices are leading edge and aligned to technology strategy.
- Provide technical guidance through the complete Solution Development Life Cycle.
- Developing solution architectures aligned with enterprise-wide standards to ensure successful implementation of technology solutions.
- Lead the technical design process coordinating various stakeholders; develop and document solution architectures for projects aligned to bank’s standards and policies.
- Custodian of design and engineering best practices; and technical app road-maps.
requirements:
Technical Skills:

- At least 3 years of experience in Android.
- Good understanding of modern Android architecture like MVVM, MVI, etc.
- Having experience developing both Android and iOS applications is a plus.
- Willingness to learn iOS stuff and apply it to feature development.
- Having an app in Google Play or the Apple App Store is a plus.
- Having experience in KMM development is a big plus.
- Having experience integrating mobile apps with web services, such as Firebase.
- Having experience in automation tests and unit tests.
- Having experience in memory and performance solving.
- Having experience with Dexguard, Proguard, or Dexprotector is a plus.
- Having experience with Design System is a plus.
- Having experience with Feature Flagging is a plus, such as Firebase, LaunchDarkly.
- Must have experience developing for multiple screen sizes and densities.
- Experience with developing custom UI for native components.
- Familiar with trending frameworks and libraries.
- Good at finding and using third-party open-source libraries.

Soft skills:

- Strong willingness to learn new practices and technologies.
- Able to work well in the team and willing to mentor/coach others.
- Exceptional interpersonal skills, including facilitation and negotiation.
- Understanding and experience of Agile methodology.
- Experience in working across several technical domains with the ability to ‘deep dive’ where required and ensure correct solutions are implemented.
- Ability to translate technical talk to the business.
- Ability to deliver convincing presentations that provide significant insight and generate consensus and buy-in.
benefits:
You’ll love working with us if you are:

- Passionate about technology.
- Independent but also a good team player.
- Comfortable with a high degree of ambiguity.
- Focused on usability and speed.
- Keen on presenting your ideas to your peers and management.

At TYME, opportunities are here for the taking. If you want to be part of our purpose and live and lead through our values, we can offer exciting development opportunities through expanded lateral roles, stretch assignments, or people leadership.

Some of our benefits:

- Meal and parking allowances are covered by the company.
- Full benefits and salary rank during probation.
- Insurances such as Vietnamese labor law and premium health care for you and your family.
- SMART goals and clear career opportunities (technical seminar, conference, and career talk) - we focus on your development.
- Values-driven, international working environment, and agile culture.
- Overseas travel opportunities for training and work-related.
- Internal Hackathons and company events (team building, coffee run, etc.).
- Pro-Rate and performance bonus.
- 15-day annual + 3-day sick leave per year from the company.
- Work-life balance 40-hr per week from Mon to Fri.

title: QA Automation Engineer (Python, Embedded)
label: HOT
jobDescription:
As a QA Automation Engineer in our camera systems group, you will play a crucial role in technically leading, designing, developing, and optimizing automated test solutions for intelligent embedded camera systems and user interfaces and evaluating Computer Vision and AI algorithms.

You will be responsible for the full lifecycle of test automation development, from conceptualization to deployment, while also contributing to backend API test design and implementation. This position requires a deep understanding of modern UI frameworks, strong full-stack test automation principles, and experience with camera technologies or similar data-intensive applications.

We are seeking a highly skilled and detail-oriented Quality Assurance Automation Engineer who can lead our Vietnam embedded automation efforts.

The ideal candidate is passionate about leading successful deployments of commercial systems for the benefit of our customers. The Quality Assurance Automation Engineer will be responsible for guiding the development, and hands-on participation in the quality assurance activities for our Embedded AI platform that is the core intelligence of our security surveillance cameras, appliances, and cloud services. This engineer will help drive our releases, ensure smooth and timely deployment of new features and bug fixes, and work with a team of quality engineers to maintain the test automation framework and overall product quality.

Job Description:

- Collaborate with a small team of Quality assurance engineers and Quality technicians.
- Ensure that the Motorola Solutions Embedded AI group produces the highest quality, smartest, easiest to use products in the surveillance industry.
- Help lead the design & implementation of a quality evaluation pipeline, workflows, and reporting service for automatically testing IoT devices code prior to release.
- Contribute to a comprehensive quality assurance strategy to ensure the reliability and performance of our edge-based video surveillance cameras and cloud-based services.
- Execute quality assurance testing strategies for OTA firmware releases for cameras and appliances
- Work with the quality team to develop an exhaustive test approach, including pass fail metrics, real and synthetic video datasets, and automation as part of a comprehensive test suite for each new feature.
- Collaborate with product management, embedded software developers, algorithm developers, data scientists, and user interface engineers to define system requirements and use-cases for each new analytics feature.
- Coordinate with software development teams to define release scope, objectives, and timelines.
- Develop and maintain quality metrics, reports, and documentation to track and communicate product quality improvements.
- Analyze test results, identify trends, and provide recommendations for process improvements.
- Stay up-to-date with industry best practices and emerging technologies related to quality assurance and AI-based video surveillance systems.
- Support our cross-team software escalation process, ensuring timely resolution of critical quality issues and effective communication with stakeholders.
- Identify and close testing holes in current test processes and automation
- Create and execute test plans, test cases, and test scripts for both manual and automated testing.
- Conduct off-site outdoor field testing of analytics features on camera hardware
requirements:
- Bachelor of Science degree in Electrical Engineering, Computer Engineering, Computer Science, Robotics, Physics, or equivalent experience from a technical engineering discipline.
- Experience leading a small team, evaluating performance and managing direct reports successfully.
- 3- 8 years of experience in quality assurance automation engineering.
- Proven experience in designing, implementing, and managing comprehensive quality assurance strategies and automation frameworks for complex software and hardware systems.
- Expertise in developing and authoring Python, C++, and Javascript automation software to test individual software components, web-enabled embedded hardware, IoT, and/or Robotics.
- Strong background in cloud-connected applications with platforms such as AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud, and integrating automated tests within CI/CD pipelines.
- Demonstrated ability to mentor young developers, fostering a culture of quality, innovation, and continuous improvement.
- Excellent communication, collaboration, and interpersonal skills, with the ability to effectively engage with technical and non-technical stakeholders across all levels of the organization.
- Experience with AI, machine learning, and computer vision technologies, and their application in quality assurance.
- Ability to troubleshoot complex technical issues, think critically, and drive timely resolution of critical quality issues.
- Highly organized, creative, and curious, with the ability to multi-task and thrive in an autonomous, empowering, and exciting environment.
benefits:
- Compensation & bonus: 13th & 14th salary, AIP bonus, Holidays, Tet, and Long year service …
- Social insurance, Health insurance, Unemployment insurance: by Social Insurance and Labor Law
- The regime of annual leave, company trip, and checkup examination
- Award for marriage, newborn
- We have AON insurance package for employee, spouse, and children every year
- You will be trained, learned & work with the best technical managers who help you improve various dev skills & career path
- You’ll love working in our dynamic environment employees, young & active
- We love sport activities, as marathon, football, swimming,...
- Working time: From Monday to Friday | 08:30-12:00 & 13:00-17.30

title: Senior Integration Engineer (Authorisation Policy)
label: SUPER HOT
reasons:
- Very competitive remuneration package
- Build products for millions of users in Australia
- Hybrid and flexible working environment
jobDescription:
ABOUT THE JOB

In this role, you will be responsible for delivering reliable and efficient entitlement services to our stakeholders, ensuring stability, accuracy, and a strong customer experience at all times. You’ll play a key role in maturing the product, driving continuous improvement across development standards and ways of working.Working closely with infrastructure and support teams, you will help strengthen collaboration, uplift engineering practices, and improve operational effectiveness. A strong focus on better business modelling and sustainable product evolution will enable the team to deliver scalable, high‑quality solutions that align with both technology and business needs.

YOUR JOB RESPONSIBILITIES

- Work closely with the development team and support the testing team
- Develop policies as per the business requirement and design
- Develop system test scripts, performance scripts and support SIT.
- Work in an agile environment, attending stand-ups, retros, planning, showcases and other agile meetings and ceremonies.
- Work closely with Release Train Engineers and Solution Engineers to determine platform requirements and priorities.
- Resolve technical barriers and roadblocks impacting delivery teams.
- Contribute to the improvement of the policy Development capability; drive the maturation of Software Engineering as a valued discipline in the Technology Operating model.
requirements:
- 5+ years of IT experience with strong problem‑solving skills and hands‑on production support exposure.
- Experience with configuration and integration tools (e.g. Pega, Blue Prism, OSB, TIBCO) and role‑based access models (RBAC, ABAC, ReBAC).
- Software development experience in any programming language and strong understanding of enterprise systems and API integrations, preferably within the banking domain.
- Strong business acumen and ability to communicate using business‑focused language.
- High attention to detail, excellent analytical thinking, and ability to manage competing priorities.
- Passion for learning legacy systems, driving technology transformation, and continuous improvement.
- Strong stakeholder management, interpersonal skills, and ability to work independently or as part of a team.
benefits:
THE BENEFITS AND PERKS

1. Generous compensation and benefit package

- Attractive salary and benefits
- 20-day annual leave and 7-day sick leave, etc.
- 13th month salary and Annual Performance Bonus
- Premium healthcare for yourself and family members
- Monthly allowance for team activities
- Premium welcome kit and frequent appreciation gifts
- Extra benefits for long-term employees

2. Exciting career and development opportunities

- Large scale products with modern technologies in banking domain
- Clear roadmap for career advancement in both technical and leadership pathways
- Well-structured learning and development programs (technical and soft skills)
- Sponsored certificates in both IT and banking/finance
- Premium account on Udemy
- English learning with native teachers
- Opportunity for traveling & training in Australia

3. Professional and engaging working environment

- Hybrid working model and good work-life balance
- Well-equipped & modern Agile office with fully stocked pantry
- Special programs to improve your physical and mental health
- Annual company trip and events
- A solid talented team behind you – great people who love what they do

A DIVERSE AND INCLUSIVE WORKPLACE WORKS BETTER FOR EVERYONE

We know that our people make us who we are. That's why we have built a culture of respect – where everyone feels valued and appreciated for being their true authentic selves at NAB. With our focus on inclusion and diversity, and in partnership with our Employee Resource Groups, NAB is a place where First Nations colleagues, colleagues of all genders, sexualities and ages, carers and colleagues with disability, and colleagues from all cultures, races and religions have the opportunity to thrive, connect and grow.

We are intent on providing an environment where you can work your way. Ask about our many flexible work options and please let us know if we can provide any adjustments throughout the recruitment process.

CLOUD-FIRST

NAB is undergoing an exciting "Cloud First" technology transformation by taking advantage of the latest tools and techniques used by leading technology and digital companies globally. But it’s not just about the Tech, we are also investing heavily in our people, so if you have an appetite to learn, grow and elevate others around you, this is the place for you!

If this excites you, let's have a chat over a cup of coffee!

- Chuẩn kết nối: Restful, gRPC, File, JMS (IBM MQ)/Kafka/AMQP
- Chuẩn message: JSON, Protobuf
- Message Broker: RabbitMQ / Kafka/ IBM MQ
- Distributed Cache: Redis
- Local Cache: Caffeine / Guava
- Authentication / Authorization (optional): Keycloak
- Central Configuration (optional): Vault / Spring Cloud Config Server
- Container platform: K8S / Openshift
- Observability: ELK, Prometheus, Grafana
- API Management: OpenAPI 3
- DevSecOps Tool: Gitlab, Jenkins, Sonarqube, Nexus Artifact Repo, JIRA, Confluence
- Container Tools: Docker Desktop / Minikube

- Define and evolve system architecture for multi-region, highly available deployments across AWS and on-premise infrastructure.
- Deliver performant APIs and control systems for secure, large-scale connectivity and real-time workloads.
- Design for high Concurrent User (CCU) loads, focusing on throughput, latency reduction, and horizontal scalability.
- Leverage Redis for caching, distributed coordination, and Pub/Sub messaging.
- Use Kafka for scalable event streaming, log aggregation, and operational analytics.
- Conduct performance tuning, load testing, and fault injection to validate system resilience.
- Embed strong cryptographic and secure communication practices (key exchange, rotation, encryption in transit and at rest).
- Collaborate with security stakeholders to align with compliance standards (SOC2, ISO 27001, GDPR).
- Implement CI/CD pipelines, Infrastructure as Code (Terraform, Ansible), and GitOps workflows.
- Manage Kubernetes clusters (AWS EKS and on-prem) for containerized workloads, ensuring scalability and high availability.
- Drive observability with metrics, logs, and traces (Prometheus, Grafana, OpenTelemetry).
- Provide hands-on technical leadership and mentor engineering team members.
- Guide design reviews, enforce coding standards, and foster a culture of technical excellence.
- Partner with Product and Operations teams to translate requirements into scalable solutions.
requirements:
Must Have

- Expertise in Golang, including concurrency, networking, and performance profiling.
- Strong understanding of WireGuard protocol and modern secure networking approaches.
- Advanced experience with Redis (caching, Pub/Sub, clustering, distributed locks).
- In-depth knowledge of Kafka (streaming pipelines, consumer group management, schema evolution).
- Proven experience with Kubernetes (EKS, on-premise clusters) and AWS cloud services (VPC, EC2, IAM, MSK, ElastiCache).
- Background in large-scale distributed systems handling thousands of concurrent connections.
- Strong DevOps mindset with automation, observability, and reliability engineering practices.

Nice to Have

- Knowledge of Linux networking internals (iptables, nftables, routing, namespaces).
- Experience with additional messaging systems (e.g., RabbitMQ).
- Security certifications or expertise in cryptography and access management.
- Exposure to real-time systems or high-frequency transaction processing.

Qualifications

- Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Systems, or equivalent experience.
- 9+ years in backend engineering (Golang) with 3+ years in a Tech Lead.
benefits:
What we offer

- Competitive salary package aligned with your experience and market standards
- Performance-based reviews and clear growth opportunities
- A global working environment with exposure to international teams and projects
- Opportunities for personal and professional development, including training and new-skill learning
- Flexible working culture, built on trust and responsibility
- Supportive, open-minded team culture, where your ideas and contributions are valued
- Chances to travel or collaborate across offices, depending on project needs
- And more benefits tailored to help you thrive at Secuwall

title: Senior AI Engineer (AI ML / English)
label: HOT
reasons:
- 13th bonus salary, project bonus
- Health insurance
- Annual leave: 14 days/year + 3 days/year Christmas
jobDescription: We are looking for an experienced Senior AI Engineer with practical experience in developing AI-based solutions and a strong commitment to secure software development practices in accordance with the Asseco Secure Development Lifecycle (SDLC).This role combines strong technical expertise, the ability to work independently, and a responsible approach to security, quality, and documentation. The developer will also play an important role in maintaining project know-how and supporting knowledge sharing with new team members to ensure continuity and minimize the impact of staff turnover.
requirements:
Key Responsibilities

- Design, develop, test, and optimize AI/ML solutions (e.g., machine learning models, NLP solutions, predictive models, AI automation services).
- Integrate AI components into existing or newly developed software systems.
- Work with data, including dataset preparation, validation, processing, and quality control.
- Collaborate with architects, analysts, and infrastructure teams to design AI system architecture.
- Follow secure development standards according to the Asseco Secure Development Lifecycle (SDLC).
- Prepare and maintain technical documentation and participate in code reviews.
- Monitor model performance and continuously improve deployed models.
- Identify and mitigate AI-related risks, such as bias, data leakage, and security vulnerabilities.
- Ensure compliance with privacy and data protection regulations, including handling sensitive data.

Requirements (Must-have)

- 4+ years of experience in software development, including at least 3 years in AI/ML development.
- Experience with machine learning frameworks such as TensorFlow, PyTorch, or scikit-learn.
- Strong knowledge of Python (experience with FastAPI, Flask, or similar frameworks is an advantage).
- Practical experience in training, tuning, and deploying AI models.
- Professional English proficiency in both spoken and written communication (Must Have)
- Experience with data preparation, data pipelines, or MLOps is a plus.
- Understanding of modern software engineering practices, including CI/CD, Git, and containerization.
- Ability to follow secure development methodologies, especially in areas such as:- osecurity requirements analysis- oinput validation and data integrity checks- osecure integration of AI components- ologging, monitoring, and auditability- oAI risk management and mitigation of model vulnerabilities
- Knowledge of cybersecurity principles is an advantage.
benefits:
- Base Salary: Negotiable
- 13th bonus salary, project bonus
- Merit reviews every year
- Meal allowance
- Annual leave: 14 days/year + 3 days/year Christmas
- Annual health check
- Health insurance
- Other benefits

jobDescription:
General OverviewWe are looking for a highly skilled Senior Java Engineer to join our engineering team and contribute to the development of scalable, high-performance applications for global clients. The ideal candidate has strong hands-on experience in Java ecosystem, microservices architecture, and modern DevOps practices.

Working Model: Hybrid with 3 office days/week (Hanoi or Ho Chi Minh City office)Working Hours: Vietnam business hours

Key Responsibilities

Software Development

- Design, develop, and maintain high-quality, scalable, and high-performance Java applications
- Build and enhance microservices-based systems using Spring Boot and RESTful APIs
- Write clean, efficient, and well-documented code following best practices

System Design & Architecture

- Contribute to system architecture design for complex, high-volume, fault-tolerant applications
- Collaborate with technical leads and architects to define scalable solutions
- Ensure system reliability, performance, and security

Testing & Quality Assurance

- Perform unit testing, integration testing, and debugging
- Apply best practices in test automation (JUnit, Mockito, BDD frameworks such as Cucumber/JBehave)
- Ensure code quality using tools like SonarQube

DevOps & CI/CD

- Work with CI/CD pipelines and automation tools (Jenkins, Git, Gradle, etc.)
- Participate in containerization and deployment using Docker
- Support infrastructure and deployment processes using cloud platforms (AWS/Azure) and IaC tools (Terraform, Ansible, Puppet)

Collaboration & Agile Delivery

title: DevOps Manager
label: HOT
reasons:

jobDescription:
Primary Objectives

• As a DevOps Manager, you are responsible for strategizing and operating a centralized DevOps Service to support multiple product lines. You will act as a strategic liaison to facilitate smooth operational transitions, infrastructure problem-solving, and seamless handovers across technical units.• Additionally, you will integrate advanced reliability and security standards into the software development lifecycle to ensure maximum performance and protection for all products. This includes maintaining strict compliance with cybersecurity best practices and corporate information security policies.

Main responsibilities

• Drive the establishment of SLAs and standardized CI/CD toolchains to empower development teams across Trading and Investment Banking, ensuring a seamless and rapid time-to-market.• Promote a security-first culture by embedding automated security testing (SAST, DAST, and container security) into the delivery pipeline, ensuring every product meets strict security requirements before production release.• Architect robust monitoring and observability frameworks; define SLIs/SLOs to ensure high availability of mission-critical services while partnering with engineering teams to optimize system performance• Act as a key bridge between IT Service, Infrastructure, and Security teams to design scalable Cloud/On-premises architectures and proactively eliminate operational bottlenecks.• Lead the transformation toward Infrastructure as Code (IaC) and GitOps, driving operational efficiency and mitigating risks through advanced automation frameworks

Other responsibilities

• Drive the continuous development of team capabilities through proactive mentorship and knowledge transfer, ensuring the consistent maintenance of high-level delivery standards across all projects• Champion DevOps, SRE, and Software Security principles across the organization, serving as a technical authority to instill a culture of excellence• Lead R&D on emerging technologies to propose and implement innovative solutions that strengthen the platform's competitive edge
requirements:
1. Educational level

• Bachelor’s degree in computer science, Information Technology, or a related field

2. Knowledge & Experiences

• Over 7 years of professional experience in DevOps, System Administration, or Software Engineering• Deep expertise in DevSecOps and SRE operational models. A proven track record of integrating robust security standards throughout the Software Development Lifecycle (SDLC)• Extensive expertise in microservices architecture, RESTful APIs, and the deployment of distributed systems• Direct experience in administering and operating Cloud platforms (GCP, AWS) and Containerization/Orchestration ecosystems (Kubernetes, GKE, RKE)• Proven experience in establishing and managing a DevOps Service model to support multiple concurrent product development teams

3. Technical skills

• Designing and implementing complex, large-scale CI/CD pipelines • Expertise in IaC (Terraform, Ansible) and the GitOps framework (ArgoCD)• Designing and deploying comprehensive Monitoring/Observability stacks (Prometheus, Grafana, ELK/EFK, APM) for multi-cluster Kubernetes environments• Troubleshooting, log analysis, and bug fixing at the network and application architectural level• Integrating robust security tools and automated scanning into development pipelines

4. Soft skills

• Demonstrated ability to perform under high pressure and execute swift, decisive actions within a fast-paced Agile/Scrum environment• A process-oriented and system-thinking mindset, with the ability to resolve complex problems through the lens of risk management and resource optimization• Proven ability to transfer knowledge and provide guidance to elevate technical capabilities across the team• Strong negotiation and communication skills used to align expectations between innovation-driven initiatives and system stability requirements

title: [Ho Chi Minh] QA Engineer
company: ONE Tech Stop Vietnam Company Ltd
label: SUPER HOT
reasons:
- 13th month salary & Performance
- Premium insurance for family
- Well-being program
jobDescription:
JOB PURPOSE

- The quality gatekeeper is responsible for ensuring that software is being delivered with the highest quality standards. The main mission is to reach quality excellence by having no issues in production as a continuous target.
- The QA Engineer should know and understand the business details, being able to check whether the final result matches all the business expectations.
- The QA Engineer should create and execute manual and automated test scenarios, provide root cause analyses of defects based on metrics, and proactively raise improvements that will enhance the quality of the product.

PRIMARY JOB RESPONSIBILITIES

- As a member of an Agile team: The main responsibility for the quality of the product. Ensure that the product is delivered with the highest quality by leveraging QA activities along with the scrum phases. Some of the daily basis activities are:
- Design test processes and procedures used to ensure that software operates within defined requirements.
- Create detailed, comprehensive, and well-structured test plans and test cases.
- Implement test plans, automation, and validation strategies.
- Creating and executing test automation scripts (UI testing, API testing, etc).
- In-depth functional testing – Must be able to evaluate functional stability to ensure business requirements are being met and are “fit-for-purpose” through end-to-end functional and automation testing.
- Work closely with developers and product owners/business analysts to resolve issues.
- Communicate any obstacles to raise awareness and avoid project impediments and overall project timeline disruption.
- Collaborate with Product Owner, and Developers on tasks related to the planning, testing, and coordination of release activities.
- Participate in user story creation process through dissection of high-level requirements during team review sessions.
requirements:
SKILLS AND QUALIFICATIONS

- 3+ years of work experience in Quality Assurance roles
- Good communication skills in English.
- Experience in writing clear, concise, and comprehensive test plans and test cases.
- Knowledge of testing integrations, testing best practices, and end-to-end system processes.
- Excellent analytical and problem-solving abilities.
- Demonstrated ability to think outside the box.
- Understanding of Agile/Scrum methodology and how QA functions within it.

PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS

- Experience with test automation tools, such as Selenium, Gherkin, Specflow, Postman, SoapUI, etc.
- Familiarity with git and version control tools.
- Having Salesforce experience/knowledge is a big plus.
benefits:
At OTSV, work is a self-fulfillment, we encourage staff to leave their comfort zone, think out of the box, and share their ideas without hesitation. As a team, we analyze and evaluate issues objectively to learn quickly from mistakes.

We believe in ‘fail quick, success quick’ and strive to keep pace with the forefront of technology to digitize ONE’s business.

The designs of our offices embrace our culture of being flexible and open. Unlike a conventional office, we have an open concept with different work areas which encourages collaboration, open-mindedness, and spontaneity.

Each work area has its charm and aims to make our staff feel as comfortable in the office as they would feel at home. Have a meet-up at the Café amidst the aroma of coffee!

You will love working here!

title: Senior IT Infrastructure Engineer
label: SUPER HOT
reasons:
- Attractive and Transparent Compensation & Bonuses
- Comprehensive Healthcare and Employee Well-being
- Professional Work Environment
jobDescription:
Server & Virtualization Management (Primary Focus)

- Administer and optimize x86 server hardware (such as HP and Dell) and operating systems, including RHEL and Windows Server.
- Manage, operate, and troubleshoot virtualization layers, specifically VMware and Hyper-V.
- Ensure robust system security by executing regular patching and OS hardening processes.

Infrastructure Support (Database & Storage)

- Provide operational support for Oracle and MSSQL databases, managing daily monitoring, backups, and restore tasks.
- Administer SAN/NAS storage systems, which includes LUN provisioning and ongoing health monitoring.

Operational Stability & Vendor Coordination

- Monitor system performance continuously to ensure the high availability of all banking services.
- Establish, update, and maintain comprehensive IT Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs).
- Coordinate directly with external vendors to manage maintenance schedules and resolve complex technical issues.
requirements:
Must-Have

- At least 5 years of IT infrastructure operations, with mandatory prior experience in the Banking or Financial sector.
- High proficiency in Linux/Windows server administration and setting up virtualization environments.
- Solid basic understanding of SAN storage systems and Database (SQL) management.
- A Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related discipline.
- Intermediate English proficiency, with the ability to comfortably conduct technical discussions and read/write technical documentation.

Nice-to-Have

- Familiarity and understanding of the State Bank of Vietnam (SBV) IT regulations, specifically Circular 09/2020.
- Hands-on experience participating in IT setups for new branches/subsidiaries or managing large-scale system migration projects.
- Holding relevant professional IT certifications, such as VCP, MCSE, or OCP.
benefits:
Itviec's Client is currently representing a premier 100% foreign-owned bank from South Korea, a dominant force in East Asian finance with over 60 years of heritage. As a leader in corporate and digital banking, our client is aggressively expanding its tech hub in Vietnam to redefine cross-border financial services. This is a rare opportunity to join a global financial giant that combines a long-standing reputation for stability with a forward-thinking approach to digital transformation and Fintech innovation.

3 Reasons Why You Should Join

- Global Prestige & Career Stability: Work for a top-tier international bank known for its rock-solid financial foundation. You will benefit from a professional, structured environment that follows global banking standards, offering long-term career security and a clear path for professional growth.
- Premium Compensation & Benefits: Beyond a highly competitive salary, you will enjoy the elite "Banking-standard" benefit package, including generous performance bonuses (13th month and beyond), comprehensive premium health insurance, and attractive allowances that stand out in the tech market.
- High-Impact Fintech Projects: Get hands-on experience with sophisticated Core Banking systems, cross-border payment gateways, and advanced security architectures. You will collaborate directly with international experts from the HQ, gaining invaluable exposure to global financial technologies and "system-thinking" methodologies.

title: Senior Data Security - Data Division
label: SUPER HOT
reasons:
- Mức lương cạnh tranh, hấp dẫn
- Môi trường làm việc chuyên nghiệp, thân thiện
- Được làm việc với các hệ thống hiện đại, tiên tiến
jobDescription:
2026TD450980 - Chuyên viên cao cấp Bảo mật dữ liệu - Khối Dữ liệu

1. Mục tiêu công việc:

Thực hiện các hoạt động liên quan đến xây dựng và triển khai cơ chế bảo mật dữ liệu, đảm bảo an toàn, tuân thủ và bảo vệ dữ liệu trong suốt vòng đời, theo quy định pháp luật và tiêu chuẩn quốc tế (Nghị định 13/2023/NĐ-CP, ISO 27001, GDPR...).Phối hợp với các đơn vị Quản trị dữ liệu, An ninh thông tin, Rủi ro và Tuân thủ để triển khai hiệu quả các chính sách, quy trình, tiêu chuẩn và công cụ bảo mật dữ liệu trong phạm vi được phân công, góp phần đảm bảo hoạt động quản trị dữ liệu toàn hàng được vận hành liên tục, an toàn và hiệu quả.2. Nhiệm vụ/trách nhiệm chính:i. Thiết kế và triển khai Data Security Framework thống nhất trên toàn tổ chức.ii. Quản lý các hoạt động bảo mật dữ liệu theo vòng đời dữ liệu (data lifecycle):• Phân loại và gắn nhãn dữ liệu (Data Classification & Tagging)• Mã hóa và quản lý khóa (Encryption & Key Management)• Ẩn danh, che dấu dữ liệu (Masking, Tokenization)• Quản lý truy cập và phân quyền (Access Control, IAM, ABAC/RBAC)• Giám sát và phát hiện rò rỉ dữ liệu (DLP, Monitoring, Incident Response)iii. Xây dựng và cập nhật chính sách, quy trình, tiêu chuẩn bảo mật dữ liệu, phối hợp chặt chẽ với các đơn vị IT Security, Data Governance, QTRR và Tuân thủ.iv. Tham gia triển khai, đánh giá và kiểm soát tuân thủ các quy định pháp luật về bảo vệ dữ liệu cá nhân và bảo mật thông tin.v. Đào tạo, nâng cao nhận thức về bảo mật dữ liệu cho các đơn vị kinh doanh và kỹ thuật.vi. Xây dựng báo cáo định kỳ về tình hình an ninh dữ liệu, cảnh báo sớm rủi ro và kế hoạch cải thiện cho Ban Lãnh đạo.
requirements:
i. Trình độ & kinh nghiệm• Tốt nghiệp đại học chuyên ngành CNTT, An toàn thông tin, Khoa học dữ liệu, hoặc tương đương.• Tối thiểu 5 năm kinh nghiệm trong các lĩnh vực: Information Security, Data Governance, IT Risk, hoặc Cloud Security.• Hiểu biết về các tiêu chuẩn và khung kiểm soát bảo mật dữ liệu: ISO 27001/27701, NIST, GDPR, PCI-DSS, Decree 13/2023/NĐ-CP.• Có kinh nghiệm triển khai hoặc quản lý các công cụ bảo mật dữ liệu: DLP, Data Masking, Encryption, IAM, SIEM, Key Vault, Cloud Security Tools.ii. title: IT Security & Network Engineer
label: SUPER HOT
reasons:

jobDescription:
Security Policy & Governance

- Develop and enforce IT security policies, procedures, and standards in strict alignment with local banking regulations (e.g., SBV Circular 09).
- Define and manage Network Access Control (NAC) and Firewall policies to maintain strict network segmentation across DMZ, Internal, and Database zones.
- Establish robust security hardening standards for all network devices, servers, and endpoints.
- Manage Identity and Access Management (IAM) policies and proactively monitor privileged account activities.

Security Operations & Incident Response

- Administer and manage policies for Next-Gen Firewalls, IDS/IPS, WAF, and DLP solutions.
- Lead end-to-end responses to cybersecurity incidents, encompassing Detection, Containment, and Root Cause Analysis (RCA).
- Coordinate regular vulnerability assessments, manage remediation actions, and oversee third-party Penetration Testing (Pen-testing).

Network Infrastructure Management

- Design, implement, and maintain the bank’s internal and external network architecture (L2/L3 Switching, Routing, VLAN).
- Manage and optimize secure connectivity (such as VPNs) between Headquarters, branches, and Data Centers.
- Continuously monitor network performance and ensure High Availability (HA) for core banking services.

Compliance & Governance

- Ensure all network and security configurations fully comply with local financial regulations (e.g., SBV Circular 09/2020).
- Develop detailed technical documentation and gather comprehensive evidence to support IT audits and security inspections.
- Conduct regular network and security health checks and provide detailed reporting.
requirements:
Must-Have

- Experience: 5+ years of experience in Network & Security operations; prior experience in the Banking or Financial sector is mandatory.
- Setup Experience: Demonstrated experience in setting up secure networks from scratch for new financial entities or branches.
- Policy Expertise: Proven track record of translating complex regulatory and compliance requirements into actionable technical security policies.
- Domain Knowledge: Strong understanding of Vietnamese Cybersecurity laws and local banking technical standards.
- Technical Skills: Hands-on experience operating enterprise-grade security devices and network monitoring tools, coupled with a strong background in resolving security breaches or network-related incidents. Deep technical understanding of TCP/IP, Routing protocols (OSPF, BGP), and overall Network Security architecture.
- Language: Intermediate English proficiency, specifically the ability to accurately document security policies and respond confidently during technical audits.

Nice-to-Have

- Holding recognized professional security certifications such as CISSP, CCNP Security, CEH, or CISA.
- Practical experience dealing with ISO/IEC 27001 certification, maintenance processes, or internal auditing.

title: Backend .NET Developer (Microservices/API)
label: SUPER HOT
reasons:
