title: Technical Lead (Nodejs/Microservices/AWS)
label: HOT
reasons:
- AI-first company shaping the future of fitness
- Join a passionate global team across VN, US, & UK
- Collaborative team valuing joy & creativity
jobDescription:
About Everfit

At Everfit, we're on a mission to build the future of personalized fitness. We connect coaches and clients seamlessly through a global wellness marketplace where anyone can find the perfect coach - regardless of budget, goals or location. With nearly 280,000 coaches in 200+ countries, our platform supports not only personal trainers, but Olympic athletes, military trainers, celebrity coaches, cancer rehab specialists, and everyday heroes transforming lives through fitness. We're not just helping people get stronger—we're helping coaches build thriving businesses that make a real impact.

From workouts and nutrition to habit coaching, payments, and client communication, Everfit brings it all together with a powerful layer of automation to help coaches scale their impact and grow their business. We're integrating next-gen AI sidekicks - smart assistants that help coaches program and unlock deep health insights in real time. Imagine if Jarvis from Iron Man doubled as your personal fitness strategist!

Position Overview:

We are looking for a Tech Lead to drive the technical direction of the Marketplace squad as we build and scale Everfit's global coach discovery and booking platform.

This is primarily a technical leadership role. Roughly 80% of your time will be spent on technical direction - architecture decisions, system design, code reviews, and mentoring - with around 20% hands-on coding on the highest-impact and most complex areas. You'll be the technical anchor who ensures the squad builds systems that scale, perform under load, and remain maintainable as the product grows.

We operate with an AI-first engineering mindset. You'll be expected to actively champion AI tools (GitHub Copilot, Claude, AI-assisted testing and documentation) across the squad - helping engineers move faster, write better code, and ship with more confidence. The best Tech Leads here don't just use AI themselves; they raise the whole squad's fluency.

About the squad

The Marketplace squad is building one of Everfit's most ambitious products: a global B2C marketplace where anyone can discover and connect with the perfect coach - regardless of goals, budget, or location. This is the squad turning Everfit from a B2B SaaS into a two-sided platform at scale.

You'll own the backend systems that power coach discovery, listing management, search and ranking, transactional flows, and the data models that connect supply (coaches) with demand (clients). The squad sits at the growth edge of Everfit's product strategy — the systems you build will directly drive user acquisition and coach revenue at global scale.

Our stack

We keep our stack lean and focused. Here's what we work with - you don't need to know all of it. We care far more about strong backend fundamentals and the ability to learn fast than ticking every box on a list.

Node.js | MongoDB | PostgreSQL | AWS | Docker

Familiarity with any of these is a genuine plus. Experience with comparable technologies - any backend language, any SQL/NoSQL database, any major cloud provider - is what matters.

AI-assisted development (GitHub Copilot, Claude, and similar tools) is standard practice on our engineering teams - not optional.

Your impact

Technical Direction & Architecture (~80%)

- Own the architectural vision for the Marketplace backend - coach profiles and listings, search and ranking infrastructure, discovery algorithms, and transactional flows.
- Design systems for a two-sided marketplace: matching supply and demand at scale, handling dynamic pricing, availability, and booking state management.
- Make backend architecture decisions that enable the Marketplace to grow from thousands to millions of active users without sacrificing reliability or performance.
- Define engineering standards for the squad: API design, data modeling, caching strategies, and event-driven patterns for real-time features.
- Identify and address technical debt proactively - keeping the system healthy without slowing down delivery.

Hands-on Engineering (~20%)

- Stay close to the hardest technical work - search infrastructure, ranking algorithms, core marketplace data models, and critical integrations.
- Review pull requests with depth - not just for correctness, but for scalability and maintainability at marketplace scale.
- Build proof-of-concepts for new technical approaches and validate architecture decisions before the squad commits to them.

AI-First Mindset

- Champion AI-assisted development across the squad - from code generation and automated testing to AI-powered search and recommendation features.
- Identify where AI can meaningfully accelerate marketplace features: smarter coach recommendations, automated content moderation, personalization engines.
- Help engineers develop practical AI workflows that reduce friction and increase output quality.

Mentorship & Team Growth

- Coach engineers on marketplace-specific backend challenges - search at scale, eventual consistency, multi-sided data modeling, and performance optimization.
- Conduct technical 1:1s focused on engineers' growth as system designers and problem solvers.
- Contribute to hiring - design technical assessments and conduct engineering interviews calibrated to marketplace backend complexity.

Cross-functional Collaboration

- Partner with Product and BA from discovery through delivery - you shape the technical feasibility of marketplace features before the squad builds them.
- Communicate backend architecture decisions clearly to Product and Design so they can make informed feature trade-offs.
- Coordinate with the Payment Tech Lead on transaction flows and the AI squad on recommendation and personalization infrastructure.
requirements:
- 5+ years of backend engineering experience, with 2+ years in a Tech Lead, Senior Lead, or equivalent technical leadership role.
- Strong English communication skills - able to bridge technical trade-offs with product and business stakeholders clearly.
- Strong backend fundamentals: RESTful and event-driven API design, async processing, data modeling, caching strategies, and performance optimization - regardless of the specific language or stack you come from.
- Experience building or scaling marketplace, e-commerce, or platform products - ideally two-sided or multi-sided marketplaces with search, listings, and transactional flows.
- Experience designing search or discovery systems - ranking, filtering, relevance tuning, or working with search technologies at scale.
- Proven ability to make architectural decisions that balance delivery speed with scalability on high-traffic consumer platforms.
- AI-first engineering mindset: you actively use AI tools to work smarter and help your team do the same.

Nice to have:

- Familiarity with our stack: Node.js, MongoDB, PostgreSQL, AWS, Docker - or equivalent experience with comparable technologies.
- Experience with recommendation systems, personalization engines, or relevance ranking in a marketplace context.
- Background in high-traffic consumer platforms where performance and scalability were critical.
- Familiarity with real-time or event-driven architectures for features like availability, booking state, or messaging.
- Experience working in distributed engineering teams across time zones.
- Track record of shipping marketplace features that measurably improved discovery metrics, conversion, or user engagement.
benefits:
Compensation & Benefits:

- Full social insurance coverage and premium healthcare benefits.
- Competitive salary with 13th-month pay and performance bonus.
- Paid leave: vacation, sick leave, and maternity leave

Build Your Career with Impact:

- Be part of a mission-driven company that’s transforming human potential.
- Empower over 200,000+ coaches in more than 200 countries - including Olympic athletes, military trainers, rehab specialists, and celebrity coaches.
- Make a global impact while building a meaningful, purpose-driven career.
- Continuous training, mentoring.
- 1-2 performance reviews annually.

Work Environment:

- English-speaking, international environment promoting open communication and collaboration.
- Work alongside world-class talent from companies like Apple, Meta, Uber, Patreon, and Nike, united by a shared passion for impact and excellence.
- International team for global career growth.
- State-of-the-art equipment provided.
- Beautiful working environment near Danang's city center (Dragon Bridge) and Hanoi office.

Health & Wellness:

- PVI health insurance program and annual health check-ups.
- Active sports clubs (football, badminton, pickleball) and company retreats.
- A modern pantry designed for relaxation and social connection.
- Monthly wellness and learning workshops to recharge and grow.

title: Data Manager (Data Engineer, SQL, Python)
label: HOT
reasons:

jobDescription:
We're looking for a Manager, Data Analytics & Engineering to own Fundiin's data infrastructure end-to-end: the pipelines powering credit decisioning, the models driving business insights, and the foundations enabling ML use cases like credit scoring and fraud detection.

What you will do

1. Own the Data Platform

- You are the primary owner of Fundiin's data platform. That means keeping it running reliably, making it faster and more cost-efficient, and evolving it as business needs grow.
- Day-to-day, this looks like optimizing and refactoring ETL/ELT pipelines, strengthening monitoring and alerting, and improving data observability, so the team always knows what's healthy and what's not.
- Longer-term, you'll shape the data architecture to support new use cases as Fundiin scales.

Stack: Airflow, dbt, Data Warehouse

2. Raise the Bar on Data Quality & Governance

- Unreliable data kills trust. You'll build on Fundiin's existing data quality frameworks to ensure every team as Risk, Finance, Product; works from a single source of truth.
- This means standardizing critical business metrics (approval rate, default rate, and others), improving data lineage, tightening access control, and making governance a practice, not an afterthought.

3. Deliver Business Impact

- You work closely with Risk, Product, Finance, and Operations, not just to fulfill requests, but to understand their problems deeply and design solutions that scale.
- You'll help translate ambiguous business questions into clean data models and reliable pipelines, and you'll prioritize your team's work based on where the data can move the needle most.

4. Enable ML & AI Use Cases

- As Fundiin deepens its investment in AI-driven decisioning, you'll be a key enabler. That means supporting ML use cases like credit scoring and fraud detection; collaborating on feature design, preparing training datasets, and building pipelines that serve models reliably in production.
- You don't need to be a data scientist, but you understand what good ML infrastructure looks like.

5. Lead & Develop the Team

- You'll lead a team of Data Engineers and Data Analysts; setting priorities, unblocking delivery, and raising the craft. You're not just delegating; you're in the work with them.
- You'll establish best practices for data modeling and development, and create an environment where engineers grow into stronger, more autonomous contributors.
requirements:
Must-have

You've spent 5-10 years working seriously with data, whether as a Data Engineer, Analytics Engineer, or Data Analyst and you've moved beyond just building pipelines to actually owning them in production. You know what it means to be accountable for a system other people depend on.

Concretely, you bring:

- Strong SQL and Python; these are your daily tools, not things you look up
- Hands-on experience with Airflow (or equivalent), dbt, and a Data Warehouse; you've used these in real, production environments, not just side projects
- Data modeling depth; you think carefully about how data is structured, not just whether it runs
- Production ownership mindset
- Comfort with transactional or financial data

Nice to have

- Experience in fintech, or working closely with Risk or Product teams on analytics
- Familiarity with data quality and observability tooling (dbt tests, Great Expectations, Monte Carlo, or similar)
- Exposure to CI/CD practices or event streaming (Kafka, Pub/Sub)
- Some involvement in ML pipelines or scoring systems
benefits:
At Fundiin, we believe in fostering a dynamic work environment that encourages personal and professional growth.

Empowerment and Growth:

- We offer great autonomy, freedom to make decisions, room to take risks and learn from mistakes.
- Get involved from the ground up in creating and developing new products, leading teams, working on innovative projects, and gaining visibility within the industry.

Competitive Benefits:

- Enjoy a robust benefits package, including meaningful ESOP options.
- Access our premium health care program and annual health checkup.
- Receive a budget of 2,400,000 VND per year for professional development.
- Take advantage of device allowances or financing options covering up to 50% of new device purchases.

Engaging Work Environment:

- Participate in our monthly Town Hall meetings and collaborative sharing sessions.
- 15 days of annual leave to recharge and pursue personal interests, plus an extra day for every 3 years of service.
- Join biannual team-building trips for bonding and connections.
- Enjoy free daily drinks and weekly TGIF snacks and beverages.

title: Backend Technical Lead – PRO Trading (Go, Rust, Python)
company: CÔNG TY CỔ PHẦN CHỨNG KHOÁN KAFI
label: HOT
reasons:

jobDescription:
Job Overview

We are an emerging securities firm in Vietnam, growing rapidly with a strong focus on technology, professional trading, and innovation. Our mission is to deliver data-driven and intelligent investment solutions that empower retail, professional, and institutional clients.

We are seeking a Backend Technical Lead with deep expertise in distributed systems, microservices, and high-throughput transaction processing to join our core engineering team.

The ideal candidate will be responsible for designing and leading the development of scalable backend systems that handle hundreds of thousands of transactions per day, with a strong focus on performance, resilience, and scalability. This role reports to the Project Manager / Head of Business Technology and is well-suited for candidates with a strong logical mindset, an interest in data, models, and technology, and a desire to grow in AI-driven investment products.

Key Responsibilities

- Lead and mentor a backend engineering team working across modern technologies such as Java, Go, and distributed data systems (SQL/NoSQL).
- Design and build scalable, event-driven backend systems using microservices architecture, leveraging technologies such as Kafka or similar streaming platforms.
- Take ownership of transitioning systems from vendor-based solutions to in-house platforms, including maintaining and enhancing existing trading middleware and services.
- Design and implement core backend components for a modular and extensible trading platform supporting quantitative strategies, institutional trading, and AI-driven investment products.
- Develop and enhance backend services that integrate with core trading systems (equities, derivatives), enabling flexible capabilities such as order management, margin products, and fee logic.
- Build and operate systems capable of handling high transaction volumes (hundreds of thousands per day), ensuring strong scalability, availability, and observability.
- Optimize system performance to support low-latency and high-throughput processing, particularly for trading and execution workflows.
- Collaborate with Quantitative Researchers, Data Engineers, and Product teams to integrate market data pipelines (real-time and historical), research and signal engines, and performance analytics.
- Work closely with Business Analysts, QC, DevOps, and other engineering teams to ensure high code quality, system reliability, and alignment with business objectives.
- Contribute to and enforce engineering best practices, including coding standards, code reviews, and system design guidelines.
- Participate in roadmap planning, system reviews, and continuous improvement initiatives to enhance the overall trading platform and infrastructure.
requirements:
Must-Have:

- 7+ years of experience in backend software development, with strong proficiency in at least one programming language such as Go, Rust, Python, or similar.
- Solid experience building distributed systems, including microservices architectures, event-driven systems, and streaming platforms (e.g., Apache Kafka/NATS Jetstream/Redis Stream or equivalent).
- Experience designing and building systems for high-throughput or transaction-intensive environments, with a strong understanding of scalability, fault tolerance, performance optimization, and observability.
- Strong knowledge of API design and integration, including RESTful services, messaging systems, or real-time communication protocols (e.g., gRPC, WebSocket).
- Experience working with relational and/or NoSQL databases (e.g., PostgreSQL, MongoDB), including data modeling and performance tuning.
- Good understanding of system design principles, including modular architecture, service decomposition, and reliability patterns.
- Demonstrated experience in technical leadership, including mentoring engineers, conducting code reviews, and contributing to system design decisions.
- Strong analytical and problem-solving skills, with the ability to work in complex, high-impact systems.
- Effective communication skills and a proactive, ownership-driven mindset.

Nice-to-Have:

- Experience in trading systems, quantitative platforms, fintech, or capital markets.
- Familiarity with low-latency or real-time systems, especially in trading or execution contexts.
- Exposure to securities trading infrastructure, such as OMS, market data systems, or trading APIs.
- Experience integrating with core systems in financial services (e.g., core securities, banking systems).
- Hands-on experience with containerization and orchestration (Docker, Kubernetes) and CI/CD pipelines.
- Familiarity with observability and monitoring tools (e.g., Prometheus, Grafana).
- Understanding of risk control, compliance, or audit requirements in financial systems.
- Interest in system architecture and platform design, with a desire to contribute to long-term technical direction.
benefits:
- Key technical leadership role in a mission-critical, high-performance platform.
- Dynamic and innovation-driven working environment in a leading securities firm.
- Access to modern technologies and real-world system challenges at scale.
- Opportunity to shape architecture for future growth across multiple domains.

The Business Analyst based in Vietnam is responsible for gathering and documenting product requirements, analyzing and improving processes, engaging with stakeholders, and collaborating with Tech and UX teams to deliver data-driven and user-centric solutions that meet product objectives.

Responsibilities

Requirements Gathering & Documentation:

- Conduct meetings and workshops with product stakeholders to capture detailed product requirements.

Process Analysis & Improvement:

Stakeholder Engagement:

Technical Collaboration:

- Support end-to-end testing efforts, including user acceptance testing (UAT), and verify that issues are resolved.

Data Analysis & Reporting:

- Analyze product data to identify trends, opportunities, and potential risks.
- Generate insightful reports, dashboards, and visualizations that highlight key performance indicators (KPIs) to help guide decision-making.
- Use data-driven insights to support recommendation development and problem-solving.

Product Delivery:

- Define project scope and objectives, including resource requirements and timelines.
- Monitor product progress and provide regular updates to stakeholders.
- Identify potential project risks and collaborate with teams to develop mitigation strategies.

Continuous Improvement:

- Keep up to date on industry trends and emerging technologies to drive innovation within the organization.
- Recommend best practices based on lessons learned from previous projects and industry standards.
requirements:
Years of Experience: 2 - 5 years as a Business Analyst (BA) / Product Manager (PM)

Skills / Technical Knowledge:

- UI/UX and User Flow Design

- Expert eye for clean, standardized user interfaces and consistent UX behavior.
- Ability to map and optimize end-to-end user journeys, ensuring smooth navigation and minimal friction.
- Hands-on experience creating wireframes, user journey maps, and clickable prototypes.

- Tools and Technology Proficiency

- Project management platforms: Jira, Trello, Notion, or equivalents for backlog tracking and team collaboration.
- Mockup and prototyping tools: Figma, Sketch, Adobe XD.
- Documentation and diagramming: Confluence, Notion, Lucidchart.

- Agile and Delivery Frameworks

- Familiarity with Scrum or Kanban: story point estimation, sprint planning, backlog refinement, and retrospective facilitation.
- Experience working in iterative delivery cycles, coordinating stand-ups, and managing scope changes.

- Technical Literacy

- Basic knowledge of web/mobile architectures.
- Ability to liaise with developers on integration points, data validation, and performance considerations.

Soft skills / Attributes:

- Strong Analytical Ability - Ability to interpret complex product problems and translate them into actionable requirements and solutions.
- Effective Communication - Excellent verbal and written communication skills to facilitate discussions with stakeholders and translate requirements for technical teams.
- Stakeholder Management - Experience engaging with cross-functional teams, gathering feedback, and managing expectations.
- Process Mapping & Optimization - Proficiency in analyzing workflows, identifying inefficiencies, and proposing improvements.
- Documentation Proficiency - Skilled in writing PRDs, functional specs, user stories, and use cases.
- Problem-Solving Ability - Adept at identifying issues and proposing effective, data-backed solutions.
- Product Delivery - Ability to track product progress, support scope management, and contribute to risk mitigation efforts.
- Attention to Detail - High level of accuracy in documenting requirements and analyzing data.
- Adaptability & Curiosity - Willingness to learn new tools and keep up with industry trends.
- User Empathy - Able to incorporate user behavior insights into product analysis.
- Design Collaboration - Comfortable working with UX/UI teams to deliver user-centered solutions.

Competencies

- Attention to Detail
- Communication
- Problem-Solving
- Stakeholder Management
- Documentation and Reporting
- Technical Understanding
- Collaboration
- Adaptability
- Data Interpretation and Visualization
- Project Coordination
- User-Centric Thinking
- Requirements Elicitation
- Decision-Making Support
- Product Testing
- Cross-Functional Communication
- Prototype Interpretation and Feedback
- Design System Awareness

company: ONE Tech Stop Vietnam Company Ltd
label: SUPER HOT

jobDescription:
PRIMARY JOB RESPONSIBILITIES

- Development Oversight: Lead the software development life cycle, ensuring project delivery aligns with organizational objectives.
- Technical Solutions Design: Collaborate with stakeholders to design efficient software solutions and verify technical feasibility.
- Architectural Guidance & Design: Define system architecture, establish coding standards, and ensure alignment with non-functional requirements.
- Architectural Execution & Integration: Oversee software development, facilitate continuous integration/deployment, and maintain monitoring for system performance.
- Architectural Validation & Quality Assurance: Conduct architecture evaluations, enforce continuous testing, and validate non-functional requirements.
- Architectural Management: Develop project roadmaps, manage technical risks, maintain the technical backlog, and mentor team members.
requirements:
POSITION QUALIFICATIONS AND REQUIREMENT

- Full-stack Development Expertise: Extensive experience in both backend (Node.js/NestJS) and frontend (React/Next.js) development.
- Communication: Fluency in English is required.
- Experience: 3-5 years of experience in a similar Technical Architect role.
- Cloud Infrastructure: Advanced knowledge of cloud platforms (preferably Google Cloud), with expertise in Kubernetes, Service Mesh, and optimizing infrastructure for large-scale, secure, and resilient systems.
- Application Architecture: Expertise in designing, evaluating, and validating modern software architectures such as Microservices, Domain-Driven Design (DDD), Clean Architecture.
- Data Architecture: Expertise in designing and managing data models, with a strong focus on PostgreSQL, as well as other SQL/NoSQL databases, ensuring optimal performance and scalability.
- Non-Functional Requirements: Proven expertise in managing and optimizing system non-functional requirements, including performance, security, and scalability.
- Technical Troubleshooting: Strong problem-solving skills for diagnosing and resolving technical and production incidents effectively.
- Technical Communication: Excellent communication skills to convey complex technical concepts clearly to both technical and non-technical stakeholders.

PERSONAL ATTRIBUTES:

- Experience in mentoring people
- Calm in finding resolutions for issues/problems

title: iOS Developer (Swift)
label: HOT
reasons:
- Excellent environment and team to help you grow.
- Competitive salary and learning culture.
- Premium health care for you and your family.
jobDescription:
Are you an experienced (Senior) iOS Engineer looking for your next career move? Do you have a background in design & architecture and development of digital products? If so read on.

The team:

You will be part of our Digital Delivery Hub who are responsible for designing, developing and maintaining some of the most interesting and innovative digital apps within the financial services space that are at the forefront of the market. Our Hub is focused on building a world class User Experience, Design and Web / Mobile Development team that can work with the business to realise an exciting digital strategy.

The role:

We are looking for a talented (Senior) iOS Developer who still does hands-on development to contribute in the development and execution of an innovative mobile banking solution in Asia. This will include the development of in-country and cross-border solutions across all facets of a mobile banking operation including customer experience and design, developing and implementing new products and services, process engineering and other functional deliverable. Risk management and technology innovation will be essential for your success.

You will be responsible for technically leading and coaching our engineers who work in cross-functional delivery teams to design and build best-of-breed mobile solutions whilst maintaining necessary support for ongoing products.

Your duties will be to:

- Provide hands-on technical leadership and development in mobile solution development – you will get your hands dirty.
- Provide a leading voice in the evolving mobile architecture framework and road-map covering languages, tooling, patterns and delivery processes.
- Enhance our talent pool ensuring that our team’s skills and practices are leading edge and aligned to technology strategy.
- Provide technical guidance through the complete Solution Development Life Cycle.
- Developing solution architectures aligned with enterprise-wide standards to ensure successful implementation of technology solutions.
- Lead the technical design process coordinating various stakeholders; develop and document solution architectures for projects aligned to bank’s standards and policies.
- Custodian of design and engineering best practices; and technical app road-maps.

By applying for GoTymeX on It Viec, you agree to all terms and conditions indicated in this Personsal Data Privacy Policy ("Policy") at .
requirements:
Technical Skills:

- At least 3 years of experience in iOS development with Swift.
- Having experience developing both Android and iOS applications is a plus.
- Willingness to learn Android stuff and apply it to feature development.
- iOS Experience that demonstrates learning & application of the latest native technology: Swift UI, Swift Package Manager, and keeping up with WWDC updates.
- Having an app in Google Play or the Apple App Store is a plus.
- Having experience in KMM development is a big plus.
- Having experience integrating mobile apps with web services, such as Firebase.
- Having experience in automation tests and unit tests.
- Having experience in memory and performance solving.
- Having experience with Dexguard, Proguard, or Dexprotector is a plus.
- Having experience with Design System is a plus.
- Having experience with Feature Flagging is a plus, such as Firebase, LaunchDarkly.
- Must have experience developing for multiple screen sizes and densities.
- Experience with developing custom UI for native components.
- Familiar with trending frameworks and libraries.
- Good at finding and using third-party open-source libraries.

Soft skills:

- Strong willingness to learn new practices and technologies.
- Able to work well in the team and willing to mentor/coach others.
- Exceptional interpersonal skills, including facilitation and negotiation.
- Understanding and experience of Agile methodology.
- Experience in working across several technical domains with the ability to ‘deep dive’ where required and ensure correct solutions are implemented.
- Ability to translate technical talk to the business.
- Ability to deliver convincing presentations that provide significant insight and generate consensus and buy-in.
benefits:
You’ll love working with us if you are:

- Passionate about technology.
- Independent but also a good team player.
- Comfortable with a high degree of ambiguity.
- Focused on usability and speed.
- Keen on presenting your ideas to your peers and management.

At TYME, opportunities are here for the taking. If you want to be part of our purpose and live and lead through our values, we can offer exciting development opportunities through expanded lateral roles, stretch assignments, or people leadership.

Some of our benefits:

- Meal and parking allowances are covered by the company.
- Full benefits and salary rank during probation.
- Insurances such as Vietnamese labor law and premium health care for you and your family.
- SMART goals and clear career opportunities (technical seminar, conference, and career talk) - we focus on your development.
- Values-driven, international working environment, and agile culture.
- Overseas travel opportunities for training and work-related.
- Internal Hackathons and company events (team building, coffee run, etc.).
- Pro-Rate and performance bonus.

ưu vận hành, phát hiện gian lận);- Chịu trách nhiệm document các bước phát triển, các điểm ra quyết định trong quá trình phát triển để đảm bảo khả năng tái sử dụng và chia sẻ các tri thức có được trong mỗi dự án Khoa học Dữ liệu;- Diễn giải kết quả mô hình AI/ ML và cách thức áp dụng vào quy trình cho các đơn vị nghiệp vụ.• Thử nghiệm, theo dõi và đánh giá hiệu quả mô hình:- Phối hợp với đơn vị nghiệp vụ để xây dựng kế hoạch thử nghiệm các mô hình AI/ ML trong luồng quy trình nghiệp vụ thông qua A/B test;- Đánh giá các chỉ tiêu kĩ thuật (technical metric), các chỉ tiêu kinh doanh (business metric) trong quá trình thử nghiệm;- Theo dõi các hiệu năng mô hình trong quá trình thử nghiệm, thực hiện phân tích kết quả thử nghiệm, đề xuất các điểm cần cải thiện (nếu có).• Nghiên cứu & cập nhật kỹ thuật, công nghệ mới:- Thường xuyên nghiên cứu, cập nhật các xu hướng, kỹ thuật tiên tiến trong lĩnh vực Khoa học Dữ liệu;- Chủ động tìm hiểu và thử nghiệm các công nghệ, framework và mô hình mới để nâng cao hiệu quả triển khai giải pháp dữ liệu và AI/ ML tại ngân hàng;- Tích cực tham gia và chia sẻ tại các seminar nội bộ để lan tỏa kiến thức và chia sẻ kinh nghiệm thực tiễn với đội nhóm.• Thực hiện các công việc khác theo yêu cầu và chỉ đạo của lãnh đạo cấp trên.
requirements:
• Kĩ năng cứng:- Tốt nghiệp Đại học trở lên chuyên ngành Công nghệ thông tin, Toán tài chính hoặc các chuyên ngành có liên quan;- Nắm vững các kiến thức nền tảng về xác suất thống kê, các thuật toán học máy thông dụng (thuật toán cây, thuật toán hồi quy logistics, thuật toán phân cụm…);- Thành thạo Python và các thư viện chuyên sâu phục vụ AI/ ML như: Scikit-learn, XGBoost, LGBM, TensorFlow, Optuna,..cùng các công cụ hỗ trợ triển khai như MLflow, Git;- Thành thạo SQL;- Am hiểu về genAI (các thư viện như PyTorch, TensorFlow, Hugging Face Transformers) là một lợi thế- Có kinh nghiệm sử dụng các công cụ BI như Power BI, Tableau, Superset… là một lợi thế;

• Kỹ năng mềm:- Có kinh nghiệm làm việc trong lĩnh vực Khoa học Dữ liệu từ 2 năm trở lên;- Có khả năng phối hợp và làm việc nhóm hiệu quả;- Cẩn thận, tỉ mỉ, có khả năng logic tốt và có khả năng làm việc trong áp lực;- Kỹ năng thuyết trình, giao tiếp rõ ràng và mạch lạc, có thể trình bày kết quả phân tích, mô hình và insight cho đơn vị nghiệp vụ;- Ưu tiên các ứng viên đã có kinh nghiệm trong lĩnh vực tài chính ngân hàng.

title: Senior Game Developer
label: HOT
reasons:
- International working environment
- Competitive salary and benefit
- Chance to work on-site in Singapore
jobDescription:
Embark on Your Next Epic Career Quest! Join Our Craftland Game Development Guild!

Ready to dive into the world of Free Fire Crafland as a Senior Game Developer with the goal of leading a full game development lifecycle end-to-end? Crafting games from start, building compelling user attraction plan, and push your creativity beyond limits. We’ve got the quest for you!

About us

At Garena, we’re not just making games; we’re creating immersive experiences that captivate millions of players around the globe. Our Game Team is a dynamic mix of creative minds, game wizards, and data gurus dedicated to pushing the boundaries of the gaming world.

About Free Fire Craftland

Free Fire Craftland is our dynamic ecosystem that empowers creators and developers to build immersive in-game experiences as an extension of the renowned Free Fire universe.

Craftland is a collaborative platform where innovative technology and bold ideas come together, turning concepts into engaging digital content that continually redefines mobile gaming. Equipped with a suite of intuitive tools—including a map editor, game logic customization, and an extensive asset library—users can easily design, optimize, and bring their creations to life. Their creativity is celebrated, and their collaboration empowers us to push boundaries and set trends in interactive entertainment.

Mô tả công việc

Your Mission

The Game Developer role plays a crucial part in maximizing our user participation and stickiness to our Craftland world, by building new maps, game modes on our Craftland environment. The position will be in charge of quality of maps and games created by our development team. You will be able to explore innovative and complex gameplay style, thereby broadening our PGC game maps and building up new exciting modes.

Your Quest

Game Development:

- Working with cross-functional teams to conceptualize and design innovative games for our platform.
- Develop, test, and maintain games, ensuring they meet technical and artistic standards.
- Demonstrate a strong willingness to learn and grow in game design, with the goal of independently managing the full game development lifecycle end-to-end.

Performance Optimization:

- Optimize games for performance across multiple devices and platforms.
- Identify and resolve performance bottlenecks to ensure seamless gameplay.

Maintenance and Updates:

- Provide regular updates to improve game features and functionality.
- Address and resolve bugs promptly to maintain game stability and quality.

Technical Support and Collaboration:

- Provide technical support to junior developers, regional teams, and PUGC studios.
- Offer feedback and solutions for issues related to the game editor and other tools.
requirements:
Yêu cầu công việc

- A deep love for gaming with passion about creating engaging and immersive gaming experiences is a must.
- Having a Bachelor's degree from reputable university of Information Technology or above.
- At least 4-year experience with proven record in game development with game engines like Unity, Unreal Engine, or similar., with a strong portfolio of published games. Having experience in designing games for UGC platforms: Roblox, Mini World, Blockman GO, etc is a strong advantage.
- Strong understanding of game development concepts such as game mechanics, UI design, and game balancing.
- Experience with version control tools such as Git or SVN.
- Proficiency in programming languages such as C++, C#, or JavaScript. Experience with scripting languagues like .Lua, Python, etc is a plus
- Strong understanding of game mechanics, physics, 2D,3D and user interface design.
- Experience with multiplayer game programming, implementing client / server architecture.
- Strong communication skills in both Vietnamese & English to effectively convey design concepts and ideas to cross-functional and cross regional teams. Able to communicate in Chinese is a plus.
- Ability to adapt to feedback and iterate on designs quickly. Able to deliver under pressure and adapt to constantly changing priorities.
- Detail-oriented with strong problem-solving skills, is committed to delivering high-quality gaming experiences to our users.
- Detail-oriented with strong problem-solving skills, is committed to delivering high-quality gaming experiences to our users.

Application Form Guidance:

Please help to submit your job application package with the documents as

1. Your CV

2. The Garena Application Form (Download the file from the link, fill in and upload it with your CV):

What we offer

- Impactful & Challenging Work: Join a dynamic environment where your contributions can shape the gaming experiences of millions.
- Opportunities for Growth: Embark on a journey of personal and professional development across various business tracks.
- Vibrant Culture: Connect with like-minded individuals in a lively and inclusive workplace, where we work hard and play hard.
- Autonomy: Take charge of your projects and make your mark on the gaming industry.
- Competitive Package: Enjoy competitive salaries, modern facilities, office perks, and medical benefits.
benefits:
- Impactful & Challenging Work: Join a dynamic environment where your contributions can shape the gaming experiences of millions.
- Opportunities for Growth: Embark on a journey of personal and professional development across various business tracks.
- Vibrant Culture: Connect with like-minded individuals in a lively and inclusive workplace, where we work hard and play hard.
- Autonomy: Take charge of your projects and make your mark on the gaming industry.

title: Chuyên viên tích hợp hệ thống (Java Developer)
label: HOT
reasons:

- Cơ hội được đào tạo, phát triển kỹ năng chuyên sâu
jobDescription:
Trách nhiệm chính

Lập trình tích hợp/nâng cấp cho các hệ thống công nghệ của Ngân hàng:

- Tham gia xây dựng kế hoạch thực hiện tích hợp/chuyển đổi hệ thống.
- Thực hiện rà soát và tiếp nhận tài liệu đặc tả chi tiết kỹ thuật phát triển ứng dụng.
- Tham gia và phát triển phần mềm ứng dụng trên nền tảng Web và Service trên nền tảng Java.
- Tham mưu và đề xuất phương án cải tiến nhằm nâng cao khả năng chịu tải và an toàn cho các kết nối giữa các hệ thống với nhau.
- Lập trình tích hợp, kiểm tra, sửa lỗi các hệ thống theo kế hoạch đảm bảo tuân thủ theo quy trình nghiệp vụ, tiến độ, tiêu chuẩn, chất lượng, sản phẩm CNTT.
- Thực hiện kiểm thử (Unit Test).
- Thực hiện các công việc khác theo sự phân công của cấp quản lý.
requirements:
Yêu cầu về bằng cấp/chứng chỉ

- Tốt nghiệp Đại học trở lên các chuyên ngành CNTT hoặc các ngành có liên quan.
- Ưu tiên có các chứng chỉ quốc tế có liên quan.
- Trình độ ngoại ngữ: tiếng Anh giao tiếp, đọc hiểu tài liệu liên quan.

Yêu cầu về kinh nghiệm, kiến thức

- Ít nhất 03 năm kinh nghiệm làm việc Lập trình ứng dụng bằng Java.
- Có kinh nghiệm làm tốt về Back-End, API Webservice, Micro services, xử lý tốt MultiTask, Multithread, Multi-processing, cơ chế Hash table, cơ chế xử lý file.
- Có kinh nghiệm tích hợp / phát triển: RESTful APIs, SOAP, TCP/IP.
- Có kinh nghiệm làm việc với các hệ điều hành Enterprise Linux, Windows Server.
- Có kinh nghiệm làm việc trên các web container: JBOSS, Weblogic, IBM Websphere.

Có các kiến thức sau là một lợi thế:

- Có kiến thức về các Middleware: Enterprise service bus (ESB), Oracle Service Bus, IBM Integration Bus,
- Microservices, Caching Server, Load balancer, Reverse Proxy, and Firewall, Queue.
- Các framework: Java (Spring, Struts, Hibernate, JDBC, JPA …), .NET (MVC, .Net Core, Entity, Linq)
- Khái niệm Agile, Scrum, DevOps, CI/CD, các công cụ như: Gitlab, Jenkins v.v…
- Biết về Docker/Kubernetes and Cloud Infrastructure

CHẾ ĐỘ ĐÃI NGỘ:

- Chế độ Lương và thu nhập hấp dẫn: các khoản thưởng vào nhiều dịp Lễ, Tết trong năm (thưởng tháng 13, thưởng danh hiệu theo cá nhân, thưởng kết quả hoạt động, kinh doanh của Đơn vị,…);
- Được đào tạo nghiệp vụ, kiến thức công việc liên quan;
- Cơ hội nghề nghiệp & lộ trình thăng tiến rõ ràng;
- Du lịch nghỉ mát hàng năm.
benefits:
“Chất lượng nguồn nhân lực luôn là mối quan tâm hàng đầu của các doanh nghiệp. Thực tế đã chứng minh, những doanh nghiệp có chiến lược nhân sự hiệu quả đều đạt được các thành tựu đột phá. Trong tương lai, điều này còn quan trọng hơn khi tri thức, sáng tạo và cảm xúc trở thành những yếu tố tiên quyết trong cạnh tranh và phát triển”

(Ông Lê Đức Thịnh – Phó TGĐ)

jobDescription:
Job SummaryWe are seeking a highly skilled and passionate Mobile Engineer with expertise in React Native to join our dynamic team at Hitachi Digital Services LLC. You will be instrumental in developing and maintaining innovative mobile applications that deliver exceptional user experiences.Job Responsibilities

* Design, develop, and maintain high-performance, scalable, and secure mobile applications using React Native.

* Collaborate closely with product managers, UI/UX designers, and backend engineers to define, design, and ship new features.

* Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code following best practices and architectural patterns.

* Participate in code reviews, providing constructive feedback and ensuring code quality.

* Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve issues and bugs in existing applications.

* Continuously discover, evaluate, and implement new technologies to maximize development efficiency and improve application performance.

* Optimize applications for maximum speed and scalability across various mobile devices and operating systems.

* Stay up-to-date with the latest mobile development trends, tools, and technologies.

* Contribute to the overall architecture and technical vision of our mobile products.

J
requirements:
Job Qualifications

- Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field, or equivalent practical experience.
- 3+ years of professional experience in mobile application development.
- Proven expertise in React Native development, including a strong understanding of its ecosystem, state management libraries (e.g., Redux, MobX), and component lifecycle.
- Solid understanding of JavaScript/TypeScript, ES6+, and modern front-end development practices.
- Experience with native module development (iOS/Android) for integrating platform-specific functionalities is a plus.
- Familiarity with RESTful APIs, asynchronous programming, and data serialization formats (JSON).
- Experience with version control systems (e.g., Git).
- Strong problem-solving skills and the ability to work independently as well as in a team environment.
- Excellent communication and collaboration skills.
- Experience with testing frameworks (e.g., Jest, React Native Testing Library) is desirable.
- Knowledge of agile development methodologies.

Nice to Have

- Experience with Kotlin/Java for Android.
- Familiarity with AI/ML frameworks (Core ML, TensorFlow Lite).
- Exposure to cross‑platform frameworks like Flutter.
- Having Japanese Languages is a big plus
- Having domain of Insurance/ Banking knowledge is a big plus

Soft Skills

- Strong problem-solving skills and analytical thinking.
- Ability to work independently and collaborate in cross-functional teams.
- Good communication skills in English
- Willing to go onsite customer's office in HCMC

jobDescription:

- Quản trị hệ thống mạng: Thiết lập, cấu hình và duy trì hạ tầng mạng, bao gồm các thiết bị như router, switch, firewall và các hệ thống mạng khác.
- Giám sát và bảo trì: Theo dõi hoạt động mạng để phát hiện sự cố và xử lý các vấn đề kỹ thuật, thực hiện sao lưu và khôi phục dữ liệu, kiểm tra và nâng cấp phần mềm, và thực hiện các biện pháp bảo mật.

- Lập kế hoạch và mở rộng mạng: Thực hiện kế hoạch phát triển và mở rộng hệ thống mạng theo nhu cầu của tổ chức, đánh giá và triển khai các công nghệ mới, nâng cấp hạ tầng hiện hữu và tăng cường khả năng mạng.

requirements:
1. Bằng cấp/Chứng chỉ:

- Tốt nghiệp Đại học các chuyên ngành về công nghệ thông tin.

- Tiếng Anh: Không yêu cầu bằng cấp nhưng ứng viên phải có khả năng giao tiếp, hội họp và đọc hiểu thông thạo tài liệu chuyên ngành.

- Ưu tiên ứng viên có  chmột trong các chứng chỉ

CCNA (Cisco Certified Network Associate): Chứng chỉ cơ bản về công nghệ mạng của Cisco, cung cấp kiến thức về định tuyến, chuyển mạch, và an ninh mạng.CCNP (Cisco Certified Network Professional): Chứng chỉ nâng cao hơn CCNA, chứng minh khả năng quản lý mạng lớn và phức tạp.MCSA (Microsoft Certified Systems Administrator): Chứng chỉ này xác thực khả năng cài đặt, vận hành, và bảo trì hệ thống mạng máy tính trên nền tảng Microsoft Windows Server hoặc các chứng chỉ quản trị hệ thống trên nền tảng mã nguồn mở như LPICEH (Certified Ethical Hacker): Chứng chỉ này chứng minh khả năng của một chuyên gia trong việc tìm kiếm và khắc phục các lỗ hổng bảo mật.CISM (Certified Information Security Manager): Chứng chỉ quản lý bảo mật thông tin, tập trung vào việc quản lý rủi ro và thiết kế chính sách bảo mật.

2. Kiến thức/Kinh nghiệm chuyên môn:

- Có từ 2 năm kinh nghiệm quản trị  giải pháp mạng, hệ thống mạng.

- Hiểu biết chuyên sâu tối thiểu một giải pháp mạng hoặc quản trị hệ thống mạng WAN/LAN.

- Có kinh nghiệm lập kế hoạch hoặc triển khai các nhiệm vụ phụ trong dự án.

(Ông Lê Đức Thịnh – Phó TGĐ kiêm Giám đốc Khối Nguồn nhân lực)

title: Software Engineer (Python, TypeScript)
label: HOT
reasons:
- Hi-tech working environment
- Young and dynamic colleagues
- International experience
jobDescription:
Why this role is different

Most engineering jobs ask you to maintain legacy systems or add features to crowded codebases. This isn't that.

You'll be one of the founding engineers shaping two products that sit at the intersection of AI, enterprise software, and infrastructure — at a moment when those three things are being rewritten from scratch. The code you write in your first six months will still be running in production five years from now. The architectural decisions you make will shape how thousands of Korean small businesses experience AI, and how GPU compute is delivered across Southeast Asia.

We don't believe in 200-person engineering orgs where you ship one feature per quarter. We believe in small teams of strong engineers who own entire systems end-to-end, ship fast, and use AI tools to operate like teams 5x their size.

The two products you'll build

CoSAP — AI-Powered Business Intelligence for Korean SMEs

Korean small and medium businesses run on Douzone and ECount — ERP systems that hold decades of accounting and operational data, but expose it through forms and reports built for accountants, not founders. CoSAP changes that. We let business owners ask questions in plain Korean — "왜 이번 달 마진이 떨어졌어?" (why did our margin drop this month?) — and get answers backed by their actual financial data.

Under the hood: a multi-tenant data layer connecting Douzone and ECount, retrieval over financial and operational data using PostgreSQL with pgvector and Qdrant, event streaming with Kafka, workflow orchestration with Kestra, and self-hosted LLM serving with vLLM. The Korean SME market is 7+ million businesses. Almost none of them have access to real business intelligence today.

Fusionflow — GPU & AI Infrastructure Orchestration

GPUs are the most expensive, most contested compute resource on earth right now. We operate Kubernetes-based GPU clusters across multiple data centers and turn them into reliable, multi-tenant compute that customers can actually use. Fusionflow is the orchestration layer: scheduling, isolation, observability, and operations.

You'll work on real distributed systems problems — GPU scheduling under contention, node health and failure recovery, network performance tuning across InfiniBand and RoCE, tenant isolation, and the operational tooling needed to run hundreds of GPUs reliably. We currently operate a 19-node K3s cluster with 160+ GPUs and are scaling significantly through 2026.

What you'll actually do

Concretely — not buzzwords, but the kind of tickets you'll close in your first year:

- Build the next-generation ERP connector layer for CoSAP — designing schemas, sync logic, and conflict resolution for ECount and Douzone data flowing into our analytics layer.
- Improve retrieval quality for natural-language financial queries — chunking strategies, embedding models, hybrid search, and evaluation pipelines.
- Design and operate Fusionflow's GPU scheduling logic — how do we fairly allocate scarce GPU resources across tenants while keeping latency low?
- Harden cluster operations — node health monitoring, automated remediation, network tuning, DDoS mitigation, observability.
- Write production-grade APIs and internal tooling in Python and TypeScript that other engineers, ops staff, and customers depend on.
- Review AI-generated code with the same rigor as human code — catching subtle bugs, hallucinated APIs, security issues, and performance regressions.
- Be on-call for systems you build. Debug real outages. Write the postmortem. Ship the fix.
requirements:
In the AI era, raw coding skill is no longer the bottleneck. Almost anyone can produce working code with Claude Code or Cursor. What separates strong engineers from average ones now is judgment, taste, and verification discipline. Here's what we actually screen for, in priority order:

1. Verification instinct — the ability to spot when AI output is wrong

- This is the #1 filter. AI tools produce confident, plausible-looking code that is sometimes subtly broken — hallucinated APIs, wrong async behavior, race conditions, security holes, schema mismatches. The best engineers today treat AI output as a draft from a fast, overconfident junior, not as truth. We will test this in the interview.

2. Strong fundamentals in distributed systems

- You understand consistency, idempotency, retries, queues, timeouts, and what happens when networks partition. You've worked with Kubernetes, Kafka (or equivalent), and PostgreSQL in production — not just in tutorials. You know why SELECT FOR UPDATE exists and when to use it.

3. Problem decomposition over prompt engineering

- Given an ambiguous request, you ask the right clarifying questions before writing code. You can break "sync ECount data into our analytics layer" into a concrete technical plan covering schema, ingestion, idempotency, error handling, and observability — before opening Claude Code.

4. Production ownership and operational maturity

- You've been on-call. You've debugged a real outage at 2 AM. You read logs, traces, and metrics fluently. You write code defensively because you've been burned. You don't say "works on my machine" — you say "let me check what differs in production."

5. Code reading > code writing

- Most of your time is spent reading and reviewing, not greenfield writing. You can drop into an unfamiliar codebase, orient yourself in a few hours, and identify what to change. You're comfortable navigating large repos, reading other people's code, and understanding intent.

6. AI tool fluency with healthy skepticism

- Daily use of Claude Code, Cursor, or Copilot. Familiarity with MCP, agent workflows, tool calling, and prompt design. Most importantly: you know where these tools fail and you compensate. A candidate who blindly trusts AI output is more dangerous than one who doesn't use it at all.

7. Clear written communication in English

- PR descriptions, technical specs, runbooks, prompt design, async messaging with a globally distributed team. Clear writing equals clear thinking. We work asynchronously across Singapore, HCMC, and Korea — written communication is the medium.

The stack you'll work with

- Languages: Python, TypeScript / Node.js (some Go for infrastructure)
- Data: PostgreSQL, pgvector, Qdrant, Kafka, Kestra
- AI / ML: vLLM, sentence-transformers, embedding models, RAG pipelines
- Infrastructure: Kubernetes (K3s), Docker, Linux, GPU operators
- Networking: InfiniBand, RoCE, DWDM (you'll learn what you don't know)
- AI Tooling: Claude Code, Cursor, MCP servers, custom agent workflows
- Observability: Prometheus, Grafana, structured logging
- Source / CI" Git, GitHub Actions, code review culture

Nice-to-haves (not required)

- Korean language reading ability — significant advantage for CoSAP work
- Experience with ERP systems (Douzone, ECount, SAP, Oracle)
- GPU/CUDA familiarity, or experience operating Kubernetes with GPU workloads
- RAG and vector search tuning experience
- Smart contract or blockchain experience (we have adjacent projects in tokenized infrastructure)
- Open-source contributions, technical blog, or side projects we can look at
benefits:
Compensation & equity

- Competitive base salary benchmarked against top HCMC tech employers (Grab, Shopee, VNG, Tiki)
- Performance-based bonuses tied to milestones, not vague "culture fit" reviews
- Meaningful equity participation — you own a piece of what you build
- Health insurance for you and immediate family

Growth & learning

- Direct mentorship from the CTO and senior engineers across Singapore and Korea
- Annual learning budget for courses, conferences, and certifications
- Paid AI tool subscriptions (Claude Pro/Max, Cursor, etc.) — we want you using the best tools
- Conference travel — APAC tech conferences, KubeCon, GTC, etc.
- Travel to Singapore and Korea for offsites, customer visits, and team weeks

Job Summary

The UX Specialist is a data-driven advocate for the user, responsible for uncovering deep insights into user behavior and translating them into actionable feedback for the development team. Unlike a generalist designer, this role focuses heavily on User Research, Usability Testing, and UX Auditing. You will be the "guardian of quality," ensuring that every feature developed is intuitive, accessible, and solves real user problems.

- Position: team member or team lead
- Open level: from Middle to Senior level
- Work location (select 1 of 2 options below):In Vietnam: HoChiMinh city, central districtsOnsite in Dubai: extremely high benefits, all living costs covered by allowance (accommodation, meals on working days, transportation)

- 9:00 - 18:00 (or flexible to 8:00 - 17:00 depending on policy at the moment)
- Monday to Friday

Key Responsibilities

- User Research & Discovery: Plan and conduct qualitative and quantitative research (User interviews, surveys, card sorting, and field studies) to understand user needs and pain points.
- Usability Testing: Lead end-to-end usability testing sessions on prototypes and live products to identify friction points.
- UX Auditing & Heuristic Evaluation: Regularly perform expert reviews of current UI/UX designs to ensure compliance with design principles and accessibility standards (WCAG).
- Feedback & Documentation: Synthesize complex research data into clear, actionable reports. Provide specific, constructive feedback to UI Designers and Developers.
- User Journey Mapping: Create and maintain User Journey Maps, Service Blueprints, and User Flows to visualize the end-to-end experience.
- Competitive Analysis: Monitor industry trends and competitor products to identify opportunities for innovation and improvement.
- Validation: Review implemented features during the UAT (User Acceptance Testing) phase to ensure they meet the defined UX requirements.
requirements:
Requirements & Qualifications

- Education: Bachelor’s degree in Human-Computer Interaction (HCI), Psychology, Computer Science, Design, or a related field.
- Experience: 3+ years of experience in UX Research, UX Design, or Product Analysis.● Portfolio: A strong portfolio demonstrating your research process, case studies of how your feedback improved a product, and your ability to analyze complex flows.● Technical Proficiency: * Proficiency in design tools like Figma or Adobe XD (for wireframing and prototyping).Experience with research/analytics tools (e.g., Hotjar, Mixpanel,Maze, Google Analytics, Usertesting.com).
- Experience with research/analytics tools (e.g., Hotjar, Mixpanel,Maze, Google Analytics, Usertesting.com).

Key Skills (Technical)

- Research Methodology: Mastery of various research methods (A/B testing, ethnography, longitudinal studies).
- Data Analysis: Ability to interpret both qualitative feedback (what users say) and quantitative data (what users do).
- Information Architecture: Understanding how to organize content and navigation to be most effective for users.
- Prototyping: Ability to create low-to-mid fidelity wireframes to communicate structural changes quickly.
- [optional] Coding (or vibe coding): Know how to implement an web or mobile application

Soft Skills

- Empathy: The ability to put yourself in the user's shoes and represent their voice within the company.
- Communication & Persuasion: Strong storytelling skills to present findings to stakeholders and the ability to negotiate with Developers/Product Managers.
- Critical Thinking: A sharp eye for detail and the ability to spot logical flaws in a user flow before they reach production.
- Constructive Radical Candor: The ability to give direct, honest feedback to the development team while maintaining a collaborative and positive relationship.
- Adaptability: Comfortable working in an Agile/Scrum environment where priorities can shift quickly.

title: Senior Machine Learning Engineer (AI, C/C++, Python)

About the Company

OTANICS provides comprehensive IoT-based solutions for aquaculture that combine sensors and data science with state-of-the-art computer vision and Artificial Intelligence (AI) technologies. Our solutions provide supporting tools for shrimp farmers with insightful recommendations to make better, well-informed decisions, lower costs, and significantly increase yields as we strive toward a more sustainable aquaculture. Backed by top multinational corporations, we offer a large customer base and a work environment that prioritizes professional growth and performance.

The Job Overview

We are seeking a Senior Machine Learning Engineer to provide technical leadership within our growing team. You will collaborate with a diverse group of software engineers, data scientists, and ML experts to architect and deploy advanced models that solve real-world aquaculture challenges. As a senior member of the team, you are expected to stay at the forefront of AI developments, mentoring junior engineers while driving the technical direction of our perception and prediction pipelines.

Responsibilities

As a Senior Machine Learning Engineer, you will:

- Drive the research and development of advanced AI models for specialized shrimp farming and processing applications.

requirements:

- In-depth, hands-on knowledge of deep learning fundamentals.

- Deep familiarity with modern deep learning architectures (e.g., Transformers, CNNs).
- Experience deploying ML models into production pipelines with monitoring, validation, and iteration loops.
- Excellent communication skills with the ability to translate complex technical concepts for non-technical stakeholders.
benefits:

title: Agentic AI Engineer/Developer (Vertex AI/ADK)
label: HOT
reasons:
- Social Work-Life Balance That Works for You
- Attractive salary & benefit, 25 days annual leave
- Premium health insurance for employee & family
jobDescription:
The position

Are you passionate about the next generation of AI systems that can reason, use tools, and execute real-world workflows? As an Agentic AI Developer, you’ll be joining our innovative AI engineering team that’s responsible for designing, building, and maintaining autonomous AI agents on Google Cloud. Your role will not only focus on implementing reliable agentic applications, but also on elevating our AI development lifecycle, improving orchestration patterns, and enhancing evaluation workflows and processes.

We’re looking for someone who thrives on building with LLMs, understands how agents “think,” and enjoys working with tools like Vertex AI, Gemini, and the Agent Development Kit (ADK). If you have a solid programming foundation and are eager to grow in the agentic AI space, you’ll get to take your AI engineering skills to the next level!

What you’ll be doing

- Designing and implementing autonomous AI agents using the Google Agent Development Kit (ADK) in Python or Java
- Integrating tools such as REST APIs, Google Search, internal services, and databases so agents can interact with external systems
- Assisting in orchestrating multi-agent workflows where agents collaborate, plan, and review each other’s work
- Developing and refining prompts and system instructions using techniques like ReAct (Reasoning and Acting) and Chain of Thought to increase reliability
- Using Vertex AI evaluation tools to test agent performance, identify hallucinations, and ensure compliance with safety guardrails
- Deploying and managing agents on Vertex AI Agent Engine Runtime to ensure scalability, availability, and performance
requirements:
Requirements

- Proficiency in Python (preferred) or Java
- Basic understanding of LLM application frameworks (e.g. LangChain, AutoGen) and a strong desire to master Google ADK
- Familiarity with Google Cloud Platform (GCP), in particular AI platform(formerly Vertex AI), Model Garden (Gemini), and Cloud Functions
- Ability to work with RESTful APIs, JSON data structures, and basic SQL or vector databases
- Understanding of core reasoning patterns for agents, including planning, memory management, and tool-calling loops
- Strong command of English (both written and spoken)
- A collaborative team player, eager to learn and share knowledge

Nice To Have

- Experience with Google Gemini models and Vertex AI Studio
- Previous projects involving RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation)
- Basic understanding of containerization (Docker) and CI/CD pipelines
- A portfolio or GitHub repository showcasing a functional AI agent or automation script

Soft skills

- System thinking skills to visualize complex workflows and break them down into small, executable steps
- An iterative learner mindset, comfortable with keeping up with new SDK updates and architectural patterns in a rapidly evolving field
- Safety-conscious, with a strong “human-in-the-loop” mindset that prioritises accuracy and safety over pure speed
- Excellent communication skills to work constructively and cooperatively with internal and external stakeholders
- High degree of responsibility and autonomy, with the ability to manage your own work in an international environment
benefits:
- International Collaboration: Gain invaluable experience working within a truly European and international landscape. You will learn to navigate different cultures and adapt your working style in a highly collaborative, global environment.
- Open-Minded Culture: Join a team that values diverse perspectives and rewards those who are eager to learn from international colleagues.
- Hands-on Experience: Work with the latest Google Cloud AI stack at the cutting edge of technology.
- Mentorship: Receive guidance from senior AI engineers in a fast-paced, "agent-first" environment.
- Real Impact: The opportunity to build production-grade AI that does more than just talk—it acts.
- Rewards & Flexibility: A competitive salary package with a wide range of extra-legal benefits and a flexible, tech-savvy work environment.
- Flexible Work: Enjoy a flexible work environment that values results over rigid schedules. Off on Saturday and Sunday. Annual holidays leave will be following Vietnam law and as company regulations.
- 25 days of annual leave, 13th salary, Social insurance, health insurance, and unemployment insurance will be under Labor Law.
- Generous private medical health insurance for employees & family members
- Team building activities & outing

title: Senior Embedded SW Engineer (Automotive SiL/ vECU)
company: Bosch Global Software Technologies Company Limited
reasons:
- Committed 13th-mth bonus + attractive yearly bonus
- Premium Healthcare for you and 2 family members
- 16++ days of paid leave per year
jobDescription:
Team Information

Airbag team are growing in Vietnam. The Airbag team in Vietnam is a part of the Bosch Airbag Global team, responsible for SW development of Airbag Control Unit to leading Chinese, Japanese, and ASEAN car makers.

- We are looking for talented team members with passion in developing safety products that save lives.
- We offer a lot of training and practical hands-on in Automotive Embedded SW and Airbag system domain.
- Opportunity to work in an international environment with stakeholders and global experts.
- Join us: the Bosch AIRBAG global team which creates "EXPLOSIONS THAT SAVE LIFE"

As a Software-in-the-Loop (SiL) Engineer, you will play a key role in shaping and advancing our SiL/vECU platform to support cutting-edge automotive software development and testing.

Your main roles and responsibilities

- Requirements Engineering: Analyze and transform complex user requirements for SiL systems into detailed technical specifications and innovative solution designs.
- Architectural Design: Define, design, and evolve the SiL/vECU (virtual Electronic Control Unit) architecture, ensuring scalability, performance, and maintainability.
- Platform Development: Lead the development, implementation, and enhancement of the SiL platform, supporting advanced software development and comprehensive testing activities.
- Automation & Integration: Develop sophisticated automated test scripts and frameworks within the SiL environment, and seamlessly integrate SiL solutions into continuous integration (CI/CD) and continuous testing (CT) pipelines.
- Feature Customization: Design and implement specific SiL features and capabilities tailored to the unique requirements of diverse customer projects.
- Debugging & Optimization: Proactively identify, diagnose, and resolve complex issues within the SiL environment, implementing effective and robust solutions.
requirements:
Mandatory Qualifications

- Education: Bachelor's or Master's degree in Electrical Engineering, Electronics Engineering, Mechatronics, Computer Science, or a closely related technical field.
- Experience:3-7 years of progressive experience in the Automotive Embedded domain.2-3 years of dedicated hands-on experience with Software-in-the-Loop (SiL) development and integration.
- 3-7 years of progressive experience in the Automotive Embedded domain.
- 2-3 years of dedicated hands-on experience with Software-in-the-Loop (SiL) development and integration.
- Technical Expertise:AUTOSAR: Expert-level knowledge (L4) and practical experience with AUTOSAR framework, methodologies, and standards.Automotive Protocols: Strong understanding (L3) of key automotive communication protocols, including CAN, FlexRay, LIN, Ethernet, and SPI.Programming: High proficiency (L4) in programming languages such as C/C++ and Python.
- AUTOSAR: Expert-level knowledge (L4) and practical experience with AUTOSAR framework, methodologies, and standards.
- Automotive Protocols: Strong understanding (L3) of key automotive communication protocols, including CAN, FlexRay, LIN, Ethernet, and SPI.
- Programming: High proficiency (L4) in programming languages such as C/C++ and Python.
- Problem-Solving: Exceptional logical thinking, analytical, and problem-solving skills, with a proven ability to tackle complex technical challenges.
- Communication: Excellent verbal and written communication skills, capable of articulating complex technical concepts clearly to diverse audiences.
- Language: Fluency in English (both written and spoken) is mandatory.

Nice to Have (Preferred Qualifications)

- Testing Methodologies: Experience with various software testing methodologies, including unit, integration, and system testing.
- Project Leadership: Prior experience in project management, technical lead roles, or coordinating cross-functional engineering efforts.
- Model-Based Design: Familiarity with Model-Based Design tools (e.g., MATLAB/Simulink) for automotive applications.
- Virtualization: Experience with virtual ECU (vECU) environments and associated tools.
- Cloud Integration: Exposure to integrating simulation environments with cloud-based platforms.
benefits:
Why BOSCH?

Because we do not just follow trends, we create them. Together we turn ideas into reality, working every day to make the world of tomorrow a better place. Do you have high standards when it comes to your job? So do we. At Bosch, you will discover more than just work.

Benefits and Career Opportunities

- Working in one of the Best Places to Work in Vietnam and Top 30 of the Most Innovative Companies all over the world
- English-speaking environment, with opportunity to be part of innovation team and work in global projects
- Onsite opportunities
- Engage in our diverse training programs which surely help strengthen both your personal and professionalism
- Flexible working time
- 13th-month salary bonus + attractive performance bonus (you'll love it!) + annual performance appraisal
- 100% offered salary and mandatory social insurances in 2-month probation
- 15++ days of annual leave + 1-day of birthday leave
- Premium health insurance for employee and 02 family members
- Lunch and parking allowance
- Good benefits of company activities such as: football, badminton, yoga, Aerobic, team building…

title: IT Project Manager (ERP, SAP, Oracle)
label: NEW
jobDescription:
Vietnam Housewares is embarking on a major ERP transformation initiative to upgrade and optimize our Arito ERP system. This initiative aims to better support our Manufacturing, Finance, Operations, and Supply Chain functions.

We are seeking an experienced IT Project Manager who combines strong project management capabilities with hands-on ERP experience. This role will play a critical part in driving the ERP upgrade from planning through execution and go-live.

You will work closely with the Head of IT, ERP Specialist, and cross-functional business stakeholders to ensure successful delivery—from requirements gathering and process mapping to vendor coordination, testing, and user adoption.

This is a high-impact, cross-functional role, ideal for someone who can effectively translate business needs into actionable IT solutions.

KEY RESONSIBILIES

1/ ERP Improvement

- Lead end-to-end project management of the Arito ERP upgrade initiative
- Gather, analyze, and document business requirements across Production, Finance, Operations, and Supply Chain teams
- Map current (AS-IS) and future (TO-BE) business processes
- Manage vendor relationships, ensuring alignment on scope, timelines and deliverables
- Coordinate User Acceptance Testing (UAT) with business stakeholders
- Plan and execute training for end users and support go-live activities

2/ Project Management & Governance

- Develop and maintain project plans, timelines, and status reports
- Identify, track, and mitigate project risks and dependencies
- Produce clear IT documentation: system maps, process flows, SOPs, and handover materials)
- Facilitate meetings, workshops, and stakeholder reviews
- Track action items and ensure accountability across teams

3/ IT and Operational Support

- Support the Head of IT in assessing current IT infrastructure and systems
- Coordinate with external vendors and service providers
- Contribute to the development of the IT Action Plan and roadmap
requirements:
Must Have

- Minimum 5 years of experience in IT project management or ERP implementation/upgrade projects
- Hands-on experience with at least one ERP system (Arito, SAP, Oracle, Microsoft Dynamics, or equivalent)
- Strong business process mapping and requirements documentation skills
- Proven ability to work effectively with cross functional business stakeholders
- Experience in managing external vendors and ensuring delivery against commitments
- Strong communication skills in English (written and verbal)
- Highly organized, detail-oriented, and capable of managing multiple workstreams

Nice to Have

- Experience with ERP modules in Manufacturing (PP, production planning, BOM) or Finance (AP/AR, GL, costing) or Operations (inventory, production)
- Project management certification
- Experience in manufacturing or trading companies
- Exposure to IT infrastructure or system integration projects
benefits: Thưởng, khám sức khỏe, đào tạo, nghỉ phép, trợ cấp đi lại

title: Assistant To Head Of IT Department (Agile, English)
company: BIDV - SUMI TRUST LEASING COMPANY., LTD
label: NEW
jobDescription:
TỔNG QUAN VỊ TRÍ

- Đóng vai trò hỗ trợ Trưởng ban trong việc quản trị và điều hành kỹ thuật.
- Chịu trách nhiệm điều phối các dự án phát triển hệ thống, giám sát vận hành hạ tầng và quản lý mối quan hệ với các đối tác CNTT.

POSITION OVERVIEW

- Serve as a key support to the Head of Department in technical management and operations.
- Responsible for coordinating system development projects, overseeing infrastructure operations, and managing relationships with IT partners.

TRÁCH NHIỆM CHÍNH

1.1 Phát triển Hệ thống & Quản lý Đối tác (Ưu tiên số 1)

- Điều phối dự án: Trực tiếp tham gia quản lý vòng đời phát triển phần mềm/hệ thống (SDLC), từ khâu thu thập yêu cầu, thiết kế giải pháp đến triển khai và nghiệm thu.
- Quản lý nhà cung cấp (Vendor Management): Thiết lập tiêu chuẩn, đánh giá năng lực và giám sát tiến độ thực hiện của các đơn vị thuê ngoài. Đảm bảo chất lượng sản phẩm bàn giao đúng cam kết hợp đồng.
- Tối ưu hóa quy trình: Đề xuất các giải pháp công nghệ mới để số hóa và cải thiện hiệu suất làm việc của toàn bộ tổ chức.

1.1 System Development & Vendor Management (Priority Level 1)

- Project Coordination: Actively participate in managing the Software/System Development Life Cycle (SDLC), from requirements gathering and solution design to implementation and acceptance testing.
- Vendor Management: Establish standards, assess vendor capabilities, and monitor the performance and progress of outsourced partners. Ensure deliverables meet contractual commitments and quality standards.
- Process Optimization: Propose new technology solutions to drive digital transformation and improve overall organizational efficiency.

1.2 Quản lý Vận hành & Hỗ trợ Kỹ thuật (Ưu tiên số 1)

- Duy trì hệ thống: Giám sát công tác bảo trì, nâng cấp hệ thống phần cứng, phần mềm và hạ tầng mạng định kỳ.
- Xử lý sự cố (Helpdesk): Chịu trách nhiệm cao nhất trong việc tiếp nhận và giải quyết các vấn đề kỹ thuật phức tạp, đảm bảo tính liên tục của hệ thống CNTT.
- Quản trị rủi ro: Xây dựng và thực thi các kịch bản ứng phó sự cố, bảo mật thông tin và sao lưu dữ liệu (Backup & Recovery).

1.2 Operations Management & Technical Support (Priority Level 1)

- System Maintenance: Oversee periodic maintenance and upgrades of hardware, software, and network infrastructure.
- Incident Handling (Helpdesk): Take primary responsibility for receiving and resolving complex technical issues, ensuring continuity of IT systems.
- Risk Management: Develop and implement incident response scenarios, information security measures, and data backup & recovery plans.

1.3 Lập kế hoạch & Tham mưu Chiến lược (Ưu tiên số 2)

- Xây dựng kế hoạch: Hỗ trợ Trưởng ban lập ngân sách CNTT hàng năm và lộ trình (Roadmap) phát triển công nghệ thực tiễn, bám sát mục tiêu kinh doanh
- Báo cáo điều hành: Tổng hợp số liệu, phân tích hiệu quả hoạt động IT để tham mưu cho Trưởng ban trong các cuộc họp chiến lược.

1.3. Planning & Strategic Advisory (Priority Level 2)

- Planning & Budgeting: Support the Head of Department in preparing the annual IT budget and developing a practical technology roadmap aligned with business objectives.
- Executive Reporting: Consolidate data and analyze IT performance metrics to provide advisory input to the Head of Department during strategic meetings.
requirements:
YÊU CẦU TUYỂN DỤNG

2.1. Trình độ & Kinh nghiệm

- Giáo dục: Tốt nghiệp Đại học trở lên chuyên ngành Công nghệ thông tin, Hệ thống thông tin quản lý hoặc các chuyên ngành liên quan.

- Có kinh nghiệm thực tế trong lĩnh vực CNTT (ưu tiên ứng viên từng làm việc tại nước ngoài hoặc môi trường quốc tế).
- Có kinh nghiệm ở vị trí quản lý (tương đương Phó Trưởng bộ phận trở lên) trong các doanh nghiệp.
- Ưu tiên: Đã từng làm việc trong các công ty liên doanh hoặc tập đoàn đa quốc gia.

2.1. Education & Experience

- Education: Bachelor’s degree or higher in Information Technology, Management Information Systems, or related fields.
- Work Experience:Proven practical experience in the IT field (candidates with overseas or international working experience are preferred).Experience in a managerial position (equivalent to Deputy Head of Department or above) within enterprises.Preferred: Prior experience working in joint ventures or multinational corporations.
- Proven practical experience in the IT field (candidates with overseas or international working experience are preferred).
- Experience in a managerial position (equivalent to Deputy Head of Department or above) within enterprises.
- Preferred: Prior experience working in joint ventures or multinational corporations.

2.2. Kỹ năng & Nghiệp vụ

- Chuyên môn: Am hiểu sâu về lập kế hoạch thực tiễn CNTT, quản lý dự án (PMP/Agile), quản lý rủi ro hệ thống.
- Ngoại ngữ: Thành thạo Tiếng Anh (nghe, nói, đọc, viết) để làm việc trực tiếp với đối tác nước ngoài và tài liệu chuyên môn.
- Kỹ năng mềm: Tư duy chiến lược, khả năng điều phối nhân sự, kỹ năng đàm phán và giải quyết vấn đề dưới áp lực cao.

2.2. Skills & Competencies

- Technical Expertise: Strong knowledge of practical IT planning, project management (PMP/Agile), and system risk management.
- Language: Proficient in English (listening, speaking, reading, writing) to work directly with foreign partners and technical documentation.
- Soft Skills: Strategic thinking, personnel coordination capability, negotiation skills, and ability to solve problems under high pressure.
