- Ensure the database facilities operating and recovery within the agreed SLA.

- Determine the best approach for system protection requirement such as load balancing, failover, remote site protection, etc.

- Determine the risks in database facilities and the resolution to rectify the risks.

2. Operation Support

- Perform any database cleansing ensuring the health working environment.

- Implement ETL, clean up and transform external data to fit the desired format, efficiently importing large volumes of data extracted from multiple systems into a data warehouse environment.

- Determine the effectiveness of the restoration for the database by the backup data.

- Determine/define the mechanism for the monitoring of the performance & exceptions of the database facilities.

- Determine/define the mechanism on detecting any issues happening in the database facilities in the campus.

- Rectify the issues immediately if happening.

- Perform user administrative activities on database level but not included user administration on application level.

- Define/design the operation reports required to summaries the status of the database facilities for management. This shall include the utilization vs capacity, rate of availability, issues, etc.

3. Security & Authentication

- Determine potential weaknesses of the database software and the company’s overall system.

- Determine how to protect the database facilities.

- Implement best practices to minimize security risks.

- Set up access policy according to the company’s role matrix to control who has access and what type of access they are allowed.

- Set up audit policy.

- Consult audit logs in the case of a security breach or irregularity.

4. Documentation & Version Control

- Document the design of the database facilities with the detail of diagram, system parameters and requirement, protection mechanism, and other related material as well as its historical changes becoming part of the IT Architecture Dossier.

- Prepare the documents keep the latest and historical information of the facilities becoming part of the inventory control of the department.

- Maintain the configuration document for each facility keeping the latest configuration parameter, historical changes on parameters in each device, and the method of changing the parameter becoming part of the

- Configuration Control and Version Control within the department

- Prepare the operation guide for each facility.

title: DevOps/ SRE Engineer (Cloud/MLOps/AI)
company: CÔNG TY CỔ PHẦN THANH TOÁN TRỰC TUYẾN TOÀN CẦU
jobDescription:
Chúng tôi đang tìm kiếm một kỹ sư DevOps/SRE đam mê công nghệ, có khả năng nắm bắt xu hướng nhanh bén. Bạn sẽ là người giữ cho hệ thống Fintech và Vận tải luôn hoạt động trơn tru (đảm bảo tính High Availability, Security), đồng thời tiên phong áp dụng các công cụ/giải pháp AI để tự động hóa, giám sát hệ thống và tối ưu hóa quy trình phát triển phần mềm (AIOps/MLOps).

Trách nhiệm chính

1. Vận hành & Đảm bảo độ tin cậy (Site Reliability - SRE)

- Xây dựng, quản lý và tối ưu hóa cơ sở hạ tầng Cloud (AWS/GCP/Azure) phục vụ cho cả mảng Fintech (yêu cầu bảo mật cao, độ trễ thấp) và mảng Vận tải (hệ thống tracking thời gian thực, lưu lượng dữ liệu lớn).
- Thiết lập và giám sát các chỉ số SLI, SLO, SLA. Đảm bảo hệ thống đạt uptime 99.99%.
- Xây dựng hệ thống Monitoring & Alerting toàn diện (Prometheus, Grafana, ELK/EFK stack). Chủ động xử lý sự cố (Incident Management) và thực hiện Post-mortems.

2. CI/CD & Tự động hóa (DevOps)

- Thiết kế và duy trì các pipeline CI/CD tự động, an toàn và tốc độ cao.
- Quản lý Infrastructure as Code (IaC) bằng Terraform, Ansible hoặc Pulumi.
- Quản lý, vận hành và scale hệ thống Container/Orchestration (Docker, Kubernetes).

3. Ứng dụng AI & Nắm bắt xu hướng (Điểm nhấn chiến lược)

- AIOps: Ứng dụng các mô hình AI/Machine Learning vào việc giám sát hệ thống (phát hiện bất thường - anomaly detection, dự đoán tải - predictive scaling, phân tích log thông minh).
- MLOps: Hỗ trợ đội ngũ Data/AI xây dựng hạ tầng và pipeline để training và deploy các mô hình AI (như AI định tuyến vận tải, AI chấm điểm tín dụng Fintech).
- AI Tooling: Tiên phong áp dụng các công cụ AI (như GitHub Copilot, ChatGPT, v.v.) vào công việc hàng ngày để tối ưu hóa việc viết script tự động, tạo tài liệu, hoặc phân tích nguyên nhân gốc rễ (Root Cause Analysis).
- Liên tục cập nhật các xu hướng công nghệ mới về Cloud Computing, SRE và AI để đề xuất cải tiến kiến trúc hệ thống.
requirements:
Kinh nghiệm & Chuyên môn:

- Ít nhất 3-5 năm kinh nghiệm ở vị trí DevOps, SRE hoặc System Engineer.
- Kiến thức sâu rộng về một trong các Cloud Provider lớn (AWS, GCP, Azure).
- Thành thạo Linux, Networking và kiến trúc Microservices.
- Có kinh nghiệm thực tế triển khai và quản trị Kubernetes (K8s) ở môi trường Production.
- Nắm vững các công cụ CI/CD (GitLab CI, GitHub Actions, Jenkins...) và IaC (Terraform).
- Kỹ năng lập trình/scripting tốt với ít nhất một ngôn ngữ: Python, Go, Bash.

Yêu cầu đặc thù:

- Đam mê AI: Có kiến thức cơ bản về quy trình phát triển AI/ML. Rất hoan nghênh ứng viên đã từng làm MLOps hoặc có kinh nghiệm tích hợp AI/LLM API.
- Tư duy hệ thống: Hiểu biết về các yêu cầu bảo mật trong ngành tài chính (PCI-DSS là một lợi thế) và khả năng xử lý bài toán scale lớn trong vận tải.
- Kỹ năng mềm: Tư duy chủ động (proactive), khả năng giải quyết vấn đề xuất sắc, chịu được áp lực cao và có tinh thần tự học hỏi không ngừng.
benefits:
- Mức lương thưởng cạnh tranh, đánh giá năng lực minh bạch.
- Môi trường làm việc cởi mở, khuyến khích thử nghiệm công nghệ mới (đặc biệt là AI).
- Cung cấp các công cụ AI trả phí để hỗ trợ tối đa cho công việc chuyên môn.
- Gói chăm sóc sức khỏe toàn diện và các đặc quyền sử dụng dịch vụ nội bộ (Fintech & Vận tải).

reasons:

jobDescription:
One Mount is Vietnam's largest technological ecosystem that creates solutions along the entire value chain, starting with retail, distribution, real estate, and financial services. Our mission is to build Vietnam's most trusted ecosystem, empowering all people and businesses to realize their full potential at the intersection of technology and humanity.

We are looking for experienced Product Owner to join our product team, lead the delivery of AI and data-driven products in banking and finance in a complex enterprise environment. You will play a critical role in planning, execution, governance, and stakeholder communication, enabling teams to focus on delivering value while maintaining transparency and reporting for leadership.

MAIN RESPONSIBILITIES

- Collaborate with stakeholders to understand business problems and translate them into specific requirements for AI and Data solutions.
- Maintain and prioritize the product backlog, ensuring user stories are well-defined with clear acceptance criteria for data scientists and engineers.
- Act as a bridge between business teams and technical teams, ensuring that the business language is translated accurately into technical specifications.
- Guide development sprints, participate in planning to break down requirements into tasks, remove blockers, and monitor execution to ensure on-time delivery.
- Collaborate with QA and Data teams to define test scenarios and verify that the data/model output meets business expectations .
- Track product usage metrics and basic performance indicators to suggest improvements for the next versions.
- Work with the team to identify risks regarding data quality or logic gaps early in the process.
- Directly report the results, progress, and information of the above processes to the Director.
requirements:
- 4+ years of experience as a Business Analyst or Product Owner in software product development.
- Strong data-driven mindset: comfortable working with numbers, logic and understanding basic data concepts..
- Experience working on data-intensive products is a big plus.
- Ability to write basic SQL queries to check data or analyze issues is a strong advantage.
- Proven ability to create clear user documentation (manuals, workflows) and manage Agile artifacts (user stories, backlog) using JIRA/Confluence.
- Excellent communication skills, with the ability to explain technical constraints to business stakeholders in a simple way.
- Eager to learn about AI/Machine Learning concepts and apply them to solve business problems.
- Ability to independently research & read documents, find solutions, and apply in work.
- Experience in Banking, Finance or Fintech projects is an advantage.
- Good English proficiency is a strong advantage.
- Prior experience working on AI projects is a big plus.
benefits:

- 13-month salary with annual performance bonus, project incentives, sales incentives (based on position)
- Lunch allowance: 730.000 VND/month
- Special occasion bonus: 2.500.000VND/year
- Annual leaves: Up to 20 days/year (based on levels)
- Health: Social insurance, premium health insurance, yearly health check
- Laptop, screen and other needed facilities/accounts/tools for work

Career Growth

- Yearly salary review and promotion
- Diverse career path: Management or Expert and functions rotation opportunity
- Free learning sources in Udemy, Coursera, O'relly platforms; internal workshop, certification sponsorship, and exclusive mentoring from C-levels
- Recognition and awards at team and organizational levels.

Working Environment

- Open & collaborative working space foster both individual focus and teamwork activities
- Young, dynamic, and collaborative working atmosphere
- Unwind zones: gaming, table tennis, yoga, gyms, bath rooms, sleep corner.
- Quarterly/yearly teambuilding & engaged internal events.

- Có kinh nghiệm Fullstack: Backend + Frontend (Python-Flask/FastAPI, React/Angular/Vue.......)
- Tư duy hệ thống, khả năng giải quyết bài toán phức tạp theo định hướng sản phẩm
- Giao tiếp hiệu quả, có khả năng truyền đạt giải pháp kỹ thuật rõ ràng cho cả kỹ thuật và phi kỹ thuật.

Ưu tiên

- Có kinh nghiệm sử dụng các công cụ AI hỗ trợ lập trình (Claude, Cursor, GitHub Copilot…) và các workflow cho coding agents
- Có kinh nghiệm làm việc với các mô hình LLM, GenAI, agenticAI, các kỹ thuật như RAG, CoT, …
- Có kiến thức sâu và rộng về kiến trúc hệ thống CNTT (SQL, NoSQL, Service, Micro Service, Container, Message QUEUE,…).
- Có khả năng dẫn dắt đội nhóm

title: Senior AI Developer (ML/Python/SQL)
company: Bosch Global Software Technologies Company Limited
reasons:
- Committed 13th-mth bonus + attractive yearly bonus
- Premium Healthcare for you and 2 family members
- 16++ days of paid leave per year
jobDescription:
The Senior AI Engineer for this global workflow product plays a specialized role at the intersection of reverse engineering and forward-looking product development. Unlike standard AI roles, this position focuses heavily on "unlocking" decades of tribal knowledge and operational data hidden in legacy silos to power the next generation of AI-driven automation.

You will lead the technical strategy for extracting, mining, and transforming massive volumes of legacy data into high-quality training sets for AI models. Your mission is to evolve our global workflow product from a reactive IT tool into a proactive, AI-driven platform capable of predictive maintenance, anomaly detection, and automated decision-making.

Key Responsibilities

- Legacy Data Mining: Architect and implement advanced data mining techniques to extract valuable operational insights from structured and unstructured legacy systems (e.g., old SQL procedures, mainframe logs, siloed documentation).
- AI Product Evolution: Design and deploy production-ready ML/Deep Learning models that drive core product features such as intelligent workflow routing, natural language interfaces (LLMs), and predictive analytics.
- Feature Engineering for Workflows: Lead the discovery and creation of "features" from legacy data that specifically improve IT workflow efficiency, such as identifying bottleneck patterns or predicting system failures.
- Global Model Management: Oversee the deployment and lifecycle (MLOps) of models across global regions, ensuring low-latency performance and compliance with regional data residency laws (e.g., GDPR, SOC2).
- Reverse Engineering via GenAI: Utilize Generative AI and LLMs to automate the modernization of legacy codebases, turning outdated scripts into documented, cloud-native services.
- Cross-Functional Leadership: Mentor junior engineers and collaborate with Product Managers to translate legacy business logic into modern, AI-powered user experiences
requirements:
Technical Skills & Experience

- Education: Bachelor's or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, or a related quantitative field.
- Experience: 8+ years in software or data engineering, with at least 4+ years specialized in AI/ML deployment in a global production environment.
- AI/ML Mastery: Expert proficiency in Python and frameworks like PyTorch, TensorFlow, or Scikit-learn. Strong experience with LLM Orchestration (e.g., LangChain, LangGraph).
- Data Mining & Engineering: Deep experience with ETL/ELT pipelines, NoSQL/Graph databases, and tools like Apache Spark or Flink for large-scale data processing.
- Infrastructure: Hands-on experience with MLOps (MLflow, Airflow), containerization (Docker, Kubernetes), and global cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or GCP).

Specialized Hybrid Skills

- Legacy System Knowledge: Ability to navigate and extract data from older relational databases or siloed enterprise architectures.
- Analytical Mindset: Proven track record of identifying high-value AI use cases from messy, real-world "dark data".
- Strategic Communication: Ability to justify the ROI of legacy data mining projects to senior leadership.
benefits:
- Private Health Insurance (Generali) : Covered by company
- Personal Accident Insurance: Covered by company
- 13-month Salary Bonus : Guaranteed upon contract completion. (Payment timing: Included in the final payroll of labor contract)
- 12 days annual leave

title: Lead Front-end Developer (JavaScript, ReactJS/Angular)
company: Bosch Global Software Technologies Company Limited
reasons:
- Committed 13th-mth bonus + attractive yearly bonus
- Premium Healthcare for you and 2 family members
- 16++ days of paid leave per year
jobDescription:
Company Description

The Bosch Group is a leading global supplier of technology and services. Since the beginning of 2013, its operations have been divided into four business sectors: Automotive Technology, Industrial Technology, Consumer Goods, and Energy and Building Technology.

The Bosch Group comprises Robert Bosch GmbH and its roughly 360 subsidiaries and regional companies in some 50 countries. If its sales and service partners are included, then Bosch is represented in roughly 150 countries. This worldwide development, manufacturing, and sales network is the foundation for further growth.

Bosch Global Software Technologies Company Limited (BGSV) is 100% owned subsidiary of Robert Bosch GmbH - one of the world’s leading global suppliers of technology and services, offering end-to-end Engineering, IT, and Business Solutions.

Starting its operation from 2010 at Etown 2 in HCMC, BGSV is the first software development center of Bosch in Southeast Asia. BGSV nowadays have over 4,000 associates, with a global footprint and presence in the US, Europe, and the Asia Pacific region.

With our unique ability to offer end-to-end solutions that connect sensors, software, and services, we enable businesses to move from the traditional to digital or improve businesses by introducing a digital element in their products and processes.

Job Description

A Lead Front-End Developer for a global IT workflow product drives the user experience of complex, data-heavy systems. This role requires balancing hands-on technical excellence with the architectural foresight needed to scale products across international markets.

You will lead the front-end strategy for a global IT workflow automation product, guiding architecture and delivery of intuitive, performant experiences for complex, data-heavy use cases. From drag-and-drop workflow builders and real-time dashboards to configuration wizards, you’ll set the technical direction, raise engineering standards, and ensure the UI is responsive, accessible, and reliable across regions and network conditions.

Key Responsibilities

· Technical strategy and architecture: Define the front-end architecture (React + TypeScript primary) including state management patterns, choosing frameworks and patterns that ensure scalability and maintainability. Drive API contract discipline with backend and define caching/streaming strategies for real-time data.

· Design System Management: Own and scale the Bosch Digital Design System and component library, ensuring pixel-perfect consistency across all regions and product modules. You will ensure Bosch Corporate Design is applied correctly.

· Workflow Automation UX: Design and implement intuitive interfaces for complex logic, such as drag-and-drop workflow builders, real-time data dashboards, and integration of wizards.

· Design system leadership: Own and evolve the component library and design tokens (theming, dark/HC modes); govern adoption via Storybook, documentation, and CI gates (lint, a11y, visual regression). Ensure consistency and scalability across modules and international variants.

· Global readiness (i18n, a11y, performance): Ensure high performance across varying network conditions and localized support for multiple languages and regional data standards.

· Engineering excellence and security: Build a testing strategy and implement CI/CD quality gates, bundle analysis, and static checks.

· Cross-Functional Collaboration: Partner with UX/UI designers to bridge the gap between high-fidelity designs and technical feasibility, and with backend teams to define robust API contracts.

· Team Mentorship: Mentor engineers, lead code reviews, establish engineering standards and playbooks, and contribute to hiring and onboarding.
requirements:
Must Have

- Education: Bachelor’s or master's degree in computer science, Engineering, or a related field.
- Experience: 7+ years of professional front-end experience, including 3+ years leading teams or major initiatives on large-scale web apps.
- Core Languages: Expert in modern JavaScript (ES6+), HTML5, CSS3 (Sass/CSS Modules) and modern layout.
- Frameworks: Extensive experience with React, Angular, or Vue.js, including state management (e.g., Redux, MobX). React proficiency building reusable, stateful components and hooks; strong command of state management.
- Design system adoption across 2+ product modules with documented components and usage guidelines.
- Build & Deployment: Proficiency with Git-based workflows, and CI/CD (GitHub Actions/GitLab CI/Jenkins) with quality gates.
- Testing: Strong background in automated testing frameworks like Jest, Cypress, or Playwright.
- Deep understanding of Web Accessibility (WCAG) and SEO best practices.
- Localized experiences delivered in multiple languages, including at least one RTL locale.
- Security awareness (OWASP front-end risks, XSS/CSP, secure handling of untrusted content).
- Agile Mindset: Proven track record of delivering in fast-paced, sprint-based global environments.
- Global Mindset: Experience delivering software that accounts for regional cultural nuances and varied internet speeds.

Nice to Have

- Workflow Expertise: Experience building tools for IT operations, project management, or SaaS automation is highly desirable.
- Project Management: Ability to manage timelines, define technical roadmaps, and communicate progress to senior stakeholders.
- Design token pipelines (Style Dictionary), Storybook, Chromatic/visual regression testing.
- Observability (Sentry, Datadog), feature flagging, A/B testing.
- Experience with distributed teams and varying network conditions across regions.
- Measurable improvements in Core Web Vitals and interaction latency on at least one high-traffic workflow.
benefits:

- Personal Accident Insurance: Covered by company
- 13-month Salary Bonus : Guaranteed upon contract completion. (Payment timing: Included in the final payroll of labor contract)
- 12 days annual leave

jobDescription:
Build the Future of Intelligent Workflows Platform

We’re redefining how the global workflow platform works.

At the core of a global technology organization, our product team is building a next-generation enterprise workflow platform used by 500,000+ users worldwide. Built on modern low-code/no-code (NCLC) foundations and rapidly evolving into an AI-native product powered by automation and GenAI, this platform is central to how critical business processes operate at scale.

As we transform into a true AI Product Team, we are looking for a Senior IT Business Analyst (Product Owner Assistant) who thrives at the intersection of product thinking, execution excellence, customer empathy, and technical depth.

This is not a documentation role.

This is a product-impact role.

You will work closely with Product & Service Managers, engineers, consultants, and global stakeholders to turn vision into reality - bringing clarity to complexity and execution to scale.

Job Description

Why This Role Matters?

You sit at the center of product discovery and delivery – ensuring the right problems are solved, with the right priority, and that outcomes scale to hundreds of thousands of users. You bridge legacy knowledge, real customer pain points, and future-ready AI design to shape the Next Gen workflow platform.

If you’re energized by complexity, precision, and impact - and want to grow into a strong product development career - this role is for you.

What You’ll Do

Product Execution & Ownership

- Partner with the Product & Service Manager to translate product strategy into clear, outcome-driven requirements
- Break down complex processes into scalable workflows, user stories, and system designs
- Own backlog quality, user stories, and acceptance criteria

Discovery, Legacy Deep Dive & Design Thinking

- Assist in organizing and facilitating Design Thinking workshops
- Translate research and insights into concrete Next-Gen requirements

Customer & IT Consultant Exposure (~25%)

- Spend ~25% of time in an IT consultant role, engaging directly with internal customers
- Understand real customer pain points, expectations, and constraints
- Feed customer insights back into product prioritization and solution design

Stakeholder & Delivery Management

- Act as a bridge between customers, key stakeholder, business, engineering, design, and operations
- Lead requirement reviews, validation, and support UAT
- Measure delivery outcomes against business success criteria

Technical, AI & Adoption Excellence

- Define functional and nonfunctional requirements (performance, security, scalability)
- Collaborate closely with engineering through design, build, and delivery
- Support AI-driven workflows, intelligent automation, change management, and adoption
requirements:

- Strong understanding of enterprise platforms, workflow automation, and system design
- Experience with low-code/no-code (NCLC) and cloud architectures (preferred)
- Exposure to AI/ML products or strong interest in AI transformation
- Excellent analytical and communication skills – able to turn ambiguity into clarity

- Comfortable in Agile environments with high ownership
- Detail oriented, proactive, and outcome-focused

Nice to Have

title: Backend Engineer (Java, Golang, Cloud, AWS, PostgreSQL)
jobDescription:
About Us:

AIRR Labs is a fast-growing E-commerce & Social Commerce company building lasting connections between brands and consumers in Southeast Asia. We provide a full suite of solutions that enable brands to bring their unique stories to life across the online customer journey.

Our Technology team is dedicated to building innovative AI tools that generate high-quality content, images, and videos to empower businesses to scale efficiently.

Our mission is to revolutionize content creation through cutting-edge artificial intelligence, enabling our clients to achieve unparalleled growth and creativity.

Job Summary:

We are seeking a skilled Backend Engineer to join our team. You will design, develop, and maintain robust, scalable, and secure server-side applications that power our products and services. The ideal candidate is passionate about building efficient systems, has strong problem-solving skills, and thrives in a collaborative environment.

Key Responsibilities:

- Design and build high-concurrency backend services using Go or Java to support global e-commerce scale.
- Develop and optimize AI-powered search features, including vector-based semantic search and integration with LLM-driven workflows.
- Build and manage scalable cloud infrastructure on AWS, ensuring high availability and optimized performance for large-scale media assets.
- Implement event-driven architectures and microservices that communicate via high-performance message brokers.
- Build and maintain robust CI/CD pipelines to automate testing and deployment in a containerized environment.
- Collaborate on the design of complex database schemas (Postgres) and search index mappings (OpenSearch) to ensure data integrity and query efficiency.
requirements:
Qualifications:

- Bachelor's degree in computer science, Engineering, or a related field (or equivalent experience).
- 2+ years of professional experience in backend development (can be open to young talents with less experience), with a strong preference for Go (Golang) or Java.
- Proven experience with Cloud Infrastructure (AWS), including deep knowledge of storage optimization and serverless components.
- Hands-on experience with PostgreSQL and search engines like OpenSearch/Elasticsearch.
- Familiarity with modern AI concepts, vector embeddings and integrating with AI APIs to build smart features.
- Solid understanding of containerization (Docker, Kubernetes) and modern observability tools (e.g., Prometheus, Grafana).
- Experience handling / processing high-traffic APIs is a plus.

Preferred Skills (Optional):

benefits:

title: Specialist, Senior Specialist Risk Modeling
reasons:

jobDescription:
HO26.58 - Chuyên viên, Chuyên viên cao cấp Xây dựng Mô hình rủi ro

-Thực hiện các công việc liên quan đến việc xây dựng mô hình rủi ro tín dụng trong phạm vi chức năng được giao, đảm bảo tuân thủ quy trình và quy định của MB nhằm đạt được các mục tiêu chung của đơn vị.-Thu thập và xử lý dữ liệu để xây dựng các mô hình và công cụ đo lường rủi ro tín dụng, hệ thống xếp hạng khách hàng (scoring), và hệ thống cảnh báo sớm.-Xây dựng và triển khai các thẻ điểm/mô hình định lượng rủi ro tín dụng, rủi ro tín dụng tập trung và rủi ro tín dụng đối tác theo phạm vi phân công.-Hỗ trợ thiết lập các công cụ kiểm tra sức chịu đựng rủi ro tín dụng, bao gồm thu thập thông tin, đề xuất kịch bản sức chịu đựng, đánh giá và phân tích tác động của kịch bản đối với các yếu tố như tỷ lệ nợ xấu (NPL), dự phòng rủi ro tín dụng, vốn cho rủi ro tín dụng, và thu nhập từ hoạt động tín dụng.-Tham gia xây dựng các công cụ hỗ trợ việc định giá dựa trên rủi ro (risk-based pricing).-Tư vấn và đóng góp ý kiến trong quá trình xây dựng và triển khai các mô hình tín dụng tại các đơn vị liên quan trong MB và các công ty thành viên.-Đưa ra các khuyến nghị và báo cáo dựa trên kết quả phân tích đầu ra từ các mô hình đo lường rủi ro tín dụng, nhằm hỗ trợ cải thiện Khung quản trị rủi ro tín dụng.-Thực hiện các công việc khác theo phân công của quản lý trực tiếp, phù hợp với năng lực và phạm vi công việc.

title: Senior Java Developer/Squad Lead - SI - MSB - 3I131
reasons:

jobDescription:
Triển khai các Siêu dự án 2000 tỉ trong tổ hợp công nghệ cao của MSB (gồm các dự án Công nghệ lớn/nhỏ và Khối Công nghệ MSB). Mô tả công việc của vị trí gồm:

requirements:

- Ưu tiên ứng viên có kinh nghiệm làm việc theo mô hình Agile/Scrum
benefits:

- Tham gia những dự án số hóa trọng điểm với vốn đầu tư lên tới 2000 tỉ đồng, ứng dụng những công nghệ mới nhất.
- Mức lương tháng tùy khả năng công việc: $1000 - $3000. Gói thu nhập từ 15 đến 20 tháng lương/năm kèm nhiều đãi ngộ hấp dẫn (Esop, vay ưu đãi, bảo hiểm sức khỏe cao cấp …, thưởng dự án tùy vị trí công việc).
- Được dẫn dắt bởi đội ngũ quản lý giỏi chuyên môn, đánh giá công bằng. Cơ hội làm việc trực tiếp với các đối tác hàng đầu thế giới (AWS; BCG; IBM; Temenos…).
- Nhiều chương trình đào tạo nâng cao kỹ năng, năng lực chuyên môn. Được tham gia chương trình Lãnh đạo kế cận (Talent Pool) khi nhiều năm có hiệu suất năm việc tốt.
- Làm việc trong “Ngân hàng Chuyển đổi số tiêu biểu” của năm 2021 do Hiệp hội Ngân hàng và Tập đoàn dữ liệu quốc tế (IDG) vinh danh. Văn phòng làm việc đẳng cấp theo mô hình Agile tiên tiến. Cơ sở vật chất, công cụ lao động tốt, cấu hình mạnh mẽ.

title: Virtualization Engineer (Automotive)
reasons:
- Cutting-Edge Mobility Solutions Company
- Cutting- edge projects from global auto brands
- Long-term career mobility in automotive domain
jobDescription:
Job Title:Embedded Linux Engineer (C/C++ | Virtualization | Automotive)We are hiring an Embedded Linux Engineer to work on low-level system software and virtualization technologies for automotive platforms. This role involves working with C/C++, Linux systems, and system-level debugging.This role will be responsible for the development, configuration, integration, and validation of virtualization solutions within our automotive systems. This role requires a deep understanding of hypervisor technology, system-level debugging, and performance optimization.About KPIT:

KPIT is a global technology company specializing in providing software solutions and services to the automotive, manufacturing, life sciences, and financial services industries. We are passionate about innovation and creating impactful solutions that drive the future of mobility. At KPIT, you’ll be part of a collaborative and dynamic environment, working on cutting-edge technologies with a team of talented engineers and designers.Chức danh công việc:Kỹ sư Embedded Linux (C/C++ | Ảo hóa | Ô tô)

Mô tả công việc:Chúng tôi đang tuyển dụng một Kỹ sư Embedded Linux để làm việc với phần mềm hệ thống mức thấp và các công nghệ ảo hóa cho nền tảng ô tô. Vai trò này bao gồm lập trình bằng C/C++, làm việc với hệ điều hành Linux và gỡ lỗi ở cấp độ hệ thống.

Vị trí này sẽ chịu trách nhiệm phát triển, cấu hình, tích hợp và kiểm thử (xác nhận) các giải pháp ảo hóa trong hệ thống ô tô của chúng tôi. Công việc yêu cầu hiểu biết sâu về công nghệ hypervisor, gỡ lỗi hệ thống và tối ưu hiệu năng.

Về KPIT:KPIT là một công ty công nghệ toàn cầu chuyên cung cấp các giải pháp và dịch vụ phần mềm cho các ngành ô tô, sản xuất, khoa học đời sống và dịch vụ tài chính. Chúng tôi đam mê đổi mới và tạo ra các giải pháp có tác động, định hình tương lai của ngành di chuyển. Tại KPIT, bạn sẽ làm việc trong một môi trường năng động, hợp tác cùng đội ngũ kỹ sư và nhà thiết kế tài năng, trên những công nghệ tiên tiến.
requirements:
Skills & Experience:

Must-Have:

Strong understanding of hypervisor technologies (e.g., Xen, KVM, VMware).

Experience with virtualization concepts and techniques.

Proficiency in C/C++ programming.

Experience with system-level debugging and troubleshooting.

Familiarity with Linux-based systems.

Good-to-Have:

Experience with automotive embedded systems.

Knowledge of real-time operating systems (RTOS).

Experience with performance analysis and optimization tools.

Familiarity with automotive networking protocols (CAN, Ethernet).Education:

Bachelor's degree in computer science, Electrical Engineering, or related field.Kỹ năng & Kinh nghiệm:

Bắt buộc:

- Hiểu biết vững về các công nghệ hypervisor (ví dụ: Xen, KVM, VMware).
- Có kinh nghiệm với các khái niệm và kỹ thuật ảo hóa.
- Thành thạo lập trình C/C++.
- Có kinh nghiệm gỡ lỗi (debugging) và xử lý sự cố ở mức hệ thống.
- Quen thuộc với các hệ thống dựa trên Linux.

Ưu tiên:

- Có kinh nghiệm với các hệ thống nhúng trong lĩnh vực ô tô.
- Kiến thức về hệ điều hành thời gian thực (RTOS).
- Có kinh nghiệm với các công cụ phân tích và tối ưu hiệu năng.
- Quen thuộc với các giao thức mạng ô tô (CAN, Ethernet).

Học vấn:

- Tốt nghiệp Cử nhân ngành Khoa học Máy tính, Kỹ thuật Điện/Điện tử, hoặc lĩnh vực liên quan.
benefits: One of the best company is IT services & products globally

title: SOME/IP Protocol Engineer
reasons:
- One of the top MNC
- One of the best company is IT services & products
- Culture & Growth
jobDescription:
Job Summary:

The SOME/IP Protocol Engineer will be responsible for the planning, deployment, and maintenance of the Scalable service-Oriented MiddlewarE over IP protocol stack, a critical component of our autonomous driving system. This role involves designing network topologies, developing toolchains, and collaborating with cross-functional teams to ensure successful integration and mass production.

Responsibilities:

Plan and deploy the SOME/IP protocol stack, including core functions such as service discovery, remote procedure call, and event notification.

Design and propose robust network topology solutions based on SOME/IP technology to enhance communication efficiency and scalability within the autonomous driving system.

Participate in the development and maintenance of a toolchain supporting the SOME/IP protocol.

Collaborate closely with hardware and algorithm teams to facilitate the successful mass production application of the protocol stack.

Troubleshoot and resolve issues related to SOME/IP communication and integration.

Contribute to the documentation of the SOME/IP implementation and network architecture.
requirements:
Skills & Experience:

Must-Have:

Strong understanding of the SOME/IP protocol and its underlying concepts.

Experience with network protocol design and implementation.

Proficiency in C++ programming.

Experience with Linux-based systems.

Strong problem-solving and analytical skills.

Good-to-Have:

Experience with automotive networking technologies (e.g., Ethernet, CAN).

Familiarity with AUTOSAR architecture.

Experience with robotics or autonomous driving systems.

Knowledge of service-oriented architecture (SOA).

Education:

Bachelor's degree in computer science, Electrical Engineering, or related field.
benefits: •  20MN+ vehicles on road are powered by KPIT software•  14+ Software Centers of Excellence Globally•  25+ Years Focus on Auto & Mobility•  13K+ Software experts passionate of mobility and tech

- Analyze application flows and identify attack vectors (tampering, hooking, jailbreak/root bypass, emulator detection, etc.).
- Research emerging vulnerabilities, exploit techniques, and tools.
- Document findings and deliver clear remediation guidance to engineering teams.
- Support post-incident analysis and root-cause reviews.
- Build internal security guidelines and secure coding standards.
- Train engineering teams on security best practices and secure SDLC.
requirements:
Requirements

- Hands-on experience with testing frameworks such as the PTES and OWASP
- In-depth knowledge of application development processes and at least one programming or scripting language (e.g., Java, Scala, C#, Ruby, Perl, Python, PowerShell)
- Passion to learn and explore.

Preferred

- Experience with exploit development, vulnerability research or fuzzing.
- Fintech or payment industry security experience.

title: Business Analyst – Insurance Solutions
reasons:

jobDescription:
- Serve as the primary business analysis liaison between Papaya and international insurance partners (Life & Non-life), translating complex insurance domain requirements into clear, actionable product specifications.
- Lead requirements gathering, process mapping, and gap analysis for core insurance workflows including: Fraud/Waste/Abuse (FWA) detection, Claim automation, New Business submission, Underwriting, Customer Experience, and Digital Transformation initiatives.
- Analyze and document end-to-end business processes for claim adjudication, policy servicing, and underwriting — identifying opportunities for automation and AI-powered enhancements.
- Collaborate with international stakeholders across multiple time zones to elicit, validate, and prioritize requirements — ensuring alignment between partner expectations and Papaya’s product roadmap.
- Produce high-quality deliverables: Business Requirements Documents (BRD), Functional Specifications, user stories, process flow diagrams, data mapping documents, and acceptance criteria.
- Work closely with engineering and UX/UI teams to ensure requirements are feasible, well-understood, and delivered to specification — participating in sprint planning, grooming, and review sessions.
- Support the design and configuration of FWA rules engines, claim automation workflows, and underwriting decision models by providing domain expertise and business logic documentation.
- Conduct competitive analysis and market research on insurance technology trends, regulatory requirements, and best practices across international markets.
- Facilitate UAT (User Acceptance Testing) with insurance partners, managing defect triage and ensuring delivered solutions meet business objectives.
- Contribute to building Papaya’s insurance domain knowledge base — documenting industry terminologies, regulatory nuances, and partner-specific configurations across markets.
requirements:
- 1–3 years of experience as a Business Analyst, preferably in insurance, insurtech, or financial services. Fresh graduates with strong analytical skills and genuine interest in insurance will also be considered.
- Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration, Finance, Insurance, Information Systems, or a related field.
- Solid understanding of insurance domain fundamentals: policy lifecycle, claim processing, underwriting principles, reinsurance concepts, and regulatory frameworks.
- Experience working with or strong interest in FWA detection, claim automation, and digital transformation projects in insurance.
- Proficiency in requirements documentation: BRDs, functional specs, user stories, process flows (using tools like Jira, Confluence, Miro, Lucidchart, or similar).
- Strong analytical and problem-solving skills — ability to decompose complex insurance processes into structured, implementable components.
- Excellent communication skills in English (verbal and written) — comfortable presenting to and negotiating with international stakeholders and C-level executives.
- Experience with Agile/Scrum methodologies and cross-functional team collaboration.
- Familiarity with data analysis tools (Excel/Google Sheets advanced functions, SQL basics) is a plus.
- Understanding of API integrations, system architecture concepts, and how technology enables insurance operations is a strong advantage.
- Can-do attitude, attention to detail, and comfort with ambiguity in a fast-paced startup environment.
- Proactive in work, eager to learn, with strong self-study and high-level technology research capabilities, especially in AI applications for insurance.
- Willingness to work across time zones when collaborating with international partners.
benefits:
- Competitive salary based on experience and capability.
- Performance-based bonuses and annual salary review.
- Participate in the well-being activities of the company: birthday, team building, general health check-up, etc.
- Work in a young and active environment in a fast-growing insurtech startup.
- Opportunities to work with top leadership and expand networks in insurance.
- Direct exposure to international insurance markets and global partners from day one.
- Unique opportunity to shape insurance products powered by cutting-edge GenAI technology.

title: SOC Cybersecurity Engineer/Manager
jobDescription:
Role OverviewWe are seeking an experienced SOC Manager to lead the VCC Security Operations Centre (SOC). This role is responsible for overseeing 24/7 SOC operations, driving service excellence, and ensuring effective incident response for our clients. The SOC Manager provides leadership to Tier 1 and Tier 2 analysts, manages escalations, and ensures alignment with industry best practices and regulatory frameworks

Responsibilities

- SOC Leadership & Operations
- Lead and mentor SOC analysts, fostering high performance and professional development.
- Act as Team In-Charge for assigned shifts, overseeing daily SOC operations and incident workflows.
- Ensure adherence to SOC playbooks, standard operating procedures, and compliance requirements.
- Manage high-severity incidents and provide expert-level investigation and resolution support.
- Service Delivery & Continuous Improvement
- Ensure cybersecurity services are delivered in line with defined SLAs and KPIs.
- Drive continuous improvement in SOC processes, tools, and service quality.
- Collaborate with internal technical teams to support customer onboarding and ongoing operations.
- Customer Engagement & Escalation Management
- Serve as the senior escalation point for clients, ensuring timely and effective issue resolution.
- Build trusted relationships with clients by understanding business objectives and aligning cybersecurity services accordingly.
- Proactively manage customer risks and identify opportunities to enhance service value.
- Reporting & Stakeholder Communication
- Provide regular operational and risk updates to senior management.
- Analyse incident trends, customer feedback, and service metrics to inform improvements.
- Contribute insights to enhance SOC capabilities, tools, and service offerings.
- Technical & Professional Requirements
- Proven experience handling escalated security incidents in a SOC environment.
- Strong working knowledge of SIEM platforms, threat intelligence, IDS/IPS, firewalls, and malware detection technologies.
- Solid understanding of cybersecurity frameworks and standards, including MITRE ATT&CK and NIST.
- Strong analytical, problem-solving, and decision-making skills with the ability to perform under pressure.
- Willingness to work in a 24/7 SOC environment.
requirements:
- Minimum 3-8 years of experience in SOC operations and cybersecurity service delivery.
- Demonstrated experience leading SOC or security operations teams.
- Professional certifications such as CISSP, CISA, or CISM (at least one required).
- Bachelor’s degree in Cyber Security, Information Security, or a related discipline; a Master’s degree is an advantage.

title: Senior Data Scientist
reasons:
- Ngân hàng TMCP hàng đầu
- Lộ trình thăng tiến rõ ràng, minh bạch
- Cơ hội được đào tạo, phát triển kỹ năng chuyên sâu
jobDescription:
MỤC TIÊU CÔNG VIỆC

- Tại SACOMBANK, chúng tôi tìm kiếm một Senior Data Scientist có tầm nhìn chiến lược để dẫn dắt và triển khai các sáng kiến Machine Learning có tác động cao, phối hợp chặt chẽ với các đơn vị kinh doanh.

TRÁCH NHIỆM CHÍNH

1. Phát triển Giải pháp Dữ liệu (Data Solutioning)

Bạn sẽ đóng vai trò tiên phong trong việc thiết kế và triển khai các giải pháp Data Science tiên tiến, tác động trực tiếp đến hiệu quả kinh doanh:

- Thiết kế, phát triển và tối ưu các mô hình Machine Learning/Deep Learning nhằm giải quyết các bài toán kinh doanh phức tạp, gắn chặt với KPI và định hướng chiến lược
- Phát triển các use case như Credit scoring / Risk modeling, Customer segmentation, Recommendation systems, Fraud detection, cross sell/ upsell.
- Xây dựng và mở rộng các giải pháp AI như hệ thống gợi ý, cá nhân hóa và mô hình dự báo nhằm nâng cao trải nghiệm khách hàng và kết quả kinh doanh
- Thúc đẩy việc ứng dụng Machine Learning và Big Data trong các đội nhóm đa chức năng, đưa tư duy dữ liệu vào mọi hành trình khách hàng
- Đảm bảo các sáng kiến Data Science được triển khai linh hoạt, tuân thủ và bám sát mục tiêu kinh doanh, tạo ra giá trị rõ ràng ở quy mô lớn .

2. Khai thác Insight Dữ liệu (Data Insighting)

Bạn sẽ biến dữ liệu thành tài sản chiến lược, giúp tổ chức ra quyết định thông minh hơn:

- Khai thác các insight có giá trị cao từ các tập dữ liệu lớn, đa dạng, phối hợp chặt chẽ với các đơn vị kinh doanh
- Xây dựng framework giám sát mô hình, theo dõi hiệu năng và cải thiện độ chính xác liên tục
- Dẫn dắt các buổi brainstorming liên phòng ban để tìm kiếm cơ hội ứng dụng Data Science vào kinh doanh
- Phối hợp với Data Engineers để thiết kế và triển khai các thuật toán có khả năng mở rộng, nâng cao hiệu suất hệ thống
- Nắm vững hệ sinh thái dữ liệu, đảm bảo chất lượng dữ liệu, tính toàn vẹn của mô hình và sự phù hợp với mục tiêu kinh doanh
requirements:
Học vấn

- Đại học trở lên trong các lĩnh vực: Thống kê, Toán học, Khoa học Máy tính, Khoa học Dữ liệu, Phân tích định lượng, Công nghệ Thông tin hoặc các ngành liên quan

Kinh nghiệm

- 4 năm kinh nghiệm thực tế trong phân tích dữ liệu, phát triển Machine Learning / Deep Learning trên dữ liệu quy mô lớn và mô hình thống kê nâng cao
- Kinh nghiệm với công nghệ Big Data như Spark hoặc Scala.
- Thành thạo Python (pandas, numpy, scikit-learn, xgboost, pytorch/tensorflow). Hiểu sâu về (Supervised / Unsupervised Learning, Feature Engineering , Model Evaluation & Tuning ).
- Kinh nghiệm sử dụng các framework như pytorch, tensorflow.
- Kinh nghiệm làm việc với SQL, Oracle và hệ thống dữ liệu lớn.
- Có thành tích triển khai thành công các sản phẩm dữ liệu, giải pháp phân tích nâng cao hoặc hệ thống AI trong môi trường thực tế.
- Có kinh nghiệm ứng dụng Machine Learning/AI trong ngân hàng, tài chính hoặc các ngành có dữ liệu lớn và yêu cầu cao.
- Tư duy chiến lược, có khả năng chuyển hóa insight kỹ thuật thành giá trị kinh doanh và trao đổi hiệu quả với lãnh đạo cấp cao
- Kinh nghiệm làm việc trong môi trường Agile, hiểu rõ Scrum trong triển khai các dự án dữ liệu phức tạp
- Năng lực lãnh đạo tốt: mentoring, xây dựng đội nhóm và thúc đẩy hiệu suất cao .
- Kinh nghiệm MLOps (MLflow, Kubeflow, Docker, Kubernetes), cloud là lợi thế.
- Có chứng chỉ hoặc công bố khoa học là lợi thế
- Khả năng sử dụng tiếng Anh tốt trong môi trường làm việc chuyên nghiệp
benefits:
Tại SACOMBANK, bạn sẽ được trao quyền với quy mô, nguồn lực và tầm nhìn của một định chế tài chính hàng đầu—đồng thời đóng vai trò quan trọng trong việc định hình các chiến lược dữ liệu tác động đến hàng triệu khách hàng tại Việt Nam.

Chúng tôi mang đến:

- Cơ hội dẫn đầu trong hành trình chuyển đổi số, ứng dụng Data & AI để mang lại trải nghiệm ngân hàng thông minh và cá nhân hóa
- Môi trường làm việc năng động, hiện đại, hợp tác cùng các chuyên gia hàng đầu trong lĩnh vực công nghệ và dữ liệu
- Cơ hội xây dựng hệ sinh thái ngân hàng dựa trên dữ liệu, với nền tảng Analytics, AI và Big Data tiên tiến
- Chế độ đãi ngộ cạnh tranh, cùng các chính sách thưởng gắn liền với hiệu quả và đóng góp
- Nền tảng để đổi mới, dẫn dắt và tạo ra tác động thực tiễn ở quy mô lớn

title: Innovation Engineer (AI/Blockchain/MVP)
reasons:
- “An cư lạc nghiệp”- housing support for long-term
- Competitive salary and benefits
- Exclusive perks across Sun Group’s ecosystem
jobDescription:
Trong mô hình AI First, công nghệ không chỉ để vận hành mà để tạo ra những sản phẩm hoàn toàn mới.

Innovation Engineer là người đứng ở tuyến đầu của Innovation Lab, chịu trách nhiệm:

- Biến ý tưởng thành sản phẩm thực tế
- Đưa công nghệ mới (AI, Blockchain…) vào giải bài toán kinh doanh
- Tạo ra những trải nghiệm khác biệt trong hệ sinh thái Sun Group

Đây không phải vị trí “nhận task và code”. Đây là vị trí dành cho những người muốn:

- Build sản phẩm từ 0 → 1
- Own end-to-end
- Và nhìn thấy sản phẩm của mình được sử dụng bởi hàng triệu khách hàng

TRÁCH NHIỆM CÔNG VIỆC

- Làm chủ sản phẩm: Tham gia từ khâu bàn bạc ý tưởng, thiết kế hệ thống cho đến khi sản phẩm chính thức ra mắt. Bạn là "cha đẻ" thực sự của những tính năng mình làm ra.
- Xây dựng bản thử nghiệm (MVP): Nhanh chóng tạo ra các phiên bản chạy thử để kiểm tra ý tưởng có thực sự hiệu quả với khách hàng hay không.
- Ứng dụng công nghệ mới: Trực tiếp đưa các công nghệ hiện đại như Trí tuệ nhân tạo (AI) hoặc Blockchain vào để giải quyết các bài toán cụ thể (ví dụ: tư vấn du lịch tự động, quản lý thẻ thành viên số...).
- Tối ưu trải nghiệm: Đảm bảo hệ thống luôn nhanh, bảo mật và dễ sử dụng cho khách hàng.
requirements:
- Có kinh nghiệm thực chiến: Đã có ít nhất 4 năm làm lập trình Full-stack (hiểu cả về giao diện người dùng lẫn hệ thống xử lý bên dưới), mong muốn phát triển Solution Architect/Technical Leader
- Biết dùng công nghệ để giải quyết vấn đề: Đã từng trực tiếp triển khai ít nhất một dự án có ứng dụng AI (như Chatbot thông minh, nhận diện hình ảnh...) hoặc các giải pháp liên quan đến Blockchain.
- Tư duy "Sản phẩm của tôi": Bạn không đợi ai nhắc, bạn chủ động tìm cách làm cho sản phẩm tốt hơn mỗi ngày. Bạn coi sự thành công của sản phẩm là danh dự cá nhân.
- Học hỏi cực nhanh: Công nghệ mới thay đổi từng ngày, bạn cần là người yêu thích việc khám phá và không ngại thử cái mới.
benefits:
TẠI SAO LỰA CHỌN INNOVATION LAB

- Sân chơi lớn, bài toán thật: Sản phẩm của bạn sẽ được ứng dụng tại các khu vui chơi Sun World, các khách sạn 5 sao hay các dự án bất động sản đẳng cấp nhất Việt Nam.
- Tự do sáng tạo: Tại Lab, chúng tôi khuyến khích những ý tưởng "điên rồ". Bạn được quyền chọn công nghệ tốt nhất để thực hiện mục tiêu mà không bị gò bó bởi các quy trình cũ kỹ.
- Môi trường năng động: Làm việc trực tiếp với những người đam mê đổi mới, quy trình gọn nhẹ, tập trung vào kết quả.

QUYỀN LỢI

jobDescription:
Why join Offspring?

Offspring is a boutique digital production studio, founded by an Australian Technical Director, that works with Australian and US markets.

We believe that having the best people is more important than having hundreds of people. We believe that work should be about culture, growth and passion… not only money. We believe in pushing people to learn and achieve more. We believe in rewarding people based on their contributions, not who they know.

If your values match with ours, then we want to talk to you.

Đôi nét về Offspring

Offspring Digital là công ty công nghệ của Úc, đã hoạt động ở Hà Nội, Việt Nam gần 10 năm. Hiện công ty có hai đối tượng khách hàng chính: Úc và Mỹ. Về mặt sản phẩm, công ty hiện xây dựng và vận hành các nền tảng social network, thương mại điện tử, ứng dụng liên quan đến sức khỏe trên cả môi trường web và mobile.

Với Offspring, chúng tôi tin rằng việc lựa chọn người có năng lực cao quan trọng hơn việc có nhiều người khả năng trung bình. Chúng tôi cũng cho rằng một công việc tốt không chỉ liên quan đến vấn đề bạn nhận được bao nhiêu lương, mà còn là môi trường làm việc, văn hóa công ty, triển vọng nghề nghiệp và đam mê. Offspring tin tưởng là môi trường có thể đáp ứng được những yêu cầu trên và là nơi tạo ra nhiều cơ hội cho mọi người học hỏi và đạt được nhiều thành tựu trong sự nghiệp của mình. Bên cạnh đó, Offspring luôn tin tưởng vào việc đánh giá nhân viên của mình dựa vào giá trị đóng góp của họ, chứ không dựa vào những mối quan hệ mà họ có.

Nếu bạn cảm thấy những giá trị của bạn phù hợp, xin chào đón bạn vào Offspring Digital!
requirements:
Responsibility

- Develop and maintain cross-platform mobile applications using React Native
- Write clean, maintainable, and scalable code for production environments
- Optimize app performance (rendering, memory usage, network handling)
- Collaborate with designers and product managers to deliver high-quality UX
- Integrate APIs and handle complex data flows
- Ensure proper handling of loading states, errors, and edge cases
- Participate in code reviews and contribute to engineering best practices
- Debug and resolve production issues effectively

Mô tả công việc:

- Phát triển và duy trì các ứng dụng mobile đa nền tảng sử dụng React Native
- Viết code sạch, dễ bảo trì và có khả năng mở rộng cho môi trường production
- Tối ưu hiệu năng ứng dụng (rendering, memory usage, network handling)
- Phối hợp với team Product và Design để mang lại trải nghiệm người dùng chất lượng cao
- Tích hợp API và xử lý các luồng dữ liệu phức tạp

- Tham gia code review và đóng góp vào việc cải thiện chất lượng code
- Debug và xử lý hiệu quả các vấn đề phát sinh trên production

Technical Requirements

React Native & Frontend

- Strong experience with React Native and modern React (hooks, functional components)
- Solid understanding of component lifecycle and rendering behavior
- Experience with performance optimization (re-renders, FlatList, memoization)
- Experience with animations (e.g. Reanimated, gesture handling)

State Management & Data

- Experience with state management (Zustand, Redux, or similar)
- Experience with server state management (React Query or similar)
- Strong understanding of API integration, caching, and error handling

Architecture & Code Quality

- Ability to design scalable and maintainable code architecture
- Experience structuring apps by features/modules
- Understanding of separation of concerns and reusable components
- Experience handling async flows, request cancellation, and edge cases

Testing & Reliability

- Experience with unit testing (Jest)
- Familiarity with end-to-end testing (Detox or similar) is a plus

Về chuyên môn

React Native & Frontend

- Có kinh nghiệm tốt với React Native và React hiện đại (hooks, functional components)

State Management & Data

- Hiểu rõ cách tích hợp API, caching và xử lý lỗi

Architecture & Code Quality

- Có khả năng thiết kế kiến trúc code scalable và dễ maintain
- Có kinh nghiệm tổ chức code theo module/feature
- Hiểu rõ separation of concerns và xây dựng component tái sử dụng
- Có kinh nghiệm xử lý async flow, request cancellation và các edge cases

Bonus skills

- Knowledge of Linux Server/ Shell command
- Knowledge of Agile, Scrum, Kanban

title: Head of Divisional Control Office (Technology Risk)
reasons:
- Very competitive remuneration package
- Build products for millions of users in Australia
- Hybrid and flexible working environment
jobDescription:
Head of Divisional Controls will lead and embed first-line risk management within NAB Technology DCO, ensuring robust identification, assessment, and mitigation of technology risks across NAB and provide detailed technical engagement with CIOs and other Technology senior stakeholders across Australia, India and Vietnam . The role provides proactive management of technology risk areas (see KPI section for Technology areas) profiles, control effectiveness, and compliance with NAB Group standards, while enabling business delivery through resilient processes. Acts as a strategic partner to technology executives, offering insight and resolutions on emerging risks, AI, automation, efficiency improvements and predictive reporting and analytics and manage the 2nd and 3rd Line of Défense as well as regulatory changes, and required adjustments to safeguard operational integrity and customer outcomes.

MAIN RESPONSIBILITIES

- A Senior Technology Risk leadership background to work with the business stakeholders and the technology Risk teams includes identifying, assessing, and managing technology risks across infrastructure, applications, cloud, data, cybersecurity, third party services, and emerging technologies and able to understand the business needs
- This role is responsible for working proactively in a team supporting NAB Vietnam in its execution of risk management accountabilities and responsibilities.
- The tasks or activities for which this role is responsible each day are set out in Group policies, standards and guidance notes and revolve around technical, operational and compliance event management, change risk management, remediation/response, risk and obligation profiling.
- Advising business leaders on the application of the risk and compliance management framework to evaluate risks in order to achieve business outcomes.
- Engaging and managing senior stakeholders to implement and improve business systems and processes through the use/integration of the risk and compliance framework.
- Working with the business to implement systems and controls to manage the requirements of risk and compliance policies which apply to the business.
- Risk profiling: assisting to identify key risks and design of indicators to monitor, input into Divisional Risk Setting Statements as relevant.
- Designing controls: assisting to identify the right key controls to mitigate key risks and obligations applicable to the business in partnership with specialist controls team.
- Providing guidance on risk and control items including Subject Matter Expertise for the following: Risks, Obligations Events, Change, and related Policies; Remediation action plans to address any control design or operating effectiveness gaps; Requisitions on Management attestations, ensuring evidence is consolidated at a Sub-Divisional level; Relevant Risk Management Forums and/or other risk related committees as required.
- Engaging the relevant Enterprise Controls communities for expert assistance as appropriate.
- Providing business specific input and context to: Risk deep dive reviews; Internal Audit reviews; Assurance reports; Action plans for ineffective operational controls.
- Uplifting risk management maturity, culture and practices.
- Assisting in regulatory responses and regulatory engagement matters.
- Providing strategic guidance to the team on scope and approach for testing of controls
- Assisting in regulatory responses and regulatory engagement matters.
requirements:
Essential capabilities

- Deep understanding of technology and operational risk frameworks.
- Ability to design and embed first-line risk controls aligned with NAB Group standards.
- Excellent time management and ability to multi-task and adapt to changing priorities.
- Ability to conduct detailed technical assessment to uplift controls and processes in a fast-changing technology & business landscape.
- Proven ability to perform and coach within in a high performing team.
- Practical approach to solving issues with strong commercial acumen.
- Exposure to the operations and technology teams and the challenges that they face.
- Strong written and verbal communication skills.
- Ability to influence colleagues and executives to take action to strengthen outcomes for colleagues and customers.
- Ability to provide clear insights and recommendations on risk posture.

Experience

- 10+ years experience in technology and operational risk management.
- 5+ years in senior leadership roles managing risk in large, complex, cross-border organisations.
- Operational experience in offshore / shared services models implementing 1LOD risk frameworks, and good understanding of offshore delivery models.
- Experience in regulatory and compliance arrangements for offshore / shared services models with ability to design and implement technical and operational controls.
- Working knowledge of SDLC, banking platforms, and system workflows.
- Proven ability to perform in a high performing team.

Qualification Requirements

- Tertiary qualification in a relevant technology/business-related discipline (or equivalent business/technology experience).
- Relevant Risk and Controls Certifications will be highly regarded, e.g. CISSP, CISA, CRISC, etc
- Post Graduate qualification desirable.

title: Sr DevOps Engineer (Cloud, Terraform, AWS) Up to 50M
reasons:
- Enjoyable Team Environment
- Engaging and Innovative Work

jobDescription:
We are looking for a strong DevOps Engineer who can take ownership of building and operating modern cloud infrastructure. This role is ideal for someone who is not only hands-on, but also able to think at system level, make technical decisions, and drive improvements across environments.

You will work closely with engineering teams to design, build, and scale reliable, high-performance systems on AWS, leveraging Kubernetes and GitOps practices.

Key Responsibilities

- Design, deploy, and operate scalable infrastructure on AWS and Azure using Terraform.
- Architect and manage Kubernetes clusters (EKS) for production workloads with high availability and reliability requirements.
- Define and implement CI/CD and GitOps workflows (ArgoCD, GitHub Actions, Azure DevOps).
- Build and maintain reusable infrastructure modules and multi-environment setups.
- Implement monitoring, logging, and alerting (CloudWatch, Prometheus, Grafana, ELK).
- Optimize system performance, reliability, and cloud cost at scale.
- Design and improve deployment strategies (blue/green, canary, zero-downtime).
- Ensure security best practices (IAM, secrets management, network policies).
- Troubleshoot complex production issues and improve system resilience.
- Collaborate with developers to improve system architecture and deployment workflows.
- Contribute to technical decisions and continuously improve DevOps practices across teams.
requirements:
Required Qualifications

- 5–6+ years of experience in DevOps / Cloud Engineering.
- Strong experience with AWS (EKS, VPC, IAM, RDS, CloudWatch, etc.).
- Practical experience with Azure (VNets, ACR, Key Vault, Application Gateway, Monitor, etc.).
- Solid experience operating Kubernetes in production environments.
- Proven experience with Infrastructure as Code (Terraform), including modular design and multi-environment setups.
- Experience with CI/CD pipelines (Azure DevOps, GitHub Actions).
- Hands-on experience with GitOps practices (ArgoCD or similar).
- Strong understanding of system design, scalability, and high availability.
- Experience working with high-load or production-critical systems.
- Good troubleshooting skills and ability to handle complex incidents.

Nice to Have

- Experience with multi-region or distributed systems.
- Experience with service mesh (Istio / Linkerd).
benefits:

Work-Life Balance

jobDescription:
Role Summary

We are looking for motivated SENIOR JAVA BACKEND DEVELOPERS with English communications skills to join our global engineering teams and developing and operating our flagship product (Digital Bank platform). In our modern development environment, AI assistants are integral to the Software Development Lifecycle. Engineers leverage AI tools for code generation, test creation, and refactoring, while focusing their expertise on architecture, code verification, quality assurance, and strategic technical decisions. This is a hybrid role where you'll function as part Business Analyst, part QA Engineer, and Full-time Developer. You'll need to understand business processes deeply, communicate technical designs confidently with Product Owners and BA, and ensure quality throughout the development cycle.

requirements:

Specific Qualifications

title: Mobile Automation Engineer (QA)
reasons:
- A very clear, global mission
- A product already in use across in 190+ countries
- Hybrid work, 25 days holiday + 6 weeks remote!
jobDescription:
Our mission is to become the global standard for addressing. Street addresses weren’t designed for 2026. They aren’t accurate enough to specify building entrances, and they don’t exist for parks, rural areas and many parts of the world. This makes it hard to find places and causes problems and inefficiencies on a global scale.That’s why we created what3words. We divided the world into 3m squares and gave each square a unique combination of three words. It’s the easiest way to find and share precise locations.Over the last year, what3words has been used in 193 countries, and our monthly active users continue to grow at an impressive pace. Our tech is used by emergency services, delivery companies, eCommerce businesses, ride-hailing apps and NGOs, and is integrated into the navigation systems of millions of cars around the world.The role:You’ll be joining our fast-growing tech team, focusing on mobile applications for iOS, Android mobile, and integrated in-car systems. You’ll be responsible for designing and implementing robust, scalable automation in Java using Appium to ensure our mobile users have a seamless, high-performance experience.Your rigorous attention to detail and excellent communication skills will be essential. If you are passionate about quality and have a proven competence in automating test cases for mobile applications, we’d like to hear from you.Responsibilities:

- Build and maintain mobile test suites in Appium and CI/CD pipelines for our core applications.
- Ensure consistent functionality and UI/UX integrity across various device types, OS versions, and screen resolutions.
- Conduct a mix of manual exploration and automated regression to find and report mobile-specific bugs, from memory leaks to broken gestures.
- Collaborate with Software Engineers and Product Managers to develop effective strategies and test plans for our Mobile Apps.
- Find and isolate bugs in backend services and determine their impact on the product or release.
- Help troubleshoot issues in production and staging environments.
- Conduct post-release/post-implementation testing including regression, performance, and integration testing for backend systems.
requirements:
Essential Skills:

- Education: BSc/BA in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field.
- Mobile Automation: Experience building robust mobile automation frameworks from scratch using open-source tools (e.g., Appium, Espresso, or XCUITest), with a focus on cross-platform functional testing.
- Mobile CI/CD Integration: Experience integrating mobile automated test suites into build pipelines, specifically handling mobile-specific challenges like device clouds or emulator/simulator orchestration.
- Java Proficiency: Strong Java programming skills with expertise in JUnit or TestNG to drive mobile test scripts.
- DevOps Ecosystem: Experience with build and configuration tools such as GitHub Actions and CircleCI.
- Device & OS Savvy: A keen eye for mobile-specific nuances, including UI/UX consistency across different screen sizes, OS versions (Android/iOS), and hardware constraints.
- Soft Skills: Excellent communication in spoken and written English, paired with a high-quality "mobile-first" mindset and rigorous attention to detail.

Extra credit if you:

- Have worked with Revenue cat or other services that handle in app subscriptions for Apple’s Appstore and Android’s Play store.
- Experience working with backend services.
- Experience with BDD and implementing Cucumber for automation.
- Have worked on native frameworks (XCUITest, Espresso or UIAutomator)
- Are able to understand the business context of what you’re doing – understand the value your work creates.

The role is based in our Ho Chi Minh office (at ///become.outlooks.rising). While you can work from the office five days a week if preferred, our Engineering team can choose to work up to two days a week from home. We also offer a six-week remote-work allowance; for up to six weeks a year, you can work from anywhere in the world (as long as you’ve got great WiFi and are happy to work on the HQ timezone).Diversity & InclusionOur mission is to help everyone talk about everywhere, and we believe diverse perspectives make for a better company and better products too. We strongly encourage applications from underrepresented groups and are committed to equality and inclusivity in our hiring processes and company culture.
benefits:
Our team is a group of talented people from all over the world on an unprecedented journey. Every day brings new challenges and we are always learning. You will be proud to see your individual and team contributions making a real difference. 🙂

BenefitsWe offer the following benefits to all permanent employees of what3words:

- Competitive salary
- Flexible working
- 6 week remote working (work from anywhere) policy
- 25 days holiday: plus the option to buy more!
- Share options
- Private health insurance
- Wellbeing Days
- Generous parental leave policies
- Family friendly policies
- Employee Assistance Programme (EAP)
- Lunch & learn sessions
- Team social budget
