title: HO - Business Intelligence Executive
reasons:
- 13 Monthly Base Salary
- Training
- Recorgnition
jobDescription:
MỤC TIÊU CÔNG VIỆC

- Phân tích nhu cầu quản trị, điều hành của người sử dụng (business users).
- Mô hình hóa yêu cầu kinh doanh thành giải pháp Business Intelligence (BI) nhằm nâng cao năng lực quản lý, giám sát và hiệu quả hoạt động của Ngân hàng.
- Đảm bảo tính chính xác, nhất quán và chất lượng dữ liệu/báo cáo trên hệ thống BI.

MÔ TẢ CÔNG VIỆC

1. Phân tích nhu cầu & xác định mục tiêu nghiệp vụ

- Làm việc với các đơn vị nghiệp vụ để xác định mục tiêu công việc, yêu cầu dữ liệu và yêu cầu xử lý của người sử dụng.
- Phân tích nhu cầu báo cáo, giám sát, điều hành trong các mảng: kinh doanh, tài chính, sản phẩm, rủi ro, vận hành…
- Thu thập, làm rõ và chuẩn hóa business requirements.

2. Mô hình hóa yêu cầu thành giải pháp BI

- Phân tích và mô hình hóa yêu cầu người dùng thành các giải pháp Business Intelligence phù hợp.
- Lập tài liệu mô tả nghiệp vụ, yêu cầu dữ liệu, logic xử lý để chuyển giao cho:Bộ phận xử lý dữ liệu (Data/ETL)Bộ phận MIS – Báo cáo
- Bộ phận xử lý dữ liệu (Data/ETL)
- Bộ phận MIS – Báo cáo
- Tư vấn cấu trúc dữ liệu (dimension, measure, data mart, bus matrix…) phục vụ xây dựng hệ thống báo cáo.

3. Kiểm tra & kiểm soát chất lượng dữ liệu

- Xây dựng hoặc tư vấn quy trình kiểm tra tính hợp lý, chính xác và nhất quán của dữ liệu.
- Thực hiện kiểm tra chất lượng dữ liệu lần đầu trước khi đưa vào khai thác chính thức.
- Kiểm soát và đối soát tính đúng đắn của số liệu trên các báo cáo BI theo tần suất quy định.

4. Thiết kế, quản lý và triển khai báo cáo BI

- Phân tích, mô hình hóa và thiết kế giao diện báo cáo/dashboard BI phù hợp với từng nhóm người sử dụng.
- Lập kế hoạch triển khai báo cáo: xác định phạm vi, ưu tiên, lộ trình và thời gian thực hiện.
- Giám sát tiến độ, tham gia kiểm thử (UAT) hệ thống BI nhằm đảm bảo đáp ứng yêu cầu nghiệp vụ.

5. Chuyển giao & hỗ trợ người sử dụng

- Chuyển giao, hướng dẫn sử dụng hệ thống báo cáo BI cho người dùng cuối.
- Phối hợp với các bên liên quan trong quá trình vận hành, cải tiến và mở rộng hệ thống BI.
requirements:
🎓 Trình độ học vấn

- Tốt nghiệp Đại học các ngành liên quan đến Kinh tế, Tài chính – Ngân hàng, Quản trị, Hệ thống thông tin quản lý (MIS).

📘 Kiến thức & Chuyên môn

- Kiến thức về hoạt động ngân hàng, quản trị và điều hành.
- Khả năng đọc, phân tích báo cáo tài chính, báo cáo kinh doanh và báo cáo quản trị.
- Hiểu biết về cấu trúc cơ sở dữ liệu và mô hình dữ liệu BI:Dimension, MeasureData Matrix, Bus MatrixData Mart, Data Warehouse
- Dimension, Measure
- Data Matrix, Bus Matrix
- Data Mart, Data Warehouse

🛠️ Kỹ năng

- Ngoại ngữ: Tiếng Anh – đọc hiểu tài liệu chuyên ngành và giao tiếp.
- Thành thạo Power BI, SQL, Tableau và các công cụ phân tích dữ liệu.
- Kỹ năng thiết kế, trình bày báo cáo và dashboard.
- Kỹ năng phỏng vấn người dùng, đặt câu hỏi và làm rõ yêu cầu.
- Kỹ năng trình bày, truyền đạt, giao tiếp.
- Kỹ năng làm việc nhóm, thương lượng và thuyết phục các bên liên quan.

💼 Kinh nghiệm

- Bắt buộc tối thiểu 01 năm kinh nghiệm làm việc tại Ngân hàng.
- Có kinh nghiệm trong các lĩnh vực phân tích dữ liệu, lập báo cáo BI, MIS, hoặc các mảng:Báo cáo sản phẩmBáo cáo tài chínhBáo cáo rủi roBáo cáo điều hành
- Báo cáo sản phẩm
- Báo cáo tài chính
- Báo cáo rủi ro
- Báo cáo điều hành

🌱 Phẩm chất cá nhân

- Tinh thần học hỏi, chủ động tiếp thu kiến thức mới.
- Năng động, chăm chỉ, cẩn thận và kiên nhẫn.
- Thân thiện, hợp tác tốt với các đơn vị nghiệp vụ và kỹ thuật.
benefits:
• Average 15 Monthly Base salary per year

• ACB Health Care.

• Meal Allowance.

• Preferential loan as regulated by ACB

• Yearly Medical Checkup & Team building activities.

• Professional and Transparent Working Environment

title: Technical Architect (Banking, Securities)
reasons:
- Positive work environment, support & determination
- Very attractive salary & benefits
- Development opportunities & improve a quality life
jobDescription:
- Evaluate business needs and provide scalable technology solutions with focus on performance and resiliency in terms of software/application specifications and design documents based on architectural blueprints designed by the Digital Transformation Project Director
- Analyze current technologies used within the company and determine ways to improve. Presents and defends architectural, design, and technical choices to support our technology goals
- Provide the development team with architectural blueprints to follow
- Guide and assist the development team to resolve technical issues throughout the development process to ensure consistency with initial design, and to ensure software meets all requirements of quality, availability, performance, security, etc. via critical steps of Technical Design and Code Reviews, refactoring of application state, etc
- Troubleshoot and resolve issues with coding or design
- Develops high quality code that follows industry standard best practices and considers performance and resiliency
- Ensure that work plan is properly assigned, major timelines are cascaded with the Digital Technology team, and the correct documentation is in place and communicated regularly
- Carry out the day-to-day tasks such as stand-up calls, meetings, deployments and relevant important activities
- Support leading and mentoring engineers to achieve a greater level of programming skills
- Ensure corrective and preventive maintenance and service requests are prioritized and properly delivered
- Ensure that service, operational and support requirements are taken into consideration and solutions are ready to be transitioned to the live
- Responsible for ensuring that sufficient testing of solutions has taken place to minimize any disruption during transition to live
- Ensure that the right levels of communication are provided, relationships around the business are developed and nurtured and the expectations of key stakeholders are managed
- Improve the product quality and productivity over time
- Work closely with cross functional teams to successfully monitor progress of initiatives
- Any assignments from Line Manager if needed
requirements:
1. Education level

- Bachelor‘s degree in computer science, information-technology, engineering, or a related study, or equivalent experience

2. Knowledge & Experiences

- Minimum 10 years’ experience of working in software development, and at least 5 years in the Technical Leader position, with proven experience in designing scalable and large systems; making high-level technology decisions
- Good knowledge of software and service design (SOA, micro services, messaging, 12-factor methodology)
- Experience in designing different types of APIs and articulating their value proposition
- Good knowledge of Cloud, Containers and PaaS platform, formal certification from either GCP, Azure or AWS is a plus
- Experience with products and architecture / delivery of solutions in any of Amazon AWS, Microsoft Azure, GCP is a big advantage
- Have knowledge of DevOps and container management platforms like Kubernetes and Docker, familiar with CI / CD and Agile software development processes
- Experience in banking, finance or securities sectors is a big plus

3. Technical skills

- Ability to strategically evaluate and practically apply emerging technology trends to drive innovation and optimize evolving business and operating models
- Proficient in the fundamentals of cloud systems administration, with a strong ability to manage, monitor, and optimize cloud infrastructure effectively
- Expertise in architecting complex enterprise systems using Microservices, API development, Enterprise Service Bus (ESB), and messaging technologies to deliver scalable and integrated solutions

4. Soft skills

- Ability to present complex concepts and solutions in a way that’s easy to understand to non-technical audiences
- Excellent troubleshooting and communication skills
- Can communicate verbal and written English
- High responsibility and teamwork
- Ability to meet deadlines and deliver within our high-demand environment
- Required to be team-player who is highly motivated, focused on customer satisfaction and solution/results driven
benefits:
Understanding candidates' expectations of the ideal workplace, we always put the people element at the top of our priorities. ​

Primary benefits:

- Attractive KPI Bonus annual
- Review Salary and performance annual
- 18+ Annual Leaves​, 5 sick leaves, 1 day off birthday
- Full 100% Social Insurance, Annual Medical Check- up​, Health insurance
- Team Building and company activities: Year- end Party, New-year Party, Company trip, Charity activities
- Learning workshops: e-learning, English courses, career development training programs​
- Sports clubs: gym, yoga, running, football, tennis, badminton

title: Technical Lead (Golang, Java, NodeJS, IOS)
jobDescription:
THÔNG TIN CHUNG/ GENERAL INFORMATION

- Tên vị trí / Position: Technical Lead
- Phòng ban/ Department: Kỹ thuật/ Engineering
- Báo cáo cho/ Report to: CEO / CTO
- Số lượng/ Headcount: 1
- Cấp bậc/ Level: Lead / Principal

MỤC TIÊU CÔNG VIỆC/ JOB PURPOSE

Chịu trách nhiệm kiến trúc tổng thể hệ thống MDM, dẫn dắt đội ngũ phát triển, đưa ra quyết định kỹ thuật chiến lược và đảm bảo sản phẩm MDM đạt chất lượng tương đương Scalefusion, MobiStyle trên thị trường.

Responsible for the overall system architecture of the MDM (Mobile Device Management) platform. This role involves leading the engineering team to drive product development, making strategic technical decisions, and ensuring the product achieves market-leading quality comparable to industry benchmarks like Scalefusion and MobiStyle.

TRÁCH NHIỆM CHÍNH/ KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

- Thiết kế kiến trúc hệ thống MDM: backend API, mobile agent, admin console, push notificationSystem Architecture Design: Define the architecture for the MDM ecosystem, including Backend APIs, Mobile Agents, Admin Consoles, and Push Notification services.
- Lựa chọn công nghệ stack phù hợp và xây dựng coding standards cho toàn bộ dự ánTech Stack & Standards: Select appropriate technology stacks and establish coding standards and best practices for the entire project
- Phân chia module, lập sprint plan và assign task cho Sub Lead và Senior DevelopersDecompose modules, facilitate Sprint Planning, and assign tasks to Sub-Leads and Senior Developers.
- Code review, đảm bảo chất lượng code, bảo mật và performance của hệ thốngConduct Code Reviews to ensure system integrity, security, and high performance.
- Thiết kế hệ thống MDM protocols: device enrollment, policy enforcement, remote commandsMDM Protocol Design: Design and implement core MDM protocols, including Device Enrollment, Policy Enforcement, and Remote Commands
- Xây dựng CI/CD pipeline, quy trình deploy, monitoring và incident responseBuild CI/CD pipelines, deployment workflows, system monitoring, and incident response strategies.
- Nghiên cứu và tích hợp các tính năng MDM nâng cao: Kiosk mode, Geofencing, App ManagementResearch and integrate advanced MDM features such as Kiosk Mode, Geofencing, and Mobile Application Management (MAM).
- Phối hợp với BA để chuyển đổi yêu cầu nghiệp vụ thành thiết kế kỹ thuậtCollaborate with Business Analysts (BA) to translate business requirements into robust technical specifications
requirements:
YÊU CẦU/ REQUIREMENTS

Học vấn:    Cử nhân CNTT, Khoa học máy tính hoặc tương đươngEducation: Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science, IT, or a related field.

Kinh nghiệm: 5-8 năm kinh nghiệm phát triển phần mềm, 2+ năm ở vị trí lead. Ưu tiên có kinh nghiệm MDM/EMMExperience: 5–8 years in software development, with 2+ years in a leadership role. Previous experience with MDM/EMM (Enterprise Mobility Management) is highly preferred.

Kỹ năng kỹ thuật   Technical Skills

- Backend: Golang, Java, Node.js/Python/Go, RESTful API, GraphQL, Microservices
- Mobile: Android (Kotlin/Java), iOS (Swift), Device Admin API, MDM protocols
- Cloud: AWS (EC2, S3, RDS, Lambda, IoT Core), Docker, Kubernetes
- Database: PostgreSQL, Redis, MongoDB, Elasticsearch
- Security: OAuth 2.0, JWT, End-to-End Encryption (E2EE), certificate management

Kỹ năng mềmSoft Skills

- Khả năng lãnh đạo kỹ thuật, mentoring và phát triển đội ngũ
- Tư duy kiến trúc hệ thống, ra quyết định kỹ thuật chiến lược
- Giao tiếp hiệu quả với cả team kỹ thuật và non-tech stakeholders
- Giao tiếp Tiếng Anh tốt

- Proven technical leadership, mentoring, and team growth capabilities.   - Strong architectural thinking and strategic decision-making.   - Excellent communication skills with both technical teams and non-technical stakeholders.   - Good in English communication

KPI ĐO LƯỜNG HIỆU QUẢ/ KEY PERFORMANCE INDICATORS (KPIs)

- KPI 1: Uptime hệ thống MDM ≥ 99.5%System Uptime ≥ 99.5%.
- KPI2: Thời gian response API trung bình < 200msAverage API Response Time < 200ms.
- KPI 3: Code coverage ≥ 80% cho các module coreCode Coverage ≥ 80% for core modules
- KPI 4: Sprint velocity ổn định, hoàn thành ≥ 85% story points mỗi sprintStable Sprint Velocity, completing ≥ 85% of committed Story Points per sprint
- KPI 5: Số lượng critical bugs trên production < 2/thángFewer than 2 critical production bugs per month

CÔNG CỤ SỬ DỤNG/ TOOLSTACK

- Cursor Pro + GitHub Copilot — AI-assisted coding
- Claude Pro / Claude API — AI assistant cho kiến trúc và code review
- GitHub Team — Source control, PR review, CI/CD (GitHub Actions)
- Jira — Sprint planning, task management, backlog grooming
- AWS Console — Quản lý hạ tầng cloud
- Docker + Kubernetes — Container orchestration
- Postman — API design và testing
- Datadog + Sentry — Monitoring và error tracking
- SonarCloud — Code quality và security scanning
benefits:
- Lương/ Salary: Thỏa thuận từ 50.000.000 đồng/ Negotiable from VND 50,000,000
- Đóng BHXH – BHYT – BHTN đầy đủ
- Lương tháng 13...
- Các quyền lợi khác sẽ được nêu rõ khi phỏng vấn
- Thời gian làm việc: từ thứ 2 đến thứ 7, 8h00 đến 17h00Insurance: Full Social, Health, and Unemployment Insurance coverage as per labor laws.Bonuses & Leave: 13th-month salary and 12 days of annual leave upon signing the official labor contract.Other Benefits: To be discussed in detail during the interview.Working Hours: Monday – Saturday, 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM.

title: 04 Senior Fullstack Dev (Golang, Java, NodeJS, IOS)
jobDescription:
THÔNG TIN CHUNG/ GENERAL INFORMATION

- Tên vị trí / Position: Senior Developer
- Phòng ban/ Department: Kỹ thuật (Engineering)
- Báo cáo cho/ Report to: Tech Lead / Sub Lead
- Số lượng/ Headcount: 4
- Cấp bậc/ Level: Senior

MỤC TIÊU CÔNG VIỆC/ JOB PURPOSE

Phát triển các tính năng backend, frontend và mobile cho sản phẩm MDM, đảm bảo code chất lượng cao, hiệu năng tốt và bảo mật. Đóng góp vào việc xây dựng sản phẩm MDM cạnh tranh trên thị trường Việt Nam.Develop backend, frontend, and mobile features for Mobile Device Management (MDM) products, ensuring high-quality code, performance, and security. Contribute to building a competitive MDM product in the Vietnamese market.

TRÁCH NHIỆM CHÍNH/ KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

- Phát triển backend services: API quản lý thiết bị, policy engine, command queueDevelop backend services including device management APIs, policy engines, and command queues.
- Xây dựng admin console (web dashboard) cho quản trị viên MDMBuild web dashboards (Admin Consoles) for MDM administrators.
- Phát triển mobile agent app trên Android và/hoặc iOS cho thiết bị được quản lýDevelop mobile agent applications on Android and/or iOS for managed devices.
- Triển khai các tính năng MDM: remote lock/wipe, kiosk mode, app blacklist/whitelistImplement MDM features such as remote lock/wipe, kiosk mode, and app blacklisting/whitelisting.
- Viết unit tests và integration tests, đảm bảo code coverage theo yêu cầuWrite unit and integration tests to ensure code coverage meets requirements.
- Tham gia code review, đóng góp ý kiến cải thiện kiến trúc và quy trìnhParticipate in code reviews and contribute to architectural and procedural improvements.
- Fix bugs, optimize performance và xử lý technical debtFix bugs, optimize performance, and resolve technical debt.
- Cập nhật kiến thức về Android Enterprise, Apple MDM protocol, SCEP/DEPStay updated with Android Enterprise, Apple MDM protocol, and SCEP/DEP
requirements:
YÊU CẦU/ REQUIREMENTS

Học vấn: Cử nhân CNTT, Khoa học máy tính hoặc tương đươngEducation: Bachelor’s degree in IT, Computer Science, or equivalent.

Kinh nghiệm: 3-5 năm kinh nghiệm phát triển phần mềm. Ưu tiên có kinh nghiệm mobile developmentExperience: 3-5 years of experience in software development. Prior experience in mobile development is preferred.

Kỹ năng kỹ thuậtTechnical Skills

- Backend: Golang, Java, Node.js/Python, RESTful API, SQL/NoSQL databases
- Frontend: React.js/Vue.js, TypeScript, responsive design
- Mobile: Android (Kotlin/Java) or iOS (Swift), React Native is a plus
- Cloud: AWS cơ bản (EC2, S3, Lambda), Firebase Cloud Messaging
- Tools: Git, Docker, CI/CD, Agile/Scrum methodology

Kỹ năng mềmSoft Skills

- Tự chủ trong công việc, chủ động tìm giải pháp
- Tinh thần học hỏi, cập nhật công nghệ mới
- Làm việc nhóm tốt, sẵn sàng hỗ trợ đồng đội
- Kỹ năng giao tiếp Tiếng AnhSelf-reliance: High level of autonomy and proactive problem-solving.Growth Mindset: Eagerness to learn and stay updated with new technologies.Teamwork: Strong collaboration skills and a willingness to support teammates.English communication skill.

KPI ĐO LƯỜNG HIỆU QUẢ/ KEY PERFORMANCE INDICATORS (KPIs)

- KPI 1: Hoàn thành ≥ 90% story points được assign trong sprintComplete ≥ 90% of assigned story points within a sprint.
- KPI 2: Code coverage ≥ 80% cho code mớiMaintain code coverage ≥ 80% for new code.
- KPI 3: Số lượng bugs từ code cá nhân < 3/sprintKeep individual bug count below 3 per sprint.
- KPI 4: PR được chấp thuận trong vòng 24 giờEnsure Pull Requests (PRs) are approved within 24 hours.

CÔNG CỤ SỬ DỤNG/ TOOLSTACK

- Cursor Pro + GitHub Copilot — AI-assisted coding
- Claude Pro — Debug, code generation, learning
- GitHub Team — Source control, pull requests
- Jira — Task management, sprint tracking
- Postman — API testing and documentation
- Docker — Development environment
- BrowserStack — Cross-browser/device testing
- Figma — Design specs and assets
benefits:
- Lương/ Salary: Thỏa thuận từ 25.000.000 đồng/ Negotiable from VND 25,000,000
- Đóng BHXH – BHYT – BHTN đầy đủ
- Lương tháng 13...
- Các quyền lợi khác sẽ được nêu rõ khi phỏng vấn
- Thời gian làm việc: từ thứ 2 đến thứ 7, 8h00 đến 17h00Insurance: Full Social, Health, and Unemployment Insurance coverage as per labor laws.Bonuses & Leave: 13th-month salary and 12 days of annual leave upon signing the official labor contract.Other Benefits: To be discussed in detail during the interview.Working Hours: Monday – Saturday, 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM.

title: Business Analyst (BA)
jobDescription:
THÔNG TIN CHUNG/ GENERAL INFORMATION

- Tên vị trí / Position: Business Analyst (BA)
- Phòng ban/ Department: Sản phẩm (Product)
- Báo cáo cho/ Report to: CEO / Tech Lead
- Số lượng/ Headcount: 1
- Cấp bậc/ Level: Mid-Senior

MỤC TIÊU CÔNG VIỆC/ JOB PURPOSE

Phân tích yêu cầu nghiệp vụ MDM từ thị trường và khách hàng, chuyển đổi thành đặc tả kỹ thuật chi tiết, đảm bảo sản phẩm MDM đáp ứng đúng nhu cầu quản lý thiết bị di động của doanh nghiệp Việt Nam.Analyze MDM business requirements from the market and customers. Translate these into detailed technical specifications to ensure the MDM product effectively meets the mobile device management needs of Vietnamese enterprises.

TRÁCH NHIỆM CHÍNH/ KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

- Nghiên cứu thị trường MDM, phân tích đối thủ (Scalefusion, Hexnode, ManageEngine) để xác định feature gapConduct MDM market research and competitor analysis (Scalefusion, Hexnode, ManageEngine) to identify feature gaps.
- Thu thập và phân tích yêu cầu từ khách hàng tiềm năng (doanh nghiệp, trường học, bệnh viện)Collect and analyze requirements from potential customers (enterprises, schools, hospitals).
- Viết Product Requirements Document (PRD) và User Stories chi tiết cho từng tính năng MDMWrite Product Requirements Documents (PRD) and detailed User Stories for each MDM feature.
- Thiết kế user flows, wireframes cơ bản và phối hợp với UI/UX DesignerDesign basic user flows and wireframes; collaborate with UI/UX Designers.
- Định nghĩa acceptance criteria rõ ràng cho mỗi user storyDefine clear acceptance criteria for every user story.
- Tham gia sprint planning, grooming, review — đóng vai trò Product Owner phụ trợParticipate in sprint planning, grooming, and reviews—acting as a proxy Product Owner.
- Phân tích dữ liệu sử dụng sản phẩm để đề xuất cải tiến tính năngAnalyze product usage data to propose feature enhancements.
requirements:
YÊU CẦU/ REQUIREMENTS

Học vấn: Cử nhân CNTT, Quản trị Kinh doanh hoặc ngành liên quanEducation: Bachelor’s degree in IT, Business Administration, or related fields.

Kinh nghiệm: 2-4 năm kinh nghiệm BA tại công ty phần mềm. Ưu tiên có kinh nghiệm B2B SaaSExperience: 2–4 years of experience as a BA in software companies; experience in B2B SaaS is preferred.

Kỹ năng kỹ thuật:Technical Skills

- Phân tích yêu cầu: Use case diagrams, user story mapping, process flow
- Wireframing: Figma, Balsamiq hoặc tương đương
- Agile/Scrum methodology, hiểu biết về sprint workflow
- SQL cơ bản để truy vấn dữ liệu phân tích
- Hiểu biết về MDM concepts: device enrollment, policy, compliance, app managementRequirement Analysis: Proficiency in Use Case diagrams, user story mapping, and process flows.Wireframing: Figma, Balsamiq, or equivalent tools.Methodology: Strong understanding of Agile/Scrum and sprint workflows.Data: Basic SQL skills for data analysis queries.Domain Knowledge: Understanding of MDM concepts: device enrollment, policy, compliance, and app management.

Kỹ năng mềm:Soft Skills

title: Senior DevOps Engineer (AWS, Linux, CI/CD)
reasons:
- State-of-the-art algorithm & knowledge of exchange
- Dynamic and professional working environment
- Strong career paths with well-support policy
jobDescription:
About TJTECH

TJTECH is a fast-scaling fintech company building AI-driven trading and broker infrastructure across Vietnam, Singapore, and Japan.

We operate:

- Real-money B2C trading platforms
- B2B broker infrastructure (MT4/MT5, liquidity, risk systems)
- High-availability real-time trading systems You will lead the stability, scalability, and security of live trading infrastructure serving international brokers and retail traders.

Role Overview

We are seeking a Senior DevOps Engineer who will take ownership of mission-critical trading infrastructure.

This is not a maintenance role.

This is a leadership role responsible for:

- Production reliability
- Infrastructure architecture decisions
- Incident command
- DevOps process maturity

You will work closely with CTO-level stakeholders and product leadership.

Key Responsibilities

- Architect and operate high-availability AWS infrastructure
- Own Kubernetes cluster architecture and optimization
- Lead CI/CD architecture and GitOps implementation
- Ensure uptime and reliability of MT4/MT5 trading platforms
- Design scalable monitoring and alerting systems
- Drive incident response and root-cause analysis
- Implement infrastructure-as-code practices
- Strengthen system security and access controls
- Mentor junior DevOps engineers
requirements:
Experience

- 5+ years in DevOps / Infrastructure Engineering
- Proven experience operating real-time production systems
- Experience in financial systems or trading platforms (preferred)
- Cloud & Infrastructure
- Advanced AWS experience (VPC architecture, IAM, HA design, scaling strategy)
- Strong Kubernetes expertise (cluster architecture, networking, RBAC, autoscaling)
- Deep networking knowledge (TCP/IP, routing, firewall, load balancing)
- Experience designing fault-tolerant, highly available systems
- Experience with Terraform or similar IaC tools

DevOps & Automation

- Strong experience designing CI/CD pipelines
- Experience with GitOps (ArgoCD preferred)
- Advanced deployment strategies (Blue/Green, Canary)
- Monitoring stack experience (Prometheus, Grafana, ELK, etc.)
- Strong Linux systems administration skills

Soft Skills

- Strong ownership mindset
- Ability to lead incident response calmly under pressure
- Clear communication and cross-team coordination
- Ability to make architectural trade-off decisions
benefits:
- Salary: 3,000 – 3,500 USD (based on experience)
- 13th month salary
- 100% salary during 2-month probation
- Annual performance review
- HMO coverage
- Visa/work permit support
- Direct impact on fintech infrastructure across multiple countries

title: Milient - Senior Fullstack Developer (NodeJS, MERN)
reasons:
- Global growth with experienced engineers
- Innovative, balanced, creative culture
- Competitive salary, benefits, training
jobDescription:
Milient is a leading SaaS provider specializing in project management solutions, offering tools for timekeeping, resource planning and quality assurance to businesses across the Nordic region. With offices in Norway and Sweden, we are proud of being the Nordic region’s largest SaaS provider within project management, including timekeeping, resource planning, quality assurance, staffing, and recruitment. Milient is often used by architects, the staffing industry, advertising, engineering and IT. Milient aims to empower businesses by simplifying complex project management tasks, thereby enhancing productivity and project outcomes. We emphasizes the importance of its employees, fostering a collaborative environment that encourages professional development.

Read more about us:

We are hiring three Software Developers to join a growing product team based in our Hanoi office. You will work within a collaborative team that includes a Tech Lead and consultants based in Poland, contributing to both the maintenance and modernization of existing systems, as well as the development of new features on a MERN stack hosted in AWS.

While the role is full stack in nature, frontend support is available within the broader organisation, so a stronger backend or full stack profile is equally welcome.

A key workstream for this team is the identification and extraction of functional domains within the existing application, decomposing it into standalone, reusable modules that will underpin a broader product portfolio. This is a rare opportunity to combine legacy modernization with genuine greenfield architecture work.

Responsibilities:

- Design, develop, and maintain features across the full stack primarily using MongoDB, Express.js, React, and Node.js.
- Contribute to the gradual migration of legacy frontend code (jQuery and related technologies) toward modern frameworks and best practices.
- Play an active role in identifying and decomposing functional domains within the existing application into standalone, reusable modules – combining legacy modernization with greenfield architecture work to support a growing product portfolio.
- Collaborate closely with the Tech Lead, Polish-based consultants, and cross-functional teams to deliver high-quality software.
- Participate in code reviews, providing and receiving constructive feedback to uphold coding standards.
- Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code with appropriate test coverage.
- Identify and address technical debt as part of ongoing development work.
- Support deployment and monitoring of applications in AWS environments.
- Contribute to Agile ceremonies including sprint planning, stand-ups, and retrospectives.
requirements:
- Bachelor’s degree in computer science, Software Engineering, or a related field (or equivalent practical experience).
- Proven experience as a Software Developer with deep proficiency in Node.js and server-side JavaScript; working knowledge of the broader MERN stack (MongoDB, Express.js, React) is expected with Node.js being the primary focus
- Solid understanding of RESTful API design and integration.
- Familiarity with legacy frontend technologies, particularly jQuery.
- Experience with version control systems (Git) and collaborative development workflows.
- Comfortable using AI coding assistants (e.g. GitHub Copilot, Claude, Cursor) as part of your day-to-day development workflow
- Understanding of software testing principles and experience writing unit or integration tests.
- Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail.
- Good communication skills and ability to work effectively across distributed, multicultural teams.

For Senior-level candidates, you should also have:

- Significant experience (typically 5+ years) delivering production software in full stack or backend-heavy roles.
- The ability to take ownership of complex technical problems and drive solutions with minimal guidance.
- Experience mentoring or informally supporting junior and mid-level developers.
- A track record of contributing to architectural decisions, technical documentation, and long-term code quality improvements.

Preferred Qualifications

- Experience with AWS services (e.g.: EC2, S3, Lambda, RDS) and cloud-native development practices.
- Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines and DevOps tooling.
- Experience with Agile methodologies and tools such as Jira and Confluence.
- Prior exposure to frontend migration projects or modernization initiatives.
- Experience with domain-driven design, modular architecture, or application decomposition (e.g: microfrontends, service extraction).
- Knowledge of security best practices in web application development
- Experience with agentic coding workflows, such as using AI tools to scaffold features, generate tests or automate repetitive tasks.
benefits:
What we offer:

Challenging responsibilities, an entrepreneurial environment, and a supportive team. If you’re not a perfect fit but have what it takes, reach out. We value diversity.

What will you get?

Join our innovative and market-leading Scandinavian SaaS company and accelerate your growth alongside experienced software engineers from around the world. We value creativity, innovation, and work-life balance in our Scandinavian work culture, and offer a competitive salary with 100% official salary during the probation period, annual reviews, and 13th month salary.

We prioritize the well-being of our employees with premium healthcare and accident insurance, as well as a wellness package to help you stay healthy and wealthy. You'll also have the chance to participate in exciting company outings, team-building activities, and on-site training opportunities in the Nordic region.

Work in a modern and supportive environment where your individuality is valued, and collaborate with a talented team on a mission to become global players in the industry.

title: SAP IT Project Lead (Test/ Data/ Cutover/ Cloud)
reasons:
- Hybrid working
- Wonderful and Human focus Environment
- Global Training Program (Cloud, OS,...)
jobDescription:
As a SAP IT Project Lead (Test/ Data/ Cutover), you will be a key leader in the success of SAP transformation programs. You will be responsible for:

- Leading the SAP data migration and cutover strategy across business units and geographies.
- Acting as Subject Matter Expert (SME) for all data-related aspects, including extraction, transformation, validation, and reconciliation of data from legacy systems to SAP.
- Collaborating with business, functional, and technical teams to define cutover scope, wave plans, and runbooks.
- Ensuring alignment of the data migration approach with project timelines and quality standards.
- Designing and implementing data validation and data quality frameworks.
- Managing cutover rehearsals, mock runs, and hypercare support planning.
- Coordinating with internal and external stakeholders to minimize business disruption during go-live.
- Managing and mentoring team members, driving cross-functional coordination, and ensuring knowledge transfer.
- Reporting on data migration and cutover KPIs, proactively identifying and mitigating risks.
- Applying industry best practices, tools, and automation in project execution to ensure high-quality outcomes.
requirements:
Must haveProgram/Project Management Excellence

- Minimum 5 years of experience leading complex IT programs, including SAP implementation projects.
- Expertise in Agile, Waterfall, and hybrid delivery methodologies.
- Strong ability to manage project budgets, timelines, and dependencies.

SAP Expertise

- Deep knowledge of SAP S/4HANA data structures across modules such as Finance (FI), Controlling (CO), Supply Chain (MM/SD), and Manufacturing (PP/QM).
- Proven experience with SAP Data Migration tools, including SAP BODS, LTMC, SAP Data Services, and Migration Cockpit.
- Solid understanding of Cutover planning for SAP go-lives, including mock run cycles and rollback strategies.

Data Strategy & Governance

- Proficiency in data governance frameworks, Master Data Management (MDM), and Data Quality tools.
- Understanding of data security, privacy compliance (e.g., GDPR), and data retention policies.

Technical & Analytical Tools

- Advanced skills in SQL, Excel VBA, Power BI/Tableau for data reporting and transformation.
- Experience using project tracking tools like JIRA, ServiceNow, Clarity, or MS Project.

Leadership & Communication

- Ability to communicate clearly with technical and non-technical audiences.
- Experience managing cross-functional and global teams.

title: Mid - Senior Business Analyst
reasons:
- Competitive Salary Package
- Dynamic & Flexible Working Environment
- Working with experts from around Europe and USA
jobDescription:
Founded in 2014, Eastgate Software is a software development company that builds custom business solutions and applications. We are proud of our high-qualified staff who has more than 20 years of experience in software development including web, mobile and desktop applications.

We put quality and customer satisfactions at the top priority in every project we carry. Therefore, our German and US senior experts offer local consultancy for European and US clients.

As a member of Eastgate, you will be emerged in a professional and flexible environment where you have opportunities to express your own ideas and improve your skill set through many interesting full-cycle projects.

Your responsibilities:

- Work as a Business Analyst in an Agile environment, collaborating closely with Product Owners, developers, QA, and stakeholders.
- Envision and analyze initial business requirements and support the definition of the initial project scope.
- Gather, analyze, and translate business needs into user stories, acceptance criteria, and functional specifications.
- Document business and functional requirements using appropriate artifacts such as wireframes, user stories, activity diagrams, use cases, and process flows.
- Support requirements planning, elicitation, analysis, validation, and life cycle management in alignment with BABOK best practices
- Facilitate effective communication between the development team and customers regarding implementation, QA issues, and requirement clarifications.
- Support UAT activities, including test preparation, defect clarification, and validation of implemented requirements.
- Prepare and maintain BA-related documentation, such as Requirement Traceability Matrix (RTM), user manuals, and UAT/training materials.

With Senior Level:

- Define the Business Analysis approach for each project, including elicitation techniques, documentation standards, and stakeholder engagement strategy.
- Plan and manage the requirements phase at the beginning of the project, including scope definition, prioritization, and risk identification.
- Lead and facilitate requirements elicitation workshops and stakeholder review sessions.
- Analyze business processes, user workflows, and system interactions to identify gaps and improvement opportunities.
- Document detailed and high-quality business requirements, ensuring clarity, consistency, and testability.
- Manage requirement changes, perform impact analysis, and support change control throughout the project lifecycle.
- Participate in peer reviews and inspections of requirements and analysis artifacts to ensure quality and alignment.
- Provide coaching and training to junior team members and prepare training materials as needed.
requirements:
- 3–5 years of experience as a Business Analyst or Product Owner, with strong practical knowledge of BABOK and Business Analysis best practices.
- Proven experience in requirements planning, elicitation, analysis, validation, and lifecycle management.
- Strong skills in stakeholder management, requirements prioritization, and change control.
- Ability to model business processes, functional flows, and system interactions.
- Experience supporting UAT, solution validation, and post-release evaluation.
- In-depth experience with at least one prototyping tool (e.g., Balsamiq, Figma); experience with modeling tools is an advantage.
- Good command of English, especially spoken English.
- Domain knowledge in Logistics or Intelligent Transportation Systems (ITS) is an advantage.
benefits:

Với lợi thế về hạ tầng và hệ sinh thái dữ liệu, đây là môi trường phù hợp cho những chuyên gia công nghệ mong muốn:

- Làm việc với các bài toán kỹ thuật phức tạp (distributed systems, tích hợp đa hệ thống)

Chúng tôi đang tìm kiếm Tech Lead đồng hành cùng đội ngũ trong việc thiết kế và triển khai các giải pháp công nghệ thế hệ mới.

Mô tả công việc

Với lợi thế về hạ tầng và hệ sinh thái dữ liệu, đây là môi trường phù hợp cho những chuyên gia công nghệ mong muốn:

title: AI Developer (Python, GenAI/LLM)
jobDescription:
Team Context

You'll join a small, high-output AI/ML team within Microsoft's Lifecycle Scale Solutions (LSS) organization, working across a 10-project AI portfolio that includes AI agents, LLM evaluation tools, NLP pipelines, and ML models. The team innovates, experiments, and builds — from early POCs to production systems on Azure. We serve as customer zero for larger engineering and product teams, piloting new AI tools and patterns for our organization.

What You'll Do

· Build and deploy AI agents and multi-agent systems on Azure using composable patterns

· Build and consume MCP servers to connect agents to internal data sources, tools, and enterprise workflows

· Design orchestration patterns, tool integrations, and RAG pipelines

· Develop prompt engineering and evaluation workflows (including automated eval loops)

· Build APIs for agent integration with enterprise platforms (M365 Copilot, Teams)

· Implement data pipelines for unstructured data (transcripts, support interactions)

· Set up CI/CD, responsible AI controls, and production monitoring

· Use agentic dev tools (GHC CLI, Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot agent mode) as your primary development workflow

· Flex into low-code agent configuration, infrastructure, and data engineering as needed
requirements:
Must-Have Skills

· AI agent development — building and deploying agents on Azure AI Foundry, Microsoft Agent Framework, or equivalent; composable agent patterns

· LLM/GenAI engineering — prompt engineering, model selection, evaluation, fine-tuning, structured outputs

· AI-native dev tools - GitHub Copilot CLI, Claude Code, etc.

· Python (Advanced) — production-quality, async, typed, well-tested code

· API development — designing and building production REST APIs

· Cloud infrastructure — Azure services, search, identity, deployment pipelines

·  Good to Have: MCP server development, LLM/ML Ops, PySpark, NLP, Copilot Studio, Power Platform, front-end development, containerization, agent evaluation frameworks

Qualifications

. 4+ years software engineering, 2+ years building GenAI/LLM solutions in production. Full-stack experience preferred. Must demonstrate hands-on agent or AI system development — not just calling APIs. Experience with MCP or similar agent-tool integration protocols is a strong differentiator. BS/MS in CS or equivalent.

. Proficiency in English
benefits:
- Innovative Work Culture: Join a team where creativity and innovation are at the heart of everything we do. Our IT company thrives on new ideas, and we foster a collaborative environment where every voice is valued and heard. You'll have the opportunity to work on cutting-edge projects that push the boundaries of technology.
- Career Growth & Learning Opportunities: We believe in the power of continuous learning. Whether it’s through mentorship, online courses, or access to industry conferences, we provide the tools you need to grow professionally. You’ll have opportunities to learn and advance in your career, all while working with some of the best minds in the industry.
- Flexible Work Environment: Work-life balance is key. We offer flexible hours and a supportive environment that adapts to your needs. Whether you're a night owl or an early bird, we trust our employees to manage their time in a way that allows for both productivity and personal time.
- Collaborative Team Spirit: We know that great things happen when people come together. Our teams are diverse, inclusive, and driven to succeed. From brainstorming sessions to cross-departmental collaboration, you’ll work with talented individuals who are passionate about what they do.

title: Product Owner (Business Analyst, AI, Agile/Scrum)
reasons:
- MacBook Pro/Extra screens & Remote Work policy
- Premium health insurance package for you, relative
- Company Trip 4-5*, Yoga, Gym/Fitness/English club
jobDescription:
As a Product Owner at our technology firm, you will own internal products end-to-end — from ideation to launch to ongoing operations — serving our internal teams and departments as your users. You will work directly with the BOD and Heads of other departments as your primary stakeholders, leveraging AI tools aggressively across the product workflow, and driving delivery through strong communication, stakeholder expectation management, and self-management. This role suits someone who thinks like an owner, not an executor.

- End-to-End Product Ownership: Own the full lifecycle of internal products — from ideation, through development and launch, to post-launch operations. Define product vision, roadmap, priorities, and success metrics aligned with organizational goals. Take full accountability for outcomes, not just output.
- AI-Powered Product Work: Leverage AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, Copilot, etc.) extensively across the workflow — drafting specs, writing user stories, prototyping, research, documentation, and testing — to multiply your throughput and the team's velocity.
- Stakeholder & Expectation Management: Work directly with the BOD and Heads of other departments as your primary stakeholders. Gather needs, align priorities, communicate trade-offs clearly, and manage expectations proactively. Say "no" constructively when needed and defend decisions with data.
- Delivery & Demo: Partner with the Development team through implementation. Run sprint demos for stakeholders, coordinate releases, handle UAT with internal users, and ensure features ship on time and meet business goals.
- Operations & Post-Launch: Monitor product performance and health after launch. Support internal users across departments, handle operational issues, collect feedback, and iterate. Own the product in production — not just during build.
- Self-Management & People Coordination: Drive your own priorities with minimal supervision. Coordinate across cross-functional teammates without formal authority — influence, unblock, and follow through.
- Data-Driven Decisions: Use usage data and internal user feedback to prioritize backlog, validate hypotheses, and recommend improvements.
- Ad-hoc Tasks: Execute additional assignments as requested by the Line Manager.
requirements:
KNOWLEDGE & EXPERIENCE

- Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Business Information Systems, or a related field.
- Minimum 2-3 years of experience as a Product Owner, Product Manager, or senior Business Analyst with proven end-to-end product ownership.
- Experience working on internal / B2E (business-to-employee) products, enterprise tools, or internal platforms is a strong plus.
- Hands-on, daily experience using AI tools to accelerate product work — specs, prototypes, research, documentation, analysis.
- Solid understanding of the Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC) and Agile/Scrum; comfortable operating in AI-assisted development environments.

SKILLS

- Strong AI fluency: able to use AI tools effectively across product tasks — prompt well, validate output, integrate AI into daily workflow.
- Fluent in Vietnamese (clear, concise, and persuasive communication) and Professional working proficiency in English.
- Stakeholder management with senior leaders: comfortable working directly with BOD and Heads of other departments — align competing priorities, manage expectations proactively, and communicate with executive-level clarity.
- Proficiency in writing user stories, acceptance criteria, and creating workflow diagrams (AI-assisted is fine and encouraged).
- Comfortable running demos, UAT sessions, and stakeholder presentations.
- SQL and basic data-analysis skills are a plus.

ABILITIES

- Strong self-management: organized, proactive, and drives tasks to completion without constant supervision.
- Manages people without authority: coordinates, influences, and unblocks teammates across functions.
- Owner mindset: takes responsibility from idea to operation — not just hand-off at delivery.
- Expectation-setting: calm under pressure, honest about trade-offs, and able to say no constructively.
- Growth-oriented: embraces new technology (especially AI) and continuously sharpens the craft.
- An active listener who can calmly champion and defend new ideas.
benefits:
- Great facility to work. You will have a MacBook and extra high definition screens
- Remote work 12 days / Annual leave 12 days / Sick leave 2 days / Anniversary leave 1 day

title: MaintMaster - Quality Assurance Engineer
reasons:
- Global growth with experienced engineers
- Innovative, balanced, creative culture
- Competitive salary, benefits, training
jobDescription:
Maintmaster is a Swedish company with a 20-year history of delivering software for managing and  structuring maintenance work across a wide variety of industries, primarily in northern Europe.  Today, we are about 50 people but are aiming to grow a lot in the next few years. We work with state-of-the-art tools, frameworks, methods, and programming languages, not just because they are the latest and greatest but also because it is more fun to be close to the bleeding edge product is deployed to Microsoft Azure and currently serves more than 600 customers and 60000 users in 25 countries, and we want your help to make it even better. We offer a great working environment with a high degree of self-organization and independence as well as close collaboration with our Swedish, German, Irish and English colleagues, from developers, QA engineers and UX designers to product owners, salespersons, and project leads.

More information at ;

Maintmaster is now looking for a quality assurance engineer with a focus on testing and quality assurance within a modern web app built on .NET, React and Microsoft Azure to work in our beautiful office in HANOI, VIETNAM.

What will you do?

- You will work in a newly established team of 5-7 people, collaborating alongside an already fully functional and established team with the common task of developing and delivering what is deemed to be the most important functionality for our customers at any given time.
- Together with the team, and other teams, you will decide the best way to test and generally ensure that new features are up to our quality standards.
- You will plan, design, and execute tests, either manually or create automated test (supported by your teammates)
- Your primary work will be in quality assurance, but work may take you into other areas of work and technology too, such as IoT, CI/CD and Azure Infrastructure if you are interested.
- The team is jointly responsible for the delivery, from preparation until roll-out.
- The team works closely with all stakeholders such as the product owner, UX designer, architect, management, and other development teams. Close collaboration with these is essential.
- You are encouraged from day one to contribute to the product backlog and to the team’s way of working. We would love to hear what we should do differently from you.
requirements:
Minimum requirements:

- Relevant education or similar in software testing.
- Solid hands-on experience with software testing, including test planning, test case design, execution and defect reporting.
- Experience with professional software testing and test automation.
- Excellent communication skills. Able to write clear bug reports and collaborate effectively with developers and product owners.
- Excellent English communication skills, spoken and written.

Will be advanced if you are skilled in:

- Programming skills, with experience in Playwright (JavaScript).
- Familiar with SQL and databases
- Working in an international environment
- Experience with testing tools such as Postman and Soap UI
- GIT
- Azure and Azure DevOps
- Agile mindset and methods
- Continuous integration, delivery, and industry standard tools
benefits:
Why you’ll love working here:

- You will work with state-of-the-art technology, tools, and methods.
- You will work in a team, not just side by side with others.
- We love the agile mindset, we think it is a key factor in developing great software with great people, and we hope that you do too.
- We encourage helping and supporting one another. Helping others do their work is considered more important than work.

What will you get?

- You’ll get to work with experienced software engineers worldwide at market leading, innovative Scandinavian SaaS company looking to accelerate growth.
- Scandinavian Work Culture: creativity, innovation, and work-life balance.
- Competitive salary and 100% official salary during the probation period.
- Annual review and 13th month salary.
- Premium healthcare and accident insurance.
- Wellness package supports employees to stay healthy and wealthy.
- Exciting company outing/events and team building activities.
- On-site and training opportunities in Nordic.
- Modern working environment.

title: Senior Fullstack Developer
reasons:
- Attractive Salary + Bonus
- Premium healthcare package for you and your family
- Upskill with FlexLearn Program
jobDescription:
ABOUT US

Live Payments is one of Australia's leading payment service providers, servicing thousands of businesses across Australia. We continue to innovate our payment solutions and expand our product offering alongside our industry leading strategic partners including Qantas Loyalty and Prospa.

ROLE AND RESPONSIBILITIES

Live Payments is seeking a talented and experienced Full-stack Developer to join our growing/ multi-national team. Reporting directly to our Vietnam based Team Leader, the Full-stack Developer will work on developing and maintain our existing and future products.

Core duties include:

Frontend Development

- Develop and implement user interfaces using React.js, Next.js, and modern front-end technologies
- Build responsive, accessible UIs with CSS and Material-UI
- Troubleshoot and resolve end-user issues and optimise automated processes

Backend Development

- Design, develop, and maintain robust backend APIs using Node.js (NestJS) and Golang
- Build and maintain high-performance, high-throughput services with strict reliability requirements
- Design and maintain scalable microservices capable of handling high transaction volumes
- Ensure idempotency, consistency, and fault tolerance across processing flows
- Implement robust error handling, retry strategies, and reconciliation processes

AI-Augmented Development & Collaboration

- Use agentic AI tools (e.g. Claude Code, Cursor, GitHub Copilot) daily to accelerate development, automate code reviews, and improve code quality
- Design effective prompts, workflows, and context strategies to maximise output from AI coding agents
- Identify and implement opportunities to integrate AI agents into development workflows, CI/CD pipelines, and operational processes
- Collaborate with stakeholders to clarify project requirements and recommend improvements
- Conduct code reviews with a strong focus on performance, security, and reliability
- Prepare and maintain comprehensive technical documentation, including SRS and design documents
- Work closely with DevOps teams to improve observability, monitoring, and alerting
requirements:
Required skills:

- Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related discipline, or equivalent professional experience
- At least 5 years of proven experience in fullstack development. Advanced proficiency in JavaScript (ES6+), Node.js, React.js, Next.js, NestJS and Golang
- Strong expertise in designing and integrating RESTful APIs, socket protocols, and backend architecture
- Experience with relational databases (PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQL Server) and transactional data modelling
- Understanding of distributed systems concepts (timeouts, retries, circuit breakers, idempotency)
- Deep understanding of concurrency, asynchronous programming, and multithreading
- Proven experience working with agentic AI development tools (e.g. Claude Code, Cursor Agent, GitHub Copilot) not limited to chat-based AI usage
- Ability to design effective prompts, workflows, and context strategies to maximise output from AI coding agents
- Familiarity with security best practices for backend systems
- Excellent communication skills with a strong command of the English language
- Demonstrated problem-solving abilities, self-motivation, and capacity to work both independently and collaboratively

Desirable skills:

- Experience working on payment gateways, fintech, or financial systems
- Knowledge of AS2805, ISO 8583, ISO 20022, or equivalent payment message formats
- Knowledge of PCI DSS or payment security standards
- Strong understanding of Service-Oriented Architecture (SOA) and Microservices
- Hands-on experience with AWS (Lambda, etc.), GCP, or Azure
- Infrastructure-as-Code experience (Terraform, CloudFormation, etc.)
- Experience with NoSQL databases such as MongoDB or DynamoDB
- Experience handling peak traffic, failover, and disaster recovery
- Knowledge of rate limiting, throttling, and traffic shaping
- Solid experience with performance profiling and optimisation
benefits: - Fully social insurance according to Vietnam Labor Law- Full salary on probation- 13th month salary and performance bonus- Annual leave: 14 days/ year  + 01 day off for birthday leave- Performance review twice a year- Annual health check and vaccination- Premium Health Care Insurance (covering for spouse and children)- Personal Learning & Career Development Program (15.6 millions VND/ year)- Health Scheme Program- Laptop provided (Macbook/Window)- Free parking, coffee, snacks, etc- Attractive career path- Regular team dinners and team building activities- International and friendly working environment

title: Senior Java Engineer (Spring) From 5 Years
reasons:
- No English/Japanese Required
- 3 kỳ nghỉ dài (9 ngày liên tục/kỳ) mỗi năm
- Nền tảng vững chắc (PHP/Java) x AI Tech
jobDescription:
🚀 3 Lý do bạn không thể bỏ lỡ Rakus Vietnam

1. Không rào cản ngôn ngữ (No English/Japanese Required)

Tại Rakus, "Code" là ngôn ngữ duy nhất. Chúng tôi không yêu cầu kỹ năng tiếng Anh hay tiếng Nhật. Bạn chỉ cần tập trung vào chuyên môn kỹ thuật. Mọi rào cản ngôn ngữ đã có đội ngũ Comtor hỗ trợ.

2. 3 kỳ nghỉ dài (9 ngày liên tục/kỳ) mỗi năm

Chúng tôi trân trọng thời gian bạn dành cho gia đình. Ngoài kỳ nghỉ Tết Âm lịch, công ty chủ động thiết lập các kỳ nghỉ đặc biệt vào dịp Golden Week (tháng 4-5) và Năm mới Dương lịch (tháng 12-1). Mỗi dịp này bạn sẽ được nghỉ liên tục 9 ngày.

Bạn có thể thoải mái du lịch hay về quê mà không cần dùng đến phép năm!

Tổng số ngày nghỉ lễ trong năm lên đến hơn 30 ngày.

3. Nền tảng vững chắc (PHP/Java) x Công nghệ AI (Github Copilot, v.v.)

Chúng tôi phát triển sản phẩm SaaS ổn định được hơn 10.000 doanh nghiệp Nhật Bản tin dùng, nhưng quy trình làm việc luôn được cập nhật mới nhất.

- Cấp tài khoản GitHub Copilot bản quyền cho toàn bộ kỹ sư.
- Cấp tài khoản Devin, Claude Code cho những ai có nhu cầu.Bạn sẽ phát triển thành một "Hybrid Engineer" – vừa có nền tảng Backend vững chắc, vừa thành thạo các công cụ AI hiện đại.

** Rakus Việt Nam là công ty 100% vốn đầu tư từ RAKUS Co., Ltd. - công ty nổi tiếng hàng đầu tại Nhật Bản cung cấp các dịch vụ đám mây (SaaS), giúp các doanh nghiệp điều hành hoạt động của mình một cách nhanh chóng, tiện dụng nhất.

**Chúng tôi đang tuyển dụng 2 Java Senior/Principal Software Engineer:

LÀM VIỆC OFFLINE FULLTIME TẠI VĂN PHÒNG HEADOFFICE QUẬN 12: Hệ thống phần mềm quản lý chi phí và chi phí đi lại trong nội bộ Doanh nghiệp; đang được sử dụng bởi hơn 20,000 Doanh nghiệp khách hàng tại Nhật Bản với hơn 1.7 triệu end-users.

Nếu:

・Bạn đang là Java Developer và muốn thăng tiến đến vị trí cao hơn

・Bạn mong muốn phát triển Career path theo hướng Techlead/Solution Architect trong tương lai

・Bạn mong muốn môi trường làm việc lâu dài (ít nhất 3 năm trở lên)

・Bạn có năng lực tập trung và thích tìm hiểu sâu về 1 hệ thống.

Hãy gia nhập đội ngũ phát triển series sản phẩm "Rakuraku" – SaaS chiếm thị phần số 1 tại Nhật Bản.

- Phát triển: Thiết kế, triển khai và kiểm thử các tính năng mới sử dụng Java (Spring, Springboot).
- Quy trình AI: Tận dụng các công cụ AI mới nhất để tăng tốc độ coding, refactoring và tự động hóa kiểm thử (test automation).
- Tư duy sản phẩm: Tập trung vào chất lượng code (Quality) và khả năng bảo trì dài hạn (Maintainability).
requirements:
Yêu cầu cơ bản:

- Có ít nhất 5 năm kinh nghiệm trở lên về kiến thức và đam mê lập trình ứng dụng web với: - Ngôn ngữ: Java- JavaScript, jQuery. - PostgreSQL, MySQL ... - các Frameworks như Spring, Springboot hay Struts, Seasar2, Hibernate ...
- Có kinh nghiệm Automation test: Jmeter, JUnit, Selenium
- Có kinh nghiệm DevOps: Git, GitHub, Jenkins, Docker
- Có khả năng tạo/trình bày tài liệu kĩ thuật ở giai đoạn upstream một cách dễ hiểu.
- Có khả năng research để giải quyết các vấn đề về kĩ thuật.

Ưu tiên:

- Sử dụng hiệu quả các công cụ AI như Github copilot, Gemini, Claude, ChatGPT, ...
- Có khả năng đọc, hiểu và phân tích yêu cầu nghiệp vụ từ phía khách hàng
- Có khả năng phát hiện và giải quyết vấn đề tốt
- Có khả năng giao tiếp tốt
- Hiểu quy trình và phong cách làm việc tại công ty Nhật là một lợi thế.

Lưu ý: Không tuyển ứng viên nước ngoài.
benefits:
Tại sao Rakus được yêu thích?

Không chỉ là lương thưởng, chúng tôi chăm sóc cuộc sống và gia đình bạn theo phong cách Nhật Bản: "Tận tâm và An tâm".

💰 Tài chính vững mạnh (Solid Finance)

- Chắc chắn "14 tháng lương": Bao gồm lương tháng 13 + 1 tháng thưởng cố định (được nhận bất kể KPI). Tài chính gia đình bạn luôn được đảm bảo.
- Xét tăng lương: 2 lần/năm. Lộ trình thăng tiến rõ ràng, cấp trên sẽ hỗ trợ bạn thăng cấp để đạt mức lương cao hơn.
- Công ty đóng BHXH ở mức 100% lương gross.
- 100 % lương trong thời gian thử việc.

🛡️ Sức khỏe & Gia đình (Health & Family Care)

- Bảo hiểm đặc biệt: Chi phí y tế của bạn được chi trả phần lớn bởi gói bảo hiểm cao cấp do công ty đài thọ.
- Hỗ trợ người thân: Hỗ trợ thủ tục để vợ/chồng và con cái tham gia gói bảo hiểm nhóm của công ty (tự nguyện).
- Nghỉ phép siêu linh hoạt: 12 ngày phép năm có thể chia nhỏ để nghỉ theo "đơn vị 30 phút"."Sáng đưa con đi học", "Chiều về sớm đón con", "Đưa người nhà đi khám bệnh"... Tất cả đều OK! Chúng tôi ủng hộ tuyệt đối việc bạn chăm sóc gia đình.
- "Sáng đưa con đi học", "Chiều về sớm đón con", "Đưa người nhà đi khám bệnh"... Tất cả đều OK! Chúng tôi ủng hộ tuyệt đối việc bạn chăm sóc gia đình.
- Khám sức khỏe định kỳ.

🎉 Niềm vui & Kết nối (Community)

- Du lịch 5 sao: Company Trip hàng năm (3 ngày 2 đêm) tại các resort cao cấp. Tài trợ 50% chi phí tour cho gia đình nhân viên.
- Sự kiện liên tục: Tiệc sinh nhật hàng tháng, Year End Party hoành tráng, Lì xì Tết, quà tặng Trung thu, ngày phụ nữ, ngày nam nhân, Giáng sinh, ...
- Ngân sách team: Cấp 170.000 VND/người/tháng cho team building (ăn uống, cafe, picnic cùng đồng nghiệp).
- Tham gia các CLB thể thao (Futsal, cầu lông)

⏰ Thời giờ làm việc, nghỉ ngơi

- Thứ 2~ thứ 6, từ 8:30~ 17:30
- 12 ngày phép năm + 11 ngày nghỉ lễ lịch VN + 7 ngày nghỉ lễ lịch Nhật = 30 ngày
- Hầu như Không làm thêm giờ (No Overtime)

📝 Đào tạo

- Cơ hội được cử đi Nhật đào tạo. Các kỹ sư người Nhật hỗ trợ OJT (on the job training)
- Training kỹ năng mềm theo level
- Seminar kỹ thuật hàng tháng

🏆 Giải thưởng

- Quarterly MVP – Giải thưởng Nhân viên xuất sắc của Quý
- Giải thưởng nhân viên 5 năm, …

title: Business Analyst (BA)
reasons:
- Thu nhập cạnh tranh - Chế độ đãi ngộ hấp dẫn
- Môi trường làm việc năng động, thân thiện
- Chế độ phúc lợi xã hội tốt
jobDescription:
- Tiếp xúc khách hàng (bên ngoài và nội bộ) để tìm hiểu, nắm rõ, tư vấn để có thể chuyển từ yêu cầu/quy trình thực tế của khách hàng thành các yêu cầu sản phẩm và chốt thống nhất với khách hàng về yêu cầu bài toán.- Xây dựng tài liệu yêu cầu sản phẩm (SRS, URD), tài liệu thiết kế sơ bộ (Wireframe, Prototype) và các quy trình nghiệp vụ (Flowchart)- Trao đổi và giải đáp các thắc mắc về mặt nghiệp vụ của đội dự án để đảm bảo sản phẩm được xây dựng đúng yêu cầu.

- Quản lý các yêu cầu thay đổi (CR); hỗ trợ PM tổ chức nghiệm thu (UAT), bàn giao sản phẩm và xử lý các vướng mắc phát sinh trong quá trình triển khai.

- Cầu nối thông tin giữa khách hàng và đội ngũ kỹ thuật; theo dõi timeline, đôn đốc các thành viên hoàn thành công việc đúng hạn và báo cáo tiến độ định kỳ cho Quản lý dự án (PM).

- Xây dựng và lưu trữ hệ thống tài liệu dự án bao gồm: Tài liệu nghiệp vụ, biên bản cuộc họp, hồ sơ nghiệm thu, hợp đồng và các thủ tục hành chính liên quan.- Báo cáo các vấn đề vướng mắc lên cấp cao hơn (người có trách nhiệm về kết quả của sản phẩm/dự án đang thực hiện)
requirements: - Tốt nghiệp chuyên ngành Điện tử - Viễn thông, CNTT hoặc các chuyên ngành khác liên quan- Có khả năng đọc hiểu tốt các tài liệu và thuyết trình tốt bằng tiếng Anh - Có kiến thức về các kĩ thuật phân tích nghiệp vụ như: các mô hình chức năng nghiệp vụ, mô hình luồng nghiệp vụ, mô hình dữ liệu quan hệ, ngôn ngữ UML, tạo Use case, prototype của sản phẩm/ứng dụng.- Có năng lực phân tích và giải quyết vấn đề: Suy nghĩ sáng tạo, Kỹ năng ra quyết định- Ưu tiên ứng viên có kiến thức nghiệp vụ ngành ngân hàng, nghiệp vụ về các hệ thống xác thực bảo mật.
benefits:
- Thu nhập cạnh tranh, không giới hạn: Lương cứng hấp dẫn + thưởng theo hiệu quả kinh doanh (không giới hạn), ghi nhận xứng đáng năng lực và kết quả.
- Cơ chế đãi ngộ linh hoạt: Xét tăng lương định kỳ hàng năm hoặc đột xuất đối với cá nhân có thành tích nổi bật.
- Đào tạo & phát triển chuyên sâu: Được đào tạo về sản phẩm, giải pháp công nghệ, quy trình làm việc; tham gia các chương trình đào tạo nâng cao trong và ngoài nước.
- Phúc lợi toàn diện: Đầy đủ chế độ BHXH, BHYT, BHTN theo quy định; Gói Bảo hiểm chăm sóc sức khỏe cao cấp Bảo Việt dành riêng cho CBNV.
- Chăm sóc sức khỏe định kỳ: Khám sức khỏe tại các Bệnh viện uy tín hàng đầu Việt Nam.
- Môi trường làm việc chuyên nghiệp – công nghệ cao: Làm việc trong Tập đoàn tiên phong về giải pháp định danh, bảo mật, thẻ thông minh; cơ hội tiếp cận các dự án lớn với Chính phủ, Ngân hàng và các Doanh nghiệp.
- Văn hóa doanh nghiệp gắn kết: Du lịch, nghỉ mát, teambuilding, hoạt động nội bộ và các CLB thể thao đa dạng.
- Thưởng & phúc lợi hấp dẫn: Thưởng Lễ, Tết và các Chế độ phúc lợi khác theo chính sách của Công ty.

title: Junior iOS Mobile Developer (Swift, English)
reasons:
- Highly competitive salary and benefits package
- Excellent environment and team to help you grow.
- We are Singapore's leading car portal
jobDescription:
1. Education

● Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or related field.● Final-year students or fresh graduates with strong iOS project portfolios are also welcome to apply.

2. Responsibilities

● Design, build, and maintain advanced features for the Motorist iOS app using Swift 5+, UIKit, and SwiftUI.● Apply VIPER/MVVM architectures to ensure modular, testable, and scalable code.● Apply reactive programming with RxSwift, Combine, and RxCocoa for event-driven features.● Integrate Firebase SDK (Firestore, Remote Config, Crashlytics) for data, feature toggling, and app stability.● Handle app life cycle events (background, foreground, terminated states) to ensure smooth user experiences.● Work with RxSwift, RxCocoa, and RxRealm for reactive programming and event handling.● Integrate APIs using Alamofire, ObjectMapper.● Manage secure data and credentials using Locksmith and RealmSwift.● Collaborate closely with backend developers, designers, and QA testers to ensure smooth, reliable, and scalable app performance.● Debug, refactor, and continuously optimize the app for performance and user satisfaction.● Participate in code reviews, sprint planning, and technical discussions to share knowledge and improve team efficiency.
requirements:
Technical Experiences

Must Have

● Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science or related field.● Solid understanding of Swift, Xcode, and iOS SDK fundamentals.● Familiar with VIPER/MVVM architecture, SOLID principles, OOP, and data structures.● Experience working with databases such as RealmSwift or Core Data.● Understanding of RESTful API integration and JSON data handling.● Proficient understanding of code version control tools, such as Git.● Strong attention to detail and analytical problem-solving mindset.

Nice to Have

● Exposure to SwiftUI, Combine, or Reactive Programming (RxSwift / RxCocoa).● Familiarity with Firebase SDK (Firestore, Remote Config, Crashlytics).● Experience with CoreLocation, Google Maps SDK.● Appreciation for clean, maintainable, and well-structured code.● Collaborative mindset and a reliable team player who takes ownership of their work.

Language Skills

● Able to communicate and collaborate in English (written and spoken).● Willing to learn and improve communication when working with Singapore HQ and other markets.

Flexible Points

We welcome engineers who:● Are passionate about iOS development and eager to grow in a professional environment.● May not have long working experience but can demonstrate strong technical fundamentals and self-learning ability.● Want to master VIPER architecture, Reactive Programming, and Swift best practices.● Are not yet fluent in English but are motivated to practice and improve daily.● Enjoy solving complex problems and building high-quality apps that users love.

Notice

Candidates are required to provide reference information after passing the interview round.

At Motorist, we believe in work hard, play hard. You’ll be part of an energetic and collaborative team that encourages creativity, learning, and ownership.Join us to grow your career and help build one of Singapore’s leading automotive platforms.
benefits: ● Competitive salary with annual performance review and 13th-month bonus.● Modern working devices: MacBook, monitor, iPhone test devices, etc.● PVI Health Insurance and full social insurance as per Vietnam Labor Law.● 15 days annual leave, increasing by 1 day per year.● English language training sponsored by the company.● Professional development and opportunities to travel to Singapore for training.● Friendly, innovative, and young working environment in District 2, Ho Chi Minh City.● Working hours: 7 hours/day, Monday to Friday (no weekends).● Year-end party and team-building activities.● Unlimited potential for career growth and internal advancement.

title: Middle/Senior Backend Engineer (Python, FastAPI)
company: CÔNG TY CỔ PHẦN THƯƠNG MẠI DƯỢC PHẨM ĐẠI PHÚC QUANG MINH
jobDescription:
We are looking for a Middle/Senior Backend Engineer to design and build scalable, real-time systems in the financial domain.

This role requires strong ownership, the ability to design systems independently, and experience working with production-grade applications.

Job Description

- Design, develop, and optimize backend systems for real-time data processing and analytics
- Architect and maintain database solutions with a strong focus on performance, scalability, and reliability
- Build and maintain APIs and services supporting high-throughput systems
- Take ownership of features end-to-end: from system design to deployment and optimization
- Propose technical solutions and contribute to architectural decisions
- Collaborate with frontend engineers to ensure seamless system integration
- Monitor and maintain production systems, ensuring high availability and performance
- Troubleshoot production issues: reproduce, debug, identify root causes, and implement long-term fixes
- Build internal tools and automation to improve system reliability and engineering efficiency
- Communicate progress and key technical decisions clearly with the Founder
requirements:
Your Skills and Experience

+ Must-have Skills

- 3-5+ years of backend development experience
- Strong proficiency in Python (FastAPI or similar frameworks)
- Solid experience with PostgreSQL (schema design, query optimization, data modeling) and Redis (caching, pub/sub, queue patterns)
- Hands-on experience with Pandas or Polars for data processing (DataFrame transformations, aggregations)
- Experience building and operating production-grade systems
- Familiarity with asynchronous programming and concurrency, along with message queues (RabbitMQ, Kafka, or similar)
- Experience building REST APIs and WebSockets for real-time systems
- Strong understanding of system design, performance optimization, and production debugging/troubleshooting
- Hands-on experience with Docker and CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions or similar)
- A- bility to work independently and take ownership of system design and implementation

+ Nice-to-have Skills

- Background in financial systems, trading platforms, or market data
- Experience building real-time or data-intensive systems
- Experience with cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, or Azure)
- Experience with TimescaleDB, Parquet pipelines, or similar technologies
- Familiarity with monitoring and observability tools (e.g., Grafana, Sentry)
- Exposure to LLMs or AI-powered applications

title: Remote Data Engineer - AI Data Platform Japan (Python)
location: Ha Noi - Da Nang - Ho Chi Minh
reasons:
- 100% remote—work from anywhere with flexible hours
- Claude Code MAX ($200/month) provided from Day 1
- Build pipelines for 8B data points—largest in SEA
jobDescription:
What Makes SalesNow Different

- Data scale: 8B data points, 14M records, 2.3M daily updates (vs. 1M-100M rows at typical companies)
- Data ownership: You build and own Japan's largest corporate intelligence platform (vs. processing someone else's data)
- AI integration: 20+ AI pipelines in production, MCP Server live (vs. "We're planning to use AI someday")
- Dev tools: Claude Code MAX ($200/month), Cursor, CodeRabbit — all company-paid (vs. standard IDE, maybe Copilot)
- Your code's impact: Feeds AI products used by enterprise clients, millisecond latency matters (vs. dashboards no one reads)
- Career trajectory: Build Japan's data infrastructure → architect AI data products → global leverage (vs. same stack forever)
- Remote work: 100% remote, no relocation required (vs. hybrid / office-required)

Why This Role Exists

AI models are commodities now. The cost of running GPT-3.5-equivalent models dropped 280x in two years. Every company has access to the same foundation models. The war moved to data — who owns it, who structures it, who feeds it to AI.

Oracle's Larry Ellison said it plainly on his December 2025 earnings call: "AI models are trained on the same public data, so they're rapidly commoditizing. AI inference on private data will be an even bigger, more valuable business." McKinsey echoes: "By 2030, the AI leaders will be defined not by who trained the biggest model, but by who built the most reliable systems on proprietary data."

SalesNow owns 14 million company records and 8 billion data points — the largest structured corporate intelligence platform in Japan. This data updates 2.3 million records daily, with differential refresh as fast as every 60 seconds. Hiring signals, funding rounds, organizational changes, press releases, job postings — all structured, all real-time, all proprietary.

This data doesn't exist inside any LLM's training set. The only way to access it is through SalesNow. That's the moat.

We need data engineers who can build and scale the pipelines that make this moat wider every day.

What You'll Build

This is not "maintain existing ETL jobs." You're building the data nervous system of Japan's corporate intelligence.

The Scale

- 14 million+ company records across Japan's entire business landscape — from Toyota to a 3-person startup in Okinawa
- 8 billion data points structured and queryable at millisecond speed
- 2.3 million records updated daily — hiring signals, funding rounds, organizational changes, press releases, job postings
- Sub-minute differential refresh — when a company posts a new job or announces funding, SalesNow knows within 60 seconds
- 42+ data sources feeding into a unified schema
- 5 delivery formats: Web app UI / CRM integration (Salesforce, HubSpot) / MCP Server / Data API / Custom AI Agents

AI-Native Development Culture

SalesNow doesn't just "use AI." AI is the operating system of how we build software. What this means for you, concretely:

- Claude Code MAX — Company-paid for every engineer. This is a $200/month tool that most individual developers can't justify. You get it Day 1, fully covered
- Monthly AI tool budget — Tens of thousands of yen per person, on top of Claude Code MAX, for any AI tool you want to try
- CodeRabbit — Automated PR reviews powered by AI. Every pull request gets AI review before human review
- Vibe coding culture — Not just engineers. The CEO, COO, and business teams all write code with AI assistance. When you propose a technical solution, leadership actually understands it
- 20+ AI pipelines in production — X post generation, candidate screening, PR monitoring, behavioral analytics, financial page generation — all running daily in production. This isn't a demo. It's how the company operates
- No "AI committee" or "innovation lab" gatekeeping — You want to try a new approach? Ship it. The decision loop is measured in hours, not quarters

Why this matters for your career: In 3 years, every engineering role will require AI-native development skills. At SalesNow, you build those skills now — not by watching tutorials, but by shipping production AI systems daily.

Before You Apply — Quick Self-CheckPlease confirm the following before submitting your application:

- I have professional experience building data pipelines or data processing systems with Python
- I have professional experience writing SQL queries and working with databases
- I am available for full-time remote work (40 hours/week)

Bonus: Japanese language ability (JLPT N3+) is a strong plus.In Your Cover Letter, Please Include:1. The largest dataset or data pipeline you've worked with — how many records per day, and what did it do?2. What was the most technically challenging problem you solved in your career? (1-2 sentences is fine)3. Which data tools or frameworks have you used? (e.g., Airflow, dbt, Spark, Kafka, Elasticsearch — list any that apply)
requirements:
Must Have

- 2+ years of professional data engineering experience
- Strong Python skills — clean, testable pipeline code
- Strong SQL skills — complex queries, window functions, query optimization
- Experience with at least one orchestration tool — Airflow, Dagster, Prefect, or equivalent
- Experience with relational databases at scale — PostgreSQL preferred
- English proficiency (professional working level)

Nice to Have

- Experience with Elasticsearch or OpenSearch at scale
- dbt experience
- Web scraping / large-scale data collection systems
- Experience with data quality frameworks and monitoring
- AWS experience (S3, Lambda, ECS, RDS, etc.)
- RAG pipeline / vector database experience
- Experience processing 1M+ records daily
- Japanese language ability (JLPT N3 or above)
benefits:
- Salary: $1,000–$2,500 USD/month (25–62 triệu VND)
- MacBook provided
- Full-time contract via EOR (local legal employment)
- Paid leave per local labor law
- Performance-based salary review every 6 months
- AI translation tools provided (company-paid)
- Monthly AI tool budget in addition to Claude Code MAX
