As a Business Analyst cum Project Manager, you will bridge the gap between business objectives and technical execution. You will be responsible for analyzing business needs, defining system requirements, and leading the end-to-end delivery of hospitality technology projects (such as PMS upgrades, Guest Experience Apps, and CRM integration).

Business Analysis (40%)

- Requirements Engineering: Collaborate with Hotel Operations, Marketing, and Finance to gather and document business requirements (BRD, SRS, User Stories).
- Process Optimization: Analyze existing hotel workflows (Check-in/out, Housekeeping, F&B) and design optimized digital solutions to enhance efficiency and guest satisfaction.
- Data Analysis: Work with data sets to provide insights into booking trends, revenue management, and guest behavior to support executive decision-making.

Project Management (40%)

- End-to-End Delivery: Define project scope, milestones, and resource allocation. Ensure projects are delivered on time, within budget, and at high quality.
- Stakeholder Management: Act as the primary point of contact between internal stakeholders and external vendors (Software providers, Agencies).
- Risk & Issue Management: Identify potential bottlenecks in the project lifecycle and proactively implement mitigation strategies.
- Agile Leadership: Facilitate Daily Stand-ups, Sprint Planning, and Retrospectives if working with an in-house tech team.

Quality Assurance & Training (20%)

- Oversee User Acceptance Testing (UAT) and ensure the final product meets the business's quality standards.
- Develop training materials and conduct workshops for hotel staff to ensure smooth adoption of new systems.

title: Senior Data Engineer
company: Virtual Security Lab Cyber Risk Management Services L.L.C
reasons:
- Competitive salary package
- Flexible working culture
- Global environment with international project
jobDescription:
A. Overview

We are looking for a skilled Data Engineer to design, build, and operate scalable data pipelines that power real-time processing and analytics. You will work on high-throughput data systems, ensuring reliability, performance, and maintainability across the data lifecycle — from ingestion to storage and search.

This role requires strong experience in distributed systems, stream processing, and cloud-native data infrastructure.

B. Key Responsibilities

- Design and implement real-time and batch data pipelines
- Build and maintain scalable streaming systems
- Develop and optimize stream processing jobs
- Ensure reliable ingestion from multiple internal and external data sources
- Design event schemas and data contracts
- Implement data validation, transformation, and enrichment logic
- Optimize storage layouts and lifecycle management strategies
- Improve system observability (metrics, logging, alerting)
- Troubleshoot and resolve performance bottlenecks in distributed systems
- Implement retry, dead-letter, and replay mechanisms
- Ensure data quality, consistency, and governance
- Collaborate with Backend, DevOps, and Security teams
requirements:
Must-Have

- Proficiency in Python, Java,and SQL; strong software engineering fundamentals
- Experience with distributed messaging systems (e.g., Apache Kafka) and stream processing frameworks (e.g., Apache Flink)
- Knowledge of event-time processing, windowing, state management, and handling out-of-order events
- Experience with cloud storage/data lakes, relational databases, and search/indexing engines (e.g., OpenSearch / Elasticsearch)
- Familiarity with cloud platforms (AWS preferred), IaC (Terraform), CI/CD, and containerization (Docker)
- Strong problem-solving skills and ability to design scalable, fault-tolerant data pipelines

Nice-to-Have

- Experience with workflow orchestration platforms
- Experience in security, log processing, or observability domains
- Schema management tools (Avro, Protobuf, Schema Registry)
- Data lake table formats (Iceberg, Hudi, Delta Lake)
- Experience with distributed query engines (Athena, Trino, Presto)
- Multi-tenant system design
- Cost optimization in large-scale cloud environments

Soft Skills

- Strong problem-solving and debugging skills in distributed systems
- Ownership mindset with attention to reliability and quality
- Clear communication and documentation skills
- Ability to work cross-functionally
- Comfort working in fast-paced environments

Qualifications

- Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science or equivalent experience.
- 7+ years of experience in data engineering or distributed systems
- Strong fundamentals in system design and scalability
- Proven experience operating production-grade data platforms
- Ability to balance performance, cost, and reliability
benefits:
What we offer

- Competitive salary package aligned with your experience and market standards
- Performance-based reviews and clear growth opportunities
- A global working environment with exposure to international teams and projects
- Opportunities for personal and professional development, including training and new-skill learning
- Flexible working culture, built on trust and responsibility
- Supportive, open-minded team culture, where your ideas and contributions are valued
- Chances to travel or collaborate across offices, depending on project needs
- And more benefits tailored to help you thrive at Secuwall

4. Quản lý rủi ro và vấn đề

6. Kỹ năng lãnh đạo và phát triển đội ngũ

title: DevOps Engineer (AWS, Azure)
reasons:
- High salary from $1500 - $3000
- Remote working and flexible working hours
- Interesting and challenging projects to work on
jobDescription:
As a DevOps Engineer at Otto International, you will play a crucial role in managing AWS/Azure infrastructure using IaC, building secure CI/CD pipelines, administering Linux/Windows systems, and supporting containerized workloads with Docker and Kubernetes. This role will support the design, implementation, and operation of scalable, secure, and highly available infrastructure and delivery pipelines. You will work closely with engineering, security, and operations teams to enable reliable application delivery across cloud environments while embedding DevSecOps best practices into all stages of the software lifecycle.

How will you make a difference?

- Design, implement, and maintain cloud infrastructure on AWS and Azure using Infrastructure as Code (IaC) to ensure consistency, scalability, and security.
- Build, manage, and optimize CI/CD pipelines to support reliable and automated build, test, and deployment workflows.
- Implement and enforce DevSecOps best practices, including container security, secrets management, RBAC hardening, network segmentation, and security policy enforcement.
- Deploy, operate, and troubleshoot containerized applications using Docker and Kubernetes, ensuring high availability and performance.
- Administer and support Linux (Ubuntu, CentOS) and Windows Server environments, including installation, configuration, patching, tuning, and troubleshooting.
- Collaborate with development teams to improve system reliability, observability, monitoring, and incident response.
- Design and manage networking components such as VPCs/VNETs, subnets, routing, load balancers, DNS, firewalls, and security groups.
- Develop automation and operational tooling using Bash and Python to support system administration and monitoring.
- Create and maintain detailed documentation for system architecture, configurations, operational procedures, and disaster recovery plans.
- Participate in continuous improvement initiatives to enhance system stability, security posture, and delivery efficiency.
- Communicate effectively with team members and stakeholders.
requirements:
Who we are looking for?

- Bachelor’s degree in information technology, computer science, system engineering, or a related field.
- Minimum 3 years of hands-on experience as a DevOps Engineer, System Engineer, or System Administrator, with strong expertise in Linux-based environments.
- Proven experience managing and operating AWS and Azure cloud platforms using Infrastructure as Code (IaC) tools such as AWS CDK, Terraform, CloudFormation, Ansible, and Chef, ensuring scalable, repeatable, and secure deployments.
- Solid working knowledge of DevSecOps best practices, including container image scanning, runtime security, secrets management, RBAC hardening, network segmentation, and security policy enforcement across environments.
- Strong experience with container technologies including Docker and Elastic Container services, and Kubernetes orchestration, covering build, deployment, scaling, and troubleshooting of containerized workloads.
- Good understanding of networking concepts, including VPCs/VNETs, subnets, routing, load balancing, DNS, firewalls, and security groups.
- Working proficiency in Bash and Python for automation, system administration, monitoring, and operational tooling.
- Hands-on experience designing, implementing, and maintaining CI/CD pipelines, with practical experience using GitHub and GitHub Actions to enable reliable build, test, and deployment workflows.
- Strong experience administering Linux distributions (Ubuntu, CentOS) and Windows Server environments, including installation, configuration, patching, performance tuning, and troubleshooting.
- Demonstrated ability to document system architecture, configurations, operational procedures, and disaster recovery processes to ensure long-term maintainability, knowledge sharing, and operational excellence.
- Good verbal and written communication skills.
- Strong teamwork and interpersonal skills.

Why work with us?

- Collaborative, fun and challenging work environment.
- Open, transparent and diverse culture with locations worldwide.
- Double-pay, performance bonus, flexible working hours.
- Full healthcare insurance coverage.

All data provided by applicants will be treated in strict confidence and used solely for recruitment purposes.
benefits:
- High salary from $1500 - $3000
- Open, transparent and diverse culture worldwide
- Remote working and flexible working hours
- Provide laptop for working
- Full insurance coverage and extra healthcare insurance

We value your skills and contribution

- We offer very competitive salary for our employees.
- Annual salary review based on performance and contribution.
- 13th-month salary.
- Festival bonus twice a year
- Annual discretionary bonus

We value your growth

- Nice and friendly working environment.
- Lots of interesting and challenge projects to work on.
- Working with smart and straight technical geeks from other countries.

We value your time

- We don't value working over-time. Better way to do more work: be productive within your working time and spend the rest of your time with your family.
- Flexible working hours and Home office scheme are for everyone.

Hỗ trợ chuyên môn và đào tạo:

title: Implementation Engineer (JavaScript, API, Integration)
reasons:

jobDescription:
At OL Vietnam, we have worked alongside our parent company, Orange Logic LLC, to support some of the world’s largest enterprises with their digital asset management needs. Orange Logic provides a premier Digital Asset Management (DAM) platform that streamlines workflows, enhances collaboration, and ensures compliance across complex digital ecosystems, empowering any team working with digital content the ability to efficiently create, manage, and distribute their content at scale.

WHAT DIFFERENTIATES OL VIETNAM

- We are trusted by global leaders to work with over 100 customers, including many of the world's most recognized brands.
- Our business is strong and resilient, even in the face of economic challenges. During the Covid economic downturn, we did not implement layoffs or reduce compensation. Instead, we continued to grow, consistently expanding our team and adding dozens of talented members to our R&D department each year.
- You’ll work with top engineers and team members who are passionate about building flexible, scalable, and streamlined systems that will define the future of business management.

MISSION

Job Summary: We are seeking an Implementation Engineer to provide hands-on technical support for customer implementation projects involving complex workflows, custom integrations, and advanced platform configurations.

This role bridges the gap between Implementation Specialists and the Development Team, supplying developer-level JavaScript and API expertise to ensure successful customer deployments while minimizing the need for direct Development Team involvement. The Implementation Engineer will design, build, debug, and document integration solutions that align with customer requirements and Orange Logic best practices.

This is a highly technical, customer-facing role that requires strong problem-solving skills, comfort working across systems, and the ability to translate nuanced business workflows into reliable technical solutions.
requirements:
Essential Functions:

- Provide developer-level coding and technical support for customer implementations involving complex workflows and integrations.
- Design, build, and troubleshoot JavaScript-based customizations within the Orange Logic platform.
- Develop, test, and validate RESTful API integrations between Orange Logic and third-party systems.
- Work with JSON, XML, and authentication mechanisms (OAuth, JWT, SAML) to support secure data exchange.
- Support Implementation Specialists by owning technically complex aspects of implementation projects.
- Debug integration issues related to data mapping, authentication, performance, and edge-case workflows.
- Create reusable scripts, integration patterns, and configuration templates to improve implementation efficiency.
- Use developer tools such as Git, Postman, and API testing frameworks to validate and maintain implementation artifacts.
- Produce clear, implementation-focused technical documentation for internal teams and customer-facing use.
- Collaborate with Product, Solutions Consulting, and Development teams to escalate true product defects or enhancement needs.
- Stay current on Orange Logic platform APIs, customization capabilities, and integration best practices.

PROFILE

Key Qualifications:

- Strong ability to translate complex business requirements into effective technical workflows and API-based solutions.
- Solid proficiency in JavaScript, particularly for customization, automation, and integration use cases.
- Hands-on experience working with RESTful APIs in production environments.
- Experience supporting or implementing enterprise software platforms (e.g., DAM, CMS, CRM, PIM, marketing platforms).
- Comfortable debugging issues across multiple systems and layers (frontend logic, APIs, authentication, data models).
- Organized and proactive in managing multiple concurrent implementation efforts.
- Strong cross-functional communication skills, particularly when working with non-developer stakeholders.
- Excellent English verbal and written communication skills, with the ability to explain technical concepts clearly.
- Technically curious, pragmatic, and solution-oriented.

Preferred Qualifications

- Prior experience as a Software Engineer or Technical Consultant.
- Experience in customer-facing implementation, professional services, or solutions engineering roles.
- Familiarity with SaaS platforms and enterprise integration patterns.
- Exposure to React or modern JavaScript frameworks is a plus.
- Experience working in post-sales or delivery-oriented technical roles.
benefits:
You would love to work and find those values with us:

- Distributed decision making: We also allow each employee to directly weigh in on our priorities.
- Transparency: We value transparency, openness, and accountability, whether it is with our customers or internally.
- Meritocracy: Employee's recognition and advancement is based purely on their individual and collective achievements.
- Deep work: We do everything we can to let you focus deeply on your work.

Our benefits include:

Data Privacy Notice for Candidates in Vietnam:

By submitting your application, you acknowledge that you have read and understood OL Vietnam’s Privacy Policy. Any consent provided herein is explicit and voluntary.

Based on your consent, OL Vietnam will process your personal data for recruitment for the position you apply for, including evaluating your candidacy, communicating with you, and, where applicable, verifying relevant information as part of the selection process. If you would like OL Vietnam to consider you for future suitable roles, we will request your separate, explicit consent and you may withdraw consent at any time as described in the Privacy Policy. For details on how we handle your information, please refer to our Privacy Policy on OLVN Website.

jobDescription:
BE A MAKER

At Simpson Strong-Tie, we've built a workplace where people are connected and engaged in creative thinking from day one throughout their careers.

When you think of the best a family has to offer - support, collaboration and respect - that's what we value at Simpson Strong-Tie. When there's a win, we'll cheer you on. When there's a snag, coworkers step in to help you out. Working on solutions together is just the way we do things here, and that creates an atmosphere that often feels like home.

At Simpson Strong-Tie, you'll find talented, passionate, dedicated, humble and genuinely kind people who are all connected by our shared mission - to provide solutions that help people design and build safer, stronger structures.

It's this mission and our strong people-focused values that have made Simpson Strong-Tie a unique place to work for more than 70 years - a place where you can connect, create and build your career. We invite you to  about our culture and why our employees are our most loyal customers.

YOU

You will serve as a primary technical authority, providing both leadership and architectural expertise for Simpson’s application services and enterprise solutions. You will collaborate closely with the US Technical Leads, Development Manager and key stakeholders to propose and execute innovative technical strategies that align with organizational goals and maximize customer satisfaction.

WHAT YOU’LL BE DOING

Service Providing Management

The successful candidate will provide subject matter expertise in .NET to lead the development of high-performance engines and scalable web applications. The candidate will oversee the robustness of .NET backend integrations and ensure the stability of cross-platform services.

- Lead the design, development, and maintenance of Residential .NET applications, ensuring they meet business requirements and performance standards. Apply deep knowledge of Clean Architecture and Domain-Driven Design (DDD) to manage the complexity of the residential web applications.
- Define, communicate, and enforce software development best practices, emphasizing the practical application of design patterns to optimize performance and scalability.
- Lead the team in migrating legacy .NET and monolithic applications to scalable, microservices-based architectures using Azure and cloud-native platforms.
- Drive a culture of testing excellence using practically the unit test, integration test , maintaining a strictly enforced Code Coverage threshold of >80%.
- Standardize cloud resource provisioning such as Terraform, facilitate fully automated CI/CD lifecycles.
- Practical experience with the deployment of containerized applications using Azure Container Apps.
- Implement comprehensive monitoring strategies using Azure Monitor and/or Application Insights to establish real-time alerting and system health dashboards.
- Serve as a Subject Matter Expert (SME) to resolve complex technical challenges and support the team in troubleshooting advanced issues.

People Development

- Strategic Upskilling: Align subordinate technical training with corporate growth objectives to ensure the team’s professional competencies meet evolving project requirements.
- Performance Excellence: Partner with the Senior Manager to define evaluation criteria and feedback loops that drive employee engagement and peak performance.

Knowledge Leadership: Champion a culture of continuous learning and cross-functional knowledge sharing across the segment. Design technical interview frameworks and training programs to recruit, coach, and evaluate high-performing on-site teams.

Others

- Highly contribute to the Developments and Business Objectives of Segment and Company level.
requirements:
Education

Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field.

Certification

TOEIC 800 or Equivalent

Experience

Minimum 7 years of professional software development experience, including 3+ years in a Technical Lead or Solution Architect capacity.

Personal qualities

Integrity, responsibility, commitment, flexibility, innovation

Skills & Abilities

Core techical stack: Expert-level proficiency in .NET/ASP.NET ecosystem, Azure cloud-native but not limited to below stack

- Frontend: ASP.NET Web Forms, ReactJS
- Backend: .NET Framework 4.7, .NET 8, .NET 10, Microservices
- Database: Microsoft SQL Server
- Cloud-native: Microsoft Azure
- Containers: Docker, CI/CD with TeamCity/Azure DevOps)
- Quality: SonarCloud, Snyk, MS Test, XUnit, Moq, NSubtitude

Engineering Excellence: Deep understanding of CI/CD, unit testing, refactoring, and DevSecOps principles.

Cloud & Infrastructure: Hands-on experience with Azure cloud-native stack and containerization strategies.

Architecture & Documentation: Skilled in technical writing and architectural visualization using diagrams and figures.

Mentorship: Proven ability to design and deliver effective technical training programs for team members.

jobDescription:
The Company

Real Estate Doc (REDOC) is a B2B software platform that breaks the norm by converting traditional real estate and banking documentation and workflow transactions digital!

We are looking for young and motivated technically-skilled individuals to join us and be part of the change in digitising the real estate and banking industry!

The Career Opportunity

- Want to work for a Singapore-based Tech Company? We are looking for skilled Business Analysts to work with us and drive the change in the industry.
- The Business Analyst (BA) plays a key role in bridging business objectives with technical execution. You will work closely with stakeholders across departments to gather and analyze requirements, design workflows, and support development teams to deliver scalable ERP and SaaS-based web applications. You’ll act as the translator between business needs and engineering realities, with a strong focus on digitization, automation, and user-centric design.

Your responsibilities:

1. Requirement Management

- Elicit and document business and user requirements through interviews, workshops, surveys, and on-site observation.
- Distinguish clearly between business needs, user expectations, and system constraints.
- Write and maintain BRD, FSD, SRS, user stories, and use cases.
- Prioritize requirements using MoSCoW, Value vs Effort Matrix.

2. Process Modeling & Documentation

- Design wireframes, user flows, process diagrams, and mockups (via Figma, Lucidchart).
- Maintain requirement traceability in tools like Jira and Confluence.
- Clearly log change requests and impact assessments with proper stakeholder sign-off.

3. SDLC Engagement

- Support all SDLC phases: Discovery, Development, UAT, and Deployment.
- Work within Agile frameworks based on project context

4. Technical & System Understanding

- Understand modern web application architecture, including Frontend, Backend, APIs and databases.
- Actively participate in technical discussions with client-side engineers and solution architects to understand implementation feasibility and constraints.
- Collaborate with internal technical teams to translate business requirements into clear data models, and system behavior.
- Provide rough effort estimates and assist in timeline negotiation based on technical complexity, dependencies, and constraints.
- Proactively identify and explain potential technical blockers, security concerns, or architectural limitations when clients raise feature requests or change requirements.
- Understand and interpret common system error codes or integration failures to guide clients and internal teams toward quick resolution.

5. Stakeholder & Communication Management

- Facilitate alignment between business and tech teams via meetings, reports, and status updates.
- Communicate findings, issues, and proposals effectively in both verbal and written forms.
- Produce clear documentation: meeting minutes, training guides, user manuals.

6. Product & Project Contribution

Support QA team in preparing test scenarios and validating acceptance criteria.

Participate in sprint reviews and release planning sessions.
requirements:
- At least 2 years of experience as a Business Analyst in large scale ERP System and Banking domain
- Knowledge of RESTful APIs, web architecture, databases.
- Strong Ability to translate business requirements into functional, non-functional, and technical requirements
- Strong spoken and written English skills
- Understanding of Agile and experience working in Agile driven environments with working knowledge of Agile tools (JIRA/Confluence)
- Ability in using suitable tools for business modeling, drawing business flows/diagrams, wireframing such as Balsamiq, Figma…
- Strong presentation skills; able to translate technical detail into business context.

- Experience with financial and document management technology is a plus

TMT là công ty tiên phong cung cấp giải pháp công nghệ SaaS tại Việt Nam. Với sự tin tưởng của hơn 5.000 khách hàng, TMT dẫn đầu trong việc ứng dụng công nghệ vào các lĩnh vực SME, E - commerce,... thông qua các sản phẩm phần mềm như: TPOS, TDental,… nhằm giúp khách hàng quản lý và tối ưu hóa hoạt động kinh doanh.

Hiện tại TMT đang tìm kiếm vị trí 1 AI Agent Engineer tham gia trực tiếp vào các dự án phát triển phần mềm cùng đội ngũ Team AI cũng như đội ngũ phát triển sản phẩm của TMT.

Tổng quan công việc:

- Thiết kế và triển khai AI Agent cho hệ thống WiPix sử dụng ADK, tích hợp với Frontend TypeScript và Backend .NET để tạo giải pháp AI tự động hóa hiệu quả.

Mô tả công việc:

- Thiết kế kiến trúc AI Agent sử dụng ADK; xây dựng workflow và tích hợp các công cụ (tools) cho các bài toán thực tế của WiPix.
- Cải thiện hiệu suất, độ tin cậy (reliability) và thực hiện đánh giá (evaluation) chất lượng Agent.
- Tích hợp Agent với Frontend (React/TypeScript) và xây dựng các UI components hỗ trợ tương tác giữa người dùng và AI.
- Triển khai cơ chế giao tiếp Real-time (WebSocket/SSE), xử lý phản hồi từ Agent và quản lý trạng thái (state management).
- Tích hợp AI Agent với hệ thống Backend có sẵn.
- Tích hợp cơ chế xác thực và phân quyền cho Agent.
requirements:
1. Kinh nghiệm chuyên môn;

- Có từ 1 năm kinh nghiệm về AI/ML hoặc phát triển AI Agent. Am hiểu về Agent Frameworks và kỹ thuật Prompt Engineering.
- Thành thạo Python (cho Agent development) và có kinh nghiệm với TypeScript hoặc .NET.
- Sử dụng tốt LangSmith/Promptfoo để kiểm thử và đánh giá mô hình.
- Có kiến thức cơ bản về: HTML, CSS, JavaScript. Có kinh nghiệm với React, Vue hoặc Angular…. Component đơn giản, Responsive và tối ưu hóa giao diện. Biết Unit testing và tích hợp API hệ thống.
- HTML, CSS, JavaScript.
- Có kinh nghiệm với React, Vue hoặc Angular….
- Component đơn giản, Responsive và tối ưu hóa giao diện.
- Biết Unit testing và tích hợp API hệ thống.
- Am hiểu .NET Core/C#, phát triển REST API, sử dụng Entity Framework (hoặc ORM tương đương).

2. Kỹ năng cần có:

- Có tinh thần trách nhiệm cao với công việc, thái độ làm việc tích cực.
- Có khả năng làm việc theo đội, nhóm.

- Có khả năng đọc hiểu và ứng dụng các tài liệu nghiên cứu chuyên ngành.

3. Là lợi thế nếu có.

- Đã từng làm việc thực tế với ADK (Agent Development Kit).
- Thành thạo cả hai hệ sinh thái TypeScript và .NET.
- Có kinh nghiệm làm việc trong đội ngũ đa chức năng (Cross-functional team).
- Có kinh nghiệm với Docker, Cloud services (Azure/AWS) và Git.

jobDescription:
We are seeking Middle/Senior Backend Developers with solid backend expertise and a strong interest in developing fullstack capabilities.▪️ Our Office: Gia Dinh Ward (Formerly Ward 7, Binh Thanh District, Ho Chi Minh City)▪️ Salary Range: $1,200 – $3,000/month▪️ Experience: Minimum 4 years▪️ English: Intermediate (able to communicate effectively in meetings)▪️ Interview Process:- 1st interview about Technical, Experience- 2nd interview with CTO and CEO about culture, experienceJob brief

We are looking for Middle/Senior Backend Developers with a strong interest in Fullstack development to manage the software development lifecycle from planning and prioritization to testing and release.

Middle/ Senior Developer responsibilities include gathering system and user requirements, building modules and testing features before release. If you have hands-on experience developing software with agile methodologies and are ready to lead our junior developers, we’d like to meet you.

Ultimately, you will deploy and maintain functional, secure and high-quality applications.

Your responsibilities

- Identify and analyze user requirements.
- Implement our applications, services and products.
- Write well-designed, efficient code.
- Review, test and debug team members’ code.
- Release and maintain our products/ services in production environments.
- Ensure our applications are secure and up to date.
requirements:
Your skills and experience

- Experience as a Backend Developer is required; experience with frontend technologies is a plus.
- Experience in designing, implementing, and testing applications using technologies such as Java.
- In-depth knowledge of popular Java frameworks like Spring MVC, Spring Boot, Microservice, JPA, Rest API.
- Proficiency in one of the following: Java, Javascript, Typescript, NodeJS, ReactJS, NextJS, VueJS, Angular, Python, PHP
- Strong knowledge of SQL, MySQL or similar databases.
- Worked on Java build & dependency management using tools like Maven, Gradle.
- Experience with Object-Oriented Design (OOD).
- Experience with Test-Driven Development (TDD).
- Strong delegation and time management skills, problem-solving abilities, teamwork skills.
- English: Intermediate to Upper intermediate level.
- Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Engineering or relevant field.

Nice to have

- Experience with Docker, Jenkins, AWS, Cloud and SaaS will be a plus.
- Proficiency in Japanese will be a significant advantage.
benefits:
- Providing market-competitive salary, benefits, can work remotely in future.
- As you contribute to the development of in-house products and acquire business skills in the HR tech field, you will have the opportunity to lead product strategy for business expansion, including planning and development of new business ventures.
- Parking Allowances.
- Full salary for probation.
- Social Insurance in full gross salary.
- Performance review (Twice a year).
- Bonus at the end of the year based on performance evaluation results and company revenue.
- Annual leave, Special leave days.
- Annual health check-up.
- Company trip and other internal events.

reasons:

jobDescription:
is dedicated to the digital transformation of the European Life and Pensions industry. As InsurTech innovators, we provide future-proof core technology for policy administration. The Prudent Revolution is our mission – bridging technology and partnership to navigate the fastest, safest path through complex change for L&P providers.

We combine tech and industry expertise with relevant market experience to offer a broad range of consultancy and data services – from managing faultless legacy system migration to facilitating compelling end-user experiences. Based in Stockholm, Lumera has significant presence with offices in the United Kingdom, the Netherlands, Norway, Sweden, India and Vietnam.

Lumera is majority owned by Monterro, a leading Nordic software investor.

We are seeking an experienced Site Manager to lead our Hanoi-based organisation and software development teams. This role carries responsibility for the operational, people and development leadership of Lumera Vietnam.

As experienced professional with strong general management experience and a proven ability to manage and develop small software development teams of up to 50 people, you will be accountable for site operations, talent development and delivery excellence in alignment with Lumera’s strategy.

Responsibilities:

Operations & Site Leadership:

- Manage all Lumera Hanoi operations in alignment with Lumera’s global business plan and objectives.
- Collaborate closely with global Product Development, Finance, HR, IT and other functions within Lumera and Scandinavian Software Park.
- Establish and maintain local operational policies aligned with Lumera’s culture, values and compliance requirements.
- Develop and implement the local talent strategy, including hiring, development and retention.
- Inspire, motivate, and develop high performing teams.
- Communicate progress, risks, issues and outcomes clearly to stakeholders and senior management.
- Work closely with the Head of Engineering for Vietnam.
- Undertake other operational management duties as required by the business.
- Progress to the role of legal representative for Lumera in Vietnam over time.

Development Management

- Lead delivery of the product development roadmap in Hanoi.
- Oversee development activities in close collaboration with the Product Management function.
- Collaborate with developers and other stakeholders throughout the whole software development life cycle.
requirements:
Education and Experience

- Bachelor’s degree in Software Engineering, Business Studies or a related field.
- Delivery experience of software development.
- Strong understanding of the Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC).
- Experience of Agile ways of working.
- At least 5 years’ proven experience in people management.
- High energy leader with strong people management capability and clear, effective communication skills.
- Strong leadership mindset – demonstrating influence, accountability, and empathy.
- Excellent problem solving, negotiation, and conflict management skills.
- Strong written and verbal communication skills in English.
- Experience working with European companies or cultures is a plus.
benefits:

- Comprehensive insurance package.

title: Junior/Middle Tester (Automation Test/ QA QC)
jobDescription:
Founded in 2020, FLYER is Vietnam’s leading online English learning and testing platform for students. We develop technology that enables learners to practice exams as if they were real, while enjoying a fun, game-like learning experience. Our mission is to help millions of children confidently conquer English proficiency tests such as Cambridge, TOEFL Primary, and IELTS, and to build well-rounded English skills.

After five years of growth, FLYER is now supporting over 500,000 students and 1,000 schools, with our user base doubling every year. We are rapidly expanding into the LMS (Learning Management System) sector, providing solutions for schools and corporate training.

At FLYER, people are at the heart of everything we do. We look for individuals who are proactive learners and passionate about creating educational products with meaningful social impact.What You Will Do as an Tester

- Design, develop, and maintain test automation frameworks using Playwright + TypeScript.
- Build and execute automation test scripts for web and mobile applications.
- Design test cases, test plans, and integrate automation into CI/CD pipelines.
- Perform API testing (REST, GraphQL, WSS) and validate system data.
- Analyze test results, log defects, and collaborate with the Dev team for resolution.
- Ensure product quality, performance, and user experience.
- Communicate effectively with international teams/clients in English when needed.
requirements:
(1) Experience & Competencies

- 1.5–3 years of experience in Automation Testing.
- Proficient in at least one automation framework, preferably Playwright + TypeScript.
- Solid understanding of QA methodologies, SDLC, and software testing processes.
- Experience with CI/CD tools (Git, Jenkins, GitHub Actions, etc.) is a plus.
- Familiar with API testing and web technologies (HTML, CSS, JavaScript).
- Strong analytical thinking and debugging skills.
- Good English reading/writing skills are a plus.
- Experience in product companies or EdTech is an advantage.

(2) Mindset & Personality

- Proactive Learning: Ambitious, open to trying new things, and willing to learn about tech products.
- Perseverance & Resilience: Has a “see it through” attitude, does not give up easily when facing challenges.
- Team Spirit: Open-minded, respectful, and always ready to support one another.
- Improvement Mindset: Sees problems as opportunities to contribute and is eager to brainstorm solutions.

Recruitment Process

Round 1: Screening Call (Phone/Chat)

Round 2: Competency Interview - CEO, Lead & HR (Onsite)

Round 3: Offer & Career Development Discussion (Online)

Work Location: Việt Á Tower, No. 9 Duy Tân, Dịch Vọng Hậu, Cầu Giấy, Hanoi.

Working Hours: Monday – Friday: 8:30 AM – 12:00 PM | 1:30 PM – 6:00 PM
benefits:
☑️ Income & Benefits

- Competitive Income = Fixed salary upto 22.000.000 VND + Bonuses on holidays, Tet, birthdays, etc. + Other allowances/support.
- Lunch allowance: 50,000 VND per working day.
- English certificate allowance for employees with a valid IELTS score of 6.5 or higher.
- 13th-month salary, annual company trip, and full insurance according to labor law.
- Attractive seniority policy for employees with 2+ years of service (seniority bonuses, low-interest home loan support, etc.).

☑️ Growth Opportunities

- Transparent annual performance review process, with the possibility of early promotion (after 4-6 months) for those who deliver exceptional performance and exceed expectations.

☑️ Work Environment & Culture

- A young, fast-paced, and efficiency-driven tech startup: every good idea gets tested quickly.
- A culture of learning and sharing: internal knowledge sharing and weekly mini-workshops.
- Passionate, fun, and result-driven teammates with strong professional backgrounds.
- An open workspace with plenty of team activities and bonding opportunities: team bonding, workshops, and company trips.

☑️ Meaningful Impact

- Directly create a positive impact for millions of students and teachers across the country, improving English learning and education quality in Vietnam.
- Join FLYER on its journey to bring Vietnamese technology to the global education stage.

title: Back End Developer (Golang, SQL, NoSQL)
jobDescription:
Position Overview:

We are seeking experienced and innovative Back End Developers to join our dynamic team. The ideal candidate will be proficient in Golang and associated libraries, with a strong background in microservices architecture. In addition, expertise in message queuing systems, search engines like ElasticSearch, relational and NoSQL databases, websockets, and gRPC is essential.

Experience in CRM software or VoIP telephony systems is considered a significant advantage. The Back End Developers will be responsible for designing, developing, and maintaining scalable and high-performance software solutions.

Responsibilities:

- Design, develop, and maintain applications using Golang for backend development and Svelte, NextJs framework (or similar) for frontend development.
- Utilize message queuing systems for asynchronous communication between microservices.
- Implement real-time communication using websockets for interactive features.
- Integrate gRPC for efficient and high-performance communication between microservices.
- Develop and optimize database schemas for both SQL (e.g., PostgreSQL, MySQL) and NoSQL databases.
- Write efficient SQL queries and interact with NoSQL databases for data operations.
- Implement search functionality using ElasticSearch or similar technologies.
- Ensure code quality, performance, and security through proper testing and code reviews.
- Investigate and troubleshoot technical issues, providing timely resolutions.
- Stay updated on emerging technologies and best practices in back end development.
requirements:
- Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or related field.
- Minimum of 1-2 years of experience in back end development.
- Proficiency in Golang and associated libraries and tools for backend development.
- Require at least 1-2 years of experience in Golang.
- Experience with microservices architecture and designing scalable systems - must have
- Familiarity with message queuing systems (e.g., RabbitMQ, Kafka) and asynchronous communication patterns - must have
- Experience with websockets for real-time communication - nice to have
- Solid understanding of both SQL and NoSQL databases, including schema design and query optimization - must have
- Knowledge of gRPC for efficient communication between microservices - Nice to have
- Experience with CRM software or VoIP telephony systems is a plus.
- Excellent problem-solving and analytical skills with a keen attention to detail.
- Strong communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to collaborate effectively with cross-functional teams.
- Proven track record of designing and developing scalable, robust, and high-performance software solutions
benefits:
- Salary: Negotiable
- 13th-month salary, holiday and Tet bonuses according to company policy
- Full social insurance (SI), health insurance (HI), and unemployment insurance (UI as per Vietnamese law)
- Young, dynamic working environment with many opportunities for personal development
- Participation in team building activities and annual company trips

title: Head of Engineer
reasons:
- Very competitive remuneration package
- Build products for millions of users in Australia
- Hybrid and flexible working environment
jobDescription:
NAB Digital Vietnam’s tech teams build and operate the core digital, cloud, data, and cybersecurity platforms that power banking experiences for millions of NAB customers, working with modern engineering stacks (microservices, APIs, AWS/Azure cloud, DevOps) and collaborating closely with Australia and global partners to deliver secure, scalable, and innovative digital solutions. We are looking for a Head of Engineer to join the team and deliver ongoing operations of an IT Digital roadmap(s), support strategy definition, and be responsible for leading and motivating a multi-disciplinary team of dynamic.

MAIN RESPONSIBILITIES

- Provide technical leadership for the Digital Sub-Domain and are accountable for on-time delivery of Sprint / SDLC epics and features.
- Lead, coach and mentor technology resources to uplift skills/knowledge to perform their role and to build a high-performing team.
- Drive technical delivery with a focus on improving speed, cost and quality of outcomes, ensuring the squads are aligned on objective and outcomes.
- Support and drive lean portfolio management across the Digital domains through linking business roadmaps with software / platform delivery.
- Manage cross functional, agile teams across business units to achieve planned targets. Accountable for removing technical or delivery impediments that can’t be resolved at squad level.
- Cost Management of financials to ensure achievement of plans and drive CI/CD.
- Responsible for developing market-leading capacity; the strategic deployment of departmental resources leads to optimal resource allocation and successful Digital product development.
- Contribute as NICV expert and contribute to NAB corporate IT leadership to build innovation of AI, Cloud expertise and others where applies.
- Advise and / or responsible to stakeholders on digital dev, test, deploy and operate Digital NAD services from NICV (Vietnam Innovation Center Vietnam).
- Execute other tasks as assigned by your People Leader and/or authorized representative of NAB Vietnam from time to time.
requirements:
- Experience in Digital delivery of large, complex organizations operating in global services / work-force management. Preferably in Banking/ Financial services
- High level of practical expertise, combined with significant business depth and strategic vision to enable effective assessment of the potential added-valued to be played by IT systems.
- Experienced in managing and delivering multi-business unit initiatives; large complex programs containing multiple streams across multiple regions, with multiple vendors.
- Experienced in building, leading and managing teams of 50+ world class engineers with high complexity
- Able to navigate a large complex organization and build relationship with Senior stakeholder using informal and formal networks.
- The ability to lead a team that thinks and execute like a fintech, whilst operating with the balance sheet and risk appetite of the largest Banks in Australia
- Excellent communication skills, both written and oral.
- Can work under stressful situations time to time. Personal resilience.
- High quality planning, prioritization, and organization skills.
- Critical thinking and ability to identify risks, ‘areas of gaps’ and seek help if / when required.
- Stakeholder Management. High influencing authority with peers and stakeholders.
- Financial management, planning and forecasting techniques.
- Capacity management and resource allocation and lead technical team.
- Tracking, measuring and continuous improvement of team performance

EXPERIENCE:

- Minimum 10+ years in working in financial services technology. Ideally Tier1 banking.
- Min 5+ years in both technology change, operations (incl. triage management)
- Min 5+ years’ experience in managing technology teams of 30+ staff
- Technical experience in either development, design, architecture and / or consulting
benefits:
THE BENEFITS AND PERKS

1. Generous compensation and benefit package

- Attractive salary and benefits
- 20-day annual leave and 7-day sick leave, etc.
- 13th month salary and Annual Performance Bonus
- Premium healthcare for yourself and family members
- Monthly allowance for team activities
- Premium welcome kit and frequent appreciation gifts
- Extra benefits for long-term employees

2. Exciting career and development opportunities

- Large scale products with modern technologies in banking domain
- Clear roadmap for career advancement in both technical and leadership pathways
- Well-structured learning and development programs (technical and soft skills)
- Sponsored certificates in both IT and banking/finance
- Premium account on Udemy
- English learning with native teachers
- Opportunity for traveling & training in Australia

3. Professional and engaging working environment

- Hybrid working model and good work-life balance
- Well-equipped & modern Agile office with fully stocked pantry
- Special programs to improve your physical and mental health
- Annual company trip and events
- A solid talented team behind you – great people who love what they do

If this excites you, let's have a chat over a cup of coffee!

title: [Remote/ Freelancer] Mid/Sr Backend Dev (.NET Core 8)
jobDescription:
We are looking for a talented Middle/ Senior Backend Developer (.NET Core 8 ) to join our software development team. You will be responsible for building and maintaining high-quality backend applications, integrating with frontend systems, and ensuring optimal performance and security.

We’re Hiring Urgently: Freelancer (2-Month Contract)
requirements:
1. Technical Skills:

Experience:

- 4+ years of experience in software development using .NET Core (preferably .NET 8)
- Practical experience with .NET Core projects, API development, and integration with frontend or third-party systems

Backend Development:

- Proficient in C#, .NET Core 8, ASP.NET Core, Entity Framework Core, and related technologies
- Strong understanding of Object-Oriented Programming (OOP), MVC pattern, and design patterns (e.g., Dependency Injection, Repository Pattern)
- Skilled in developing RESTful APIs, microservices architecture, and using tools such as Swagger and Postman

Integration & Development:

- Experience working with databases such as SQL Server, PostgreSQL, MySQL, or NoSQL databases (e.g., MongoDB, Redis)
- Understanding of the Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC), including architecture design, testing (unit & integration testing), and deployment (CI/CD)
- Ability to optimize application performance, ensure security (authentication/authorization), and handle complex technical issues

Preferred (Nice-to-Have):

- Experience with Angular
- Knowledge of other frontend technologies (React, Vue.js) is a plus
- Knowledge of cloud services (AWS, Azure, Google Cloud) or container technologies like Docker, Kubernetes

2. English Skills:

- Good English communication skills (both speaking and writing) to work with international teams and clients

3. Soft Skills & Responsibilities:

Teamwork:

- Work in Agile/Scrum environment, collaborate with Scrum Master and development teams
- Participate in product design, technical evaluations, and code reviews to ensure code quality

Problem-Solving:

- Capable of analyzing, designing system architecture, and resolving complex technical problems
- Research and apply new technologies in projects

4. Education & Experience:

- Bachelor’s degree in Information Technology, Computer Science, Software Engineering, or related fields
- 3–5 years of experience working in tech companies, preferably with international or outsourcing projects

Application Requirements:

- A detailed CV listing experience and completed projects
- Relevant certificates (if any)
benefits:
Benefits:

- Working hours: 8:00 AM – 17:00 PM, Monday to Friday
- Working model: Remotely
- Competitive Salary: 20 – 35 million VND/month

title: Senior AI Engineer (AIML/CV/OCR, Yolo, Python, Pytorch)
reasons:
- 13th Salary; Performance bonus
- Premium health care for you and your family
- Opportunity to be on site in the USA
jobDescription:
YOU

You want to be an important member of a strong team of other makers who take pride in their work and support each other. As a Senior AI Engineer, you will join the AI-Powered Takeoff Team in Vietnam, collaborating closely with U.S. stakeholders and coordinating with external vendors to build an AI-driven product that transforms technical drawings (PDFs, CAD files, and blueprints) into actionable data, directly improving product performance and business efficiency. That’s year one. If career growth is important to you, we not only know how to help you with that, it’s what we love to do:

PROJECT DESCRIPTION

AI-Powered Takeoff is an intelligent construction TakeOff platform designed to automate material quantity takeoffs from architectural and engineering drawings. By leveraging computer vision, machine learning, and the system extracts, measures, and categorizes building components directly from digital blueprints PDF, significantly reducing manual effort, errors, and turnaround time.

The objective of AI-Powered Takeoff is to:

- Automate quantity detection from drawings
- Assist with measurements (length, area, count, volume)
- Organize extracted quantities in structured formats
- Support revision comparison
- Reduce manual tracing effort

WHAT YOU’LL BE DOING

At Simpson Strong-Tie we value the individual, and the creativity that individuals can bring to the workplace. You join this company for a career, not a job!

- You will join the AI Engineering team within an innovative manufacturing and construction technology environment, collaborating closely with the US team to design and develop AI services that enhance product performance and deliver measurable business impact.
- You thrive in a cross-functional environment, working closely with product managers, AI engineers, subject matter experts (SMEs), data analysts, product engineers, and business stakeholders to deliver high-impact solutions.
- Design, develop, and maintain scalable end-to-end machine learning pipelines for automated vision processing
- Build systems for symbol detection, drawing interpretation, floor plan parsing, and quantity extraction from construction documents (PDFs, CAD exports, blueprints).
- Develop and fine-tune object detection and segmentation models to identify construction elements (walls, doors, windows, fixtures, framing, hardware components, etc.).
- Implement OCR/YOLO and document layout analysis pipelines to extract annotations, dimensions, and labels from technical drawings.
- Apply advanced ML techniques including transformer-based vision models and multi-label classification.
- Conduct model evaluation, benchmarking, hyperparameter optimization, and performance tuning.
- You will also be responsible for creating and optimizing core modules of the MLOps platform, from the computation layer to the orchestrator layer.
- Collaborate with software engineers to integrate ML models into production applications.
- Manage and oversee the AI vendor’s deliverables, including reviewing training approaches and datasets, and leading testing/UAT to evaluate and validate model accuracy and performance against business requirements.
requirements:
If you can do everything listed above, you’ve got what it takes. Perhaps some of the following would be helpful too:

- 2+ years in Software Development (preferably construction tech, engineering, or document automation)
- 3+ years in AI/ML or Computer Vision roles
- Strong hands-on Python experience for image processing and CV pipelines

ML & Computer Vision Expertise

- Design and maintain scalable end-to-end ML pipelines for automated vision processing (symbol detection, drawing interpretation, floor plan parsing, quantity extraction from PDFs/CAD/blueprints).
- Solid experience with OpenCV, Torchvision, YOLO, Detectron2, SAM, or similar.
- Proven background in Object Detection, Image Segmentation, OCR, and Document Layout Analysis (e.g., PaddleOCR, Tesseract, LayoutLM, Donut).
- Experience analyzing large sets of technical drawings and applying data augmentation for engineering documents.
- Image classification, multi-label detection, semantic & instance segmentation
- Transformer-based vision models (ViT, DETR, LayoutLM)
- Model evaluation (mAP, IoU, F1), hyperparameter tuning, model optimization
- Strong experience with PyTorch, TensorFlow, Scikit-learn, Pandas, Albumentations, etc.
- Experience with Azure/Azure ML, AWS, or GCP

Other requirements (nice to have)

- Deploy and optimize ML systems (low-latency inference, retraining pipelines, drift monitoring)
- Model serving tools (TorchServe, ONNX, Triton, TF Serving)
- Comfortable working in Linux environments
- Ability to communicate technical outputs to non-technical stakeholders
- Strong written and spoken English
- Bonus: Experience with BIM (IFC/Revit), PDF parsing, GIS/spatial data, or construction/proptech domains.
benefits:
- Attractive salary with 100% salary during probation
- 13th-month salary, Performance bonus, Salary review annually
- Premium health care program for employees + one of your beloved ones, Annual medical check-up
- 14 vacation days, Christmas Day per year
- Opportunity to be on-site in the USA
- Chance to collaborate and work with global stakeholders
- Provide training to develop our employee‘s knowledge and skills (Internal training: Udemy, Pluralsight, and another online training course, TechTalk sharing within Software Development Division; External training: Management, English, Soft Skills, ….)
- Benefits for special holidays (Birthday, Marriage, Women’s Day, Tet Holidays, Mid-Autumn, Newborn babies, International Children‘s Day…)
- Company trip and Year-End party every year
- Social, sports and several team building activities
- Young, friendly and international working environment
- Modern working conditions and entertainment facilities at the office
- Snacks, tea and coffee all the time
- Compliance fully to Vietnam Labor code

jobDescription:
Welcome to SMG Vietnam!

SMG Swiss Marketplace Group simplifies lives with innovative online marketplaces in Automotive, Real Estate, General Marketplaces, and Finance & Insurance. As SMG’s innovation hub, SMG Vietnam develops cutting-edge solutions in a collaborative, empowering environment. Recognized among the 2023 Asia & Vietnam Best Workplaces, we attract top digital talent to create exceptional user experiences for Switzerland. Guided by our core values—Better Together, Aim High, and Act Responsibly—we drive innovation and meaningful change.

This job refers to our Automotive brands, Autoscout24 and Motoscout24, Switzerland’s leading online marketplaces that connect buyers, sellers, and dealers for vehicles of all kinds, supported by services such as featured listings, advertising solutions, and leads for financing and insurance.

We are looking for QA Engineers to help us shape the future of the Swiss automotive market by ensuring the quality and reliability of our modern, innovative platforms. You will collaborate closely with a diverse community of talented engineers from around the globe, leverage their expertise, and contribute your own as you grow your skills in test automation, quality practices, and scalable, high-performing digital products.

Join our dynamic team, located in six countries (Switzerland, Serbia, Vietnam, France, Germany, and India), where creativity thrives. Together, we tackle challenges, celebrate successes, and keep learning and growing.

Your Mission

- Act as the QA voice in agile ceremonies and independently manage the testing lifecycle to ensure quality and reduce tech debt for medium- to large-scale features.

Prioritize converting key manual test cases into automated scripts to accelerate regression and end-to-end test cycles.Test domain-driven web referencing database-heavy back-end systems and check the consistency across devices, browsers, and operating systems.Conduct periodic exploratory testing in test environments.

- Test domain-driven web referencing database-heavy back-end systems and check the consistency across devices, browsers, and operating systems.
- Conduct periodic exploratory testing in test environments.

- Provide input on high-level test scenarios, risks, resources, and test estimates during planning sessions.

We value the skills you bring and your ability to learn quickly, so don’t worry if your career path has been unique.

title: QA Engineer ( Python, AI, Automation Test, CI/CD, C++ )
jobDescription:
We are seeking a diligent and detail-oriented QA Engineer to join our R&D team. The successful candidate will be responsible for ensuring the quality and reliability of our model and core engines. You will play a key role in building testing infrastructure, benchmarking models, and defining complex data scenarios to predict how model performance impacts the final product.

Key Responsibilities:

- Test Automation Architecture: Design, develop, and optimize scalable automated testing frameworks for core engines. Focus on streamlining model benchmarking, regression suites, and performance profiling.
- Data Engineering for QA: Architect comprehensive data strategies. Define and synthesize complex data contexts and edge-case scenarios required to stress-test ML model robustness.
- End-to-End Risk Analysis: Evaluate model outputs through a product lens. Predict systemic risks and quantify how model variance impacts the final user experience post-integration.
- CI/CD Integration: Seamlessly integrate automated validation gates into the CI/CD pipeline to ensure continuous quality delivery for cloud-connected and embedded components.
- Cross-functional Collaboration: Work closely with Data and Dev teams to triage defects, analyze root causes, and refine model training requirements based on QA insights.
requirements:
- Minimum 3 years in Software Quality Engineering or Backend Development, with a focus on automation.
- Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Machine Engineering, or a related technical field.
- Proficient in Python (for automation & ML scripting) and C++ or JavaScript (for engine-level or web-integrated testing).
- Solid understanding of AI/ML lifecycles and Computer Vision fundamentals.
- Hands-on experience with cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or GCP) and IoT/Robotics environments.
- Ability to calculate and interpret core metrics (mAP, Precision/Recall, F1-score, etc.) to assess model performance beyond simple "pass/fail" results.
- Proficiency with Git, Jira, TestRail, and modern CI/CD tools (Jenkins, GitLab CI, or GitHub Actions).

Preferred Qualifications

- Proactive Problem Solving: Proven track record of architecting test frameworks from scratch.
- Agile Proficiency: Experience in Scrum/Agile environments with a focus on rapid iteration.
- AI-Driven Productivity: Experience leveraging LLMs or AI-based coding assistants to accelerate test script generation and data synthesis.
- Communication: Ability to translate complex technical risks into actionable insights for non-technical stakeholders.
benefits:

title: Junior Android Developer (Kotlin/Java)
reasons:
- Highly competitive salary and benefits package
- Excellent environment and team to help you grow.
- We are Singapore's leading car portal
jobDescription:
We are looking for a Junior Android Developer to join our growing Motorist Vietnam team.You will help design, optimize, and enhance the Motorist mobile application — one of Singapore’s leading automotive platforms — using the latest Android technologies to deliver the best experience for drivers across Southeast Asia.

1. Education

● Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or related field.● Final-year students or fresh graduates with strong Android project portfolios are also welcome to apply.

2. Responsibilities

● Design, build, and maintain advanced features for the Motorist app using Kotlin and Jetpack Compose.● Implement modern architectures using MVVM, Hilt/Dagger (Dependency Injection), and Coroutines.● Work with frameworks and libraries such as Retrofit2 + OkHttp3, Realm, RxJava, and Firebase Crashlytics / Analytics.● Collaborate closely with backend developers, designers, and QA testers to ensure smooth, high-performance user experiences.● Debug, refactor, and continuously optimize the Motorist app for reliability and scalability.● Conduct research and apply emerging Android technologies to improve performance and user satisfaction.● Participate in sprint planning, code reviews, and team knowledge sharing sessions.
requirements:
Technical Experiences

Must Have

● Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science or related field.● Understanding of Java/Kotlin, Android Studio, and Android SDK fundamentals.● Familiar with SOLID principles, OOP, data structures, and clean architecture (MVVM).● Experience working with databases such as SQLite, Room, and Realm.● Understanding of RESTful API integration and JSON data handling.● Proficient understanding of code version control tools, such as Git.● Strong attention to detail and analytical problem-solving mindset.

Nice to Have

● Exposure to Jetpack Compose, Retrofit2 / OkHttp3, RxJava, or Google Maps SDK.● Basic understanding of Firebase Messaging, Crashlytics, or Remote Config.● Familiarity with Material 3 Design, Coroutines Flow, or JUnit / Espresso testing.● Appreciation for clean, maintainable, and well-structured code.● Collaborative mindset and a reliable team player who takes ownership of their work.

Language Skills

● Able to communicate and collaborate in English (written and spoken).● Willing to learn and improve communication when working with Singapore HQ and other markets.

Flexible Points

We welcome engineers who:● Are passionate about Android development and eager to grow in a professional environment.● May not have long working experience but can demonstrate strong fundamentals and self-learning ability.● Want to master Jetpack Compose, Kotlin Coroutines, and Clean Architecture.● Are not yet fluent in English but are motivated to practice and improve daily.● Enjoy solving problems and building high-quality apps that users love.

Notice

Candidates are required to provide reference information after passing the interview round.

At Motorist, we believe in work hard, play hard. You’ll be part of an energetic and collaborative team that encourages creativity, learning, and ownership.Join us to grow your career and help build one of Singapore’s leading automotive platforms.
benefits: ● Competitive salary with annual performance review and 13th-month bonus.● Modern working devices: MacBook, monitor, Android test phones, etc.● PVI Health Insurance and full social insurance as per Vietnam Labor Law.● 15 days annual leave, increasing by 1 day per year.● English language training sponsored by the company.● Professional development and opportunities to travel to Singapore for training.● Friendly, innovative, and young working environment in District 2, Ho Chi Minh City.● Working hours: 7 hours/day, Monday to Friday (no weekends).● Year-end party and team-building activities.● Unlimited potential for career growth and internal advancement.

title: Hybrid - Engineering Manager (Ruby, Python, Agile)
reasons:

jobDescription:
CloudStorm Ventures builds, invests in, and accelerates niche technology businesses. We believe in the power of innovative solutions and the passionate individuals behind them - to make a positive impact and serve important needs.

Our portfolio includes products such as EDGEauditor and VetLogix. EDGEauditor enables ski industry professionals to better protect their guests & organizations, while boosting visitor experience through reliable and consistent data. VetLogix is a cloud-based practice management platform purpose-built for large animal veterinarians.

We are currently seeking an Engineering Manager to lead and support the EDGEauditor and Vetlogix product. This role will be responsible for building, mentoring, and managing the engineering team, as well as providing strong technical and delivery leadership to ensure the successful development and execution of the platform initiatives.

A day in the life as an Engineering Manager:

- Oversee and lead both Frontend and Backend engineering teams, ensuring effective collaboration and high-quality output
- Monitor and maintain system reliability, performance and security, proactively identifying and addressing potential risks
- Conduct regular check-ins and 1:1 meetings with engineering team members to support performance, engagement and development
- Support the development, implementation, and continuous improvement of internal systems, processes, and policies
- Align squad-level goals with broader Engineering objectives to ensure consistency and strategic impact
- Provide hands-on support in debugging complex code issues and resolving architectural challenges
- Lead the technical design and architecture of scalable and maintainable solutions
- Collaborate closely with Product, QA teams and other stakeholders to deliver high quality solutions that meet customer needs
requirements:
If the below describe your knowledge, experience and character, this role could be for you:

- Excellent English communication skills, with the ability to collaborate effectively with cross-functional and global teams
- Minimum of 2 years of experience leading and managing engineering teams
- Hand-on experience with Ruby, Python or equivalent
- Hand-on experience with Agile development methodologies
- Experience working with Docker
- Proven experience in technical project planning, execution, and delivery
- Demonstrated experience in mentoring, coaching, and developing engineering talent
- Strong communication and interpersonal skills
- Excellent project management, organizational, and time management abilities

We know imposter syndrome can be REAL when applying for a new role, but please don't let the confidence gap prevent you from taking a leap and applying for your dream job. Your future self will thank you!

Apply today with your resume and answer any application questions. We’ll start reviewing candidates within two weeks of this position being posted and will reach out to you if we’d like to get to know you a bit better. We often get hundreds of applications for our roles (we feel very honored that so many people are interested!) and try our best to get back to each person. If there’s a delay in our response, please don’t think we’ve forgotten about you. We may be taking our time to thoroughly review each candidate before deciding who to interview.

title: Senior Frontend Developer (Next.js, React.js)
jobDescription:
AROBID is a global B2B e-commerce and online trade exhibition ecosystem. We are looking for an experienced Frontend Developer to drive the development of high-performance, user-centric web applications using Next.js and React.js. The ideal candidate brings strong technical expertise, leadership capability, and a passion for building scalable, secure, and impactful digital platforms.

- Play a key role in web and mobile development of Arobid - the new leading B2B digital ecosystem of e-commerce, global online expo and conference, data intelligence and CSR for global market.
- Develop platforms which are not only functional, bug-free, but also with high user experience, SEO-optimized, performance and security.
- Ensure the platform capability of maintainability, reliability, and extendability of the deliverables.
- Participating effectively in our Agile/SCRUM process, in software architecture design, deliverable sprints, code reviews and enhancements with the team, etc. as well as proposing new alternatives to existing tech and design solutions.
- Contribute to strong engineering team culture, collaboration and high accountability.

Job description

- Work closely with Product Owner, Designers, and other disciplines to develop Arobid’s products.
- Code optimization to improve scalability, reliability, security and performance of web applications.
- Guide and mentor other developers, fostering a culture of technical excellence and continuous learning within the team.
- Architect the Next.js 16+ frontend application. You will define patterns for Server Actions, caching strategies, and reusable component composition to ensure high performance (Core Web Vitals).
- You treat AI coding tools (Cursor, Copilot) as a force multiplier. You know how to prompt for architectural patterns and rigorously audit the output for security and logic flaws.
requirements:
- Over 5 years of experience as a Software Engineer, specializing in high-performance, user-experience-focused web applications using Next.js and React.js. Strong with SEO optimization, UX, Scalability, clean code, security
- Familiar with tools like Figma, Git,...
- A big plus if experienced with complex web business, 3D or commerce platforms.
- Solid grasp on good software engineering practices such as code reviews, deep focus on quality and documentation.
- Knowledgeable of cyber security and data privacy.
- Experience debugging render cycles, memory leaks, and optimizing bundle sizes.
- Great team spirit and solution-oriented attitude.
- Provide a clean & maintainable code.
benefits:
- Join a strong winning-spirit team of creating new business platforms for Vietnam and SEA.
- Human centricity environment, focusing on collaboration and success.
- Social insurance coverage upon signing your employment contract.
- Generous leave policy: 12 annual leave days plus all Vietnamese public holidays.
- 13th-month salary (applicable from the probationary period).
- Company-provided equipment.
- Well-stocked pantry: tea, coffee, snacks, microwave, etc.
- Engaging company activities: Company trips, team-building events, regular internal events (including live music performances!), and access to company-sponsored badminton courts.

title: Mid/Senior Software Engineer (AI)
reasons:
- Solving hard problems that have meaningful impact!
- Working with leaders, experts in industries
- Competitive salary with employee stock-option plan
jobDescription:
Backend Engineering:

- Develop and maintain high-performance backend systems using Node.js and TypeScript.
- Design system architecture following the microservices model, ensuring scalability and performance optimization.
- Build and operate APIs (RESTful / GraphQL).
- Work closely with Product Managers, DevOps, QA, and software engineers.
- Participate in code reviews, refactoring, writing unit tests, and integration test.

AI Engineering:

- Design and deploy AI agents at the production level.
- Build AI agent workflows with multi-step reasoning, planning, tool use/function calling, and task execution.
- Work with embeddings and vector databases.
- Evaluate and improve AI quality through evaluation pipelines and minimize hallucination.
- Optimize latency, token usage, and costs for AI systems

Technologies & Systems

- RESTful or GraphQL APIs.
- PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis.
- AWS: RDS, Lambda, ECS, S3.
- CI/CD: GitHub Actions, Docker
requirements:
Mandatory

- 2-4 years of backend experience (Node.js, TypeScript).
- System thinking and architectural design skills.
- Experience in code reviewing, testing, and system optimization.
- Good communication skills with technical and product teams.
- Experience working at tech product companies.
- Good command of English.

AI Requirements

- Experience building AI features using LLMs (OpenAI, Claude, or open-source) in production.
- Understanding of LLMs, AI agents, and tool use/function calling.
- Experience with RAG, embeddings, and vector databases.
- Understand how to evaluate and improve the output of LLM systems.
- Understand the trade-offs between latency, cost, and quality.

Preferred (Nice to have)

- Experience with NestJS or Python.
- Experience in Fintech or financial products.
- Experience building end-to-end LLM/AI products
benefits:

- 13th-month salary and year-end bonus.
- Employee Stock Ownership Plan (ESOP).
- Premium health insurance package (up to 500,000,000 VND/year).
- 18 days of paid leave/year.
- Technology-driven work environment, encouraging the application of AI in work.
- Internal engagement activities: Company trip, Year-end party,...

title: AI Engineer (Agentic Workflows)
reasons:
- Competitive base salary & Appealing benefits
- Premium medical care package
- Remote work and home office possibility
jobDescription:
Overview: We are seeking an Applied AI Engineer who treats Large Language Models not as magic, but as stochastic components that require engineering rigor. You will be responsible for building the core "brain" of our automation ecosystem, utilizing tools like Microsoft Copilot Studio, Gemini, and Claude to execute multi-step workflows. You will bridge the gap between low-code enterprise platforms and custom Python integrations.

Key Responsibilities:

- Build agentic AI workflows and multi-agent systems for process automation.
- Build and deploy AI agents using Microsoft Copilot Studio, integrating with Microsoft 365 services for enterprise deployment.
- Combine low-code solutions with custom Python scripting where needed to extend system capabilities.
- Build robust integrations between our AI agents and 3rd-party APIs, handling rate limits, retries, and authentication within agent workflows.
- Develop RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) pipelines connecting LLMs to corporate knowledge bases and documents.
requirements:
- 2-5+ years of professional experience as an AI Engineer, Software Engineer (Applied AI), or a similar role.
- Hands-on experience with LangChain (specifically LangGraph for stateful agents) or raw API integration.
- Experience integrating GenAI models into real-world applications or enterprise systems.
- Knowledge of how to properly structure tool registries and define JSON schemas so models know when to use a tool versus when to generate text.
- Good English communication.
- Bonus: Experience designing, training, and deploying conversational bots or virtual assistants (e.g., using Dialogflow, Microsoft Bot Framework, or similar platforms) is a strong plus.

Notes: "By applying for the job at SPS Vietnam, it is considered that Candidates agree to provide personal data for SPS Vietnam to process in accordance with the Terms and Conditions of personal data processing of candidates which are in line with Decree 13/2023/ND-CP on personal data protection."
benefits:
SPS is a leading technology-driven business transformation company. With our innovative Enterprise Workplace Solutions, we empower organizations to adopt hybrid work concepts to enhance productivity and flexibility. Our Technology Business Solutions bring together cutting-edge technology, deep vertical process expertise, and a diverse global workforce to support clients in their digital transformation journey and efficiently tackle their most complex challenges.

Headquartered in Zurich, Switzerland, SPS operates in more than 20 countries and focuses on clients in banking, insurance and health. SPS has more than 8,500 employees and is recognized with a world-class NPS by its global client base.

We act with precision, connect people to the right information, and turn data into insights for better outcomes. Discover how our dedicated team at SPS makes an impact that matters by visiting .

Joining SPS Vietnam today, you can enjoy:

+ Promotion & bonus opportunities

+ Professional and challenging working environment.

title: DevSecOps Engineer - Khối Công nghệ Thông tin
reasons:

jobDescription:
HO26.96 - DevSecOps Engineer

- Xây dựng và tối ưu hóa quy trình DevOps/DevSecOps, áp dụng nguyên tắc tự động hóa nhằm nâng cao hiệu quả triển khai ứng dụng công nghệ thông tin.
- Triển khai, vận hành và quản lý các giải pháp/công cụ CICD/IaC, công nghệ Containerization/Kubernetes như GitLab, Jenkins, Nexus, Docker, ISTIO, Ansible, Rancher, v.v.
- Triển khai (deploy), tối ưu hóa (optimizing), giám sát (monitoring), phân tích (analysis) sản phẩm.
- Tham gia ngay từ giai đoạn phát triển sản phẩm, thiết kế các thành phần phi chức năng nhằm đảm bảo an ninh hệ thống và hỗ trợ trong quá trình vận hành, bao gồm:+ Thiết kế hệ thống tuân thủ các chính sách và quy định bảo mật.+ Chuẩn hóa logging, tracing và thông tin monitoring, sử dụng các công cụ như ELK, Prometheus, Grafana.
requirements:
- Tốt nghiệp đại học các chuyên ngành Công nghệ thông tin, Toán tin, Điện tử Viễn thông, hoặc lĩnh vực liên quan.
- Vị trí mở với ứng viên fresher có mong muốn theo đuổi lĩnh vực DevOps, DevSecOps
- Ưu tiên ứng viên có kinh nghiệm thực tế về DevOps hoặc DevSecOps tại công ty công nghệ hoặc tổ chức tài chính.
- Có kiến thức về 01 trong các hệ quản trị cơ sở dữ liệu: Oracle, SQL Server, PostgreSQL, MongoDB…
- Ưu tiên ứng viên có kinh nghiệm xây dựng CI/CD Pipeline, sử dụng 01 trong số các công cụ sau: Jenkins, GitLab, Nexus, Harbor, Docker, Helm, Kubernetes, Prometheus, Grafana.
