title: Senior AI Engineer
reasons:
- International working environment
- Full-salary in probation time + Premium Healthcare
- Flexible working time + Training on hot-trend tech
jobDescription:
YOUR MISSIONWe are seeking an experienced AI Engineer to join our team to develop and implement AI solutions to solve business problems. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in AI and software development, with experience in implementing and deploying enterprise AI services on cloud platforms. Additionally, this candidate should be able to work collaboratively with other team members to integrate AI solutions into existing systems.

HOW YOU'LL MAKE AN IMPACT

- Study and understand our current business to identify potential areas where AI can be applied.
- Design the scalable, HA agentic AI system.
- Develop, implement and deploy AI solutions to solve real-world business problems.
- Monitor & optimize AI solutions for performance, scalability and reliability.
- Collaborate with the AI team and software engineers to build, integrate, and maintain AI models in production systems.
- Integrate AI solutions into existing systems.
- Optimize performance and cost for our system.
- Work collaboratively with software developers to ensure successful deployment of AI services.
- Communicate results and progress clearly to technical and non-technical stakeholders.
- Stay up-to-date with the latest developments in AI, machine learning and AI application architectures.
- Training and coaching for junior members.
requirements:
- Bachelor's or Master's degree in computer science, artificial intelligence, or related field.
- 5+ years of experience software development with at least 3 years in AI engineering with proven hands-on work.
- Strong experience in software system design, Agentic AI architectural design patterns.
- Solid understanding of core AI concepts: reasoning, planning, RAG, multi-agent systems.
- Strong experience in AI Evaluation.
- Strong Python, FastAPI programming skills.
- Strong experience in cloud computing (AWS services such as SageMaker, ECS, Lambda, Step Function, S3, SQS…etc).
- Familiar with microservices, event driven architectures.
- Familiar with setup a data pipeline with cost efficiency and security in mind.
- Experience with AI tools and technologies, such as LangChain, TensorFlow, PyTorch, MCP, and scikit-learn.
- Must have experience with using AI in your daily work, from learning, research to architecture, coding, testing and documenting. Familiar with Claude Code.
- Demonstrated ability to develop, implement and integrate AI solutions to SaaS systems.
- Familiar with software engineering practices, such as version control, testing, and deployment.
- Ability to quickly learn and understand new business domains and identify potential areas for AI applications.
- Experience fine-tuning generative AI models is a plus.
- Excellent communication and collaboration skills.
- Good in English communication.
benefits:
- Attractive salary package
- Healthcare: Annual health check-up, Premium Healthcare Insurance for you and your loved ones
- Building large-scale & global software products
- International working environment, flat and transparent organization
- Working & growing with Young, Ambitious & Talented Team
- Flexible working time, from Monday to Friday

- Various training on hot-trend technologies, best practices and soft skills

title: Founding Engineer (Backend & Infrastructure)
jobDescription:
ABOUT THE ROLE

This is not a role for someone who wants a well-defined ticket queue. You will make architecture calls, set up the infrastructure from scratch, write the first lines of the backend, and own the outcome. You will work directly with the founders and hardware engineers.

WHAT YOU WILL BUILD

- A central server that connects to multiple drones simultaneously — handling telemetry, commands, video, and state sync in real time.
- A real-time communication layer between ground server and drones via MQTT, MAVLink, or WebSocket — chosen to fit the hardware.
- REST / gRPC APIs powering operator dashboards, mobile apps, and third-party integrations.
- A time-series data pipeline ingesting flight telemetry, sensor readings, and mission logs from many devices at once.
- Cloud infrastructure, container orchestration, and CI/CD pipelines — starting from zero.
- An observability stack: logging, metrics, and alerting so the team knows when something breaks before a customer does.
- A foundation that can grow from a handful of drones to hundreds without needing to be rewritten.
requirements:
WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR

Required

- 5+ years of experience building and operating production backend systems.
- Strong proficiency in Golang or Python — ideally both.
- Solid experience with real-time systems: message queues, streaming, pub/sub (Kafka, MQTT, or similar).
- Comfortable owning cloud infrastructure end-to-end: Docker, Kubernetes, AWS or GCP.
- Experience setting up CI/CD pipelines and observability stacks from the ground up.
- A builder mindset — you have started something from nothing before and have the scars to prove it.

Strong plus

- Background in IoT, fleet management, or robotics software.
- Experience with time-series databases and high-frequency sensor data.
- Edge computing or low-latency networking.
- Infrastructure-as-code (Terraform).

TECH STACK

- BACKENDGolang · Python · gRPC · REST
- Golang · Python · gRPC · REST
- DRONE / IOTMQTT · MAVLink · WebSocket
- MQTT · MAVLink · WebSocket
- INFRASTRUCTUREKubernetes · Docker · AWS · Terraform DATAPostgreSQL · InfluxDB · Redis · Kafka
- Kubernetes · Docker · AWS · Terraform DATA
- PostgreSQL · InfluxDB · Redis · Kafka
- OBSERVABILITYPrometheus · Grafana
- Prometheus · Grafana
- CI/CDGitHub Actions
- GitHub Actions
benefits:
Competitive salary

- Negotiated by experience. 13th month bonus.

Full insurance

- Social & health insurance per Vietnamese labor law.

Direct access

- Work with founders and hardware engineers — no layers, no bureaucracy.

Real hardware

- Your code controls actual drones in the field. Not a simulation.

- Test Execution: Design, develop, and maintain robust and scalable automation frameworks and scripts using Playwright with Python, along with manual testing as a hybrid Tester; drive continuous integration and continuous delivery (CI/CD) practices for automated tests; conduct performance tests.
- Test Monitoring & Report: Monitor, analyze, and report on test results, identifying trends and areas for improvement.
- Team collaboration: closely with development teams, product managers, and other stakeholders to understand requirements and ensure testability.
- Mentorship: Provide technical guidance and support to team members, helping them grow their skills and careers.
- AI leverage: Ability to apply AI-driven solutions across the end‑to‑end testing lifecycle to improve efficiency, coverage, and quality.
requirements:

- Good English communication and documentation skills
- ISTQB or equivalent testing certificate is a plus.
- Familiar with Playwright Python; additional skillset in Playwright Typescript is a plus.

title: Senior PHP Software Engineer (SaaS product)
reasons:

- Nền tảng vững chắc (PHP/Java) x AI Tech
jobDescription:
🚀 3 Lý do bạn không thể bỏ lỡ Rakus Vietnam

1. Không rào cản ngôn ngữ (No English/Japanese Required)

Tại Rakus, "Code" là ngôn ngữ duy nhất. Chúng tôi không yêu cầu kỹ năng tiếng Anh hay tiếng Nhật. Bạn chỉ cần tập trung vào chuyên môn kỹ thuật. Mọi rào cản ngôn ngữ đã có đội ngũ Comtor hỗ trợ.

2. 3 kỳ nghỉ dài (9 ngày liên tục/kỳ) mỗi năm

Chúng tôi trân trọng thời gian bạn dành cho gia đình. Ngoài kỳ nghỉ Tết Âm lịch, công ty chủ động thiết lập các kỳ nghỉ đặc biệt vào dịp Golden Week (tháng 4-5) và Năm mới Dương lịch (tháng 12-1). Mỗi dịp này bạn sẽ được nghỉ liên tục 9 ngày.

Bạn có thể thoải mái du lịch hay về quê mà không cần dùng đến phép năm!

Tổng số ngày nghỉ lễ trong năm lên đến hơn 30 ngày.

3. Nền tảng vững chắc (PHP/Java) x Công nghệ AI (Github Copilot, v.v.)

Chúng tôi phát triển sản phẩm SaaS ổn định được hơn 10.000 doanh nghiệp Nhật Bản tin dùng, nhưng quy trình làm việc luôn được cập nhật mới nhất.

- Cấp tài khoản GitHub Copilot bản quyền cho toàn bộ kỹ sư.
- Cấp tài khoản Devin, Claude Code cho những ai có nhu cầu.Bạn sẽ phát triển thành một "Hybrid Engineer" – vừa có nền tảng Backend vững chắc, vừa thành thạo các công cụ AI hiện đại.

** Rakus Việt Nam là công ty 100% vốn đầu tư từ RAKUS Co., Ltd. - công ty nổi tiếng hàng đầu tại Nhật Bản cung cấp các dịch vụ đám mây (SaaS), giúp các doanh nghiệp điều hành hoạt động của mình một cách nhanh chóng, tiện dụng nhất.

**Chúng tôi đang tuyển dụng 2 vị trí Senior PHP Software Engineer: LÀM VIỆC OFFLINE FULLTIME TẠI CHI NHÁNH QUẬN PHÚ NHUẬN

- Domain 1: Hệ thống phần mềm quản lý email: Project lớn, được sử dụng bởi hơn 8,000 Doanh nghiệp tại Nhật Bản, doanh thu tăng trưởng ổn định. Team size khoảng 15 người. Specification yêu cầu chất lượng cao.

- Domain 2: Hệ thống phần mềm quản lý chấm công: Project mới, Specification yêu cầu chất lượng cao, là một Dịch vụ Web được xây dựng để vận hành trên nền tảng Amazon Web Services (AWS).

Nếu:

・Bạn muốn tham gia phát triển một dự án mới có độ khó cao về nghiệp vụ, hệ thống lớn.・Bạn có định hướng thăng tiến lên Principal Software Engineer/Technical Leader.・Bạn mong muốn môi trường làm việc lâu dài (ít nhất 3 năm trở lên) ・Bạn có năng lực tập trung và thích tìm hiểu sâu về 1 hệ thống.

Hãy gia nhập đội ngũ phát triển series sản phẩm "Rakuraku" – SaaS chiếm thị phần số 1 tại Nhật Bản.

- Phát triển: Thiết kế, triển khai và kiểm thử các tính năng mới sử dụng PHP thuần (Pure PHP).
- Quy trình AI: Tận dụng các công cụ AI mới nhất để tăng tốc độ coding, refactoring và tự động hóa kiểm thử (test automation).
- Tư duy sản phẩm: Tập trung vào chất lượng code (Quality) và khả năng bảo trì dài hạn (Maintainability).
requirements:
Yêu cầu cơ bản:

- Có từ 5 năm kinh nghiệm trở lên làm việc với PHP trong các dự án phát triển web application (Development, Refactoring, Unit Test).
- Có kinh nghiệm với 1 (hoặc nhiều) trong các framework của PHP như: Laravel, CakePHP, Zend, CodeIgniter, Yii 2
- Có ít nhất 2 năm kinh nghiệm làm việc với VueJS, HTML, CSS, JavaScript
- Có kỹ năng giao tiếp tốt với Team và khách hàng.
- Có kỹ năng làm việc nhóm tốt
- Có khả năng đọc, hiểu và phân tích yêu cầu nghiệp vụ từ phía khách hàng
- Có khả năng tạo/trình bày tài liệu kĩ thuật dễ hiểu và chia sẻ kiến thức với đồng nghiệp
- Có khả năng phát hiện và giải quyết vấn đề tốt
- Có khả năng research tốt.

Ưu tiên:

- Đã từng sử dụng Figma, PHPStorm, GitHub
- Sử dụng hiệu quả các công cụ AI như Github copilot, Gemini, Claude, ChatGPT,...
- Đọc hiểu tài liệu bằng tiếng Anh tốt
- Hiểu quy trình và phong cách làm việc tại công ty Nhật là một lợi thế.

Lưu ý: Không tuyển ứng viên nước ngoài.
benefits:

Không chỉ là lương thưởng, chúng tôi chăm sóc cuộc sống và gia đình bạn theo phong cách Nhật Bản: "Tận tâm và An tâm".

💰 Tài chính vững mạnh (Solid Finance)

- Xét tăng lương: 2 lần/năm. Lộ trình thăng tiến rõ ràng, cấp trên sẽ hỗ trợ bạn thăng cấp để đạt mức lương cao hơn.

🛡️ Sức khỏe & Gia đình (Health & Family Care)

- Hỗ trợ người thân: Hỗ trợ thủ tục để vợ/chồng và con cái tham gia gói bảo hiểm nhóm của công ty (tự nguyện).
- Nghỉ phép siêu linh hoạt: 12 ngày phép năm có thể chia nhỏ để nghỉ theo "đơn vị 30 phút"."Sáng đưa con đi học", "Chiều về sớm đón con", "Đưa người nhà đi khám bệnh"... Tất cả đều OK! Chúng tôi ủng hộ tuyệt đối việc bạn chăm sóc gia đình.
- "Sáng đưa con đi học", "Chiều về sớm đón con", "Đưa người nhà đi khám bệnh"... Tất cả đều OK! Chúng tôi ủng hộ tuyệt đối việc bạn chăm sóc gia đình.

🎉 Niềm vui & Kết nối (Community)

- Du lịch 5 sao: Company Trip hàng năm (3 ngày 2 đêm) tại các resort cao cấp. Tài trợ 50% chi phí tour cho gia đình nhân viên.

📝 Đào tạo

jobDescription:
We’re looking for an experienced BackEnd Developer to be responsible for designing system architecture, setting codebase standards, and optimizing performance for real-time features. Your main responsibilities will include:

Functional:

- Design, implement, and maintain groups responsible for APIs, real-time logic processing, and player interaction systems.
- Actively participate in and lead the development of backend systems using Java, ensuring performance, security, and scalability.
- Establish codebase standards: folder structure, naming conventions, and processing flows.
- Collaborate closely with game designers and client developers to ensure smooth integration of backend systems with the game client.
- Design Microservices architecture for scalability and maintainability across game lines or features.
- Build and implement Unit Tests, validate business logic, and standardize event flows (results, player states, system interactions).
- Optimize performance for critical operations such as matchmaking, win-rate systems, jackpot, and reward logic.
- Ensure game backend security: anti-cheat, session validation, and prevention of fake requests/spam.
- Implement CI/CD, auto-scaling, logging, and monitoring systems for the game backend.

Organizational strategy:

- Abide by and uphold all Company core values, policies and procedures. Help make sure that the Organization’s philosophy, mission and vision are pertinent and practiced throughout the organization.
- Design, support and oversee cross-functional teams throughout the Organization.
- Analyze requirements from the Game Design Document (GDD) and propose suitable architecture.
- Actively handle production incidents, trace logs, identify root causes, and deploy quick solutions.
- Other tasks and responsibilities assigned to the Employee by the Company which may be adjusted from time to time.
requirements:
- Bachelor’s degree from an accredited university in Information Technology, Computer Science, or related major.
- Minimum 5 years of experience in backend system development with at least 3 backend languages (Java/Kotlin, Rust, Go, PHP, C#/.Net, etc.), especially with Java/Kotlin, Rust, PHP.
- Proficient in Kafka, RabbitMQ.
- Experience in building real-time systems with Socket.io, WebSocket, Redis pub/sub, event-driven architecture.
- Experience with databases (Postgres, MongoDB, MySQL/MariaDB,...) for game state management.
- Experience with Spring Boot, Lavarel is a plus.
- Familiarity with Cocos Creator networking integration and multiplayer game flow.
- Experience with large-scale real-time game systems is an advantage.
- Good English communication skills (TOEIC 500+ or equivalent).
- Familiar with project management methodologies (Agile, Scrum, Waterfall, etc.).
- Proficient in project management tools (Jira, Trello, Asana, etc.).
- Strong leadership, organizational, and problem-solving skills.
- Great communication and team-building abilities.
- Flexible and able to adapt to changes quickly.
benefits:

title: QA QC Engineer (Manual & Automation Test)
reasons:
- One of the most fast-growing startup
- Take on high-impact and ultra challenging projects
- Broaden professional network in the areas of tech
jobDescription:
About Flowmingo

Flowmingo is a Y Combinator-backed startup building an AI-native hiring platform that helps companies evaluate far more candidates, more fairly, and with far less manual effort. Our platform brings AI interviews, CV evaluation, applicant tracking, and talent discovery into one system—designed to be accessible, scalable, and usable across devices and network conditions.

The Role

We are hiring a QA/QC Engineer to become the final gatekeeper of production quality at Flowmingo. You are the last line of defense before anything reaches production.

You will decide whether a release is truly ready. You will push back when the quality bar is not met. You will go deep into edge cases, system behavior, regressions, performance risks, and real user impact. If something breaks in production that should have been caught before release, you will help lead the quality investigation, close the gap, and make sure the same class of issue does not happen again.

We want someone who thinks like an owner, tests like an engineer, and treats production quality as a non-negotiable standard.

What You Will Own

Production Release Gatekeeping

- Own final QA/QC sign-off before releases go live
- Act as the quality gatekeeper for production deployments, ensuring only stable, verified changes are approved
- Push back confidently on releases that do not meet the required quality threshold
- Define release readiness criteria and enforce them consistently across teams
- Validate hotfixes, urgent patches, and rollback readiness when incidents occur

Deep Technical Testing

- Design and execute comprehensive test strategies across frontend, backend, API, database, and integration layers
- Build detailed test cases covering happy paths, edge cases, failure modes, and regression risks
- Perform end-to-end validation across core user journeys, especially where AI, scoring logic, video flows, and recruiter-facing workflows intersect
- Review PRs, requirements, and technical changes with a quality-first mindset to catch issues before they become production problems
- Verify bug fixes thoroughly, not just at surface level, but at root-cause level across related flows

Automation & Quality Engineering

- Build and maintain scalable automated test suites for regression, smoke, integration, and end-to-end testing
- Increase test coverage without slowing down product velocity
- Integrate automated quality checks into CI/CD pipelines so issues are caught earlier and more reliably
- Use modern AI tools aggressively to accelerate test generation, coverage analysis, bug reproduction, log review, and quality workflows
- Continuously improve QA productivity through better tooling, smarter automation, and faster feedback loops

Performance, Load & Reliability Validation

- Design and run stress, load, and performance tests for critical product flows
- Identify bottlenecks, reliability risks, concurrency issues, and degradation points before users feel them
- Partner with engineering to validate stability under scale, especially for high-volume workflows and production-like scenarios
- Test resilience under real-world conditions, including unstable networks, partial failures, and recovery behavior

Production Accountability & Continuous Improvement

- Own the quality feedback loop from staging to production
- When defects escape to production, help lead defect analysis, root-cause reviews, and preventive action plans
- Track recurring quality issues and drive permanent fixes, not temporary patches
- Raise the bar on testing discipline, release quality, and engineering accountability across the company
- Help build a culture where quality is engineered early, but verified rigorously before launch
requirements:
What You Bring

- 3+ years of experience in QA, QC, SDET, or quality engineering roles in software products
- Strong hands-on experience with both manual testing and test automation
- Strong understanding of API testing, integration testing, regression testing, end-to-end testing, and production release validation
- Experience with automation frameworks such as Playwright, Cypress, Selenium, or equivalent
- Experience testing backend services, APIs, databases, and asynchronous workflows
- Familiarity with performance and load testing tools such as k6, JMeter, Locust, or similar
- Ability to read logs, inspect payloads, analyze system behavior, and collaborate deeply with engineers on technical root causes
- Comfortable reviewing PRs, requirements, and release candidates with an engineering mindset
- High ownership, strong judgment, and the confidence to block releases when quality is not where it needs to be
- A sharp eye for detail without losing sight of business impact and user experience

Strong Plus If You Have

- Experience testing AI products, LLM-driven workflows, scoring systems, or intelligent automation features
- Experience with CI/CD quality gates and release pipelines
- Experience in fast-moving startup environments where releases are frequent and standards must stay high
- Experience with observability tools, incident reviews, or post-release quality analysis
- Familiarity with HRTech, SaaS, workflow systems, or multi-sided platforms
benefits:
Why This Role is Different

At Flowmingo, production quality is not a support function. It is a business-critical function.

You will protect the reliability of the platform that recruiters and candidates trust. You will have the authority to stop weak releases, the responsibility to uphold the production bar, and the opportunity to build a quality system that scales with the company.

- Compensation: 25–35M VND/month (Gross), depending on experience, technical depth, and ownership of production quality.
- Massive Scale: We aren't building for a niche group. We are building for the millions of candidates currently ignored by the hiring system in the fastest-growing economies in the world.
- Real Technical Challenges: You will tackle unique challenges regarding bandwidth, device latency, and high concurrency that standard SaaS roles rarely encounter.
- Elite Peers: You will work alongside team members hailing from top institutions (YC, UPenn, NYU etc.).
- High Impact / Low Bureaucracy: We are a lean team. You won't be writing JIRA tickets for a month; you'll be shipping features that thousands of candidates use the next day.
- YC Network: As an early hire at a YC startup, you gain access to the most powerful startup network in the world.

Application Process

Please fill out the form and submit your CV, a 30-minute AI interview will be sent afterwards. Completing the interview is mandatory. You can do it immediately or save the link for later, but early submissions receive priority processing.

- CV + AI Interview: We look for builders, not just maintainers.
- Technical Screen: A practical discussion on architecture and problem-solving (No whiteboard riddles).
- Culture Fit: Meeting the founders.

- Ưu tiên có kinh nghiệm về kỹ thuật phần mềm trong lĩnh vực tài chính ngân hàng

2. Trình độ chuyên môn & kỹ năng kỹ thuật

3. Tư duy & hành vi giao tiếp

title: Giám đốc kiểm thử và quản lý chất lượng (QA QC, Tester)
reasons:
- 13 Monthly Base Salary
- Training
- Recorgnition
jobDescription:
1. Tóm tắt vai trò

- Chịu trách nhiệm tạo và duy trì các kịch bản test tự động bằng Selenium, Cucumber, Apium hoặc các công cụ test tương đương khác
- Làm việc với đội ngũ lập trình viên trong suốt vòng đời phát triển tính năng để phân tích và thực hiện các bài test toàn diện trong quy trình tự động, đảm bảo hành vi ứng dụng nhất quán trong mỗi lần triển khai và đáp ứng các tiêu chí nghiệm thu chức năng
- Góp phần đảm bảo chất lượng của sản phẩm phần mềm bàn giao nhằm mang lại trải nghiệm tốt nhất về sản phẩm tài chính cho khách hàng

2. Trách nhiệm chính

- Lên lịch, phân tích và chạy test các chương trình phần mềm mới hoặc đã thay đổi
- Chuẩn bị tài liệu về khung test và các quy trình phát triển phần mềm khác được sử dụng để xác minh hoạt động chính xác theo yêu cầu đã lập
- Tích hợp việc thực thi các kịch bản test trong vòng đời phát triển phần mềm
- Thực hiện test khả năng tương thích của chương trình từ nhà cung cấp
- Triển khai test, phát hiện vấn đề, đưa ra đề xuất và xác định mức độ tuân thủ các yêu cầu đã lập
- Đề xuất cải tiến hoặc sửa chữa cho các bên liên quan dựa trên yêu cầu nghiệp vụ, thiết kế ứng dụng và các thành phần
- Thiết kế và phát triển các kịch bản test chất lượng cao theo thông lệ tốt nhất, làm việc cùng với đội ngũ kiến trúc sư và các thành viên khác trong nhóm
- Tham gia vào quá trình cải tiến liên tục các quy trình phát triển phần mềm agile
- Điều tra, đánh giá và áp dụng các phương pháp test mới trong quá trình triển khai
- Phối hợp với squad để đưa ra ước tính và kế hoạch làm việc chi tiết để đảm bảo triển khai đúng hạn
- Liên tục thúc đẩy cải thiện hiệu suất, sử dụng dễ dàng hơn, độ tin cậy và khả năng phục vụ của phần mềm đã triển khai

3. Các quan hệ chủ đạo

- Đội lập trình viên và PO
- Tech lead
requirements:
1. Kinh nghiệm

- Tối thiểu 5 năm kinh nghiệm về tạo hoặc lập trình test
- Thiết kế, tạo và triển khai các kịch bản tự động hóa bằng Selenium, Apium, Cucumber hoặc các công cụ test tương đương khác
- Tạo, duy trì các kế hoạch test, corner case, script kịch bản và tiêu chí nghiệm thu tuân thủ theo các tiêu chuẩn và phương pháp QA/QC đã lập
- Thiết lập và định cấu hình môi trường test để chạy các trường hợp test
- Kinh nghiệm từng làm lập trình viên của một đội Scrum hoặc Kanban liên chức năng là một điểm cộng
- Chủ động theo dõi, lên lịch và thực hiện các bài test thủ công hoặc tự động (nếu cần) trong lịch trình sprint. Hỗ trợ các lập trình viên bàn giao đúng hạn bằng cách viết test trong suốt quá trình xây dựng

2. Trình độ chuyên môn & kỹ năng kỹ thuật

- Tốt nghiệp Đại học chuyên ngành Công nghệ thông tin, khoa học máy tính hoặc tương đương
- Khả năng làm việc với DevOps để tích hợp các phương pháp test vào đường ống CI/CD bằng cách tích hợp test trong quá trình phát triển, triển khai và bảo trì vòng đời của sản phẩm phần mềm
- Có kiến thức về các mẫu phát triển test tự động (ví dụ: Đối tượng trang)
- Kiến thức về các phương pháp phát triển agile

3. Kỹ năng mềm

- Kỹ năng giải quyết vấn đề dựa trên phân tích, hiệu quả, lập kế hoạch, định hướng kết quả
- Khả năng giao tiếp bằng lời nói, quản lý các mối quan hệ tương tác giữa các cá nhân và làm việc với các nhóm liên chức năng
- Kiến thức về các phương pháp và quy trình test có cấu trúc
- Khả năng quản lý các ưu tiên
- Có động lực cao, tinh thần đồng đội tốt, có khả năng làm việc độc lập, tự học
- Đam mê khám phá các khía cạnh cần cải tiến hoặc lỗ hổng trong công nghệ tiên tiến

4. Ngôn ngữ

- Khả năng sử dụng tiếng Anh chuyên ngành để đọc hiểu tài liệu, cảnh báo bảo mật, tiêu chuẩn quốc tế.

title: Giám Đốc Phát Triển Ứng Dụng (Java, Spring boot, AWS)
reasons:

- Training
- Recorgnition
jobDescription:
1. Tóm tắt vai trò

- Chịu trách nhiệm tổ chức, quản lý và vận hành toàn bộ hoạt động phát triển ứng dụng trong phạm vi phụ trách.
- Đảm bảo chất lượng sản phẩm phần mềm, tính ổn định – bảo mật của hệ thống, đồng thời phát triển năng lực đội ngũ nhân sự.
- Gắn kết hoạt động phát triển ứng dụng với định hướng chiến lược chuyển đổi số, sản phẩm kinh doanh và trải nghiệm khách hàng cho người dùng

2. Trách nhiệm chínhQuản lý chiến lược & kế hoạch

- Xây dựng kế hoạch phát triển ứng dụng ngắn hạn – dài hạn phù hợp với chiến lược CNTT và nhu cầu kinh doanh.
- Đề xuất công nghệ, kiến trúc giải pháp, lộ trình phát triển sản phẩm (roadmap).
- Quản lý ngân sách phát triển ứng dụng: chi phí nhân sự, hạ tầng, bản quyền phần mềm.

Đội ngũ & nhân sự

- Trực tiếp hỗ trợ chuyên viên phát triển ứng dụng (Front-end, Back-end, Full-stack).
- Đào tạo, huấn luyện đội ngũ về công nghệ mới, phương pháp lập trình, chuẩn coding & security.

Quản lý vận hành & dự án

- Điều phối và giám sát quy trình phát triển phần mềm: từ phân tích yêu cầu – thiết kế – coding – test – triển khai – vận hành.
- Đảm bảo các sản phẩm/dịch vụ CNTT được phát triển đáp ứng SLA, KPI chất lượng, hiệu suất và bảo mật.
- Phối hợp chặt chẽ với PMO, BA, QA, UI/UX và các khối kinh doanh để đảm bảo ứng dụng đáp ứng nhu cầu thực tế.
- Xử lý các sự cố (incident) liên quan đến ứng dụng, đưa ra giải pháp khắc phục nhanh chóng.

Quản lý công nghệ & quy trình

- Thiết lập và chuẩn hóa quy trình phát triển phần mềm (Agile, DevOps, CI/CD).
- Áp dụng các best practices về code review, automated testing, security by design.
- Định kỳ đánh giá, lựa chọn framework, ngôn ngữ, toolchains phù hợp để nâng cao năng suất.
- Đảm bảo tuân thủ các quy định nội bộ và chuẩn mực quốc tế (ISO, PCI DSS, GDPR, … nếu có liên quan).
requirements:

- Tối thiểu 5 năm kinh nghiệm trong lĩnh vực phát triển phần mềm, trong đó ít nhất 3 năm ở vị trí quản lý.
- Có kinh nghiệm xây dựng, quản lý đội ngũ Dev (front-end, back-end, full-stack) từ 10–30 người trở lên.

title: UX Researcher (6 months contract)
company: Bosch Global Software Technologies Company Limited
reasons:
- Committed 13th-mth bonus + attractive yearly bonus
- Premium Healthcare for you and 2 family members
- 16++ days of paid leave per year
jobDescription: We are looking for a UX Researcher who excels at investigating user and customer behaviors and attitudes by leveraging both qualitative and quantitative data. This role builds a deep understanding of human behaviors, needs, and motivations to inform and create meaningful, delightful user and customer experiences.
requirements:
Experience & Background

- 3+ years of hands-on experience in user-centered development of products or services, gained in a design agency, research institute, or in-house UX team
- Practical experience translating user insights into product inputs, such as requirements, user stories, use cases, or opportunity areas for designers and developers
- Diploma or Bachelor’s/Master’s degree in psychology, sociology, cultural anthropology, or a related field

Research Expertise

- Strong understanding of user research methods and tools, covering both qualitative and quantitative approaches
- Proficient in qualitative data analysis, with the ability to synthesize insights into clear, consumable formats for stakeholders
- Experience conducting research workshops, user interviews, usability testing, and exploratory research
- Ability to select appropriate research methods and techniques based on problem context, constraints, and goals

Analytical & Critical Thinking

- Strong analytical and conceptual skills, including the ability to identify patterns, frame insights, and suggest solution directions
- Strong critical thinking mindset, able to question assumptions and assess what does or does not make sense
- Ability to prioritize insights objectively, avoiding bias and separating evidence from assumptions

User Empathy & Research Ownership

- Strong observation and listening skills, including the ability to interpret unspoken user needs and emotions
- Able to independently drive research activities, including planning, execution, synthesis, and stakeholder communication
- Quick learner with the ability to deep-dive into unfamiliar domains, supported by secondary research and self-immersion

Tools & Learning Mindset

- Experience using digital tools for remote research and workshops (Miro, MS Team)
- Comfortable collaborating with designers, developers, and product stakeholders
- Hands-on experience or practical exposure to AI tools, with basic awareness of data ethics
- Willingness to learn new tools, software, and design approaches

Collaboration & Communication

- High proficiency in English (spoken and written).
- Stakeholder & Team Alignment: Effectively collaborate with product management, engineering, and design teams. Skillfully manage stakeholder expectations and partner with UX Leader to align on research strategy and drive activities.

Nice to Have:

- Basic understanding of SAP technology, processes, and flow charts, or experience working with SAP developers
- Influential Storytelling: Translate complex research findings into compelling narratives that inspire action. Clearly articulate research rationale and insights to diverse audiences to build consensus and drive user-centric decisions.d
benefits:
Why BOSCH?

Because we do not just follow trends, we create them. Together we turn ideas into reality, working every day to make the world of tomorrow a better place. Do you have high standards when it comes to your job? So do we. At Bosch, you will discover more than just work.

Benefits and Career Opportunities:

- Working in one of the Best Places to Work in Vietnam and Top 30 of the Most Innovative Companies all over the world
- English-speaking environment, with opportunity to be part of innovation team and work in global projects
- Onsite opportunities
- Engage in our diverse training programs which surely help strengthen both your personal and professionalism
- Flexible working time
- 13th-month salary bonus + attractive performance bonus (you'll love it!) + annual performance appraisal
- 100% offered salary and mandatory social insurances in 2-month probation
- 15++ days of annual leave + 1-day of birthday leave
- Premium health insurance for employee and 02 family members
- Lunch and parking allowance
- Good benefits of company activities such as: football, badminton, yoga, Aerobic, team building…

title: Senior Flutter Engineer (BNPL & AI Automation - Dart)
jobDescription:
We are finalizing the migration of our legacy native apps (Java/Swift) to a modernized Flutter ecosystem. We need a Product Builder to own this new codebase and help pioneer our Figma-to-Flutter AI automation pipeline.

Key Responsibilities:

- Mobile App Development & Architecture: Lead the development of our Flutter applications. Define robust and scalable app architectures (e.g., MVVM, Clean Architecture).
- API & User Flow Collaboration: Work closely with backend engineers and designers to define APIs, user workflows, and system integration from the ground up.
- Release Management: Manage the end-to-end mobile app release process, including App Store and Google Play submissions.
- Security & Performance: Take full ownership of app performance (optimizing rendering and memory) and security protocols, specifically for payment and checkout modules, ensuring compliance with modern mobile security standards.
- Collaborate on AI Workflow: Work closely with an international, cross-functional team in English to gradually integrate and improve our Figma-to-Flutter AI automation pipeline.

Preferred Personal Characteristics (Core Values): We are looking for a true "Product Builder" who thrives in a startup environment. You will be a great fit if you possess:

- True Ownership: You own outcomes, not just tasks. If a project is failing, you step in and fix the gap, even if the root cause is technically outside your job description.
- Zero Ego & "Join All Hands": You prioritize the "right answer" for the business over winning arguments. You are willing to drop your own priorities to do unglamorous "grunt work" (like manual QA or data entry) if that is what the business needs to survive.
- First-Principles Thinking: You remove bias and think deeply. You don't just accept the status quo or "industry standards"; you dig into the raw data, test assumptions, and make decisions based on facts.
- Demand High Standards & Force Multiplier: You have the courage to constructively reject subpar work to maintain excellence. You actively look for ways to unblock teammates, share knowledge, and maximize the ability of those around you.
- Kaizen: You embrace continuous improvement, always questioning how workflows and systems can be optimized.
- Empowerment: Cultivate a high-performing and collaborative team environment by actively focusing on the career development, skill enhancement, and overall professional growth of your direct reports and all team members. This involves providing constructive feedback, identifying tailored training opportunities, mentoring individuals to reach their full potential, and delegating challenging, growth-oriented tasks. The goal is to build a resilient, technically proficient, and motivated team capable of tackling complex, next-generation challenges and contributing significantly to the company's long-term success.
- Integrity: Act with honesty and fairness. We operate fundamentally with honesty and fairness in all internal and external interactions. This requires complete transparency, integrity, and ethical conduct in our business, decisions, and relationships with all stakeholders.
requirements:
Must-Have Skills:

- 3-5+ years of hands-on experience in mobile application development, with strong core expertise in Flutter/Dart.
- State Management: Expertise in architecting Flutter apps using Provider, Riverpod, BLoC, or equivalent frameworks for complex, high-state environments.
- Quality-First Mentality: Experience implementing Unit, Widget, and Integration tests alongside performance profiling to ensure a seamless user experience. Experience in writing clean, testable code and implementing quality assurance measures (Unit/E2E testing) before release.
- Store Release Experience: Proven experience in managing app release processes for both Apple App Store and Google Play.
- Workflow / API Design Aptitude: Strong ability and willingness to communicate closely with designers and backend teams to shape and define APIs and user workflows, rather than just waiting for fixed specifications.
- Architectural Thinking: Ability to evaluate and select technologies/architectures by weighing pros and cons, considering security, operations, and AI-driven development.
- Business-level English proficiency for international communication and cross-border collaboration.

Nice-to-Have:

- Zero-to-One / Setup Experience: Proven track record of setting up new project repositories and building mobile CI/CD pipelines from scratch.
- Knowledge of OWASP Mobile security principles and experience with encrypted local databases (e.g., Hive with encryption or SQFlite with SQLCipher).
- Experience with Flutter's FFI (Foreign Function Interface) or writing custom Platform Channels for deep integration with native iOS/Android APIs.
- External Collaboration: Act as the development team's representative in external stakeholder negotiations and discussions. Coordinate and communicate with partners and vendors regarding product and system integration.

- Backend development experience is a strong plus.

benefits:

The position

Are you a tech-savvy graduate or a junior professional eager to kickstart your career in cloud-based IT operations? We are looking for a motivated Junior End-user Computing (EUC) Engineer to join our Ho Chi Minh City office.

In this role, you will work alongside our global Corporate IT Teams to support our internal users and maintain a high-quality digital workspace. This is a perfect "launchpad" role where you will receive mentorship while gaining hands-on experience with modern tools like Intune, Jamf, and Google Workspace.

What you’ll be doing

You will play a vital role in helping our clients offices run smoothly. You’ll be working closely with the Corporate IT Teams to learn the ropes.

- Hardware Support: Assist with the equipment lifecycle: helping unbox, set up, and hand out laptops and office gear to your colleagues.
- OS & Software Basics: Help install and configure Windows and Mac laptops. You’ll learn how to troubleshoot operating systems (Windows/Mac) and core employee software (MS Office, Google Workspace).
- MDM Introduction: Assist the team in using Intune and Jamf to keep our computers updated. Apply basic settings and install apps remotely.
- Access Basics: Help create and manage user accounts (passwords, logins, and permissions) for platforms like Google Workspace and Jira.
- Office Tech Help: Be the "on-site" helper for our office network (LAN, WLAN, internet access, Wi-Fi), printers, and meeting room TVs.
- Security Awareness: Help the team ensure everyone has their antivirus running and their software updated, ensure awareness of crucial data backup principles.
- User Support: Help answer tech questions and "how-to" requests from your colleagues to keep the office happy.
requirements:
Requirements

- Level: Junior or Fresh Graduate (0-2 years of experience).
- Education: A Bachelor’s degree in IT or a related field (or equivalent passion for tech).
- Communication: Comfortable speaking and writing in English.
- Basics: A solid understanding of how computers and networks work.
- Familiarity: You’ve used Windows, Mac, and Google tools (Gmail/Drive) before.
- Passion: You genuinely enjoy building, fixing, and playing with tech gadgets and software.
- Mindset: You are curious, ask questions, and are always looking for better ways to work.

Nice To Have

- Any experience with virtual machines, basic coding and Google Workspace tools.

Soft skills

- Collaboration: Excellent communication skills, especially when explaining technical issues to non-IT colleagues.
- Trust: Be knowledgeable, trustworthy, and a reliable point of contact.
- Ownership: High degree of responsibility and autonomy.
- Problem-Solver: Strong analytical and problem-solving capabilities with an ability to effectively prioritize tasks.
- Service-Oriented: A high interest in helping others succeed.
benefits:

- Career Trajectory: A real chance to advance your IT skills and potentially grow towards roles like System Engineer or DevOps Engineer.
- Global Team: Join a passionate, international, and multicultural team committed to IT excellence.
- Flexible Work: Enjoy a flexible work environment that values results over rigid schedules. Off on Saturday and Sunday. Annual holidays leave will be following Vietnam law and as company regulations.

title: Senior Data Engineer (Streaming & Data Platform)
reasons:
- Competitive salary and benefits
- Comprehensive insurance coverage and allowances
- Generous leave: public + annual + 3 special days
jobDescription:
About BeWao

BeWao builds WAO, an AI-powered nutrition and wellness platform for the Vietnamese market. WAO helps users log meals, understand their nutrition, and build healthier habits — guided by a mobile-first product and an AI Assistant that learns from each user's behavior.

We are now building the data foundation that makes personalization, behavioral analytics, and real-time assistant experiences possible at scale.

What You Will Own

- Lakehouse and IngestionBuild and operate a Bronze/Silver/Gold lakehouse using Apache Iceberg on GCS with Nessie (or an equivalent catalog).Build Spark batch jobs on Dataproc Serverless for daily aggregations, behavioral features, and analytics marts.Build near-real-time pipelines (target 30s–5min freshness) using Spark Structured Streaming or Flink.Operate Debezium CDC from PostgreSQL into Kafka or Google Pub/Sub with reliable replay and recovery.
- Build and operate a Bronze/Silver/Gold lakehouse using Apache Iceberg on GCS with Nessie (or an equivalent catalog).
- Build Spark batch jobs on Dataproc Serverless for daily aggregations, behavioral features, and analytics marts.
- Build near-real-time pipelines (target 30s–5min freshness) using Spark Structured Streaming or Flink.
- Operate Debezium CDC from PostgreSQL into Kafka or Google Pub/Sub with reliable replay and recovery.
- Feature Platform for the AI AssistantStand up a feature store (Feast or equivalent) with Iceberg as offline store and Redis as online store.Build point-in-time correct joins and backfills that prevent label leakage.Serve online features with p95 < 5ms for the AI Assistant and notification decisioning.Enforce data quality with Great Expectations (or equivalent) across all layers.
- Stand up a feature store (Feast or equivalent) with Iceberg as offline store and Redis as online store.
- Build point-in-time correct joins and backfills that prevent label leakage.
- Serve online features with p95 < 5ms for the AI Assistant and notification decisioning.
- Enforce data quality with Great Expectations (or equivalent) across all layers.
- Notification, Analytics, and ExperimentationBuild pipelines that feed the notification scheduler— including 7/30/90-day behavioral windows for rule-based coaching.Evolve analytical workloads off PostgreSQL replicas onto a proper OLAP engine (ClickHouse, Trino, or similar) when scale demands it.Provide clean, query-ready datasets for product analytics, A/B tests, and BI (Superset or similar).
- Build pipelines that feed the notification scheduler— including 7/30/90-day behavioral windows for rule-based coaching.
- Evolve analytical workloads off PostgreSQL replicas onto a proper OLAP engine (ClickHouse, Trino, or similar) when scale demands it.
- Provide clean, query-ready datasets for product analytics, A/B tests, and BI (Superset or similar).
- AI Assistant Context and RetrievalAggregate nutrition logs, fitness, sleep, and health-device signals into assistant-ready feature tables.Build embedding and vector pipelines (pgvector or equivalent) for retrieval-augmented generation.Own end-to-end pipeline observability: freshness, latency, quality scores, and SLA alerts.
- Aggregate nutrition logs, fitness, sleep, and health-device signals into assistant-ready feature tables.
- Build embedding and vector pipelines (pgvector or equivalent) for retrieval-augmented generation.
- Own end-to-end pipeline observability: freshness, latency, quality scores, and SLA alerts.
- Infrastructure, Reliability, CostRun the platform on GCP (Dataproc, GCS, Cloud Composer, Cloud Run, Cloud Functions, Memorystore).Write the runbooks— failure recovery, backfills, incident response, graceful degradation. Help shape the on-call model for data pipelines.Own the data infrastructure budget as we grow from early users toward 300K+ DAU.
- Run the platform on GCP (Dataproc, GCS, Cloud Composer, Cloud Run, Cloud Functions, Memorystore).
- Write the runbooks— failure recovery, backfills, incident response, graceful degradation. Help shape the on-call model for data pipelines.
- Own the data infrastructure budget as we grow from early users toward 300K+ DAU.
requirements:
Who We Are Looking For

Mindset

- Ownership. You treat the data platform as your product— reliability, freshness, and cost are yours, not "the infra team's."
- Pragmatism. You pick the simplest tool that fits the current stage. You know when a SQL query beats a Spark job and when a Postgres replica is still the right answer.
- Production-first thinking. You design for the 3 AM failure, not the demo. Monitoring, alerting, and recovery are part of v1, not v2.
- Spec-driven execution. At BeWao we write a short spec — scope, data contract, success criteria, verification plan — before writing code. If that sounds like bureaucracy to you, this will not be a good fit.
- Clear communication. You can explain architectural trade-offs to a backend engineer, a product manager, and an ML engineer in the same meeting.
- Working English. Our technical docs and specs are written in English; daily conversation is Vietnamese + English.

Experience

- 5+ years in data engineering or backend engineering.
- 2+ years building and operating data pipelines in production (not just notebooks or one-off jobs).
- Comfortable picking up whichever language the job needs. We care about the outcome, not the logo on the tooling.
- Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field — or equivalent demonstrated experience.

Must have (we expect strong hands-on experience in most of these)

- Apache Spark — Spark SQL and DataFrame API, batch at minimum. Use whichever Spark language binding you are strongest in.
- Apache Flinkstreaming — production experience with stateful stream processing (SQL or DataStream API).
- PostgreSQL— query optimization, replication, and CDC-friendly schema design.
- Kafka or Google Pub/Sub— topic and event design, consumer operations.
- Advanced SQL — window functions, CTEs, non-trivial aggregations.
- Lakehouse fundamentals — Bronze/Silver/Gold, modern table formats. Iceberg experience strongly preferred; Delta Lake acceptable if your table-format fundamentals are solid.
- CDC pipelines — Debezium or equivalent.
- Workflow orchestration — Airflow or Cloud Composer.
- Cloud data platform experience — GCP preferred; AWS or Azure acceptable if you are ready to move to GCP fast.
- Docker, CI/CD (GitLab CI or GitHub Actions).

You can learn on the job

We do not expect one person to have all of this walking in. If you have the must-haves and the mindset, we will support you in picking up:

- Nessie or equivalent lakehouse catalog operations.
- Feast (or building an equivalent feature store).
- Great Expectations (or similar DQ frameworks) at scale.
- pgvector and embedding pipelines for RAG.

title: Data/AI Governance Expert
reasons:
- Môi trường đẩy nhanh phát triển năng lực
- Nơi quy tụ nhân tài người Việt trên toàn cầu

jobDescription:
The AI and Data Governance Lead is responsible for building, operationalizing, and coordinating the enterprise AI and data governance program. This role establishes the governance infrastructure, operational processes, and steward network that enable the organization to manage AI initiatives and data assets responsibly, ethically, and in alignment with business objectives. You will play a crucial, hands-on role in moving our organization from siloed operations to a trusted, interoperable data fabric, ensuring we share data safely while strictly adhering to Vietnam’s evolving regulatory landscape. The role also acts as the lead coordinator between the Data Governance team and various Risk and Compliance, Systems and related technical functions.

Core Responsibilities

- Support the daily execution of our Federated Governance model, ensuring that while our entities maintain operational autonomy, they adhere to non-negotiable ecosystem standards.
- Participate in cross-functional working groups to troubleshoot data challenges and negotiate effectively with stakeholders to align data formats or processes for the greater good of the ecosystem.
- Implement standardized definitions and maintain metadata management across our enterprise systems.
- Utilize and support the implementation of tools for data cataloging, lineage, and daily governance operations.
- Monitor and ensure enterprise data quality, integrity, and accessibility through established standards and performance metrics.
- Work closely with Data & Analytics, IT, and Technology Product teams to ensure day-to- day data practices support compliance with privacy and security regulations, specifically Vietnam's consumer data protection laws.
- Design and maintain the enterprise data governance framework including policies, standards, roles and decision rights
- Lead development and enforcement of global policies for data quality, metadata, lineage, classification, retention, access, and usage.
- Drive adoption of data and AI controls across business units and platforms, ensuring consistency and auditability.
- Integrate data and AI governance by harmonizing policy and governance practices across functions and enterprises.
- Operationalize AI project intake, risk and value assessment matrices, and sign-off workflows for AI initiatives
- Coordinate AI project reviews with business sponsors, compliance, legal, and technical stakeholders
- Monitor model drift, performance degradation, and fairness metrics; coordinate remediation with AI owners
requirements:
- Bachelor degree in Information Management, Data Science, Computer Science, Business Administration, or related field
- 3+ years of experience in data governance, AI governance, data management, or related program coordination role
- Demonstrated experience building and coordinating cross-functional steward networks or communities of practice
- Strong understanding of data governance frameworks, metadata management principles, and data quality practices
- Solid familiarity with banking regulations, compliance, and privacy requirements, coupled with a deep understanding of Vietnam’s data privacy laws (PDP) and how they apply to data sharing
- Familiarity with AI/ML lifecycle including model development, deployment, monitoring, and risk management
- Knowledge of data protection regulations, AI ethics principles, and responsible AI practices
- Proven experience working with data governance frameworks and utilizing modern data governance tools (data catalogs, data quality tools, etc.).
- Exceptional negotiation and "Data Diplomacy" skills to successfully bridge gaps and build consensus between diverse business units. Excellent communication and collaboration skills.
- Education: Bachelor’s degree in a related field, or equivalent practical work experience.
benefits:
Salary & Allowances

- 13-month salary with annual performance bonus, project incentives, sales incentives (based on position)
- Lunch allowance: 730.000 VND/month
- Special occasion bonus: 3.000.000 - 5.000.000 VND/year
- Annual leaves: Up to 20 days/year (based on levels)
- Health: Social insurance, premium health insurance, yearly health check
- Laptop, screen and other needed facilities/ accounts/ tools for work

Career Growth

- Yearly salary review and promotion
- Diverse career path: Management or Expert and functions rotation opportunity
- Free learning sources in Udemy, Coursera, O'relly platforms; internal workshop, certification sponsorship, and exclusive mentoring from C-levels
- Recognition and awards at team and organizational levels.

Working Environment

- Open & collaborative working space foster both individual focus and teamwork activities
- Young, dynamic, and collaborative working atmosphere
- Unwind zones: gaming, table tennis, yoga, gyms, bath rooms, sleep corner.
- Quarterly/yearly teambuilding & engaged internal events.

title: Technical Lead (React Native & Backend)
reasons:
- Competitive salary and benefits
- Comprehensive insurance coverage and allowances
- Generous leave: public + annual + 3 special days
jobDescription:
About BeWao

BeWao is the company behind WAO, an AI-powered nutrition and wellness platform built for the Vietnamese market. WAO helps users track meals, understand nutrition, and build healthier habits through a mobile-first product experience powered by modern backend services and AI-assisted workflows.

We are at a stage where strong engineering decisions still have immediate product impact. We are looking for a Technical Lead who can raise the quality bar while staying close to delivery, product reality, and production outcomes.

About the Role

This is a hands-on technical leadership role focused primarily on React Native mobile development and backend service development. It is not a pure management role. We expect the person in this role to stay close to the code, own technical direction for critical product areas, and help the team deliver reliably in production.

At WAO, we use AI-assisted development with a spec-driven workflow. Strong technical leadership here means defining clear problem statements, shaping implementation plans up front, and guiding the team to deliver in small, verifiable increments instead of relying on ad hoc coding.

Because we are a startup, this role requires a strong production mindset. You should be comfortable making sound trade-offs between speed, quality, and cost, taking end-to-end responsibility from specification through release and operation, and keeping the team focused on business value without compromising reliability.

What You’ll Do

- Lead technical direction for WAO's React Native mobile app and backend services.
- Stay very hands-on and personally contribute to critical implementation, debugging, and production issues across mobile and backend.
- Own features end-to-end from problem framing and specification to design, implementation, release, monitoring, and production follow-up.
- Drive spec-driven delivery by turning product ideas into clear specifications, technical plans, task breakdowns, and measurable acceptance criteria.
- Make pragmatic technical decisions that balance product speed, engineering quality, scalability, maintainability, and operational cost.
- Improve engineering workflows, testing strategy, observability, and release confidence.
- Review code and system design, mentor engineers, and raise technical standards through clear feedback and day-to-day guidance.
- Partner closely with Product and Design to clarify requirements, reduce ambiguity, and surface delivery risks early.
- Own technical decision-making in your area and communicate trade-offs clearly to cross-functional stakeholders.
- Help the team use AI coding assistants effectively within a disciplined workflow that prioritizes clarity, maintainability, and verification.
requirements:
Technologies We Use

- Primary Product Stack: React Native, TypeScript, NestJS, GraphQL, PostgreSQL
- PlatformServices: Firebase, Typesense, Kafka, Clickhouse
- Supporting Systems: FastAPI, Strapi, React, Next.js
- Architecture & Infrastructure: Microservices, GCP, Serverless, Redis, Cloudflare Workers

Required Skills & Experience

We're looking for a technically strong, product-minded leader who thrives in a fast-moving startup environment. You should be:

- Experienced: 7+ years of professional software engineering experience, including meaningful ownership of production systems.
- Leadership-Oriented: 2+ years leading engineers, mentoring teammates, or driving technical direction for a team or product area.
- Deeply Hands-On: Strong hands-on ability in both React Native mobile development and backend service development.
- Architecturally Strong: Able to design scalable systems, evaluate trade-offs clearly, and guide implementation from high-level design to execution details.
- Spec-Driven: Strong at writing and reviewing specifications, implementation plans, task breakdowns, and success criteria before coding starts.
- Production-Minded: Thinks beyond shipping features and takes responsibility for reliability, maintainability, observability, and operational outcomes in production.
- Startup-Oriented: Comfortable operating with ambiguity, moving quickly, making practical trade-offs, and adapting as product priorities evolve.
- AI-Native: Comfortable using AI coding assistants in a disciplined workflow. Experience with AI-assisted engineering guided by strong specs and review standards is a strong advantage.
- Relevant Technically: Comfortable with GraphQL APIs, PostgreSQL data modeling, Firebase-based auth flows, and event-driven systems. Experience with Google Pub/Sub or Kafka is valuable.
- Product-Minded: Focused on solving user and business problems, not only writing code.
- Accountable: High ownership mindset with a willingness to surface risks early, make decisions, and stand behind outcomes.
- Communicative: Clear in technical and non-technical communication, with the abilityto align stakeholders and resolve ambiguity.
benefits:
What Success Looks Like in the First 90 Days

- Build a solid understanding of WAO's mobile app, backend services, delivery workflow, and major production risks.
- Earn trust with Product, Design, and engineers while taking ownership of a high-priority mobile and backend initiative.
- Improve at least one key area of execution: specification quality, delivery predictability, code quality, or production reliability.

Why Join Us?

- Opportunity to shape the core product and engineering culture of WAO at a stage where execution still compounds quickly.
- High ownership and visible impact on product direction, technical quality, and delivery standards.
- A startup environment that values product judgment, technical depth, and production accountability.
- Competitive salary and benefits.
- Generous leave policy: Public holidays12 days annual leave3 additional Company Holidays (Christmas, Vietnamese Family Day, Birthday leave)
- Public holidays
- 12 days annual leave
- 3 additional Company Holidays (Christmas, Vietnamese Family Day, Birthday leave)
- Comprehensive insurance coverage and allowances (parking).
- Performance-based annual 13th-month salary(may apply).

Apply Now

Join BeWao and help lead the team building WAO. If you want a role where technical leadership means staying close to the code, owning delivery, and improving how a startup ships in production, we'd like to hear from you.

title: AI Engineer (AI, Data Science)
company: CÔNG TY CỔ PHẦN CHỨNG KHOÁN KAFI
reasons:

- Go build it on top of the state-of-the-art tech

jobDescription:
Job Overview

We are an emerging securities firm in Vietnam, growing rapidly with a strong focus on technology, professional trading, and innovation. Our mission is to deliver data-driven and intelligent investment solutions that empower retail, professional, and institutional clients.

We are looking for an AI Engineer (Applied AI) to join our technology team and drive the adoption of AI across software development, data & analytics, and operational workflows.

In this role, you will focus on building and experimenting with AI-driven solutions, rapidly developing proof-of-concepts (POCs), and turning them into practical, production-ready tools and automations. You will work closely with engineering, product, data, and business teams to identify opportunities where AI can create real impact.

This role reports to the Project Manager / Head of Business Technology and is well-suited for candidates with a strong logical mindset, an interest in data, models, and technology, and a desire to grow in AI-driven investment products.

Key Responsibilities

- Explore and identify opportunities to apply AI across software development, data & analytics, and operational processes.
- Build and iterate on AI-driven POCs, including use cases such as: AI assistants and copilots, Intelligent document processing and summarization, Investment Q&A and recommendation tools, Workflow automation and decision-support systems
- Develop and deploy AI-powered automation workflows that improve productivity across internal teams and customer-facing products.
- Work with LLM APIs and AI frameworks (e.g., OpenAI, Claude, LangChain, vector databases) to build features such as: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG); Semantic search and embeddings; Chatbots and AI assistants.
- Collaborate with backend engineers, data engineers, and product teams to integrate AI solutions into existing systems and platforms.
- Design and maintain lightweight ML/AI pipelines for data processing, model integration, evaluation, and deployment.
- Take ownership of end-to-end delivery, from idea to POC, production, monitoring and improvement.
- Work with external vendors or partners to evaluate, integrate, and operate third-party AI solutions, including taking over systems for internal use and enhancement.
- Monitor performance of AI solutions, continuously improving quality, reliability, and user experience.
- Stay up to date with the latest developments in AI, LLMs, and applied AI use cases, and bring relevant ideas into the organization.
- Experience working with data processing and feature engineering, including preparing datasets, transforming raw data into meaningful features, and supporting model development and evaluation.
requirements:
Must-Have:

- Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, AI, Data Science, or a related field.
- 2–5+ years of experience in applied AI, ML engineering, or building AI-powered applications.
- Strong understanding of prompt engineering techniques, including prompt design, chaining, context management, and evaluation for building reliable LLM-based applications.
- Strong hands-on experience with Python (or similar), and familiarity with modern AI/ML ecosystems.
- Experience working with LLMs and AI tools, such as: OpenAI / Claude / similar APIs; LangChain or equivalent frameworks; Vector databases / embeddings.
- Strong problem-solving and logical thinking, with the ability to quickly turn ideas into working prototypes.
- Experience building end-to-end solutions (not just models), including integration into real systems.
- Comfortable working in a fast-paced, experimental environment with evolving requirements.
- Strong ownership mindset and ability to drive initiatives independently.

Nice-to-Have:

- Experience applying AI in financial services, trading, or investment-related use cases.
- Experience working with or delivering solutions for fintech partners or external clients.
- Experience in taking over, operating, and improving AI systems from external vendors.
- Familiarity with data pipelines, analytics systems, or BI tools.
- Experience with cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, Azure).
benefits:
Why You'll Love Working Here

- Go to build a great digital product with ambitions and tough challenges.
- Go to build it on top of the state-of-the-art technologies stack.
- Go together with top-of-mind people and team.

requirements: Tối nghiệp cao đẳng CNTT
benefits:
Với phương châm coi nguồn nhân lực là yếu tố quyết định sự thành công của Công ty, MBAMC luôn chú trọng đến việc phát triển năng lực, chăm lo cho đời sống vật chất, tinh thần của CBNV. Chúng tôi hướng đến chính sách đãi ngộ cạnh tranh: “Nhân sự tốt nhất, trả lương cao nhất”, tạo mọi điều kiện thuận lợi để CBNV yên tâm công tác, cống hiến. Bên cạnh đó, MBAMC cam kết đảm bảo các chế độ của người lao động theo quy định của pháp luật, tuân thủ các chính sách của nhà nước.

Cùng với lộ trình thăng tiến và định hướng công việc rõ ràng, MBAMC cũng thường xuyên triển khai các chương trình đào tạo nhằm nâng cao kiến thức chuyên môn, kỹ năng làm việc. Nằm trong định hướng phát triển bền vững, lâu dài, liên tục tạo ra nguồn sinh khí mới cho mọi lĩnh vực hoạt động, MBAMC không ngừng tìm kiếm và thu hút nhân tài có mong muốn gắn bó với Công ty.

Các đãi ngộ tại MBAMC:

- Lương Chức danh;- Lương hiệu quả công việc;- Lương tháng 13;- Phụ cấp;- Chế độ xem xét tăng lương gắn liền với hiệu quả công việc.- Thưởng nhân các ngày lễ tết và các sự kiện MBAMC;- Thưởng thành tích định kỳ và đột xuất cho cá nhân hoặc tập thể;- Thưởng sáng kiến cải tiến kỹ thuật, nâng cao hiệu quả hoạt động kinh doanh.- Bảo hiểm Xã hội, Y tế, Thất nghiệp theo quy định của nhà nước;- Gói bảo hiểm sức khoẻ của MIC dành riêng cho CBNV Công ty;- Bảo hiểm tai nạn lao động.- Trợ cấp nhân các sự kiện đặc biệt của CBNV;- Trợ cấp trang phục;- Chương trình du lịch trong và ngoài nước hàng năm;- Khám sức khỏe định kỳ;- Các hoạt động văn hóa, văn nghệ, thể thao dành cho CBNV;- Các chương trình chăm lo đời sống và gia đình CBNV: ngày hội gia đình, hỗ trợ đào tạo, khen thưởng con CBNV có thành tích học tập tốt; Thăm hỏi tứ thân phụ mẫu, ốm đau, hiếu hỷ ....- Làm việc từ thứ 2 và thứ 6, 08h00 đến 17h30 (nghỉ trưa 90 phút, Có nhà ăn phục vụ CBNV);- Thời gian nghỉ chế độ và nghỉ lễ theo quy định Công ty và quy định Pháp luật.

title: [JOB-42] Agentic AI Engineer (Fresher)
reasons:
- GenZ "xâm chiếm" công ty chúng tôi 🌞
- Nói không với lương "up to", 💲cũng "kha khá"
- Tài trợ phí thi chứng chỉ, đậu➡️ thưởng hàng tháng
jobDescription:
Founded in 2021, AgileOps has quickly become the official partner of major technology companies like Atlassian, Google, Salesforce and HubSpot in Vietnam. AgileOps distributes products and offers consulting, training, implementation, and IT infrastructure management services for world-renowned software companies, including:

- Atlassian: Project management software suite, team collaboration tools, IT service management, and knowledge sharing, including Jira, Confluence, and Jira Service Management.
- Salesforce: Salesforce is the world’s leading CRM platform, offering #1 CRM apps for sales, service, marketing, commerce, and IT teams.
- Google: Office applications, email software, cloud storage services, and online meeting tools.
- HubSpot: Marketing automation and customer relationship management (CRM) software suite.

We are seeking a highly motivated Agentic AI Engineer (Fresher) to join our dynamic team. This is an exciting opportunity for individuals with an AI-first mindset who are eager to learn and grow in the rapidly evolving field of Generative and Agentic AI. You will receive comprehensive training, access to top-tier AI tools and models (Claude Max and Gemini Tier 3), and the chance to work in a fast-paced, innovative environment. If you are passionate about AI, thrive in high-speed settings, and are ready to launch your career in advanced AI engineering, we want you on our team!

💻 What You Will Do

- Embrace and cultivate an AI-first mindset, actively participating in thorough training programs and leveraging cutting-edge AI tools and models, including Claude Max and Gemini Tier 3.
- Apply intermediate knowledge of Large Language Models (LLMs), Generative AI, and Agentic AI to support the development and deployment of intelligent solutions.
- Communicate effectively in English, both in writing and verbally, to collaborate with team members and contribute to project discussions.
- Adapt quickly and perform efficiently in a fast-paced environment, demonstrating a proactive approach to learning and problem-solving.
- Participate in team meetings, brainstorming sessions, and knowledge-sharing activities to foster continuous improvement and innovation.
- Assist in documenting processes, experiments, and findings to support team learning and project transparency.
requirements:
👉 This Is For You If You Have

- A Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Data Science, or a related field.
- Demonstrated interest and foundational understanding of LLMs, Generative AI, and Agentic AI concepts.
- Strong English written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to articulate technical concepts clearly.
- Willingness and ability to learn quickly through structured training and hands-on experience with advanced AI tools (Claude Max, Gemini Tier 3).
- Ability to work effectively in a fast-paced, team-oriented environment, adapting to changing priorities and project needs.
- Basic programming skills in Python or a similar language, with an eagerness to develop further technical expertise.

💪 It’s Even Better If You Have

- Prior experience with AI/ML projects, internships, or relevant coursework in Generative or Agentic AI.
- Familiarity with prompt engineering, model fine-tuning, or deploying AI models in real-world applications.
- Exposure to cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, Azure) or AI development environments.
- Participation in AI competitions, hackathons, or open-source contributions related to LLMs or Generative AI.
- Understanding of ethical considerations and responsible AI practices.
- Interest in staying updated with the latest advancements in AI research and technology trends.
benefits:
💰You Will Be Generously Compensated With:

💵 Competitive salary range – Starting from 10,000,000 to 15,000,000 based on the educational background (your GPA shines here), experiences, and skills.

🏖️ Holidays Bonus – Extra pay for every public holiday

🎂 Birthday Bonus – Extra pay for your special day

🎯 Incentive Bonus – Extra bonus based on your performance

⏰ Overtime Bonus – Get compensated when you work exceed 160 hours monthly

1️⃣3️⃣ Annual Bonus – 13th-month salary (sometimes 14th)

📝 Bi-annual Salary Review

☑️ We’ve Got You Covered For:

🏥 Insurances – Full insurance package according to the law plus extra VBI health-care program

🍚🍗 Free Lunch and Parking 🛵🏍

💻 Devices and Gadgets

🏝  Annual Company Retreat

📚 100% Free Self-learning Resources: A Cloud Guru, learn.cantrill.io, Udemy, Atlassian University, Interaction Design Foundation

jobDescription:
- Design and implement scalable, secure, and maintainable system architectures aligned with business and product requirements.
- Apply modern architecture patterns such as Domain-Driven Design (DDD), Event-Driven Architecture, and Microservices to solve real-world engineering problems.
- Lead the architecture and technical design of cloud-native applications on AWS and/or Azure, ensuring high availability, performance, security, and cost efficiency.
- Work closely with cross-functional Agile/Scrum teams including Product Owners, Business Analysts, Developers, QA, and DevOps to deliver high-quality solutions.
- Translate business requirements into clear technical architecture and system design specifications.
- Conduct design and code reviews to ensure adherence to architectural principles, coding standards, and security best practices.
- Provide hands-on technical guidance and mentorship to engineers and technical team members.
- Collaborate with DevOps teams to ensure effective CI/CD pipelines, infrastructure automation, and cloud deployment practices.
- Evaluate and recommend relevant technologies, tools, and frameworks to improve system quality and delivery efficiency.
- Contribute to continuous improvement of engineering practices, architecture standards, and development processes.
requirements:

- Experience in Agile/Scrum and AWS/Azure + Kubernetes.
- Strong understanding and practical application of:
- Domain-Driven Design (DDD), Event-Driven Architecture, Microservices
- Cloud-native architecture principles
- Experience designing and delivering production systems in at least one backend technology: .NET, Java (Spring/Quarkus/Micronaut), Python, Go, Node.js
- Good understanding of CI/CD pipelines, DevOps practices, and infrastructure-as-code concepts.
- Ability to design system architecture using C4 Model and/or UML diagrams.

2. Nice to have:

- Experience with Kafka/Event streaming
- Multi-cloud or large-scale systems
- Experience using GenAI-powered development tools (e.g., AI-assisted coding, code generation, review automation) to improve software delivery efficiency.
- Experience in designing or integrating AI agents (Agentic AI) into software development workflows, such as automated coding assistants, testing agents, or DevOps automation agents

Personal Qualifications:

- Strong leadership, mentoring, and coaching skills
- Good communication and problem-solving
- High ownership and willingness to learn
- Proactive, collaborative, and continuously improving engineering practices. Passionate about modern software architecture and cloud technologies.

jobDescription: 2025TD943 - (Middle, Senior) FullStack Developer- Phát triển, trực tiếp lập trình các hệ thống, ứng dụng của Ngân hàng, gồm các hệ thống nội bộ và ứng dụng dành cho khách hàng với quy mô 30 triệu khách hàng cá nhân và 300.000 khách hàng doanh nghiệp.- Phát triển hoặc phối hợp triển khai cùng các nhà cung cấp cho các giải pháp Công nghệ.- Quản lý, phát triển dịch vụ tích hợp với các hệ thống core như: T24, WAY4, BPM, CRM, CIC v.v- Quản lý, phát triển API trên API Gateway phục vụ tích hợp với các đối tác trong nước và quốc tế.- Nghiên cứu, thử nghiệm, triển khai áp dụng các xu hướng công nghệ mới vào việc phát triển: GraphQL, Docker Container (K8s), CICD, EventSourcing, CQRS, NoSQL ...- Tham gia phân tích nghiệp vụ, đề xuất giải pháp, phương án triển khai nhằm cải tiến, nâng cao hiệu quả của các dự án trong quá trình làm việc.- Lên timeline công việc, quản lý tasks cho các thành viên trong nhóm, giám sát và hỗ trợ các thành viên hoàn thành đúng cam kết.- Dẫn dắt nhóm 3-6 thành viên, đồng hành cùng các thành viên phát triển chuyên môn và hoàn thành công việc
requirements:
- Tốt nghiệp Đại học các chuyên ngành Công nghệ thông tin và liên quan- Có kinh nghiệm làm việc thực tế tại các công ty hoặc dự án về lập trình Backend- Thành thạo 1 trong các ngôn ngữ BackEnd, ưu tiên Java hoặc Go- Thành thạo một trong trong các loại database: Oracle, Sqlserver, PostgreSQL, Mongodb.- Có kinh nghiệm trong domain tài chính, ngân hàng, chứng khoán hoặc các hệ thống có số lượng người dùng lớn là lợi thế- Với ứng viên Junior, Fresher: Ưu tiên các bạn xếp loại học tập loại Giỏi, Xuất sắc; GPA cao; đạt giải thưởng trong các cuộc thi chuyên môn, học sinh giỏi tỉnh, thành phố trở lên; có nghiên cứu khoa học được công bố tại các hội thảo, tạp chí quốc tế (ứng viên cần thể hiện nội dung về GPA, giải thưởng trong CV)

MB Bank yêu cầu ứng viên ứng tuyển cần cung cấp chi tiết các thông tin sau:- Thông tin cá nhân: Họ và tên, Ngày tháng năm sinh, Giới tính- Số điện thoại và Email liên hệ- Trình độ học vấn, Trường đã tốt nghiệp- Kinh nghiệm làm việc- Từ 3 - 5 kỹ năng nổi bật- Nguồn Tuyển dụngVì sao Bạn nên đảm bảo đầy đủ thông tin khi ứng tuyển? - Hồ sơ của Bạn sẽ được đánh giá nhanh chóng.- Đối với các hồ sơ đáp ứng đầy đủ thông tin và tiêu chí tuyển dụng phù hợp, MB Bank sẽ chủ động liên hệ phỏng vấn trong thời gian sớm nhất.- Ứng viên vui lòng kiểm tra email và điện thoại thường xuyên để không bỏ lỡ lịch hẹn phỏng vấn.Cập nhật ngay thông tin mới nhất về các Chương trình do MB tổ chức tại FanPage: - Ai yêu Miền Bắc hơn MBers- Ai yêu Miền Trung hơn MBers- Ai yêu Miền Nam hơn MBers
benefits:
Trải nghiệm Thu nhập hấp dẫn với gói đãi ngộ toàn diện:

- Thưởng thành tích tháng 13; Thưởng thành tích theo kết quả công việc 06 tháng, 1 năm ; Thưởng các dịp lễ tết trong năm ; Thưởng theo danh hiệu cá nhân và tập thể…
- Du lịch nghỉ dưỡng hàng năm
- Khám sức khỏe định kì
- Gói bảo hiểm sức khỏe cá nhân và người thân (MIC)
- Quà tặng và ngày nghỉ sinh nhật hưởng nguyên lương

Cơ hội nghề nghiệp và phát triển bản thân:

- Được thử sức với các nền tảng công nghệ mới, tham gia vào những dự án chuyển đổi lớn của ngân hàng
- Có cơ hội học hỏi từ các Chuyên gia, Lãnh đạo nội bộ hàng đầu tại MB trong lĩnh vực IT, Tài chính ngân hàng
- Được trải nghiệm các phương pháp học tập mới và phát triển năng lực theo lộ trình công danh.
- Hưởng các chính sách hỗ trợ, khuyến khích học tập, nâng cao trình độ và phát triển bản thân (chứng chỉ nghề quốc tế...)

Môi trường làm việc lý tưởng với:

- Những người cộng sự thân thiện và tài năng
- Cơ sở vật chất, không gian làm việc xanh và hiện đại.

title: Automation QA Engineer
company: Panasonic Vietnam Group – Panasonic R&D Center Vietnam (PRDCV)
reasons:
- Lộ trình phát triển sự nghiệp đa chiều
- Cơ hội đào tạo, công tác tại Nhật, Singapore, Mỹ..
- Mức lương hấp dẫn, chế độ thưởng dựa trên năng lực
jobDescription:
Ensure quality of products

· Analyze manual test cases to clarify which parts can be automated.

· Develop/verify test cases using framework Selenium or UI Path · Execute test cases and analyze results to summary about quality of system

· Communicate with other project stakeholders to ensure the quality of the functions/modules which you are assigned to

· Manage an automation test team including planning, estimation, reviewing source code, reviewing test results, reports
requirements:
[General requirements]

· At least 2 years experienced in automation test development

· Experienced develop automation script for desktop app, know UI Path is plus.

· Experienced in programming languages like C#, Javascript, typesript is plus.

· Experience in testing framework: JUnit5, TestNG…

· Experience in CI/CD tools such as Jenkins or similar.

· Experience in Docker or VM is a plus

· Experience in leading an automation team is a plus.

· Experienced in management tools such as JIRA, Redmine.

· Logical thinking, Self-learning and Self-motivated & proactive.

· English skills: Good at speaking, reading, writing.

[Preferred requirements]

· Have testing in Web/Factory/IoT domain

· Have automation testing skill/experience

· Have software development skill/experience

· Have Japanese skill

· Good understanding of software development life cycle & common using software development process: CMMI, Agile …

· Have ISTQB certificate
benefits:
𝐏𝐚𝐧𝐚𝐬𝐨𝐧𝐢𝐜 𝐑&𝐃 𝐂𝐞𝐧𝐭𝐞𝐫 𝐕𝐢𝐞𝐭𝐧𝐚𝐦 (𝐏𝐑𝐃𝐂𝐕) has been a key member of Panasonic Holdings since its establishment in Hanoi in April 2007. We specialize in delivering cutting-edge solutions across digital platforms, industrial systems, IoT, cloud computing, AI, and smart-home technologies, supporting both Panasonic subsidiaries and external clients worldwide.
