title: Solution Architect - Khối Công nghệ thông tin
reasons:
- Mức lương cạnh tranh, hấp dẫn
- Môi trường làm việc chuyên nghiệp, thân thiện
- Được làm việc với các hệ thống hiện đại, tiên tiến
jobDescription:
2025TD942 - Chuyên gia, Chuyên viên cao cấp Kiến trúc ứng dụng- Chủ trì xây dựng thiết kế giải pháp cho các sản phẩm, đáp ứng nhu cầu nghiệp vụ và phù hợp tiêu chuẩn kiến trúc, công nghệ:+ Tham gia làm rõ đầu bài và tư vấn cho nghiệp vụ, BA về yêu cầu đầu bài+ Xây dựng thiết kế tổng thể giải quyết bài toán nghiệp vụ+ Phối hợp với các AA xây dựng thiết kế chi tiết để giải quyết bài toán nghiệp vụ+ Phối hợp với các AA kiểm soát các phát triển tuân thủ thiết kế

- Tham gia xây dựng Kiến trúc tham chiếu của MB: Tham gia team cùng với EA, AA xây dựng các mẫu thiết kế, cây quyết định, tài liệu hướng dẫn, mã nguồn mẫu đáp ứng các tiêu chuẩn, nguyên tắc thiết kế, kiến trúc

- Tham gia xây dựng các quy hoạch:+ Cung cấp các thông tin, thực hiện khảo sát hiện trạng phục vụ quy hoạch+ Tham gia đánh giá và đề xuất giải pháp quy hoạch

- Các công việc khác:+ Tham gia review sự cố các hệ thống/giải pháp được phân giao.+ Phối hợp với các bên liên quan để đề xuất và xác định kích thước (sizing) hệ thống.+ Tham gia thử nghiệm, đánh giá công nghệ mới
requirements:
- Tốt nghiệp Đại học ngành Công nghệ thông tin, Toán học, Điện tử viễn thông tại các trường đại học uy tín như Đại học Bách Khoa, Đại học Quốc gia, … hoặc có chứng chỉ lập trình viên quốc tế tương đương.- Tối thiểu 04 năm kinh nghiệm lập trình và thiết kế phần mềm- Có kiến thức về nhiều ngôn ngữ: Java,go, python v.v- Hiểu biết tốt về các về các framework : Spring, Angular, React , Go-zero v.v- Hiểu biết tốt về các dòng database : Oracle, MySQL, Mongodb v,v- Hiểu biết tốt về các ứng dụng nền tảng và kiến trúc triển khai: Redis, kafka, GG v.v- Hiểu biết tốt về các mô hình kiến trúc : Monolitic, Microservice, Serverless, Event-Driven v.v. Các mô hình kiến trúc khác: Mini fontend, Miniapp v.v- Am hiểu về thiết kế ứng dụng trên nhiều khía cạnh như tích hợp, bảo mật, quy hoạch mạng v.v- Hiểu biết và có kiến thức thực tế với các mô hình phát triển như waterfall, agile v.v- Có kinh nghiệm làm việc trên các nên tảng private cloud, public cloud, các nền tảng containerization- Vị trí mở với các senior dev có định hướng chuyển sang SA- Ngoại ngữ (Tiếng Anh) - TOEIC tối thiểu 550

MB Bank yêu cầu ứng viên ứng tuyển cần cung cấp chi tiết các thông tin sau:- Thông tin cá nhân: Họ và tên, Ngày tháng năm sinh, Giới tính- Số điện thoại và Email liên hệ- Trình độ học vấn, Trường đã tốt nghiệp- Kinh nghiệm làm việc- Từ 3 - 5 kỹ năng nổi bật- Nguồn Tuyển dụngVì sao Bạn nên đảm bảo đầy đủ thông tin khi ứng tuyển? - Hồ sơ của Bạn sẽ được đánh giá nhanh chóng.- Đối với các hồ sơ đáp ứng đầy đủ thông tin và tiêu chí tuyển dụng phù hợp, MB Bank sẽ chủ động liên hệ phỏng vấn trong thời gian sớm nhất.- Ứng viên vui lòng kiểm tra email và điện thoại thường xuyên để không bỏ lỡ lịch hẹn phỏng vấn.Cập nhật ngay thông tin mới nhất về các Chương trình do MB tổ chức tại FanPage: - Ai yêu Miền Bắc hơn MBers- Ai yêu Miền Trung hơn MBers- Ai yêu Miền Nam hơn MBers

- Những người cộng sự thân thiện và tài năng
- Cơ sở vật chất, không gian làm việc xanh và hiện đại.

title: BackEnd Engineer (Fresher, UV chuẩn bị tốt nghiệp)
reasons:
- Mức lương cạnh tranh, hấp dẫn
- Môi trường làm việc chuyên nghiệp, thân thiện
- Được làm việc với các hệ thống hiện đại, tiên tiến
jobDescription: 2025TD941 - BackEnd Engineer (Fresher, UV chuẩn bị tốt nghiệp)- Tham gia lập trình, phát triển các các nền tảng nội bộ và ứng dụng dành cho khách hàng với quy mô 30 triệu khách hàng cá nhân và 300.000 khách hàng doanh nghiệp - đứng đầu Việt Nam về quy mô phục vụ- Tham gia phát triển dịch vụ tích hợp với các hệ thống lõi của ngân hàng- Tham gia phát triển API trên API Gateway phục vụ tích hợp với các đối tác trong nước và quốc tế.- Tham gia nghiên cứu, thử nghiệm, triển khai áp dụng các xu hướng công nghệ mới vào việc phát triển: GraphQL, Docker Container (K8s), CICD, EventSourcing, CQRS, NoSQL ...- Tham gia các chương trình training, đào tạo để hoàn thiện chuyên môn, nhằm phát triển lên các vị trí chính thức sau chương trình đào tạo
requirements:
- Ứng viên năm 3 trở lên hoặc đã tốt nghiệp dưới 1 năm tại các trường Đại học.- Chuyên ngành tốt nghiệp: Công nghệ thông tin và liên quan- Có kiến thức, hiểu biết về 1 trong các ngôn ngữ lập trình BackEnd, ưu tiên Java, Go- Hiểu biết về 1 trong các loại database: Oracle, Sqlserver, PostgreSQL, Mongodb.- Ưu tiên các bạn xếp loại học tập loại Giỏi, Xuất sắc; GPA cao; đạt giải thưởng trong các cuộc thi chuyên môn, học sinh giỏi tỉnh thành phố trở lên; có nghiên cứu khoa học trong quá trình học - - Phổ thông, Đại học (ứng viên cần thể hiện nội dung về GPA, giải thưởng trong CV)- Ứng viên có thể làm việc fulltime là một lợi thế. Yêu cầu onsite tối thiểu 7/10 buổi làm việc trong tuần (từ thứ 2 - thứ 6).

QUYỀN LỢI:- Bảo hiểm sức khỏe cá nhân và người thân- Du lịch- Fitness Center (Yoga, GYM,...)- Hỗ trợ kinh phí tập luyện thể thao, đi lại, kinh phí trông trẻ/mẫu giáo, điện thoại- Khám sức khỏe định kỳ- Lương tháng thứ 13- Ngảy nghỉ sinh nhật- Thưởng các dịp lễ (Tết, Quốc Khánh, 30/4 - 1/5, Sinh nhật Ngân hàng,...)- Thưởng thành tích, Thưởng hiệu suất- Vay ưu đãi

MB Bank yêu cầu ứng viên ứng tuyển cần cung cấp chi tiết các thông tin sau:- Thông tin cá nhân: Họ và tên, Ngày tháng năm sinh, Giới tính- Số điện thoại và Email liên hệ- Trình độ học vấn, Trường đã tốt nghiệp- Kinh nghiệm làm việc- Từ 3 - 5 kỹ năng nổi bật- Nguồn Tuyển dụngVì sao Bạn nên đảm bảo đầy đủ thông tin khi ứng tuyển? - Hồ sơ của Bạn sẽ được đánh giá nhanh chóng.- Đối với các hồ sơ đáp ứng đầy đủ thông tin và tiêu chí tuyển dụng phù hợp, MB Bank sẽ chủ động liên hệ phỏng vấn trong thời gian sớm nhất.- Ứng viên vui lòng kiểm tra email và điện thoại thường xuyên để không bỏ lỡ lịch hẹn phỏng vấn.Cập nhật ngay thông tin mới nhất về các Chương trình do MB tổ chức tại FanPage: - Ai yêu Miền Bắc hơn MBers- Ai yêu Miền Trung hơn MBers- Ai yêu Miền Nam hơn MBers
benefits:
Trải nghiệm Thu nhập hấp dẫn với gói đãi ngộ toàn diện:

- Thưởng thành tích tháng 13; Thưởng thành tích theo kết quả công việc 06 tháng, 1 năm ; Thưởng các dịp lễ tết trong năm ; Thưởng theo danh hiệu cá nhân và tập thể…
- Du lịch nghỉ dưỡng hàng năm
- Khám sức khỏe định kì
- Gói bảo hiểm sức khỏe cá nhân và người thân (MIC)
- Quà tặng và ngày nghỉ sinh nhật hưởng nguyên lương

Cơ hội nghề nghiệp và phát triển bản thân:

- Được thử sức với các nền tảng công nghệ mới, tham gia vào những dự án chuyển đổi lớn của ngân hàng
- Có cơ hội học hỏi từ các Chuyên gia, Lãnh đạo nội bộ hàng đầu tại MB trong lĩnh vực IT, Tài chính ngân hàng
- Được trải nghiệm các phương pháp học tập mới và phát triển năng lực theo lộ trình công danh.
- Hưởng các chính sách hỗ trợ, khuyến khích học tập, nâng cao trình độ và phát triển bản thân (chứng chỉ nghề quốc tế...)

Môi trường làm việc lý tưởng với:

- Những người cộng sự thân thiện và tài năng
- Cơ sở vật chất, không gian làm việc xanh và hiện đại.

title: Chuyên viên Phân tích nghiệp vụ - Business Analyst
reasons:

jobDescription: 2026TD450181 - Chuyên viên Phân tích nghiệp vụ- Tiếp nhận các yêu cầu về sản phẩm, dịch vụ đối với CNTT- Thực hiện nghiệp vụ phân tích, làm rõ yêu cầu và thống nhất với các bên liên quan- Xây dựng các tài liệu phân tích, đặc tả yêu cầu, mô hình hóa quy trình nghiệp vụ- Tham gia giám sát quá trình kiểm thử nhằm đảm bảo chất lượng của hệ thống CNTT đáp ứng đúng và đủ yêu cầu đã đặt ra
requirements:
- Tốt nghiệp hệ chính quy các Trường Đại học trong nước hoặc nước ngoài- Chuyên ngành đào tạo: Công nghệ thông tin, Toán tin, Điện tử Viễn thông, kế toán, Tài chính Ngân hàng- Có ít nhất 01 năm kinh nghiệm trong công tác phân tích nghiệp vụ tại các Ngân hàng, Tổ chức Tài chính, Tập đoàn & Công ty về CNTT- Ưu tiên ứng viên có kinh nghiệm quản lý dự án- Có kiến thức tổng quan về ngân hàng và am hiểu sâu nghiệp vụ ngân hàng- Có hiểu biết/kinh nghiệm thực tế về các nghiệp vụ ngân hàng. title: Agentic Coding Specialist
reasons:
- Global growth with experienced engineers
- Innovative, balanced, creative culture
- Competitive salary, benefits, training
jobDescription:
About Scandinavian Software Park

Scandinavian Software Park is Monterro’s tech hub in Hanoi, home to 150+ software engineers working for 13+ Nordic B2B SaaS companies. Founded in 2021, the park connects outstanding Vietnamese engineers with Scandinavia’s market-leading software companies.

Monterro is a Stockholm-based private equity firm managing EUR 2.85bn, specializing exclusively in Nordic B2B software. We’re building a dedicated AI team called InFuse AI to accelerate AI adoption across our portfolio – and it starts right here in Hanoi.

Is this you?

You can’t stop exploring agentic coding. Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot, Codex, the latest open-source agent frameworks. You try them all, you compare them, you have opinions. Not because someone asked you to, but because you couldn’t resist. You read the changelogs. You follow the people building these tools. When something new drops, you’re already testing it.

Maybe you’ve built side projects just to see what’s possible. Maybe you’ve automated parts of your own workflow that nobody asked you to automate. Maybe you spend your evenings thinking about how AI changes the way developers work, not the models themselves, but what they mean for how software gets built. That’s the kind of curiosity we’re looking for.

You’re the person your colleagues come to when they want to understand what AI can actually do for their code. And you enjoy that. You like showing people, not just telling them.

You’ve shipped production software for 5+ years. You know what it’s like to maintain a legacy codebase, wrestle with technical debt, and deliver under pressure. That experience matters, it’s what gives you credibility when you sit down with a developer and say “let me show you something.”

Note: This role requires a strong software development background but the job itself is coaching and enabling other developers, not writing production code day to day. We’re looking for someone who builds with agentic coding tools, not someone who builds AI/ML models. If your background is mainly in machine learning, data science, or AI research, this probably isn’t the right fit.

Your English is strong. You communicate clearly and ask good questions.

If this sounds like you, keep reading.

What do you do?

Roughly 80% of your time: help developers get good at AI coding. The other 20% is technical assessment work for investment decisions. But this split isn’t fixed, it will shift based on what’s needed.Coach and enable developers.Scandinavian Software Park has 150+ engineers working for 13+ Nordic B2B SaaS companies. Many of them haven’t yet integrated AI into how they code. Your job is to change that.You’ll work together with them directly in their codebases — not with slides and theory, but with real code and real problems. Pair programming, workshops, hands-on sessions. You’ll help teams find the workflows that actually work for them, at their level, in their stack.What this looks like day to day:

- Sit with developers and show them how to use AI tools effectively on their actual tasks
- Run workshops tailored to each team’s tech stack and experience level
- Help teams build habits — from spec-driven development to effective agent workflows to knowing when AI helps and when it doesn’t
- Support portfolio company teams based in Hanoi with agentic coding training
- Help with legacy modernization projects where AI-assisted development can make a real difference
- Create practical guides and share what works across teams

You never work in a vacuum. Every engagement is coordinated with the Swedish AI team and/or the engineering leader at the portfolio company. You’ll always have someone to discuss approach with and learn from.You don’t need to have been a professional trainer. But you need to be the kind of person who genuinely likes helping others figure things out and who is patient enough to meet people where they are.

Support investment decisions through technical assessment.

When Monterro evaluates a company for acquisition, you’ll help answer: how hard is this to build? You do this by trying to replicate the target company’s solution using AI tools. The outcome is always useful:

- If it’s easy to replicate – that tells us the solution has limited technical moat
- If it’s hard – we learn more about what’s difficult, which informs both the investment decision and where to create value afterwards

You’ll also use AI to review code quality, technical debt, and architecture in target companies and feed your findings into the investment process.

Your team:You’ll be part of Monterro’s AI team, Infuse AI – a small, senior team based in Stockholm that works across the entire portfolio. You report to the AI Lead for reviews and development, but your daily work is closely coordinated with our senior agentic coding specialist. Expect daily standups, weekly team meetings (remote) and a lot of autonomy in between.You’re the team’s presence in Hanoi. That means you’ll build relationships with developers and team leads at the park, and be the bridge between what’s happening on the ground and the AI team’s broader strategy.
requirements:
Your technical foundation

- 5+ years shipping production software – web apps, backend systems, APIs. You understand developer problems because you’ve had them yourself
- Strong in one or more of: C#, JavaScript/TypeScript, Java, Python
- Hands-on, daily use of agentic coding tools. You should know your way around Claude Code, Cursor, GitHub Copilot or similar
- You understand spec-driven development, agent workflows and how to get reliable results from agentic coding tools
- Comfortable with modern development practices: CI/CD, code review, testing, version control
- You can pick up a new codebase quickly and form a view on its architecture and quality

Your obsession

- You follow agentic coding closely – new tools, new workflows, new ways of working with AI. If we ask you “what changed in this space this week?” you should have plenty to say
- You think about how AI is changing the developer role, not just the tooling, but how teams work, how code gets reviewed how architecture decisions shift
- You’ve built things with agentic tools on your own initiative – side projects, experiments, automations. Not because it was assigned but because you wanted to
- You can talk about what you’ve tried, what worked, what didn’t and what you’d do differently
- Bonus: You do this on your own time too, not just at work

Your people skills

- You’re a clear communicator in English, written and spoken
- You enjoy teaching and coaching and people tend to trust you quickly
- You can adjust how you explain things depending on who you’re talking to
- You’re comfortable presenting to small groups and larger workshops alike
- You have the patience to help a skeptical developer see the value, and the enthusiasm to keep going

How you work

- Based in Hanoi, working from Scandinavian Software Park
- Flexible with time zones when coordinating with Nordic teams
- Comfortable switching between different companies, stacks, and contexts
- You prefer showing results over making plans. Quick wins first
- You’re comfortable with ambiguity. This role is still being shaped, and you’ll help shape it

Nice to have

- Consulting experience or a background working across multiple organizations
- Solutions architecture background
- Experience calling LLM APIs to build product features (not training or fine-tuning models)
- Knowledge of cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP)

What Success Looks Like

We don’t define success for you, that gets set together with the CTOs and team leads at each portfolio company, based on where their teams are and where they want to go.

But broadly, after 12 months you should have:

- Helped the majority of developers at the park actively use AI in their daily work
- Built practical resources and guides that teams actually refer to
- Completed several AI replication assessments for Monterro’s deal team
- Become someone developers at the park trust and seek out
- Contributed to at least one legacy modernization project

How to apply: Send your CV in English to us through the Monterro talent portal.

In your application, tell us:

- What’s the most interesting thing you’ve built or explored with AI coding tools recently?
- Describe a time you helped another developer learn something new. What did you do, and what made it work?
benefits:
Why this role is interesting:

- You get to explore AI coding tools as your actual job and help others discover what you’ve found.
- Full access to the best AI tools – Cursor, Anthropic (Claude Pro/API), OpenAI and whatever else comes next. We provide all the subscriptions and API access you need. No personal budget worries, no waiting for approval.
- You’ll work across 13+ different tech stacks and companies, not just one.
- You’ll see inside many different software businesses through the DD work.
- You’re part of building something new. Monterro’s AI practice is in its early stages.
- Scandinavian work culture: trust, autonomy, and a sensible view on work-life balance.
- Modern office at Peakview Tower in central Hanoi.
- Competitive salary for the Hanoi market.

jobDescription:

WHAT YOU‘LL DO

- Phối hợp với PM, Dev và các team liên quan để hiểu rõ yêu cầu và đề xuất giải pháp thiết kế

title: Middle/Senior Backend Developer (Java, Spring Boot)
jobDescription:

You will contribute to system architecture design and build scalable services that integrate with frontend applications and external systems. You will work closely with Product Managers, Technical Leaders, QA Engineers, and Frontend Developers to deliver high-quality products.

Responsibilities:

requirements:

title: Mid-Senior Java Backend Developer (Spring, English)
reasons:
- 13th - Month Salary and KPIs Bonus
- 90% Salary Insurance Contribution
- Team Building Budget for each Quater
jobDescription:
We're looking for an experienced Mid-Senior Backend Java Engineer to join our team. In this role, you'll be a key player in designing, implementing, and optimizing our backend systems and services. You'll work on complex distributed systems, contribute to architectural decisions, and help mentor junior team members, all while driving high-quality code and project outcomes.

What You'll Be Doing

- System Design & Development: Lead the analysis and design of complex systems and API services. You'll be responsible for the full development lifecycle, from concept to deployment.
- Code Quality & Maintenance: Write robust unit and integration tests to ensure the accuracy and reliability of our services. You'll also participate in code reviews to maintain high standards and help colleagues grow.
- Architectural Leadership: Design and implement distributed computing services and propose improvements to existing system architecture. Your insights will be crucial in areas like index strategies, query optimization, and Redis data structures.
- Project Ownership: Take full ownership of project requirements, from clarifying ambiguities with stakeholders to decomposing projects into actionable tasks and coordinating with other teams.
- Team & Process Improvement: Actively identify opportunities for system optimization and process improvements. You will contribute to refining team culture, development workflows, and engineering best practices.
- Mentorship & Collaboration: Collaborate with cross-functional teams (Product, Frontend, QA, IT) and provide mentorship and technical guidance to more junior team members.
requirements:
Required Skills & Experience

- Experience: A minimum of 3 years of professional experience in software development.
- Proficiency: Deep expertise in Java, including the Spring Framework, and proficiency in Shell scripting.
- System Design: Proven experience in designing and implementing distributed services and applying design patterns.
- Database Skills: Strong command of SQL syntax and an understanding of database normalization.
- Tools & Technologies: Hands-on experience with Redis and familiarity with the ELK stack (Elasticsearch, Logstash, Kibana).
- Testing: Experience in writing effective unit tests is essential.
- Soft Skills: You should be a proactive problem-solver with a tenacious attitude, excellent communication skills (English or Chinese) for both written and speaking, and the ability to articulate technical decisions clearly. Willingness to engage in pair programming is also required.

What We Offer

This role offers a clear path for growth and increasing impact within our team.

- First 3-6 Months: You will onboard, get familiar with our tech stack and workflows, and begin taking responsibility for product optimization and routine maintenance. You'll start tackling more complex technical requirements.
- Beyond 6 Months: You'll transition into leading core development tasks, contributing significantly to system architecture, and mentoring newer team members. You'll have the opportunity to influence engineering best practices and play a key role in technical decision-making.

The Details

- Work Type: On-Site
- Work Hours: Day shift, 09:00–18:00, Monday to Friday.
- Management: This is an individual contributor role with no direct management responsibilities.
- Leave: Two days off per week (Saturday and Sunday).
- Education: Bachelor’s degree or above (no specific major required).
benefits:
- Full Salary Insurance Contribution: Social, Health, and Unemployment Insurance paid on 90% of your official gross salary.
- Annual Bonuses: 13th-Month, 14th-Month Salary and KPIs Bonus
- Healthcare: Comprehensive Annual Health Check-up package provided by the company.
- Work Equipment: Provision of necessary computers, and modern office equipment required for your role.
- Team Building Budget: A dedicated quarterly budget for team meals or staff gatherings.
- Company Trip: An annual company vacation (local and/or international destinations).
- Special Occasion Gifts: Thoughtful gifts provided for major holidays (e.g., Tet, Mid-Autumn Festival, Christmas, etc.).

title: Middle/ Senior AI Engineer
jobDescription:
Role Overview

We are scaling agentic AI across the enterprise using a multi-platform agent stack comprising Microsoft Copilot Studio, Google AgentSpace, AWS Bedrock, and Dataiku.

This role designs, builds, and operates production-grade AI agents that can:

- reason and plan,

- retrieve enterprise knowledge,

- take actions via tools and APIs,

- operate safely under governance and audit constraints.

Agents are expected to go beyond chat and support real business workflows across IT, operations, and other functions.

The role is platform-aware but not platform-locked. Candidates may come from any ecosystem, but must demonstrate the ability to deliver agentic systems on at least one of the supported platforms and adapt across the rest.

What you will build

Examples of solutions you will deliver include:

- Enterprise Support and Ops Agents

• Leverage AI and machine learning to learn from past tickets, emails and logs to triage requests and monitor systems

• Propose or execute actions with escalation and full audit trails

• Perform automated root cause analysis for complex enterprise environment

- Knowledge and Policy Agents

• Grounded Q&A over SOPs, manuals, and policies

• Citations, traceability, and access-controlled retrieval

• Security attestation agent to reduce administrative work and to guide users for policy compliance

• System onboarding agent to guide users and help in troubleshooting, price and cost estimation

- Workflow and Action Agents

• Multi-step orchestration (e.g. read request → analyze → fetch data    → draft response → trigger approval → update system)

Responsibilities

1. Agentic Solution Design

- Design goal-driven agents that decompose tasks, select tools, manage state, and recover from failures.

- Implement agent patterns such as planner–executor, coordinator–worker, reflection/self-check, and human‑in‑the‑loop decision gates.

2. Platform Implementation

You will work across one or more of the following platforms:

- Microsoft Copilot Studio

• Build copilots with plugins, connectors, and enterprise guardrails

- Google AgentSpace

• Build agents integrated with other applications or tools (e.g. ITSM, SIEM, Workflow management system)

• Orchestrate multi-step workflows and API-driven actions

- AWS Bedrock

• Design secure agentic workflows using Bedrock models and tools

- Dataiku

• Operationalize agents within analytics, ML pipelines, and business workflows

- An operational Hybrid Machine Learning and LLM model to support smart Digital Platform and Security Operations

- ML models detect anomalies → LLM explains them
- ML predicts incidents → LLM drafts remediation and healing steps
- ML scores risk → LLM supports human decision‑making

3. Retrieval and Grounding (RAG)

- Design enterprise RAG pipelines including ingestion, chunking, embeddings,  retrieval, reranking, and citation.

- Ensure retrieval respects role-based access control and data classification.

4. Evaluation, Observability, and Operations

- Build evaluation frameworks for non-deterministic systems:  task success metrics, grounding checks, hallucination detection, and regression tests.

- Implement observability for prompts, retrieval, and tool calls.

- Own solutions from POC through MVP and production.

5. Security, Governance, and Responsible AI

- Enforce least-privilege tool access, audit logging, secrets management, prompt-injection defenses, and safe action boundaries.

- Design human approval checkpoints for high-risk or irreversible actions.

- Comply with enterprise AI governance and ethics requirements.
requirements:
Requirements

- 3-5+ years professional software engineering experience.
- Hands-on experience building GenAI or LLM systems beyond basic chatbots i.e. a hybrid Machine Learning and LLM model in an operational platform
- Strong understanding of agentic concepts: tool/function calling, state and memory, planning and execution loops.
- Practical experience with at least one of: Microsoft Copilot Studio, Google AgentSpace, AWS Bedrock, or Dataiku.
- Experience with vector databases and embeddings.

Prefered skills and experiences:

- Familiarity and experience with UiPath is an added advantage
- Familiarity and experience with project management concepts and methodologies is preferred
benefits:
- 14 days Annual leaves + 3 Sick leaves
- Private Health Insurance
- Annual Salary Review
- Performance Bonus
- 100% salary in probation period
- Free LinkedIn Learning Account
- Company Events & Team Building

jobDescription:
Banqup applies a fair and transparent recruitment process. All vacancies are published internally and externally in accordance with our recruitment policy.

MỤC TIÊU CÔNG VIỆC

Mục tiêu trọng tâm là phát hiện sớm lỗi – giảm rủi ro khi release – đảm bảo trải nghiệm người dùng cuối, đặc biệt với các sản phẩm giáo dục có yêu cầu cao về độ chính xác nội dung, luồng học tập và đánh giá kết quả học sinh.

MÔ TẢ CÔNG VIỆC CHÍNH

- Phân tích yêu cầu nghiệp vụ, tài liệu sản phẩm để xây dựng test plan, test case, test scenario.

- Tham gia đánh giá rủi ro chất lượng sản phẩm và đề xuất cải tiến quy trình kiểm thử.

title: Senior DevOps Engineer (Database & K8s)
reasons:

- Working in one of the best places to work in VN
jobDescription:
Chúng tôi đang tìm kiếm Senior DevOps Engineer có kinh nghiệm chuyên sâu trong việc triển khai, vận hành và tối ưu các hệ thống Enterprise-Grade Database Clusters và Kubernetes (K8S).Bạn sẽ đóng vai trò quan trọng trong việc đảm bảo hạ tầng dữ liệu luôn ổn định, hiệu năng cao, có khả năng mở rộng, và được giám sát chủ động thông qua hệ thống quan sát (observability) hiện đại.

Trách nhiệm chính

- Nghiên cứu, triển khai, quản trị và tối ưu các database systems (SQL Server, Oracle, MongoDB, MySQL, PostgreSQL, Redis, v.v.).
- Vận hành, tối ưu và mở rộng hệ thống Kubernetes cluster.
- Thiết lập và quản lý các monitoring & alerting systems như Prometheus, Alertmanager, Grafana, ELK, v.v.
- Define và tinh chỉnh metrics, alert thresholds, SLO/SLA, error budgets cho các dịch vụ database và hạ tầng quan trọng.
- Tham gia xử lý sự cố (incident response), điều tra nguyên nhân gốc rễ (root cause analysis) và thực hiện post-mortem để tăng độ tin cậy hệ thống.
- Tự động hóa quy trình vận hành (backup, failover, scaling, recovery, patching, CI/CD, etc.).
- Xây dựng, chuẩn hóa runbook / playbook / documentation giúp đội ngũ phản ứng nhanh và hiệu quả trong tình huống khẩn cấp.
- Phối hợp cùng team phát triển để cải tiến các sản phẩm database/big data.
requirements:
Yêu cầu

- Tối thiểu 3 năm kinh nghiệm làm việc ở vị trí SRE/DBA/System Engineer.
- Thành thạo việc triển khai, vận hành và tối ưu database systems (SQL Server, Oracle, MongoDB, MySQL, PostgreSQL, Redis, v.v.) trên môi trường on-premise hoặc on-cloud.
- Có kinh nghiệm triển khai và vận hành Kubernetes trong môi trường on-premise hoặc cloud (EKS, GKE, AKS).
- Kinh nghiệm thiết lập metrics, alert thresholds, dashboards cho hệ thống database và hạ tầng.
- Có khả năng trực on-call, theo dõi cảnh báo và xử lý hoặc escalate kịp thời các sự cố hệ thống.
- Thành thạo các công cụ monitoring & logging như Prometheus, Alertmanager, Grafana, Loki, ELK Stack,...
- Biết viết script tự động hóa bằng Python / Bash / Go.
- Kiến thức tốt về networking, storage, performance tuning, backup & recovery.
- Tư duy hệ thống mạnh mẽ, chủ động trong việc phát hiện và xử lý vấn đề.

Điểm cộng

- Có kinh nghiệm vận hành các Enterprise-grade database cluster như SQL Server, Oracle, MongoDB Enterprise là một lợi thế.
- Có kinh nghiệm vận hành distributed databases hoặc high availability clusters (Patroni, Galera, Sentinel, etc.) là một lợi thế.
- Kinh nghiệm với big data systems (Kafka, ClickHouse, Elasticsearch, etc.).
- Có chứng chỉ liên quan như MCSA/MCSE/Azure Database Administrator, Oracle Database (OCA / OCP), MongoDB Certified DBA / Developer, CKA/CKAD, AWS/GCP Certified hoặc DB Admin Certifications khác là một lợi thế.

jobDescription:
We are seeking a highly motivated and enthusiastic Experienced QA Engineer to join our QE team.

This role provides the opportunity to apply advanced software testing methodologies, tools, and best practices to enhance quality standards and continuously improve testing processes within a professional engineering environment. You will work closely with experienced QA Engineers and Development teams to ensure the quality and reliability of our products.

Your day-to-day:

- Execute and participate in all testing activities including manual and automation tests to improve product quality, work closely with the team to deliver product success.
- Automate functional, regression, and/or performance testing to speed up product delivery cycle.
- Have complete responsibility to enhance end-to-end automated test coverage.
- Participate in the review of project requirements to understand test objectives, to provide input on the testability of requirements and estimation for the testing activities.
- Prepare detailed test reports and provide data-driven Sign-Off decisions.
requirements:
Your qualifications:

- Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, IT, or a related field.
- 4-6 years of experience in software quality assurance and testing.
- Experience with manual testing to make sure that the product functionalities comply with business requirements is a MUST.
- Experience in building or maintaining automation testing frameworks for Web and API automation frameworks (e.g., Puppeteer, Playwright, Selenium).
- Strong experience of at least one modern programming language such as JavaScript, Java, Python,... with a strong base in object-oriented design and development.
- Strong English communication skills, both written and spoken.

It's a big plus if you:

- ISTQB or other relevant testing certifications.
- Experience of using AI tools (GitHub Copilot, OpenAI api, etc.) or AI-based testing platforms to optimize the QA workflow.
- Proficiency in Korean (TOPIK certification).
benefits:
From solid welfare programs to autonomy over working time and place, we create the culture in which we work. By joining NAVER VIETNAM, you will be involved in:

- A work-life balance: Hybrid working model with modern city-center offices, 14 days of annual leave (increasing yearly) and an additional day off for your birthday.
- Competitive income package: Comprehensive package with full salary insurance, 13th-month salary, annual performance appraisals, and incentive bonuses.
- AI-powered development tools: Company-sponsored access to Claude Code Enterprise, empowering developers with advanced AI support to enhance productivity and accelerate development workflows.
- Learning and development opportunities: Monthly book allowance and an annual budget for online/offline courses (Udemy, Coursera, etc.) in tech, languages, and soft skills,...
- Protecting and enhancing healthcare plan for you and your family: Premium insurance for employees and 2 family members, plus annual health check-ups.
- Employee's engagement activities: Respectful, engaging culture with monthly team budgets, social clubs, and celebration gifts.
- Working environment: Driven by "Autonomy – Challenge – Teamwork" values, with talented colleagues, supportive leaders, and modern devices supported such as Macbook Pro 14, Macbook Air M4, Dell 7450 Ultra 7,...
- Dedication bonus: Recognizing your commitment and contributions with special bonuses and benefits at key work milestones.
- Other benefits: Home office setup allowance, happy hours, attractive referral bonus, and more!

title: Senior DevOps Engineer (Cloud, Kubernetes, CI/CD)
reasons:
- Engineer platforms that operate at global scale
- Shape architecture and long‑term system direction
- Deepen expertise in reliability and scalability
jobDescription:
Strong engineers often look for roles where they can work on systems that evolve over time, not just deliver isolated features.

At AMB, DevOps Engineers work on production platforms used by global organizations, focusing on infrastructure, deployment systems, and platform reliability across billing systems, customer platforms, and distributed microservices.

Some of the platforms our engineers support operate in the fintech and digital commerce space, where systems must process financial data reliably and efficiently at scale. These environments require high availability, fault tolerance, strong data integrity, and well‑designed cloud infrastructure.

If you enjoy owning systems end‑to‑end, improving reliability, and building platforms that scale smoothly in production, this role may be a strong fit.

You will collaborate closely with engineers and product teams to design and evolve infrastructure and deployment workflows that support long‑term product platforms rather than short‑term project delivery.

WHAT YOU WILL WORK ON

As a Senior DevOps Engineer, you will help design and evolve production‑grade infrastructure, deployment systems, and platform reliability.

Your responsibilities include:

- Manage and maintain Linux-based production environments, ensuring system stability, security, and scalability.
- Design, deploy, and manage containerized applications using Docker and Kubernetes orchestration.
- Build and maintain CI/CD pipelines and automation workflows using Azure DevOps.
- Administer and optimize cloud resources across Azure, AWS, or Google Cloud Platform (GCP).
- Implement and manage Infrastructure as Code (IaC) using tools such as Terraform and ARM templates.
- Set up and monitor system performance and reliability using tools like Grafana and Prometheus.
- Automate operational tasks and deployments through scripting languages such as Bash, Python, or similar.
- Collaborate closely with engineering, QA, and product teams, to ensure smooth release cycles and stable environments.
- Apply security best practices in all cloud and containerized deployments.

We encourage engineers to take ownership of systems and features, not just complete assigned tasks.

Our Engineering Stack:

Our platforms use modern technologies commonly found in global engineering environments.

- Operating Systems: Linux (production environment management)
- Containerization: Docker, Kubernetes
- CI/CD: Azure DevOps
- Cloud Platforms: Azure, AWS, GCP
- Infrastructure as Code (IaC): Terraform, ARM templates
- Monitoring: Grafana, Prometheus
- Scripting Languages: Bash, Python
- Configuration Management: Ansible (preferred)
- Version Control: Git
- Cloud Interfaces: Azure CLI and Azure Portal
requirements:
Core Requirements:

- Minimum 5+ years of experience in DevOps, Site Reliability Engineering, or related fields.
- Strong proficiency in Linux system administration and production environment management.
- Hands-on experience with Docker and Kubernetes orchestration.
- Proven expertise with Azure DevOps for continuous integration and deployment.
- Proficiency with Infrastructure as Code (IaC) tools such as Terraform and ARM templates.
- Familiarity with monitoring and alerting tools such as Grafana and Prometheus.
- Strong scripting ability in Bash, Python, or similar.
- Experience with configuration management tools such as Ansible (preferred).
- Familiarity with Agile methodologies and DevOps culture.
- Knowledge of security best practices in cloud and containerized environments.
- Familiarity with multi-cloud or hybrid environments is a plus.

We value engineers who:

- Demonstrate strong English communication skills (written and verbal).
- Ability to clearly explain technical concepts and collaborate effectively with international engineering teams.

We value engineers who:

- Take responsibility for their work.
- Enjoy solving challenging technical problems.
- Write maintainable, high‑quality code.
- Continuously improve their skills.

____________________________________________

EXAMPLE ENGINEERING CHALLENGES YOU MAY WORK ON

As a Senior DevOps Engineer, you will work on production platforms where reliability, scalability, and operational efficiency are critical.

Examples of challenges our team tackles include:

Designing Scalable Cloud Infrastructure:

- Design and evolve cloud infrastructure across AWS/Azure environments, ensuring systems are highly available, fault‑tolerant, and cost‑efficient under production load.

Building and Evolving CI/CD Systems:

- Develop and improve CI/CD pipelines to support reliable, repeatable deployments, reducing friction for engineering teams while maintaining system stability.

Improving Platform Reliability and Observability:

- Enhance monitoring, logging, and alerting systems using tools like Prometheus and Grafana, enabling faster detection and resolution of production issues.

Managing Containerized Distributed Systems:

- Operate and optimize Kubernetes-based platforms, ensuring smooth deployment, scaling, and resilience of distributed services.

Automating Infrastructure and Operations:

- Implement Infrastructure as Code (Terraform, ARM) and automate operational workflows to improve consistency, reduce manual intervention, and support system scalability.

WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE IN THIS ROLE

First Few Weeks:

- Understanding system architecture, infrastructure, and deployment workflows.
- Contributing improvements to CI/CD pipelines, monitoring, or infrastructure configuration.
- Participating in engineering discussions around reliability and system operations.

First Few Months:

- Taking ownership of infrastructure components, deployment systems, or reliability improvements.
- Enhancing system observability, deployment processes, or operational efficiency.
- Contributing to infrastructure and platform design decisions.

Over Time:

- Driving improvements in system reliability, scalability, and operational excellence.
- Helping standardize DevOps practices across teams.
- Mentoring engineers on infrastructure, deployment, and reliability best practices.
- Contributing to long‑term platform stability and evolution.

Engineers who thrive here typically demonstrate ownership, strong operational judgement, and a proactive approach to improving system reliability and performance.
benefits:
We aim to provide a stable and supportive environment where engineers can focus on building high‑quality systems and improving their craft over time, without unnecessary process overhead. Here are the top 3 growth reasons for engineers to empower your career with us. You will:

- Work on long‑term product platforms, not short‑term projects.
- Engineer reliable systems used in production environments.
- Collaborate closely with international product and engineering teams.

Compensation & Equipment

- Competitive salary based on experience.
- 13th month salary paid every January.
- Company laptop provided.

Healthcare & Insurance:

- Social and health insurance (based on full 100% salary).
- Annual health check‑ups.
- Additional PVI health insurance from year 2.

Leave & Work‑Life Balance:

- 12 days annual leave starting from the first year.
- 2 paid sick leave days.
- 11+ public holidays per year.
- Additional leave based on seniority and family dependents.

Work Flexibility: Subject to management's discretion, you can have options to work:

- Full time
- Hybrid work model with work‑from‑home option, available for high‑performing engineers.

Office Environment

- Cozy and growing office space.
- In‑office parking available.
- Collaborative and engineering-focused culture.

Company Activities

- Annual company trips to beach destinations.
- Travel cash‑out option when travel is not possible.

Career Growth

- Work on production systems used by international organizations.
- Exposure to modern architectures, cloud infrastructure, and distributed systems.
- Opportunities to deepen expertise in system design, scalability, and reliability.

title: Agile Delivery Manager / Scrum Master (English)
jobDescription:
As an Agile Delivery Manager, you will own the delivery outcomes for our product development teams. This role revolves around creating realistic plans, maintaining transparent progress, controlling risks, facilitating smooth releases, and driving continuous improvement. While you will not replace the Product Owner or Tech Lead, you will orchestrate the people and processes necessary to enable optimal decisions and high-quality results. This position operates within a clear leveling framework supporting Scrum, Kanban, Waterfall, or Hybrid environments and is primarily internal-facing with limited direct client communication.

Key Responsibilities

- Take charge of product development elements for a team of product developers, ensuring program requirements for performance and quality are met.
- Plan, lead, coordinate, and inspire agile teams across numerous business divisions in a fast-paced setting.
- Manage agile teams on a daily or as-needed basis, guiding team development while actively removing roadblocks to their work.
- Hold team members accountable for their commitments and foster a high-performance environment where individuals are enthusiastic about their jobs.
- Collaborate closely with developers, testers, and business analysts to execute software delivery successfully.
requirements:
- Excellent English communication skills
- Proven experience executing several agile projects and leading multi-disciplinary, highly talented workforces.
- Previous experience working as a Scrum Master or Delivery Manager in a client-facing team.
- Demonstrated success in implementing software development projects and managing medium-sized, complex initiatives in a high-tech environment with cross-functional teams.
- A comprehensive grasp of the software development life cycle (SDLC).
- A deep understanding of agile project management concepts and practices.
benefits:
- 15 days of annual leave
- Competitive salary (13-month salary included)
- Health insurance and social insurance according to government regulations
- PVI Healthcare Insurance
- A chance to work in an international, friendly, and open environment
- Annual travel opportunities

title: AI Quantitative Researcher (Fresher, UV sắp ra trường)
jobDescription:
I. Job Summary

We are looking for a highly motivated Quantitative Researcher Fresher to build and maintain predictive models that analyze and forecast price movements from financial data. You will also contribute to developing data-driven trading strategies using different methods: machine learning (ML),deep learning (DL),...

Key Responsibilities

- Support to design and implement predictive models for financial time series
- Develop and backtest trading strategies using technical indicators and ML/DL
- Optimize model performance (feature engineering, hyperparameter tuning, evaluation)
- Deploy and maintain ML/DL pipelines in production
- Work with engineers to integrate models into live systems
- Monitor and improve strategy performance based on market changes
- Keep up with the latest in quantitative finance and AI
requirements:

- Solid foundation in mathematics, statistics, and probability, including:Linear Algebra, Calculus, Probability, Statistics, and Optimization
- Familiar with core machine learning techniques: Regression, classification, model evaluation, ensemble methods.
- Basic knowledge of deep learning, with hands-on experience using PyTorch
- Experience working with time series data, including preprocessing and modeling
- Experience in backtesting and evaluating trading strategies
- Good understanding of technical analysis and financial market

Nice to Have:

- Knowledge of portfolio optimization, risk management, or market microstructure
- Experience with cloud deployment or real-time pipelines
- Participation in competitions (e.g., Kaggle, Numerai)
benefits:

- We offer a youthful, open, and collaborative working environment, where you'll work with intelligent and talented colleagues.
- Initial financial support starts at 3 million VND, with potential increases throughout the Traineeship depending on performance and demonstrated capability.
- Lunch allowance is provided, and working hours are flexible to fit your schedule.

title: Senior Software Quality Control (QC/ Tester)
reasons:
- Work environment that focus solely on development
- Training opportunities with experts
- 13th-14th month salary & Incentive Programs
jobDescription:
Job Summary

Responsible for Quality Management of financial banking systems.

The candidate will apply professional project management standards to plan, execute, and monitor data flow quality across the entire system—from user interface to core banking systems.

Key Responsibilities

Plan Quality Management

- Develop detailed Test Strategy and Test Plan, clearly defining quality metrics and compliance requirements specific to the banking industry.
- Design Test Suite structure, ensuring full requirement coverage through a Requirements Traceability Matrix (RTM).

Control Quality & Testing Execution

- Perform cross-platform testing: Mobile Apps, Internet Banking, and Core Banking systems.
- Manage and control changes (Change Control) to ensure system updates do not break existing business logic.

Risk Management

- Proactively identify system quality risks, especially those related to security and data integrity in financial transactions.
- Propose contingency plans for critical failure scenarios.

Continuous Improvement

- Utilize quality management tools to conduct Root Cause Analysis of system defects.
- Optimize testing processes to shorten release cycles while maintaining output quality.
requirements:
Technical & Management Requirements

QC Knowledge & Management Capability

- Strong understanding of Software Testing Life Cycle (STLC).
- Proficient in creating and managing: Test Strategy, Test Plan, Test Scenarios, Test Cases, and Test Suites.
- Strong scope management mindset to ensure full test coverage without scope creep (Gold Plating).

Languages & Technologies

- Ability to read and understand programming languages.
- Proficient in writing complex SQL queries to validate data integrity.

Tools

- Hands-on experience with Jira, Postman, and Playwright (Automation).

General Requirements

Experience

- Minimum 3–5 years of QC experience in Banking/Fintech.
- Experience in establishing QC processes from scratch for at least one medium-to-large scale project.

Education

- Bachelor’s degree in Information Technology or a related field.

Soft Skills

- Strong problem-solving and data-driven decision-making skills.
- High attention to detail and precision-oriented mindset.
- Proficient in technical English.
benefits: Our company provides an opportunity to grow as an expert-Banking IT in VietnamYou can learn about Banking concepts and know-how from korea specialized developersIn addition, We have plans to expand our company to Indonesia, Myanmar, PhilippinesWe plan to offer training for outstanding employees in korea. - Salary: you will be happy.- Performance review: twice a year.- Incentive Programs to congratulate members' development.- Company Trip, monthly/weekly activities and events.- Health check once a year and advanced healthcare program.- Free snack, coffee, sponsored pizza or chicken & beer parties.- Work onsite with foreign teams for short or long term.- Your solutions and opinions are heard.

title: Full Stack Dev – Healthcare SaaS
jobDescription:
About Us

AdvaHealth Solutions is a leading innovator in the medical imaging informatics sector, dedicated to transforming radiology image management and workflow optimization through advancements in cloud-native imaging. We pride ourselves on bridging the gap between complex software development and service delivery, ensuring that healthcare providers have the diagnostic tools they need at their fingertips. We are a global company with team members and clients across five continents. Our team is driven by a culture of precision, technical curiosity, and a commitment to streamlining the digital healthcare landscape for the modern era.

We are currently looking for a Full Stack Developer who thrives in a dynamic environment and enjoys working across both frontend and backend systems. This role is ideal for engineers who take ownership of features end-to-end and are passionate about building scalable, high-quality products.

What You’ll Do

- Design, develop, and maintain end-to-end features across frontend and backend systems
- Build responsive, high-quality user interfaces using React
- Develop and maintain backend services using Java (Spring Boot)
- Design and integrate RESTful APIs, ensuring scalability, performance, and reliability
- Work with PostgreSQL to design efficient data models and optimize queries
- Collaborate with FE, BA, Designer, and QA team to translate requirements into technical solutions
- Implement state management and API communication strategies, including caching mechanisms
- Apply established best practices in system design, security, and performance.
- Participate in code reviews and contribute to improving engineering standards
- Troubleshoot and resolve issues across the full stack
requirements:
Required Skills

1. Strong experience with:

- Java (version 17+, preferably Java 21/25)
- Spring Boot
- PostgreSQL
- React

2. Solid understanding of:

- RESTful API design and integration
- System architecture and data flow across frontend and backend
- Web security principles (authentication, authorization, XSS, CSRF, etc.)
- Performance optimization across both frontend and backend

3. Strong problem-solving skills and ability to work across multiple layers of the system

4. Can communicate in English

Nice to Have

- Cloud & Infrastructure:Experience with AWS (cloud services, deployment, and scaling)
- Experience with AWS (cloud services, deployment, and scaling)
- Frontend EcosystemExperience with Vite (modern build tools)Experience with Lexical (rich text editor frameworks)Experience with React Table or similar data grid libraries
- Experience with Vite (modern build tools)
- Experience with Lexical (rich text editor frameworks)
- Experience with React Table or similar data grid libraries
- Healthcare / Imaging DomainFamiliarity with DICOM standard Experience with dcm4che (DICOM toolkit)
- Familiarity with DICOM standard
- Experience with dcm4che (DICOM toolkit)

Preferred Candidate Profile

- A minimum of 3 years of full-stack development experience, primarily working with Java and React.
- Strong ownership mindset with the ability to deliver features end-to-end
- Comfortable working across both frontend and backend
- Product-oriented thinking with attention to user experience and system reliability
- Ability to work in a fast-paced, collaborative environment
benefits:
- Mission-driven culture improving healthcare delivery
- Opportunity to work across the full stack on impactful products
- Collaborative, transparent, and flexible work environment
- Competitive salary with regular annual reviews to reflect performance and market rates
- We offer a hybrid work environment with a mix of work from our District One based office in HCM Vietnam and home

- Nghỉ các ngày Lễ, Tết theo quy định.
- Được tham gia sâu vào phân tích nghiệp vụ cốt lõi,
jobDescription:
GIỚI THIỆU VỀ CÔNG TY Công ty TNHH STONEPINE đến từ Hàn Quốc, chuyên phát triển các hệ thống như ERP, WMS, OMS và các giải pháp phần mềm tùy chỉnh theo từng ngành.

Chúng tôi cung cấp các nền tảng được thiết kế riêng cho khách hàng, với giao tiếp là giá trị cốt lõi giúp đảm bảo sự thành công của mọi dự án. Stonepine là môi trường năng động, nơi bạn có thể phát triển năng lực song hành cùng sự phát triển của công ty.Mô tả công việc :

- Phân tích và thiết kế toàn bộ luồng hệ thống dựa trên yêu cầu khách hàng (bao gồm vai trò SA)
- Xây dựng và định nghĩa luồng dữ liệu giữa các hệ thống: ERP · WMS · OMS · LMS
- Trực tiếp thiết kế flowchart quy trình chính và tài liệu đặc tả chức năng
- Giao tiếp, phân công công việc và điều phối giữa BA và team phát triển
- Quản lý tiến độ, nguồn lực và rủi ro dự án
- Báo cáo định kỳ và làm việc trực tiếp với khách hàng Hàn Quốc
- Dẫn dắt team BA và kiểm soát chất lượng deliverables
requirements:
Năng lực chính

- Có khả năng đọc tài liệu yêu cầu và nhanh chóng hiểu tổng thể hệ thống cần xây dựng
- Có thể thiết kế và hình dung toàn bộ flow hệ thống (AS-IS / TO-BE)
- Chủ động xây dựng flowchart và cấu trúc hệ thống
- Thiết kế module, data flow và tích hợp hệ thống end-to-end
- Tự đánh giá phạm vi, rủi ro và mức độ ưu tiên dự án

Yêu cầu bắt buộc

- Tối thiểu 5 năm kinh nghiệm PM trong các dự án SI
- Có kinh nghiệm triển khai full-cycle với một trong các domain: ERP / WMS / OMS / Logistics / Commerce / TMS
- Có kinh nghiệm dẫn dắt toàn bộ quy trình: yêu cầu → flow → đặc tả → triển khai
- Có khả năng thiết kế hệ thống tổng thể (không chỉ quản lý tiến độ)
- Có khả năng phân tích, đánh giá và ra quyết định độc lập dựa trên tài liệu khách hàng

Uư tiên

- Có kinh nghiệm làm việc với khách hàng Hàn Quốc
- Có nền tảng vững trong các dự án SI đa ngành
- Có khả năng đọc hiểu tài liệu tiếng Hàn
- Đã tham gia nhiều loại dự án với quy mô khác nhau

Chúng tôi tìm kiếm những ứng viên:

- Có khả năng chuyển hóa yêu cầu thành thiết kế hệ thống rõ ràng, không chỉ dừng ở việc ghi nhận thông tin
- Chủ động trong việc phân tích và xây dựng flow thay vì chỉ theo dõi tiến độ
- Có kinh nghiệm thực tế trong việc thiết kế hệ thốnproeg và xây dựng flowchart
- Có khả năng làm việc trực tiếp với team phát triển, đưa ra định hướng rõ ràng thay vì chỉ truyền đạt yêu cầu
- Có kinh nghiệm làm việc trong môi trường SI (System Integration) với nhiều dự án thực tế
- Có tư duy giải quyết vấn đề và đề xuất giải pháp thay vì chỉ báo cáo

Lưu ý

Khi ứng tuyển, vui lòng đính kèm flowchart hệ thống hoặc sơ đồ module của dự án bạn đã trực tiếp tham gia hoặc dẫn dắt
benefits:
- Review lương: 1 lần/năm dựa trên hiệu quả công việc
- Nghỉ các ngày Lễ, Tết theo quy định.
- Chế độ bảo hiểm đầy đủ, phép năm, lương tháng 13 theo quy định của nhà nước.
- Giờ làm việc: Thứ 2 đến thứ 6 từ 8h00 - 18h00 (nghỉ trưa 1 tiếng)
- Địa chỉ làm việc: Tòa nhà The Sun Avenue, 28 Mai Chí Thọ, phường Bình Trưng, Thành phố Hồ Chí Minh.

title: Senior Data Analyst (SQL, Python, BI, Google BigQuery)
reasons:
- User-first mindset, solving real needs with impact
- Data-driven culture, decisions backed by insights
- Safe space to innovate, fail fast and grow faster
jobDescription:
About GHN

Giao Hang Nhanh (GHN) is one of Vietnam's leading logistics enterprises, confidently providing superior services: "SMARTER, FASTER, MORE COST-EFFECTIVE." We support millions of businesses in optimizing their operations and create thousands of jobs for the Vietnamese people. Established with the mission to revolutionize the logistics industry, GHN continuously applies advanced technological solutions to streamline operational processes and enhance delivery efficiency.

Why Join GHN?

This is a pivotal opportunity to join a rapidly growing e-commerce delivery leader in Vietnam (expected YoY growth >30%). You will be part of a team that embraces cutting-edge technologies and data-driven innovation to solve real-world problems. We offer a dynamic environment where you can leverage your expertise to optimize operations alongside a team of 300 proficient middle managers.

About the Data & AI Team

At GHN, our highly motivated Data & AI team is dedicated to establishing GHN as the fastest, most reliable, and convenient delivery service in Vietnam. We aim to make data capability a core business driver for operational efficiency, scalability, and customer trust.

Job Summary

We are seeking a critical-thinking Data Analyst to join our team. This role is essential in defining key business metrics, monitoring product performance, and identifying risk factors such as fraud. You will work closely with Data Platform, Product, and Operations teams to interpret complex data into actionable insights, helping GHN maintain its competitive advantage in the e-commerce logistics sector.

Key Responsibilities

- Data Metrics & Reporting: Define key business metrics and build dashboards using visualization tools to track product performance and cross-functional objectives.
- Analysis & Insights: Perform deep-dive analysis on user behaviors, product performance, and pain points. Apply statistical techniques and domain knowledge to provide actionable recommendations for product and solution development.
- Risk & Fraud Monitoring: Monitor and identify abnormal user activities, including fake accounts, promotion abuse, and driver misbehaviors. Collaborate with Risk Strategy & Ops teams to track the effectiveness of rules and policies.
- Cross-Functional Collaboration: Work closely with the Data Platform team to ensure data accuracy and quality. Partner with Software Engineers and Product teams to validate the impact of solutions (coverage, false positives, drop-off rates) and adapt to changing conditions.
requirements:
Experience:

- Minimum 2 years of experience as a Data Analyst.
- Experience working directly with software engineers and cross-functional teams; background in e-wallet, e-commerce, or technical products is a strong plus.

Skills:

- Strong command of SQL (e.g., Google BigQuery) and Python for data analysis.
- Experience with BI tools (e.g., Looker Studio) and big data computation engines (e.g., Spark) is preferred.
- Familiarity with data orchestration tools like Airflow is a plus.
- Ability to think critically, analyze problems with strong attention to detail, and distill insights to meet business needs.
- Excellent organizational and communication skills, with the ability to manage multiple tasks in a fast-paced environment.
benefits:
- 13th-month salary, performance bonuses, and KPI bonuses
- Health insurance, Social insurance, and Unemployment insurance
- Medical insurance
- Annual health checkup
- Annual salary reviews
- Annual team building/company trip
- Ongoing internal and external training opportunities.

title: Application Engineer (NV triển khai phần mềm/SQL)
reasons:
- We CARE about you and always put FAIRNESS first
- Flexible & open international working environment
- Chance to work onsite with the team
jobDescription:
WE ARE LOOKING FOR A PERSON, WHO WILL​​:​​

CodeIT is building a strong application engineering team to support business expansion in Vietnam and ASEAN. This role focuses on delivering customer solutions using low-code platforms and ensuring high system performance and customer satisfaction.

Design and configure solutions using low-code platforms:

- CodeIT Enterprise (Windows-based applications)
- Kalipso Studio (Android-based applications)

- Translate business requirements into system configuration, including workflows, business logic, and UI behavior.
- Perform root cause analysis (RCA) and functional analysis (Input / Output / Business Logic) to troubleshoot system issues.
- Act as main contact point for post go-live support, handling tickets end-to-end:Issue → RCA → Solution → Communication → Closure
- Ensure clear and professional communication with customers via email, calls, and meetings.
- Maintain and update User Guides and documentation to reflect system behavior and business flow.
- Propose improvements to system configuration, workflows, and processes based on real issues and customer needs.
- Support deployment, testing, and system validation in coordination with R&D teams.
- Support system integration with devices such as PLC, scanner, printer, scale, and PDA (Android).
- Assist Sales team in site survey, requirement collection, and technical proposal when required.
requirements:
REQUIRED SKILLS:

- At least 3 years of experience as a Software Application Engineer/System Support/System Admin/Technical Support/Configuration Engineer
- Experience in customer support / application support, and possessing a strong customer-centric mindset.
- Experience with low-code / no-code platforms or system configuration
- Graduated in IT, Software Engineering, Automation, or related fields
- Good command of English, able to communicate with customers via email and meetings
- Understanding of Windows-based applications and business workflows
- Basic knowledge of MS SQL Server (query, stored procedures, data analysis)
- Basic knowledge of version control (Git)
- Strong analytical thinking and problem-solving skills
- Ability to perform RCA and troubleshoot common system issues independently
- Proactive, responsible, and able to work independently
- Willingness to travel when required
- Familiar with MS Excel, Word, and PowerPoint
- Ms. Excel, Ms. Word & Ms. Power Point.

Plus skills:

- Experience with Low-code/no-code platform
- Knowledge of WMS / Traceability / Manufacturing systems
- Basic knowledge of PLC programming and I/O devices
- UI/UX awareness for designing user-friendly applications (Windows & Android)
- Familiar with MS Visio, MS Project
benefits:
Attractive Benefits:

- 13th-month salary bonus provided to all staff members.
- Comprehensive healthcare insurance package for you and your dependents.
- Annual health check-up included.
- 12 days of annual leave per year, with the opportunity for 1 additional day per year, up to a maximum of 18 days. Additionally, 3 special Restaff holidays are granted on December 24th, 25th, and 26th.
- Hybrid working model allowing for 1 day per week of remote work.
- English-speaking working environment.
- Overseas business trip opportunities available.
- Sponsorship and encouragement for staff members to pursue further education through coverage of tuition fees and examination costs.
- Product-oriented approach with an agile project management style, offering a dynamic work environment and the chance to gain expertise in the latest technologies.
- Regular gathering parties and team-building activities.
- Complimentary coffee (including cappuccino, cafe latte, latte macchiato, etc.), milk, and juice.
- Working hours from 9 am to 6 pm, Monday to Friday, with a one-hour lunch break and a thirty-minute break in the afternoon.
- Annual Performance Appraisal opportunities
- English communication skills training provided.
- And much more!

benefits:

- Môi trường làm việc chuyên nghiệp – công nghệ cao: Làm việc trong Tập đoàn tiên phong về giải pháp định danh, bảo mật, thẻ thông minh; cơ hội tiếp cận các dự án lớn với Chính phủ, Ngân hàng và các Doanh nghiệp.
- Văn hóa doanh nghiệp gắn kết: Du lịch, nghỉ mát, teambuilding, hoạt động nội bộ và các CLB thể thao đa dạng.
- Thưởng & phúc lợi hấp dẫn: Thưởng Lễ, Tết và các Chế độ phúc lợi khác theo chính sách của Công ty.

title: Mid/Senior Fullstack Engineer (Python)
reasons:
- A leading Swiss product company
- An attractive compensation and benefit package
- A strong culture of growth, wellbeing and balance
jobDescription:
Welcome to SMG Vietnam!

SMG Swiss Marketplace Group simplifies lives with innovative online marketplaces in Automotive, Real Estate, General Marketplaces, and Finance & Insurance. As SMG’s innovation hub, SMG Vietnam develops cutting-edge solutions in a collaborative, empowering environment. Recognized among the 2023 Asia & Vietnam Best Workplaces, we attract top digital talent to create exceptional user experiences for Switzerland. Guided by our core values—Better Together, Aim High, and Act Responsibly—we drive innovation and meaningful change.

This job refers to our Real Estate brands, Homegate and Immoscout24, the largest real estate portals in Switzerland, with more than 15 million visits per month and more than 100,000 listings. We provide all users looking for a property with a transparent overview of the entire range of listings without them having to tediously visit different platforms. In addition to great products such as the mortgage or price calculator, we also offer editorial articles on topics such as housing and financing.

We are looking for a Mid/Senior Full-stack engineer (Python) to help us build the future of the Swiss real estate market by contributing to our cutting-edge, cloud-based technology stack. The platform's core function is to digitally connect tenants with landlords and property managers, streamlining the entire process from initial listings and managing viewing appointments all the way through to the submission of digital applications. Your work will contribute to making the rental process more efficient for all parties involved.

You will get to collaborate and access the wealth of knowledge and experience from a community of amazing engineers who come from all parts of the globe and are ready to share their expertise and aid you in your path to fulfilling your potential.

Join our dynamic team, located in six countries (Switzerland, Serbia, Vietnam, France, Germany, and India), where creativity thrives. Together, we tackle challenges, celebrate successes, and keep learning and growing.

Our tech stack

- Our frontend services utilize a variety of technologies, including Vue.js and React, with Typescript as the language of choice. These services consist of a mix of client-side, server-side, pre-rendered, and hybrid web apps. Additionally, some services leverage Django templates for the frontend, often mixed with React written in Typescript.
- Our backend architecture utilizes a combination of technologies. We have services built with Node.js and Typescript, following a serverless and microservices pattern in AWS, leveraging services like Lambda, DynamoDB, SQS, SNS, and S3. Additionally, we have services built with Python and the Django Framework, running as a modularized monolithic architecture in Docker containers on on-premise servers.
- Our monitoring is done mainly through Datadog and Sentry.
- Our codebase and services are documented using Backstage.

Your mission

- You will design, implement, test, and deliver new features that bring value to our users.
- You will encourage knowledge sharing and drive technical discussions within the team.
- You will translate high-level ideas and requirements into practical solutions.
- You will own your own services and be responsible end-to-end for everything from development and testing to delivery and monitoring.
- You will collaborate with other engineering teams as well as your existing team to ensure the stability of our microservices architecture.
- You will challenge the status quo and continuously aim to improve the architecture, code, and tools to ensure the delivery of high-quality software.

Your responsibilities will evolve as we grow.
requirements:
What will you bring to the ride?

- You are fluent in English, with written and verbal communication.
- You've got 3+ years of experience in web development, building user-facing products with end-to-end ownership across multiple layers of the stack.
- You've got 2+ years of experience with Python for backend development.
- You are proficient in working with databases.
- You are a creative, adaptable, and problem-solving individual who thrives in collaborative environments.
- You have a positive attitude and are a team player.
- You are open to change and able to propose solutions.

It would be a big plus if you also have some of these:

- You have prior working experience with Django framework or similar.
- You have prior working experience with frontend frameworks like React or similar.
- You have prior working experience with JavaScript/Typescript and Node.js.
- You have prior working experience with APIs and microservices.
- You have prior working experience with cloud service providers like AWS, Microsoft Azure, or Google Cloud.
benefits:
- Purposeful & Impactful Careers: Be part of SMG Swiss Marketplace Group, Switzerland’s most relevant online marketplace, promoting sustainable consumption, contributing to a greener society...
- Attractive Compensation: Top salary, Full pay during probation, 13th-month bonus, Annual profit growth share plan, Commuting allowance…
- Generous Benefits: 21+ annual paid days off, 10 paid days for sick leave, Full Social insurance contributions plus Premium private insurances for you and your family…
- Strong Learning & Development: Working with large scalable systems, Modern technical stacks, Transparent career paths, 24 days for learning, Personalized development plans, Yearly education budgets, Hackathons, LinkedIn learning…
- Fair Recognition & Evaluation: Clear OKRs, Regular performance check-ins, Annual performance cycle with 360-degree feedback mechanism, Promotion opportunities for all…
- Holistic Wellbeing & Balance: Annual health check-ups, Flexible hours, 40-hour work week with manageable workload, Diverse team bonding & wellness activities, Trips to Switzerland & Europe…
- Modern Work Environment: Inclusive & innovative culture, Hybrid working model with additional 12 remote weeks per year, Top-tier equipment, Best-in-kind AI assistants…
- Supportive Onboarding: Comprehensive assistance to help you settle in…

APPLY NOW, SO A GREAT CAREER OPPORTUNITY WON'T BE MISSED!

title: Middle/Senior Front-End Developer (Rotating Shift)
jobDescription:
We are looking for a talented and experienced Front-end Developer to join our team. The ideal candidate will have extensive experience in SAP UI5 (or modern frameworks like React, Angular, or Vue.js) and be responsible for leading the development of high-quality user interfaces. As this role involves working directly with our global clients, the successful candidate must have strong English communication skills and be able to participate in a rotating shift schedule that includes US timezones.

Responsibilities

- Architect & Develop: Lead the hands-on development of high-quality, scalable, and maintainable user interfaces, primarily using SAP UI5.
- Technical Leadership: Drive front-end technical architecture, establish and champion best practices, and maintain high coding standards through code reviews and mentorship.
- Global Client Support: Provide direct technical support and communicate effectively with global clients in English, participating in a rotating shift schedule (including US-timezone night shifts) to ensure uninterrupted service.
- Collaboration: Work closely with Product Managers, Business Analysts, and the Backend Team to translate product requirements and design mockups into fully-functioning features.
- Mentorship: Guide and mentor other developers, fostering a culture of technical excellence and continuous learning within the team.
- Problem Solving: Thrive in a dynamic environment, making quick and well-informed decisions to navigate tight schedules and technical challenges.
- End-to-End Ownership: Take ownership of the entire front-end development lifecycle, from initial concept and design collaboration to deployment and performance optimization.
requirements:
- Primary Skill: Extensive, hands-on experience as a Senior Developer using SAP UI5. This must include building complex custom applications, extending standard Fiori apps, and a deep understanding of Fiori design principles to create responsive and accessible enterprise-grade layouts.
- Alternative Path: We strongly encourage applications from senior developers with deep expertise in modern frameworks (React, Angular, or Vue.js) who possess a strong passion and proven ability to quickly master new technologies like SAP UI5.
- Web Fundamentals: Proficiency in browser-based debugging and the use of tools for application performance testing and optimization.
- Development Ecosystem: Mastery of Git, familiarity with project management tools like Jira, and experience working with RESTful APIs.
- Design Collaboration: Experience translating designs from tools like Figma, PSD, etc., into pixel-perfect code.
- Language & Communication: Fluency in English (written and verbal) is required to effectively support and collaborate directly with international clients.
- Shift Flexibility: Willingness and flexibility to work rotating shifts, including night shifts.
- Personal Attributes: A fast learner who is detail-oriented and highly organized. Proven ability to manage multiple priorities and deadlines in a fast-paced environment. A genuine passion for technology and for creating best-in-class user experiences.
benefits:

- Competitive salary (+13-month salary include)
- Health insurance, social insurance according to the government regulations

Job Description

Our HCM is an enterprise HR platform currently in active operation and continuous expansion. The system covers Core HR, Attendance, Payroll, Advance HR, Employee Self-Service (ESS), HR Development, Workflow Automation, System Integrations, and Custom Modules for Enterprise Clients.

We are expanding the development team to build new features while maintaining and enhancing existing modules, working closely with both local and international teams. You will be responsible for building high-performance services in Go, stuning frontend and UX/UI in React with TypeScript, maintaining and modernizing core logic in C#/.NET and SQL. As a key member of a polyglot environment, you will bridge the gap between our high-concurrency modern microservices and our robust foundation backend, ensuring a seamless experience for our users.

Key Responsibilities

- Develop new features and enhance existing functionalities across Core HR, Attendance, Payroll, Advance HR, Employee Self-Service (ESS), HR Development, Workflow Automation, System Integrations
- Maintain and refactor existing code to improve performance, scalability, and maintainability
- Frontend Excellence: Design and implement scalable, reusable components using React and TypeScript, ensuring strict type safety and optimal bundle performance.
- High-Performance Backend: Develop and maintain mission-critical microservices using Go, focusing on high concurrency, low latency, and clean API design (REST/gRPC).
- Backend foundation transformation (optional): Support and refactor existing business logic within our C#/.NET ecosystem, transitioning legacy services toward modern architectures where necessary.
- Database Design: Write complex, optimized SQL queries and manage schema migrations. You should understand indexing, execution plans, and how to resolve locking issues.
- System Ownership: Take end-to-end ownership of features—from database schema design to frontend deployment and observability (monitoring/logging).
- Participate in technical design and solution discussions
- Work closely with Business Analysts to clarify requirements and ensure correct implementation
- Perform code reviews and contribute to code quality standards

- Investigate and fix production issues when required
